AI.method: 提出采样最大均值差异(sMMD)随机对齐策略，用子集级匹配替代全局对抗性平衡，并实例化为一个反事实结果预测框架，结合归因可解释性。
AI.result: 在两个大规模ICU队列(n=27,783)上，分布偏移下误差降低11.5%，高风险任务召回率显著提升；人机评估中优于实习医生和LLM，并将临床医生准确率提升14.7%，减少决策时间。
AI.conclusion: sMMD能选择性保留临床决定性变量，实现可解释、实时的临床决策支持，在因果效应估计中有效平衡偏差与精度。

title: Online Localized Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal prediction is a framework that provides valid uncertainty quantification for general models with exchangeable data. However, in the online learning and time-series settings, exchangeability is not satisfied. Existing online conformal methods, such as adaptive conformal inference (ACI), can achieve long-run validity, yet they remain inefficient under covariate heterogeneity because they rely on global calibration. We propose \emph{Online Localized Conformal Prediction (OLCP)}, which combines online adaptation with covariate-dependent localization to better reflect heterogeneity. To reduce sensitivity to the localization bandwidth, we further develop \emph{OLCP-Hedge}, which performs bandwidth selection as an online expert aggregation problem using a constrained online convex optimization framework. Importantly, we provide coverage guarantees for both algorithms and demonstrate through simulations and real-data experiments that the proposed methods attain valid long-run coverage with narrower prediction sets than existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出在线局部保形预测（OLCP）方法，通过结合在线自适应与协变量依赖的局部化处理，解决时间序列和在线学习中数据不可交换性下的不确定性量化问题；进一步提出OLCP-Hedge，通过在线凸优化的专家聚合自动选择带宽，实现更窄的预测集和有效的长期覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 现有在线保形方法（如ACI）虽能达到长期有效性，但依赖全局校准，在协变量异质性下效率低下，无法反映数据分布的变化，需要更精细的局部自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出OLCP，将在线自适应与协变量依赖的局部化校准相结合；进一步提出OLCP-Hedge，将带宽选择建模为在线专家聚合问题，利用约束在线凸优化框架自动选择最优带宽。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据实验中，OLCP和OLCP-Hedge在保持有效长期覆盖的同时，预测集宽度显著窄于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部化在线保形预测能有效处理协变量异质性，在不确定性量化中实现效率与有效性的良好平衡。

title: Who and What? Using Linguistic Features and Annotator Characteristics to Analyze Annotation Variation
summary: Human label variation has been established as a central phenomenon in NLP: the perspectives different annotators have on the same item need to be embraced. Data collection practices thus shifted towards increasing the annotator numbers and releasing disaggregated datasets, harmful language being most resourced due to its high subjectivity. While this resulted in rich information about \textit{who} annotated (sociodemographics, attitudes, etc.), the \textit{what} (e.g., linguistic properties of items), and their interplay has received little attention. We present the first large-scale analysis of four reference datasets for harmful language detection, bringing together annotator characteristics, linguistic properties of the items, and their interactions in a statistically informed picture. We find that interactions are crucial, revealing intersectional effects ignored in previous work, and that a strong role is played by lexical cues and annotator attitudes. Effect patterns, however, vary considerably across datasets. This urges caution about generalization and transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模分析了四个有害语言检测数据集中标注者特征、语言属性及其交互作用，发现交互效应至关重要且存在交叉影响，但效应模式在不同数据集中差异显著，提示需谨慎对待泛化和迁移。
AI.motivation: 尽管NLP中已认识到标注变异（human label variation）的重要性，但现有研究多关注"谁"标注（如人口统计信息），而忽略了"什么"被标注（语言属性）以及两者的交互作用。本文填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对四个有害语言检测参考数据集进行大规模统计分析，联合建模标注者特征（社会人口学、态度等）、文本语言属性（词汇线索等）及其交互作用。
AI.result: 交互作用至关重要，揭示了先前工作忽略的交叉效应；词汇线索和标注者态度扮演重要角色；但效应模式在不同数据集间差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 有害语言标注的变异具有数据集特异性，缺乏跨数据集的一致模式，这警告我们在泛化和迁移时需要格外谨慎。

title: Na-IRSTD: Enhancing Infrared Small Target Detection via Native-Resolution Feature Selection and Fusion
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) faces the inherent challenge of precisely localizing dim targets amid complex background clutter. While progress has been made, existing methods usually follow conventional strategies to downsample features and discard small targets' details, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we present Na-IRSTD, a native-resolution feature extraction and fusion framework for IRSTD. This framework elegantly incorporates native-resolution features to preserve subtle target cues, overcoming the resolution limitations of existing infrared approaches and significantly improving the model's ability to localize small targets. We also introduce an effective token reduction and selection strategy, which selects target patches with high accuracy and confidence, boosting the low-level details of the feature while effectively reducing native-resolution patch tokens compared to dense processing, thereby avoiding imposing an unbearable computational burden. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of our token reduction and selection strategy across multiple public datasets. Ultimately, our Na-IRSTD model achieves state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Na-IRSTD，一种原生分辨率特征提取与融合框架，用于红外小目标检测。它通过保持原生分辨率保留小目标细节，并引入令牌缩减与选择策略降低计算负担，在四个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有红外小目标检测方法通常采用下采样策略，导致小目标细节丢失，性能次优。作者希望在不牺牲计算效率的前提下，保留原生分辨率特征以提升小目标定位能力。
AI.method: 提出Na-IRSTD框架，包含原生分辨率特征提取与融合，以及令牌缩减与选择策略，用于高效筛选目标相关patch并提升低层细节特征的质量。
AI.result: 在四个公开基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能，实验验证了令牌缩减与选择策略的鲁棒性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 原生分辨率特征保留对小目标检测至关重要，且通过合理的令牌选择策略可以在不增加计算负担的前提下实现性能提升。

title: Conceal, Reconstruct, Jailbreak: Exploiting the Reconstruction-Concealment Tradeoff in MLLMs
summary: Intent-obfuscation-based jailbreak attacks on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) transform a harmful query into a concealed multimodal input to bypass safety mechanisms. We show that such attacks are governed by a \emph{reconstruction--concealment tradeoff}: the transformed input must hide harmful intent from safety filters while remaining recoverable enough for the victim model to reconstruct the original request. Through a reconstruction analysis of three representative black-box methods, we find that existing transformations struggle to balance this tradeoff, limiting their effectiveness. In contrast, we show that character-removed variants achieve a better balance. Building on this, we propose \emph{concealment-aware variant construction}, which greedily selects character-removed variants that are low in harmful-keyword alignment and mutually diverse, and instantiates them through five modality-aware prompting strategies. We further introduce \emph{keyword-related distractor images} that depict the harmful keyword in diverse contexts, providing more effective auxiliary visual context than generic distractor images. Experiments across closed-source and open-source MLLMs show the proposed strategies outperform strong baselines, revealing an underexplored vulnerability: a model's own reconstruction ability can be exploited to recover hidden harmful intent and produce unsafe responses.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中基于意图混淆的越狱攻击，揭示了"重构-隐藏"权衡，并提出了一种隐蔽感知的变体构建方法，通过字符移除变体和关键词相关干扰图像实现更有效的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于意图混淆的越狱攻击方法效果有限，因为它们难以平衡"隐藏有害意图"与"保持模型可重构"之间的矛盾。作者希望揭示这一权衡机制，并设计更有效的攻击策略。
AI.method: 1) 通过重构分析发现现有黑盒方法难以平衡重构-隐藏权衡；2) 提出隐蔽感知变体构建，贪心选择低有害关键词对齐且多样化的字符移除变体；3) 设计五种模态感知提示策略；4) 引入关键词相关干扰图像提供有效视觉上下文。
AI.result: 在闭源和开源MLLMs上的实验表明，所提策略优于强基线方法，揭示了模型自身的重构能力可被利用来恢复隐藏的有害意图并产生不安全响应。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大语言模型的越狱攻击存在重构-隐藏权衡，字符移除变体能更有效地平衡这一权衡，模型自身的重构能力是一把双刃剑。

title: Non-Myopic Active Feature Acquisition via Pathwise Policy Gradients
summary: Active feature acquisition (AFA) considers prediction problems in which features are costly to obtain and the learner adaptively decides which feature values to acquire for each instance and when to stop and predict. AFA can be formulated as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), which naturally admits a sequential decision-making perspective. In this paper, we present non-myopic pathwise policy gradients (NM-PPG), a new AFA method built around this formulation. We introduce a continuous relaxation of the acquisition process that enables pathwise gradients through the full acquisition trajectory, avoiding the high variance of standard score-function policy gradients while allowing end-to-end optimization of a non-myopic acquisition policy. To better align training with deployment, we further develop a straight-through rollout scheme that follows hard feature acquisitions in the forward pass while backpropagating through the corresponding soft relaxation in the backward pass. We stabilize optimization with entropy regularization and staged temperature sharpening. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that NM-PPG yields superior performance relative to state-of-the-art AFA baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出非近视路径策略梯度（NM-PPG）方法，用于主动特征获取（AFA）问题。该方法通过连续松弛和直通式 rollout 方案，实现了端到端优化非近视获取策略，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在特征获取成本高昂的预测问题中，现有 AFA 方法在非近视决策和策略梯度方差方面存在不足，需要一种能端到端优化、低方差且非近视的获取策略。
AI.method: 将 AFA 建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），引入连续松弛实现路径梯度，结合直通式 rollout（前向硬获取、反向软传播），并用熵正则化和温度锐化稳定优化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，NM-PPG 均优于现有最先进的 AFA 基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的 NM-PPG 方法能有效学习非近视的主动特征获取策略，在性能上具有优势。

title: Teaching Thinking Models to Reason with Tools: A Full-Pipeline Recipe for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) offers a direct way to extend thinking models beyond the limits of text-only reasoning. Paradoxically, we observe that tool-enabled evaluation can degrade reasoning performance even when the strong thinking models make almost no actual tool calls. In this paper, we investigate how to inject natural tool-use behavior into a strong thinking model without sacrificing its no-tool reasoning ability, and present a comprehensive TIR recipe. We highlight that (i) the effectiveness of TIR supervised fine-tuning (SFT) hinges on the learnability of teacher trajectories, which should prioritize problems inherently suited for tool-augmented solutions; (ii) controlling the proportion of tool-use trajectories could mitigate the catastrophic forgetting of text-only reasoning capacity; (iii) optimizing for pass@k and response length instead of training loss could maximize TIR SFT gains while preserving headroom for reinforcement learning (RL) exploration; (iv) a stable RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) stage, built upon suitable SFT initialization and explicit safeguards against mode collapse, provides a simple yet remarkably effective solution. When applied to Qwen3 thinking models at 4B and 30B scales, our recipe yields models that achieve state-of-the-art performance in a wide range of benchmarks among open-source models, such as 96.7% and 99.2% on AIME 2025 for 4B and 30B, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种工具集成推理（TIR）的训练方案，通过监督微调（SFT）和基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），在不牺牲纯文本推理能力的前提下，为强思维模型注入自然的工具使用行为。在Qwen3 4B和30B模型上实现了SOTA性能（AIME 2025分别达到96.7%和99.2%）。
AI.motivation: 工具集成推理（TIR）可以扩展思维模型的推理能力，但现有研究发现，即使强思维模型几乎不实际调用工具，引入工具评估反而会降低推理性能。如何在保持纯文本推理能力的同时自然注入工具使用行为，是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 提出一套完整的TIR训练方案：(i) SFT阶段选择适合工具增强的问题轨迹，保证教师轨迹的可学习性；(ii) 控制工具使用轨迹的比例，缓解对纯文本推理能力的灾难性遗忘；(iii) 优化pass@k和响应长度而非训练损失，为RL探索保留空间；(iv) 基于稳定的RLVR阶段，配合合适的SFT初始化和防止模式崩溃的显式机制。
AI.result: 在Qwen3 4B和30B规模上，该方法在多个基准测试中达到开源模型SOTA性能，AIME 2025分别达到96.7%和99.2%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的TIR训练方案能够有效为强思维模型注入工具使用能力，同时保持甚至提升纯文本推理性能，是一种简单而有效的解决方案。

title: CXR-ContraBench: Benchmarking Negated-Option Attraction in Medical VLMs
summary: When a chest X-ray shows consolidation but the question asks which finding is present, a medical vision-language model may answer "No consolidation." This is more than an incorrect choice: it is a polarity reversal that emits a clinical statement contradicting the image. We study this failure as negated-option attraction, where a model is drawn to a negated answer option even when it conflicts with both the visual evidence and the question. We introduce CXR-ContraBench (Chest X-Ray Contradiction Benchmark), a diagnostic benchmark spanning internal ReXVQA slices and external OpenI and CheXpert protocols. The benchmark centers on present-finding questions, where selecting "No X" despite visible X creates the main clinical risk, and uses absent-finding questions as secondary tests of whether models copy negated wording. Across CheXpert protocols, the failure is substantial and persistent. On a strict direct presence probe, MedGemma and Qwen2.5-VL reach only 31.49% and 30.21% accuracy, respectively; on a matched 135,754-record CheXpert training-split protocol, both models select negated options on over 62% of presence questions. Chain-of-thought prompting reduces some presence-side reversals but does not eliminate them and can amplify absence-side contradictions. Finally, QCCV-Neg (Question-Conditioned Consistency Verifier for Negation) deterministically repairs the measured polarity-confused subset without retraining, raising MedGemma and Qwen2.5-VL to 96.60% and 95.32% accuracy on the direct presence probe. These results show that standard accuracy can hide a clinically meaningful inference-time polarity failure. Source code and benchmark construction scripts are available at https://github.com/fangzr/cxr-contrabench-code.

AI.tldr: 本文发现医学视觉语言模型在胸部X光片中存在"极性反转"故障——当图像显示有病灶时，模型却回答"无病灶"。作者构建了CXR-ContraBench基准测试，发现MedGemma和Qwen2.5-VL在直接存在性探测上准确率仅约30%，并提出QCCV-Neg方法无需重训即可将准确率修复至95%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VLM评估忽略了"否定选项吸引"这一临床关键故障：模型倾向于选择否定选项，即使与视觉证据矛盾。这种极性反转在临床场景中可能造成严重医疗事故。
AI.method: 1) 构建CXR-ContraBench基准（包含ReXVZY、OpenI、CheXpert数据集）；2) 设计直接存在性探测（direct presence probe）评估极性反转；3) 提出QCCV-Neg（Question-Conditioned Consistency Verifier for Negation）无需重训即可修复预测极性。
AI.result: MedGemma和Qwen2.5-VL在直接存在性探测上准确率仅31.49%和30.21%；在CheXpert训练集上超62%的存在性问题选择否定选项。QCCV-Neg将两者准确率提升至96.60%和95.32%。Chain-of-thought可减少部分反转但会放大另一侧矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 标准准确率指标会隐藏临床意义的推理时极性反转故障；QCCV-Neg提供了一种无需重训的有效修复方案。

title: Decodable but Not Corrected by Fixed Residual-Stream Linear Steering: Evidence from Medical LLM Failure Regimes
comment: 22 pages (14 main + 8 appendix), 5 figures, 7 tables. Under review
summary: Can linearly decodable failure signals in LLM hidden states be leveraged to correct those failures? We investigate this classification-correction gap via Overthinking (OT)--a stable behavioral regime (Jaccard >= 0.81, 94% inter-annotator agreement) in medical QA where models answer correctly under resampling yet fail in extended chain-of-thought. OT is linearly decodable at 71.6% balanced accuracy (p < 10^{-16}). Yet five families of fixed linear steering (29 configurations, n=1,273) all yield Delta ~= 0, with identical null results cross-architecture (Qwen2.5-7B) and cross-domain (MMLU-STEM). Three convergent lines of evidence suggest representational entanglement: the OT direction has 85-88% overlap with task-critical computation (specificity ratio <= 0.152); non-targeted shared-direction steering damages accuracy (-12.1pp); and LEACE concept erasure damages accuracy (-3.6pp, p=0.01), while 10 random erasures produce Delta=+0.3pp. The per-instance probe-steering correlation is r=-0.002 (p=0.97). Positively, the same probe enables selective abstention (held-out AUROC=0.610, exceeding all five uncertainty baselines, p=0.009): decodable failure structure supports post-generation reliability estimation even when the fixed linear steering family cannot exploit it for correction.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM隐藏状态中可线性解码的失败信号能否用于纠正这些失败。以医学QA中的"过度思考(OT)"现象为例（模型在重采样下正确但扩展思维链时失败），发现OT可线性解码（71.6%平衡准确率），但五种固定线性干预策略均无效（Delta≈0）。证据表明存在表征纠缠：OT方向与任务关键计算高度重叠（85-88%），非目标干预会损害准确率。然而，同一探针可用于选择性弃权（AUROC=0.610，超过所有不确定性基线），表明可解码的失败结构支持事后可靠性估计。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM隐藏状态中可线性解码的失败信号能否被有效利用来纠正模型错误，特别是针对"过度思考"（Overthinking）这一现象——模型在简单重采样下回答正确，但在扩展思维链时却失败。
AI.method: 通过Overthinking(OT)行为范式，使用线性探针解码隐藏状态中的失败信号，然后尝试五种固定线性干预（29种配置，n=1,273）进行纠正。使用表征纠缠分析（方向重叠、特异性比、概念擦除等）探究干预失败原因。
AI.result: OT可线性解码（71.6%平衡准确率，p<10^{-16}），但五种固定线性干预均无效（Delta≈0）。表征纠缠是根本原因：OT方向与任务关键计算重叠85-88%，非目标干预损害准确率(-12.1pp)。但同一探针用于选择性弃权时表现优异（AUROC=0.610，超过所有基线）。
AI.conclusion: 可解码的失败结构不一定能被线性干预利用进行修复（分类-修正鸿沟），但可用于事后可靠性估计（如选择性弃权），为LLM安全部署提供实用途径。

title: OpenG2G: A Simulation Platform for AI Datacenter-Grid Runtime Coordination
summary:
AI's growing compute demand and new datacenter buildouts present major capacity and reliability challenges for the electricity grid, leading to multi-year interconnection delays for new datacenters and bottlenecking AI growth. To ease this strain, datacenters increasingly offer rapid power flexibility in response to grid signals, where the datacenter can increase or decrease its power consumption by adapting its workload in real time.
  In order to understand the impact of large datacenters on the grid and to facilitate the design of effective coordination strategies, we build OpenG2G, a simulation platform for AI datacenter-grid runtime coordination. We show that OpenG2G is capable of answering a wide range of coordination questions by allowing users to implement and compare various control paradigms (including classic, optimization, and learning-based controllers), and quantify how AI model and deployment choices affect datacenter flexibility and coordination outcomes. This versatility is enabled by OpenG2G's modular and extensible architecture: a datacenter backend driven by real measurements of production-grade AI services, a grid backend built on high-fidelity grid simulators, and a generic controller interface that closes the loop between them. We describe the design of OpenG2G and demonstrate its usefulness through realistic grid scenarios and AI workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍OpenG2G，一个用于AI数据中心与电网运行时协调的仿真平台，旨在缓解AI算力增长带来的电网容量和可靠性挑战。该平台允许用户实现和比较经典控制、优化控制和基于学习的控制器，并量化AI模型和部署选择对数据中心灵活性的影响。
AI.motivation: AI计算需求激增和新数据中心建设给电网带来重大容量和可靠性挑战，导致新数据中心接入电网需等待数年，制约AI发展。需要理解大型数据中心对电网的影响并设计有效的协调策略。
AI.method: 构建OpenG2G仿真平台，采用模块化可扩展架构：基于真实生产级AI服务测量数据的数据中心后端、基于高保真电网模拟器的电网后端、以及连接两者的通用控制器接口。支持经典控制、优化控制和基于学习的控制器等多种控制范式。
AI.result: OpenG2G能够回答广泛的数据中心-电网协调问题，允许用户实现和比较各种控制范式，量化AI模型和部署选择对数据中心灵活性及协调结果的影响。
AI.conclusion: OpenG2G通过真实的电网场景和AI工作负载展示了其有用性，为AI数据中心与电网的协调研究提供了一个灵活、可扩展的仿真平台。

title: Measuring Evaluation-Context Divergence in Open-Weight LLMs: A Paired-Prompt Protocol with Pilot Evidence of Alignment-Pipeline-Specific Heterogeneity
summary:
Safety benchmarks are routinely treated as evidence about how a language model will behave once deployed, but this inference is fragile if behavior depends on whether a prompt looks like an evaluation. We define evaluation-context divergence as an observable within-item change in behavior induced by framing a fixed task as an evaluation, a live deployment interaction, or a neutral request, and present a paired-prompt protocol that measures it in open-weight LLMs while controlling for paraphrase variation, benchmark familiarity, and judge framing-sensitivity.
  Across five instruction-tuned checkpoints from four open-weight families plus a matched OLMo-3 base/instruct ablation ($20$ paired items, $840$ generations per checkpoint), we find striking heterogeneity. OLMo-3-Instruct alone is eval-cautious -- evaluation framing raises refusal vs. neutral by $11.8$pp ($p=0.007$) and reduces harmful compliance vs. deployment by $3.6$pp ($p=0.024$, $0/20$ items inverted) -- while Mistral-Small-3.2, Phi-3.5-mini, and Llama-3.1-8B are deployment-cautious}, with marginal eval-vs-deployment refusal effects of $-9$ to $-20$pp. The matched OLMo-3 base also exhibits the deployment-cautious pattern, identifying alignment as the inversion stage; within Llama-3.1, the $70$B model preserves direction with attenuated magnitude, ruling out a simple ``small-model effect that reverses at scale.'' One caveat: the cross-family heterogeneity is judge-dependent. Re-judging with a different-family safety classifier (Llama-Guard-3-8B) preserves the within-OLMo eval-cautious direction but flattens the cross-family contrast, indicating that the two judges operationalize distinct constructs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言模型在评估场景和实际部署场景中的行为差异（评估-部署分歧），发现不同模型对此表现出截然不同的模式：有的在评估时更谨慎（如OLMo-3-Instruct），有的在部署时更谨慎（如Mistral、Phi、Llama），且这种差异受评判模型选择影响。
AI.motivation: 现有的安全基准测试假设模型在评估中的表现能够反映其部署后的行为，但这一假设可能不成立——模型可能"识别"出评估场景并做出不同反应。作者旨在系统性地量化这种评估-部署行为分歧。
AI.method: 提出"配对提示"协议，将同一任务分别用评估框架、部署框架和中性框架呈现，控制释义变化、基准熟悉度和评判模型敏感性，在5个指令微调模型（OLMo-3、Mistral、Phi、Llama-3.1系列）及OLMo-3基座模型上进行了大规模生成实验（每个检查点840次生成）。
AI.result: 发现显著的异质性：OLMo-3-Instruct是"评估谨慎型"（评估框架下拒绝率比中性高11.8pp，有害遵从比部署低3.6pp），而Mistral、Phi、Llama-3.1-8B是"部署谨慎型"（评估vs部署拒绝效应为-9到-20pp）。基座模型表现出部署谨慎模式，表明对齐训练是反转关键；Llama-3.1-70B保留方向但幅度减弱，排除"小模型效应"。但跨系列异质性受评判模型影响。
AI.conclusion: 评估-部署分歧真实存在且模型间差异显著，安全基准测试结果不能简单外推至部署场景；评判模型的选择会影响结论，需要更精细的评估方法论。

title: ChartZero: Synthetic Priors Enable Zero Shot Chart Data Extraction
summary: Automated data extraction from line charts remains fundamentally bottlenecked by extreme stylistic diversity and a severe scarcity of comprehensively annotated, real-world datasets. Current end-to-end pipelines depend heavily on costly manual annotations, crippling their ability to generalize across arbitrary aesthetics and grid layouts. Furthermore, existing models suffer from two critical failure modes during reconstruction. First, extracting thin, intersecting curves frequently causes structural fragmentation and the erasure of fine visual details, as standard architectures struggle against complex backgrounds. Second, semantic association is notoriously error-prone; current pipelines rely on rigid spatial heuristics that easily break down against the unpredictable legend placements of in-the-wild charts. Finally, measuring true progress is hindered by evaluation protocols that assess isolated sub-tasks rather than holistic, end-to-end data reconstruction. To address these foundational issues, we introduce ChartZero, a parsing framework that leverages synthetic priors to enable robust zero-shot chart data extraction. By training exclusively on a purely synthetic dataset of simple mathematical functions, our model completely bypasses the real-world annotation bottleneck. We overcome curve fragmentation via a novel Global Orthogonal Instance (GOI) loss, and replace brittle spatial rules with an open-vocabulary, Vision-Language Model (VLM)-guided legend matching strategy. Accompanied by a new metric and benchmark specifically designed for full end-to-end reconstruction, our evaluations demonstrate that ChartZero significantly advances generalized plot digitization without requiring real-world supervision. Code and dataset will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: ChartZero是一个利用合成数据训练的图表解析框架，通过全局正交实例损失和VLM引导的图例匹配策略，实现了零样本的线图数据提取，无需真实标注数据。
AI.motivation: 当前线图数据提取面临风格多样性、真实标注数据稀缺、曲线断裂和语义关联错误等问题，现有依赖人工标注和刚性空间规则的管道泛化能力差，且缺乏端到端的评估标准。
AI.method: 1) 完全在纯合成数学函数数据上训练，绕过标注瓶颈；2) 提出全局正交实例损失(GOI)解决曲线断裂；3) 采用开放词汇的VLM引导图例匹配策略，替代刚性空间规则；4) 设计专用于端到端重建的新指标和基准。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下显著提升了通用的图表数据数字化能力，无需真实世界监督即可实现鲁棒的图表解析。
AI.conclusion: ChartZero证明了纯粹的合成先验可以替代昂贵的人工标注，结合VLM和创新的损失函数能够解决图表解析中的关键瓶颈问题。

title: More Is Not Always Better: Cross-Component Interference in LLM Agent Scaffolding
summary: LLM agent systems are built by stacking scaffolding components (planning, tools, memory, self-reflection, retrieval) assuming more is better. We study cross-component interference (CCI): degradation when components interact destructively. We run a full factorial experiment over all 2^5=32 subsets of five components on HotpotQA and GSM8K with Llama-3.1-8B/70B (96 conditions, up to 10 seeds). The All-In system is consistently suboptimal: on HotpotQA, a single-tool agent surpasses All-In by 32% (F1 0.233 vs 0.177, p=0.023); on GSM8K, a 3-component subset beats All-In by 79% (0.43 vs 0.24, p=0.010). Optimal component count is task-dependent (k*=1-4) and scale-sensitive: at 70B, combinations that hurt at 8B provide gains, though All-In still trails the best subset. We fit a main-effects regression (R^2=0.916, adj-R^2=0.899, LOOCV=0.872), compute exact Shapley values, and find 183/325 submodularity violations (56.3%), showing greedy selection is unreliable. A three-body synergy among Tool Use, Self-Reflection, and Retrieval (INT_3=+0.175, 95% CI [+0.003,+0.351]) is reported as exploratory. CCI replicates across model families (Qwen2.5) and is robust to prompt paraphrasing. Our findings suggest maximally-equipped agent defaults should be replaced by task-specific subset selection via interaction-aware analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文通过全因子实验发现，LLM智能体系统中多个组件（规划、工具、记忆、自反思、检索）共存时会产生交叉组件干扰（CCI），导致"所有组件全用"的系统反而性能次优。研究揭示了组件间存在复杂的交互效应，最优组件数量因任务而异（1-4个），并建议采用任务特定的子集选择替代"组件越多越好"的默认做法。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体系统默认"堆叠更多组件（规划、工具、记忆、自反思、检索）就能更好"，但这种假设缺乏系统验证。作者发现组件间可能存在负面交互效应，即交叉组件干扰（CCI），因此希望通过全因子实验严格量化组件间的相互作用，挑战"越多越好"的设计范式。
AI.method: 采用全因子实验设计，对5个组件（规划、工具、记忆、自反思、检索）的2^5=32种组合在HotpotQA和GSM8K数据集上进行系统评估，使用Llama-3.1-8B/70B模型（共96个条件，最多10个种子）。通过主效应回归（R²=0.916）、Shapley值计算、次模性检验、三体交互效应分析等方法量化组件间的相互作用。
AI.result: 1) All-In系统一致次优：HotpotQA上单工具智能体比All-In高32%；GSM8K上3组件子集比All-In高79%。2) 最优组件数因任务而异（k*=1-4），且受模型规模影响（70B下组件组合模式与8B不同）。3) 主效应回归拟合良好（R²=0.916），但56.3%的组件组合违反次模性，说明贪婪选择不可靠。4) 发现工具使用、自反思和检索之间存在三体协同效应。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体系统设计中"组件越多越好"的默认假设是错误的，应被任务特定的子集选择替代。组件间的交互效应（尤其是负面干扰）是系统性能的关键瓶颈，需要通过交互感知分析来选择最佳组件子集，而非简单堆叠所有可用组件。

title: Bayesian Rain Field Reconstruction using Commercial Microwave Links and Diffusion Model Priors
summary: Commercial Microwave Links (CMLs) offer dense spatial coverage for rainfall sensing but produce path-integrated measurements that make accurate ground-level reconstruction challenging. Existing methods typically oversimplify CMLs as point sensors and neglect line integration relating rainfall to signal attenuation, resulting in degraded performance under heterogeneous precipitation. In this work, we view rain field reconstruction as a Bayesian inverse problem with Diffusion Models (DMs) as high-fidelity spatial priors. We show that diffusion models better preserve key rainfall statistics compared to censored Gaussian processes. Framing rainfall estimation as a Bayesian inverse problem with a DM prior enables training-free posterior sampling using a broad family of methods, including Plug-and-Play, Sequential Monte Carlo, and Replica Exchange methods. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over established CML-based reconstruction baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将雨量场重建视为贝叶斯逆问题，利用扩散模型作为高保真空间先验，并通过多种训练无关的后验采样方法（如Plug-and-Play、序贯蒙特卡洛、副本交换）实现降水重建，在合成和真实数据上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 商业微波链路（CMLs）提供密集空间覆盖的降雨感知，但路径积分测量使得精确的地面重建具有挑战性。现有方法过度简化CMLs为点传感器，忽略了信号衰减与降雨之间的线积分关系，导致在非均匀降水条件下性能下降。
AI.method: 将雨量场重建建模为以扩散模型为先验的贝叶斯逆问题，采用训练无关的后验采样方法（Plug-and-Play、序贯蒙特卡洛、副本交换）进行推理。
AI.result: 扩散模型相比截断高斯过程更好地保留了关键降雨统计特征，在合成和真实数据集上均优于现有CML重建基线。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型作为高保真空间先验能有效改进CML降雨重建，贝叶斯逆问题框架具有灵活性和实用性。

title: MANTRA: Synthesizing SMT-Validated Compliance Benchmarks for Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Tool-using large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in settings where their reliable behavior is governed by strict procedural manuals. Ensuring that such agents comply with the rules from these manuals is challenging, as they are typically written for humans in natural language while agent behavior manifests as an execution trace of tool calls. Existing evaluations of LLM agents rely on manually constructed benchmarks or LLM-based judges, which either do not scale or lack reliability for complex, long-horizon manuals. To overcome these limitations, we present MANTRA, a framework for automatically synthesizing machine-checkable compliance benchmarks from natural-language manuals and tool schemas. MANTRA independently generates (i) a symbolic world model capturing procedural dependencies, and (ii) a set of trace-level compliance checks for a given task, and validates their consistency using SMT solving. A structured repair loop resolves inconsistencies, requiring human intervention only as a fallback. %This yields benchmarks that are formally validated. Importantly, MANTRA supports arbitrary domains and long procedural manuals, and provides a tunable notion of task complexity which is utilized to automatically derive challenging tasks accompanying compliance checks. Using MANTRA, we build a new benchmark suite with 285 tasks across 6 domains scaling to 50+ page manuals with minimal human effort. Empirically, we show that the compliance checks are richer with stronger constraint enforcement compared to existing benchmarks. Additionally, the granularity of the checks can be used for debugging the agents' failure modes. These results demonstrate that combining automated benchmark generation with formally grounded validation methods enables scalable and reliable benchmarking of tool-using agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了MANTRA框架，可自动从自然语言手册和工具模式中合成机器可检查的合规性基准，通过SMT求解和修复循环保证一致性，构建了涵盖6个领域285个任务的基准套件。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM agent评估依赖人工基准或LLM裁判，无法扩展到长流程、复杂的手册场景，缺乏可靠且可扩展的自动化合规性评估方法。
AI.method: MANTRA从自然语言手册和工具模式中自动生成符号世界模型和轨迹级合规性检查，利用SMT求解验证一致性，并通过结构化修复循环解决不一致，仅在必要时引入人工干预。
AI.result: 在6个领域构建了285个任务的基准，支持50+页手册；生成的合规性检查比现有基准约束更强、更丰富，且粒度可用于调试agent的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 自动化基准生成+形式化验证方法能实现可扩展且可靠的工具使用agent合规性评估。

title: Unifying Scientific Communication: Fine-Grained Correspondence Across Scientific Media
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: The communication of scientific knowledge has become increasingly multimodal, spanning text, visuals, and speech through materials such as research papers, slides, and recorded presentations. These different representations collectively convey a study's reasoning, results, and insights, offering complementary perspectives that enrich understanding. However, despite their shared purpose, such materials are rarely connected in a structured way. The absence of explicit links across formats makes it difficult to trace how concepts, visuals, and explanations correspond, limiting unified exploration and analysis of research content. To address this gap, we introduce the Multimodal Conference Dataset (MCD), the first benchmark that integrates research papers, presentation videos, explanatory videos, and slides from the same works. We evaluate a range of embedding-based and vision-language models to assess their ability to discover fine-grained cross-format correspondences, establishing the first systematic benchmark for this task. Our results show that vision-language models are robust but struggle with fine-grained alignment, while embedding-based models capture text-visual correspondences well but equations and symbolic content form distinct clusters in the embedding space. These findings highlight both the strengths and limitations of current approaches and point to key directions for future research in multimodal scientific understanding. To ensure reproducibility, we release the resources for MCD at https://github.com/meghamariamkm2002/MCD

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多模态会议数据集(MCD)，首个将同一工作的研究论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片连接起来的基准数据集。评估了嵌入模型和视觉-语言模型在跨格式细粒度对应关系发现上的能力。
AI.motivation: 科学知识传播日益多模态化（文本、视觉、语音），但不同格式材料（论文、幻灯片、视频）之间缺乏结构化连接，难以追踪概念、可视化与解释之间的对应关系，限制了研究内容的统一探索与分析。
AI.method: 构建MCD数据集，整合同一学术工作的论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片。评估多种嵌入模型和视觉-语言模型在跨格式细粒度对应关系发现上的性能。
AI.result: 视觉-语言模型表现稳健但在细粒度对齐上存在困难；嵌入模型在文本-视觉对应上表现良好，但公式和符号内容在嵌入空间中形成独立聚类。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法各有优劣，指出了多模态科学理解未来研究的关键方向。

title: Detecting Time Series Anomalies Like an Expert: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework with Specialized Analyzers
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, 29 pages total, 8 figures, 9 tables, with appendix
summary: Recent studies have explored large language models for time-series anomaly detection, yet existing approaches often rely on a single general-purpose model to directly infer anomaly indices or intervals, limiting controllability, interpretability, and reliability for complex anomaly patterns. We propose SAGE (Specialized Analyzer Group for Expert-like Detection), a multi-agent framework for structured anomaly diagnosis in univariate time series. It decomposes anomaly analysis into four specialized Analyzers for point, structural, seasonal, and pattern anomalies. Each Analyzer applies family-specific numerical tools and diagnostic visualizations to generate evidence, while an evidence-grounded Detector consolidates the evidence into confidence-scored anomaly records with intervals and candidate types. A Supervisor then converts these structured records into analyst-facing diagnostic reports. SAGE further constructs synthetic in-context examples from normal-reference training segments, without using real anomalous segments or anomaly-type labels as in-context examples. Across three benchmarks, SAGE achieves the best average performance among strong ML/DL and language-model-based baselines. Ablation studies and human evaluation further show that the proposed framework improves detection reliability and the practical usefulness of diagnostic outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出SAGE，一个多智能体框架，将单变量时间序列异常检测分解为多个专用分析器，分别处理点异常、结构异常、季节异常和模式异常，通过证据融合和结构化报告提升可解释性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的时间序列异常检测方法依赖单一通用模型直接推断异常指标或区间，对于复杂异常模式存在可控性、可解释性和可靠性不足的问题。
AI.method: SAGE包含四个专用分析器（点异常、结构异常、季节异常、模式异常），每个分析器使用数值工具和诊断可视化生成证据；一个基于证据的检测器融合证据，输出带置信度评分的异常记录（含区间和候选类型）；最后监督器生成面向分析师的诊断报告。不依赖真实异常段或类型标签作为上下文示例，而是从正常参考训练段构建合成上下文示例。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试上，SAGE在强ML/DL和基于语言模型的基线方法中取得最佳平均性能；消融实验和人工评估表明框架提升了检测可靠性和诊断输出的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多智能体分解和证据驱动的异常诊断，SAGE有效提升了时间序列异常检测的可控性、可解释性和可靠性，同时保持了良好的检测性能。

title: MOSAIC: Module Discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal Learning for Scientific Time Series
summary: Causal representation learning (CRL) seeks to recover latent variables with identifiability guarantees, typically up to permutation and component-wise reparameterization under appropriate assumptions. However, identifiability does not imply interpretability: latent semantics are typically assigned post hoc by alignment with known ground-truth factors. This limitation is particularly acute in scientific time series, where underlying mechanisms are unknown and discovering interpretable structure is a primary goal. In contrast, scientific observations (such as residue-pair distances, climate indices, or process sensors) are inherently semantic, as they correspond to named physical quantities. This raises a key question: can the interpretability of observations be transferred to the identifiable latent space? We propose MOSAIC (Module discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal learning), a sparse temporal VAE that integrates temporal CRL identifiability with support recovery over observed variables. MOSAIC identifies latent variables via regime-conditioned temporal variation, and recovers for each latent a sparse set of associated observations through an additive decoder, yielding module-level interpretability. We show that ANOVA main-effect supports are identifiable under general smooth mixing functions, and provide finite-sample recovery guarantees for a tractable sparse-additive variant. Empirically, MOSAIC recovers domain-consistent variable groups across RNA molecular dynamics, solar wind, ENSO climate, the Tennessee Eastman process, and a synthetic tokamak benchmark, enabling interpretable discovery of latent mechanisms in scientific time series.

AI.tldr: 提出MOSAIC框架，通过稀疏可加时间VAE将可观测变量的语义可解释性迁移到可识别的潜在空间，在科学时间序列中发现模块级潜在机制。
AI.motivation: 因果表示学习中的可识别性不保证可解释性，潜在语义通常需要事后与已知真实因子对齐；而在科学时间序列中，观测本身具有语义（如物理量名称），如何将观测的可解释性迁移到可识别的潜在空间是核心问题。
AI.method: 提出MOSAIC，一种稀疏时间VAE，结合时间CRL可识别性与观测变量的支持恢复。通过状态条件的时间变化识别潜在变量，利用加性解码器为每个潜在变量恢复一组稀疏关联的观测变量，并引入ANOVA主效应支持的可识别性与有限样本恢复保证。
AI.result: 在RNA分子动力学、太阳风、ENSO气候、田纳西-伊斯曼过程以及合成托卡马克基准上，MOSAIC恢复了领域一致的变量组，实现了可解释的潜在机制发现。
AI.conclusion: MOSAIC成功将观测的语义可解释性迁移到可识别的潜在空间，为科学时间序列中可解释的潜在机制发现提供了新范式。

title: Don't Lose Focus: Activation Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections
summary: Activation steering controls LLM behaviour towards target behaviour by intervening in internal representations, yet it often degrades reasoning and retrieval performance. We argue that a primary cause of this trade-off is attention rerouting: steering vectors alter query-key matching, shifting attention away from contextually important tokens toward less informative ones. To address this, we propose Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections (SKOP), a steering method that constrains harmful attention rerouting without eliminating steering efficacy. SKOP achieves this by preserving attention patterns on a small set of focus tokens the model relies on for reasoning and retrieval, while allowing redistribution among less critical tail tokens. Across multiple steering benchmarks, we show that SKOP achieves the best joint steering-utility trade-off, reducing utility degradation by 5-7x while retaining over 95% of vanilla steering efficacy. Our results further suggest that, in long-context retrieval settings where vanilla steering approaches are ineffective, SKOP can maintain robust performance by avoiding attention rerouting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SKOP方法，通过关键正交投影约束注意力重路由，在保持激活引导效果的同时，将模型推理和检索性能的下降减少5-7倍。
AI.motivation: 激活引导（Activation Steering）虽能控制LLM行为，但会因注意力重路由（attention rerouting）导致推理和检索性能下降，现有方法存在引导效果与实用性能难以兼顾的trade-off。
AI.method: SKOP通过对少量关键token（模型依赖的推理/检索焦点token）保留注意力模式，同时允许非关键尾部token的注意力分布重新调整，利用关键正交投影约束来限制有害的注意力重路由。
AI.result: 在多项引导基准测试中，SKOP实现了最佳的引导-效用权衡，效用下降减少5-7倍，同时保留超过95%的原始引导效果。在长上下文检索场景中，当标准引导方法失效时，SKOP通过避免注意力重路由保持稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: 注意力重路由是激活引导导致性能下降的关键原因，SKOP通过保护关键token的注意力模式有效缓解了这一trade-off，尤其适用于对推理和检索能力要求较高的场景。

title: VideoRouter: Query-Adaptive Dual Routing for Efficient Long-Video Understanding
summary: Video large multimodal models increasingly face a scalability bottleneck: long videos produce excessively long visual-token sequences, which sharply increase memory and latency during inference. While existing compression methods are effective in specific settings, most are either weakly query-aware or apply a fixed compression policy across frames, proving suboptimal when visual evidence is unevenly distributed over time. To address this, we present VideoRouter, a query-adaptive dual-router framework built on InternVL for budgeted evidence allocation. The Semantic Router predicts the dominant allocation policy, choosing between broad temporal coverage and adaptive high-resolution preservation, while the Image Router uses early LLM layers to score frame relevance. This enables aggressive compression on less relevant frames while preserving detail on critical evidence frames. To train both routers, we build Video-QTR-10K for allocation-policy supervision and Video-FLR-200K for frame-relevance supervision. Experiments on VideoMME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench show that VideoRouter consistently improves over the InternVL baseline under comparable or lower budgets, achieving up to a 67.9% token reduction.

AI.tldr: VideoRouter 提出了一种查询自适应的双路由框架，通过语义路由器和图像路由器动态分配视觉证据预算，在长视频理解中实现高效压缩，最高可减少67.9%的token数量，同时在多个基准上超越InternVL基线。
AI.motivation: 长视频LMM面临视觉token序列过长导致的推理效率和内存瓶颈，现有压缩方法要么弱查询感知，要么对帧使用固定压缩策略，在视觉证据分布不均时表现欠佳。
AI.method: 提出VideoRouter双路由框架：（1）语义路由器预测全局分配策略（时间覆盖 vs 自适应高分辨率）；（2）图像路由器利用早期LLM层评分帧相关性，对不相关帧激进压缩，对关键帧保留细节。并构建了Video-QTR-10K和Video-FLR-200K数据集训练路由。
AI.result: 在VideoMME、MLVU和LongVideoBench上，VideoRouter在同等或更低预算下一致优于InternVL基线，实现高达67.9%的token缩减。
AI.conclusion: 查询自适应的动态预算分配是解决长视频LMM推理效率瓶颈的有效方法，双路由设计在压缩率与性能之间取得了良好的平衡。

title: SkillRet: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Skill Retrieval in LLM Agents
summary: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed with large libraries of reusable skills, selecting the right skill for a user request has become a critical systems challenge. In small libraries, users may invoke skills explicitly by name, but this assumption breaks down as skill ecosystems grow under tight context and latency budgets. Despite its practical importance, skill retrieval remains underexplored, with limited benchmarks and little understanding of retrieval behavior on realistic skill libraries. To address this gap, we introduce SkillRet, a large-scale benchmark for skill retrieval in LLM agents. SkillRet contains 17,810 public agent skills, organized with structured semantic tags and a two-level taxonomy spanning 6 major categories and 18 sub-categories. It provides 63,259 training samples and 4,997 evaluation queries with disjoint skill pools, enabling both benchmarking and retrieval-oriented training. Across a diverse set of retrievers, we find that skill retrieval remains far from solved: off-the-shelf models struggle on realistic large-scale skill libraries, and prior skill-retrieval models still leave substantial headroom. Task-specific fine-tuning on SkillRet substantially improves performance, improving NDCG@10 by +13.1 points over the strongest prior retriever and by +16.9 points over the strongest off-the-shelf retriever. Our analysis further suggests that these gains arise because fine-tuned models better focus on the small skill-relevant signals within long and noisy queries. These results establish SkillRet as a strong benchmark and foundation for future research on retrieval in large-scale agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SkillRet，一个面向LLM Agent的大规模技能检索基准，包含17,810个技能、63,259个训练样本和4,997个评估查询。实验表明现有检索器在大规模技能库上表现不佳，而基于SkillRet的微调可显著提升NDCG@10（+13.1至+16.9），且改进源于微调模型能更好聚焦长噪声查询中的技能相关信号。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM Agent部署大量可复用技能，在上下文和延迟预算紧张的情况下，从大规模技能库中检索正确技能成为一个关键但未被充分研究的问题，缺乏相关基准和对检索行为的理解。
AI.method: 构建SkillRet基准：包含17,810个公共Agent技能，带有结构化语义标签和双层分类体系（6大类、18子类）；提供63,259个训练样本和4,997个评估查询（技能池不重叠），支持评测和检索训练。
AI.result: 现有检索器在大规模技能库上表现不佳，任务特定微调在NDCG@10上比最强先前检索器提升+13.1，比最强现成检索器提升+16.9；改进源于微调模型能在长噪声查询中更好地聚焦技能相关信号。
AI.conclusion: SkillRet可作为大规模Agent系统中技能检索研究的强基准和基础，当前技能检索问题远未解决，仍存在显著提升空间。

title: Energy Generative Modeling: A Lyapunov-based Energy Matching Perspective
summary: Generative models based on static scalar energy functions represent an emerging paradigm in which a single time independent potential drives sample generation through its gradient field, eliminating the need for time conditioning entirely. We unify the training and sampling phases of this paradigm, conventionally treated as separate procedures, within a single framework: density transport on the Wasserstein space, cast as a nonlinear control problem in which the Kullback Leibler (KL) divergence serves as a Lyapunov function. Training and sampling are then two instances of this same master dynamics, differing only in initial condition. Within this autonomous framework we develop two analytic results. First, since the Lyapunov certificate is asymptotic, we derive a finite step stopping criterion for Langevin sampling and prove that no Lyapunov certificate exists for the deterministic gradient flow on the same energy landscape. Second, the reformulation brings the toolkit of nonlinear control theory to bear on static scalar energy generative modeling, that is, we show that additive composition of trained scalar energies retains an explicit Gibbs invariant measure and inherits the closed-loop Lyapunov certificate. Beyond these immediate results, this reformulation bridges static scalar energy generative models with the full toolkit of nonlinear control theory, opening the door to barrier functions for constrained generation and contraction metrics for accelerated sampling. Experiments on synthetic distributions validate the theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将基于静态标量能量函数的生成模型（如EBM）统一在Wasserstein空间上的密度传输框架中，将训练和采样视为同一非线性控制问题的两种实例（仅初始条件不同），并以KL散度作为Lyapunov函数。在此框架下推导了Langevin采样的有限步停止准则，证明了确定性梯度流不存在Lyapunov证书，并展示了已训练能量函数的加性组合仍保留显式Gibbs不变测度和闭环Lyapunov证书。
AI.motivation: 传统静态标量能量生成模型的训练和采样是分离的流程，缺乏统一的理论框架。作者希望通过非线性控制理论（Lyapunov函数）将两者统一，并解决Langevin采样缺乏有限步停止准则、能量组合后性质不明等问题。
AI.method: 将密度传输视为Wasserstein空间上的非线性控制问题，KL散度作为Lyapunov函数，训练和采样作为同一动力学的不同初始条件实例。基于此框架推导Lyapunov证书的有限步停止准则，并分析确定性梯度流的不可行性；利用控制理论分析加法组合能量模型的Gibbs不变测度保持性。
AI.result: 1) 推导出Langevin采样的有限步停止准则；2) 证明确定性梯度流在相同能量景观上不存在Lyapunov证书；3) 证明加法组合的标量能量仍保持显式Gibbs不变测度并继承闭环Lyapunov证书；4) 在合成分布上验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为静态标量能量生成模型建立了与控制理论的桥梁，打开了约束生成（barrier函数）和加速采样（contraction度量）等新方向，但实验限于合成数据，真实场景效果待验证。

title: SEQUOR: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Realistic Constraint Following
summary: In a conversation, a helpful assistant must reliably follow user directives, even as they refine, modify, or contradict earlier requests. Yet most instruction-following benchmarks focus on single-turn or short multi-turn scenarios, leaving open how well models handle long-horizon instruction-following tasks. To bridge this gap, we present SEQUOR, an automatic benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in long multi-turn conversations. SEQUOR consists of simulated persona-driven interactions built with constraints extracted from real-world conversations. Our results show that even when following a single constraint, instruction-following accuracy consistently decreases as the conversation grows longer, with drops exceeding 11%. This decline becomes larger when models have to follow multiple constraints simultaneously, reducing their accuracy by over 40%. In scenarios where constraints are added or replaced at arbitrary points of the conversation, model accuracy decreases by more than 9%. Taken together, our results reveal that current models still struggle to follow user instructions in multi-turn conversations, and provide a way for better measuring instruction-following capabilities in assistants.

AI.tldr: 提出了SEQUOR基准，用于评估长多轮对话中的指令遵循能力。实验发现，随着对话变长，模型遵循指令的准确率持续下降（单约束下降超11%，多约束下降超40%，约束动态变化时下降超9%），表明当前模型在多轮对话中仍然难以很好地遵循用户指令。
AI.motivation: 现有指令遵循基准主要集中在单轮或短多轮场景，缺乏对长程多轮对话中指令遵循能力的评估，无法衡量模型在对话过程中处理用户不断细化、修改或矛盾指令的能力。
AI.method: 基于真实对话中提取的约束，构建模拟人设驱动的长多轮交互作为基准（SEQUOR），自动评估模型在对话不同阶段对约束的遵循情况。
AI.result: 1) 单约束场景：随对话长度增加，准确率下降超11%；2) 多约束同时遵循：准确率下降超40%；3) 约束动态添加/替换：准确率下降超9%。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在多轮长对话中仍难以稳定遵循用户指令，SEQUOR为衡量助手指令遵循能力提供了更好的评估方式。

title: Align3D-AD: Cross-Modal Feature Alignment and Dual-Prompt Learning for Zero-shot 3D Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-shot 3D anomaly detection aims to identify anomalies without access to training data from target categories. However, existing methods mainly rely on projecting 3D observations into multi-view representations that primarily capture geometric cues rather than realistic visual semantics and process them with vision encoders pretrained on RGB data, leading to a significant domain gap between the encoder and the projected representations. To address this issue, we propose Align3D-AD, a unified two-stage framework that leverages the RGB modality from auxiliary categories as cross-modal guidance for zero-shot 3D anomaly detection. First, we introduce a cross-modal feature alignment paradigm that maps rendering features into the RGB semantic space. Unlike prior works that implicitly rely on pretrained encoders, our method enables direct semantic transfer from RGB observations. A semantic consistency reweighting strategy is further introduced to refine feature alignment by reweighting local regions according to holistic semantic consistency. Second, we propose a modality-aware prompt learning framework with dual-prompt contrastive alignment. By assigning independent prompts to RGB-aligned and rendering features, our method captures complementary semantics across modalities, while the contrastive alignment further enhances prompt representations to improve discriminability. Extensive experiments on MVTec3D-AD, Eyecandies, and Real3D-AD demonstrate that Align3D-AD consistently outperforms existing zero-shot methods under both one-vs-rest and cross-dataset settings, highlighting its generalization capability and robustness. Code and the dataset will be made available once our paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: 提出Align3D-AD，一个利用辅助类别的RGB模态作为跨模态指导的统一两阶段框架，用于零样本3D异常检测。通过跨模态特征对齐将渲染特征映射到RGB语义空间，并采用语义一致性重加权策略和模态感知的提示学习，在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本3D异常检测方法主要依赖将3D观测投影为多视图表示，这些表示主要捕捉几何线索而非真实视觉语义，且使用预训练在RGB数据上的视觉编码器处理，导致编码器与投影表示之间存在显著的领域差距。
AI.method: 提出统一的两阶段框架：1) 跨模态特征对齐范式，将渲染特征映射到RGB语义空间，并引入语义一致性重加权策略优化局部区域对齐；2) 模态感知的提示学习框架，通过双提示对比对齐为RGB对齐特征和渲染特征分配独立提示，捕捉跨模态互补语义。
AI.result: 在MVTec3D-AD、Eyecandies和Real3D-AD数据集上，在one-vs-rest和跨数据集设置下均一致优于现有零样本方法，展现出良好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 利用辅助类别RGB模态作为跨模态指导能有效解决零样本3D异常检测中的领域差距问题，方法具有良好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: Knee Osteoarthritis Severity Grading Using Optimized Deep Learning and LLM-Driven Intelligent AI on Computationally Limited Systems
comment: 6 pages, 11 figures, Accepted and presented at the 2nd International Conference on Emerging Computational Intelligence (ICECI 2026), IEEE. Published in conference proceedings. To appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Knee osteoarthritis (KOA) is among the musculoskeletal disorders that considerably restrict joint mobility, cause severe chronic pain and impact negatively on quality life. It is one of the persistent health issues worldwide. Generally, subjectivity and inter-observer variability undermine conventional practices and evaluation process that are adopted to address such health issues. Hence precise and timely diagnosis would be one of the effective ways for the assessment of its severity. This paper proposes an automated diagnostic approach for severity grading of KOA by blending a deep learning convolutional neural network (CNN) with a device-based inference platform powered by TensorFlow Lite. It proposes a model based on the ResNet-18 convolutional neural network. The designed model is trained on publicly available database. Through a transfer learning approach obtained knee images are first classified into five Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) grades. Further the developed model is optimised. During the training of the model test accuracy of 94.48% with stable convergence has been achieved. Subsequently the optimised model transformed into a lightweight TensorFlow Lite format, facilitating seamless deployment on resource-constrained devices. The designed model is capable enough to operate in the environment having no continuous internet connectivity. Also, an auxiliary Large Language Model (Gemini-2.0-flash) is applied to generate structured interpretive findings like potential symptoms, risk factors, and preventive majors etc. The LLM component functions as interface without influencing the classification process. The proposed model articulates the feasibility of an on-device, interpretable decision-support tools for early diagnosis and improve accessibility to Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted knee screening tool.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ResNet-18 CNN的膝骨关节炎严重程度自动分级方法，将模型优化并转换为TensorFlow Lite格式以部署在资源受限设备上，并辅助使用Gemini-2.0-flash大语言模型生成结构化解释性报告。
AI.motivation: 传统KOA诊断存在主观性和观察者间差异性问题，需要一种精确、及时且可部署在资源受限环境中的自动化诊断工具。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-18 CNN通过迁移学习对膝关节X光图像进行Kellgren-Lawrence五级分类，模型优化后转换为TensorFlow Lite格式实现轻量化部署，并利用Gemini-2.0-flash LLM生成结构化的症状、风险因素及预防措施等解释性输出。
AI.result: 测试准确率达94.48%，训练收敛稳定；模型成功转换为轻量级TensorFlow Lite格式，可在无持续互联网连接的设备上运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方案验证了将深度学习CNN与设备端推理平台结合，辅以LLM生成解释性报告，构建可部署、可解释的AI辅助KOA筛查工具的可行性。

title: Adversarial Graph Neural Network Benchmarks: Towards Practical and Fair Evaluation
summary: Adversarial learning and the robustness of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are topics of widespread interest in the machine learning community, as documented by the number of adversarial attacks and defenses designed for these purposes. While a rigorous evaluation of these adversarial methods is necessary to understand the robustness of GNNs in real-world applications, we posit that many works in the literature do not share the same experimental settings, leading to ambiguous and potentially contradictory scientific conclusions. In this benchmark, we demonstrate the importance of adopting fair, robust, and standardized evaluation protocols in adversarial GNN research. We perform a comprehensive re-evaluation of seven widely used attacks and eight recent defenses under both poisoning and evasion scenarios, across six popular graph datasets. Our study spans over 453,000 experiments conducted within a unified framework. We observe substantial differences in adversarial attack performance when evaluated under a fair and robust procedure. Our findings reveal that previously overlooked factors, such as target node selection and the training process of the attacked model, have a profound impact on attack effectiveness, to the extent of completely distorting performance insights. These results underscore the urgent need for standardized evaluations in adversarial graph machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一框架重新评估7种攻击与8种防御方法，在45.3万+实验中揭示了以往被忽视的因素（如目标节点选择、模型训练过程）会严重扭曲图神经网络对抗性实验的性能结论，呼吁建立标准化评估协议。
AI.motivation: 当前图神经网络对抗攻击与防御研究缺乏统一的实验设置，导致结论模糊甚至矛盾，亟需建立公平、稳健、标准化的评估协议。
AI.method: 在统一框架下，对7种攻击和8种防御方法在6个图数据集上进行毒化与逃避两种场景的全面重新评估，共计45.3万+实验。
AI.result: 在公平评估下，攻击性能存在显著差异；目标节点选择与模型训练过程等先前被忽视的因素对攻击效果有深远影响，甚至完全扭曲性能结论。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络对抗性机器学习迫切需要标准化评估。

title: GATHER: Convergence-Centric Hyper-Entity Retrieval for Zero-Shot Cell-Type Annotation
summary: Zero-shot single-cell cell-type annotation aims to determine a cell's type from a given set of expressed genes without any training. Existing knowledge-graph-based RAG approaches retrieve evidence by expanding from source entities and relying on iterative LLM reasoning. However, in this setting each query contains tens to hundreds of genes, where no single gene is decisive and the label emerges only from their collective co-occurrence. Such hyper-entity queries fundamentally challenge local, entity-wise exploration strategies, which reason from individual genes, leading to poor scalability and substantial LLM cost. We propose GATHER (Graph-Aware Traversal with Hyper-Entity Retrieval), a convergence-centric retriever tailored to hyper-entity queries. It performs global multi-source graph traversal and identifies topological convergence points -- nodes jointly reachable from many input genes. These convergence nodes act as high-information hyper-entities that capture entity synergy. By incorporating node- and path-importance scoring, GATHER selects informative evidence entirely without LLM involvement during retrieval. Instantiated on a self-constructed cell-centric biological knowledge graph (VCKG), GATHER outperforms strong KG-RAG baselines (ToG, ToG-2, RoG, PoG) on two datasets (Immune and Lung), achieving the highest exact-match accuracy (27.45% and 59.64%) with only a single LLM call per sample, compared to 2--61 calls for KG-RAG baselines. Our results demonstrate that convergence nodes compress multi-entity signals into compact, high-information evidence that conveys more per item than multi-hop paths, providing an efficient global alternative to local entity-wise reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出GATHER方法，通过全局图遍历寻找拓扑收敛节点（从多个输入基因共同可达的节点）来压缩多实体信号，实现零样本单细胞类型注释的高效检索，在无LLM参与检索的情况下仅需单次LLM调用即可达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱RAG方法在单细胞类型注释任务中面临超实体查询（数十到数百个基因）的挑战，局部逐实体推理策略扩展性差且LLM成本高。
AI.method: 提出GATHER，一种面向超实体查询的收敛中心检索器，执行全局多源图遍历，识别拓扑收敛节点（从多个输入基因共同可达的节点），结合节点和路径重要性评分，检索过程完全无需LLM参与。
AI.result: 在Immune和Lung数据集上分别达到27.45%和59.64%的精确匹配准确率，优于ToG、RoG、PoG等基线，且仅需单次LLM调用（基线需2-61次）。
AI.conclusion: 收敛节点能压缩多实体信号为紧凑、高信息量的证据，比多跳路径更高效，为本地逐实体推理提供了全局替代方案。

title: InkDiffuser: High-Fidelity One-shot Chinese Calligraphy via Differentiable Morphological Optimization
summary: Current Chinese calligraphy generation methods suffer from poor stroke rendering and unrealistic ink morphology, resulting in outputs with limited visual fidelity and artistic fluidity. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{InkDiffuser}, a diffusion-based generative framework for one-shot Chinese calligraphy synthesis. To guarantee high-fidelity rendering, we introduce two core contributions: a high-frequency enhancement mechanism and a Differentiable Ink Structure (DIS) loss that explicitly regularizes ink morphology. Inspired by the observation that high-frequency information in individual samples typically carries contour details, we enhance content extraction by explicitly fusing high-frequency representations for more accurate font structure. Furthermore, we propose a differentiable ink structure loss that integrates differentiable morphological operations into the diffusion process. By allowing the model to learn an explicit decomposition of ink-trace structures, DIS facilitates fine-grained refinement of stroke contours and delivers significantly improved visual realism in the generated calligraphy. Extensive experiments on various calligraphic styles and complex characters demonstrate that InkDiffuser can generate superior calligraphy fonts with realistic ink rendering effects from only a single reference glyph and outperform existing few-shot font generation approaches in structural consistency, detail fidelity, and visual authenticity. The code is available at the following address: https://github.com/JingVIPLab/InkDiffuser.

AI.tldr: InkDiffuser是一个基于扩散模型的中文书法生成框架，通过高频增强机制和可微墨水结构损失(DIS)实现单样本高质量书法合成，在结构一致性、细节保真度和视觉真实性上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有中文书法生成方法存在笔画渲染质量差、墨水形态不真实的问题，生成的书法作品视觉保真度和艺术流畅性有限。
AI.method: 提出InkDiffuser扩散框架，包含两个核心贡献：(1) 高频增强机制，通过融合高频信息提取更准确的字体结构；(2) 可微墨水结构损失(DIS)，将可微形态学操作融入扩散过程，显式正则化墨水形态，实现笔画轮廓的细粒度优化。
AI.result: 在多种书法风格和复杂汉字上的实验表明，InkDiffuser仅需单个参考字形就能生成高质量书法字体，在结构一致性、细节保真度和视觉真实性上超越现有少样本字体生成方法。
AI.conclusion: InkDiffuser通过高频增强和可微墨水结构损失有效解决了书法生成中笔画渲染和墨水形态不真实的问题，展示了扩散模型在艺术字体生成领域的潜力。

title: SDFlow: Similarity-Driven Flow Matching for Time Series Generation
summary: Vector quantization (VQ) with autoregressive (AR) token modeling is a widely adopted and highly competitive paradigm for time-series generation. However, such models are fundamentally limited by exposure bias: during inference, errors can accumulate across sequential predictions, leading to pronounced quality degradation in long-horizon generation. To address this, we propose SDFlow ($\textbf{S}$imilarity-$\textbf{D}$riven $\textbf{Flow}$ Matching), a non-autoregressive framework that operates entirely in the frozen VQ latent space and enables parallel sequence generation via flow matching. We tackle three key challenges in making this transition: (1) eliminating exposure bias by replacing step-wise token prediction with a global transport map; (2) mitigating the high-dimensionality of VQ token spaces via a low-rank manifold decomposition with a learned anchor prior over the latent manifold; and (3) incorporating discrete supervision into continuous transport dynamics by introducing a categorical posterior over codebook indices within a variational flow-matching formulation. Extensive experiments show that SDFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving Discriminative Score and substantially reducing Context-FID, particularly for challenging long-sequence generation. Moreover, SDFlow provides significant inference speedups over autoregressive baselines, offering both high fidelity and computational efficiency. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SDFlow-D6F3/

AI.tldr: SDFlow是一个非自回归的时间序列生成框架，通过流匹配（Flow Matching）在冻结的VQ潜空间中进行并行序列生成，消除了自回归模型中的暴露偏差问题，在长序列生成任务上实现了SOTA性能并显著提升了推理速度。
AI.motivation: 自回归VQ模型在时间序列生成中存在暴露偏差（exposure bias）问题，即推理时错误会逐级累积，导致长序列生成质量严重下降。作者希望通过非自回归的方式解决这一根本性缺陷。
AI.method: 提出SDFlow框架，核心是基于相似性驱动的流匹配（Flow Matching）在冻结的VQ潜空间中实现并行生成。包含三个关键技术：(1) 用全局传输图替代逐步token预测消除暴露偏差；(2) 通过低秩流形分解+学习锚点先验缓解VQ token空间的高维问题；(3) 引入变分流匹配中的类别后验，将离散监督信号融入连续传输动力学。
AI.result: 在多个时间序列生成任务上达到SOTA，Discriminative Score提升，Context-FID大幅降低，尤其在长序列生成任务中表现突出。同时，相比自回归基线模型实现了显著的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: SDFlow验证了非自回归范式在VQ潜空间时间序列生成中的有效性，既解决了暴露偏差带来的质量退化问题，又通过并行生成提升了计算效率，在保真度和效率之间取得了良好平衡。

title: Towards Scalable One-Step Generative Modeling for Autoregressive Dynamical System Forecasting
summary: Fast surrogate modeling for high-dimensional physical dynamics requires more than low short-term error: useful models must roll out efficiently while preserving the statistical structure of long trajectories. Neural operators provide inexpensive autoregressive forecasts but can drift in turbulent regimes, whereas rolling diffusion and latent generative surrogates can represent stochastic transitions at the cost of multi-step denoising, noise-schedule design, or auxiliary compression models. We propose MeanFlow Long-term Invariant Spatiotemporal Consistency Autoregressive Models (MeLISA), a latent-free autoregressive generative surrogate built on pixel-space MeanFlow. MeLISA defines a blockwise stochastic transition kernel that generates each forecast block with a single model evaluation, avoiding latent encoders and iterative diffusion solvers at inference time. To stabilize long-horizon rollouts, MeLISA combines a Window-Consistency MeanFlow objective that learns conditional spatiotemporal generation from partially observed temporal windows with a Time Increment Consistency loss that constrains multi-lag finite increments and targets temporal-correlation structure. We evaluate MeLISA with compact UNet and scalable DiT backbones on two high-resolution benchmarks, extended 2D Kolmogorov flow at $256 \times 256$ and turbulent channel-flow slice at $192 \times 192$. MeLISA outperforms neural-operator baselines on short-term forecasting accuracy and long-horizon statistical metrics, including energy spectra, turbulent kinetic energy, and mixing-rate-related dynamics, while achieving inference speeds comparable to, and in some cases faster than, neural operators. Compact 3.7-5.7M-parameter variants already deliver strong parameter efficiency, and DiT variants provide a scalable path up to 150M parameters. Overall, MeLISA benefits both rollout efficiency and long-horizon statistical accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 MeLISA，一种基于像素空间 MeanFlow 的无潜在变量自回归生成代理模型，用于高维物理动力学（如湍流）的长期统计一致预测。该模型通过单次模型评估完成每个预测块，结合窗口一致性目标和时间增量一致性损失，在保持推理速度与神经算子相当甚至更快的同时，在短期精度和长期统计指标（如能谱、湍动能）上超越基线。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子模型在湍流等复杂动力学中长期 rollout 会发生漂移，而扩散模型虽能建模随机性但推理成本高（多步去噪、潜在编码器）。需要一种既高效又能在长期 rollout 中保持统计一致性的代理建模方法。
AI.method: MeLISA 的核心是像素空间 MeanFlow 上的块状随机转移核，单次模型评估生成一个预测块，无需潜在编码器和迭代扩散求解器。训练时结合两个损失：(1) Window-Consistency MeanFlow 目标，从部分观测时间窗口学习条件时空生成；(2) Time Increment Consistency 损失，约束多时间步有限增量以保持时序相关结构。支持紧凑 UNet 和可扩展 DiT 两种骨干网络。
AI.result: 在 256×256 的 2D Kolmogorov 流和 192×192 的湍流通道切片两个高分辨率基准上，MeLISA 在短期预测精度和长期统计指标（能谱、湍动能、混合率相关动力学）上均优于神经算子基线。紧凑模型（3.7-5.7M 参数）已表现出强参数效率，DiT 变体可扩展至 150M 参数。推理速度与神经算子相当甚至更快。
AI.conclusion: MeLISA 在 rollout 效率和长期统计精度之间取得了更好的平衡，证明了无潜在变量的像素空间自回归生成模型在高维物理仿真中的有效性。

title: MiA-Signature: Approximating Global Activation for Long-Context Understanding
comment: This is a work in progress; we will continue to revise and improve the manuscript
summary: A growing body of work in cognitive science suggests that reportable conscious access is associated with \emph{global ignition} over distributed memory systems, while such activation is only partially accessible as individuals cannot directly access or enumerate all activated contents. This tension suggests a plausible mechanism that cognition may rely on a compact representation that approximates the global influence of activation on downstream processing. Inspired by this idea, we introduce the concept of \textbf{Mindscape Activation Signature (MiA-Signature)}, a compressed representation of the global activation pattern induced by a query. In LLM systems, this is instantiated via submodular-based selection of high-level concepts that cover the activated context space, optionally refined through lightweight iterative updates using working memory. The resulting MiA-Signature serves as a conditioning signal that approximates the effect of the full activation state while remaining computationally tractable. Integrating MiA-Signatures into both RAG and agentic systems yields consistent performance gains across multiple long-context understanding tasks.

AI.tldr: 受认知科学中意识访问与全局点火现象的启发，本文提出Mindscape Activation Signature (MiA-Signature)概念，通过子模选择对LLM中的全局激活模式进行压缩表示，并作为条件信号近似完整激活状态的效果，在长上下文理解任务中（RAG和Agent系统）取得了一致性提升。
AI.motivation: 认知科学发现意识访问与分布式记忆系统的全局点火相关，但个体无法直接访问所有激活内容，暗示认知可能依赖一种紧凑表示来近似全局激活对下游处理的影响。受此启发，研究者希望在LLM系统中实现类似的机制。
AI.method: 提出MiA-Signature，通过子模选择从激活空间中选取覆盖上下文的高层概念，并可选择通过工作记忆进行轻量迭代更新，生成压缩的全局激活模式表示，作为条件信号注入RAG和Agent系统。
AI.result: 在多个长上下文理解任务中，将MiA-Signature集成到RAG和Agent系统均取得了一致性的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 认知科学启发的压缩激活表示方法在LLM系统中有效，MiA-Signature作为一种计算上可行的全局激活近似手段，可提升长上下文理解能力。

title: Training-Free Dense Hand Contact Estimation with Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Dense hand contact estimation requires both high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained geometric reasoning of human interaction to accurately localize contact regions. Recently, multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding visual semantics, enabled by vision-language priors learned from large-scale data. However, leveraging MLLMs for dense hand contact estimation remains underexplored. There are two major challenges in applying MLLMs to dense hand contact estimation. First, encoding explicit 3D hand geometry is difficult, as MLLMs primarily operate on vision and language modalities. Second, capturing fine-grained vertex-level contact remains challenging, as MLLMs tend to focus on high-level semantics rather than detailed geometric reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose ContactPrompt, a training-free and zero-shot approach for dense hand contact estimation using MLLMs. To effectively encode 3D hand geometry, we introduce a detailed hand-part segmentation and a part-wise vertex-grid representation that provides structured, localized geometric information. To enable accurate and efficient dense contact prediction, we develop a multi-stage structured contact reasoning with part conditioning, progressively bridging global semantics and fine-grained geometry. Therefore, our method effectively leverages the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs while enabling precise dense hand contact estimation. Surprisingly, the proposed approach outperforms previous supervised methods trained on large-scale dense contact datasets without requiring any training. The codes will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出ContactPrompt，一种无需训练、零样本的方法，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）进行密集手部接触估计，通过手部部件分割和逐部件顶点网格表示编码3D手部几何，并使用多阶段结构化接触推理实现从全局语义到细粒度几何的渐进推理，在零样本设置下超越先前监督方法。
AI.motivation: 将MLLMs应用于密集手部接触估计面临两大挑战：1) MLLMs主要处理视觉和语言模态，难以编码显式3D手部几何；2) MLLMs倾向于关注高层语义而非细粒度几何推理，难以捕捉顶点级别的接触信息。现有方法需要大规模监督训练。
AI.method: 1) 引入详细的手部部件分割和逐部件顶点网格表示，结构化地编码局部几何信息；2) 提出多阶段结构化接触推理，通过部件条件化逐步从全局语义桥接到细粒度几何，实现零样本密集接触预测。
AI.result: 无需任何训练的情况下，该方法在密集手部接触估计任务上超越了先前使用大规模数据集训练的监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明了MLLMs的推理能力可以有效用于密集手部接触估计这一细粒度几何推理任务，通过结构化几何表示和多阶段推理可充分释放MLLMs的潜力，为其他细粒度几何理解任务提供了新范式。

title: ReFlect: An Effective Harness System for Complex Long-Horizon LLM Reasoning
summary: Current reasoning paradigms for LLMs include chain-of-thought, ReAct, and post-hoc self-critique. These paradigms rely on two assumptions that fail on long-horizon, multi-stage tasks. As a result, errors accumulate silently across reasoning steps, leaving an open question: can a reasoning system effectively detect and recover from its own failures? We present ReFlect, a \emph{harness} system for LLM reasoning that creates standalone error detection and recovery logic as a deterministic wrapper around the model. Controlled experiments across 6 reasoning domains show that prompt-level self-critique produces formulaic templates that flag no issues in 90 of 100 audited reflection blocks, and the investigated LLMs wrongly accept a wrong answer in at least 76\% of cases. Our ReFlect harness achieves task success rates ranging from 41\% on gpt-4o-mini to 56\% on Claude Sonnet 4.5 across six models spanning small and frontier scale, with per-model gains over Direct CoT ranging from +7 pp on Qwen2.5-72B to +29 pp on Claude Sonnet 4.5, and additionally raises SWE-bench patch-structural quality from 0\% (Direct CoT) to between 82\% (Qwen2.5-72B) and 87\% (GPT-4o). Notably, the harness gain is inversely proportional to the model's Direct CoT task success rate (the fitted slope is -1.69 with r=-0.76): each pp lost in baseline success rate is mechanically recovered by 1.69 pp of harness gain. We spot that adding structured reasoning state and operators yields only 15.0--18.7\% pair-mean on Llama-3.3-70B and Qwen2.5-72B because models at this scale cannot reliably populate the state its operators require. ReFlect is model-agnostic, training-free, and operates entirely at inference time.

AI.tldr: ReFlect是一个确定性推理管理系统，包装在LLM外部，独立进行错误检测与恢复。实验表明，传统自批评方法在长序列任务中几乎无效（90%的反思模板未发现问题，模型在76%情况下接受错误答案）。ReFlect在6个推理领域将任务成功率提升7-29个百分点，SWE-bench补丁质量从0%提升至82-87%。该增益与基线成功率呈显著负相关（斜率-1.69, r=-0.76）。
AI.motivation: 现有推理范式（CoT、ReAct、自批评）在长周期多阶段任务中假设错误可以被模型自身感知和纠正，但实际上错误会无声累积，模型无法有效自我检测和恢复。作者试图构建一个独立于LLM的确定性系统来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出ReFlect——一个作为确定性包装器（harness）的系统，将错误检测与恢复逻辑从LLM推理过程解耦出来，作为独立模块运行。系统不依赖模型自身进行反思，而是通过外部结构化逻辑进行错误检测和恢复。
AI.result: 1) 传统自批评：90/100反思块未发现任何问题，模型在至少76%情况下接受错误答案。2) ReFlect在6个模型上任务成功率从41%（GPT-4o-mini）到56%（Claude Sonnet 4.5）。3) 相比Direct CoT增益为+7pp（Qwen2.5-72B）到+29pp（Claude Sonnet 4.5）。4) SWE-bench补丁质量从0%提升至82-87%。5) 增益与基线成功率负相关（斜率-1.69, r=-0.76）。6) 结构化推理状态方法在70B规模模型上仅有15-18.7%的表现。
AI.conclusion: ReFlect揭示了一个关键发现：LLM自我纠错本质上是无效的，需要外部确定性机制来管理推理过程。该方法是模型无关、无需训练、纯推理时的方法，对弱模型收益更大（负相关关系），为长推理链的可靠性提供了新范式。

title: Adaptive Q-Chunking for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline-to-online reinforcement learning with action chunking eliminates multi-step off-policy bias and enables temporally coherent exploration, but all existing methods use a fixed chunk size across every state. This is suboptimal: near contact events the agent needs short chunks for reactive control, while during free-space motion long chunks provide better credit assignment. The natural solution is to train critics for several chunk sizes and select the best one at each state, but naive comparison of learned critic values systematically collapses to the shortest chunk due to discount-scale mismatch, and degrades to noise in low-value states. We propose Adaptive Q-Chunking (AQC), which resolves both failures by comparing the advantage of each chunk size relative to a per-horizon baseline, normalized by the discount factor. This criterion converts biased wrong answers into unbiased near-random choices when no genuine signal exists, and becomes discriminative when a particular scale enables better planning. We prove theoretical bounds on the advantage selector's noise immunity and on the value dominance of adaptive chunking over any fixed chunk size. We demonstrate that AQC achieves state-of-the-art offline and online success rates on OGBench and Robomimic, and can be applied to enhance the performance of large-scale VLA models that predict action sequences, significantly boosting performance on RoboCasa-GR1 tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应Q分块（AQC），通过比较不同分块大小相对于各自基准的折扣归一化优势值，自适应选择最优动作分块大小，解决了固定分块大小在离线到在线强化学习中的次优性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线到在线强化学习方法使用固定大小的动作分块（action chunking），但固定分块是次优的：近接触事件需要短分块以实现反应控制，自由空间运动需要长分块以获得更好的信用分配。直接比较不同分块大小的学习批评值会因折扣尺度不匹配而系统性偏向短分块，且在低价值状态下降级为噪声。
AI.method: 提出AQC，通过比较每个分块大小相对于各自基准（per-horizon baseline）的优势值，并用折扣因子归一化。该准则在没有真实信号时将偏置错误转化为无偏随机选择，在特定尺度能够更好规划时变得有区分度。
AI.result: 在OGBench和Robomimic上实现了最先进的离线和在线成功率，并能提升大规模VLA模型在RoboCasa-GR1任务上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应分块优于任何固定分块大小，且具有理论上的噪声免疫边界和价值优势保证。

title: From 124 Million Tokens to 1,021 Neologisms: A Large-Scale Pipeline for Automatic Neologism Detection
comment: 14 pages, 5 tables. Accepted at NeoLLM 2026 Workshop, co-located with LREC-COLING 2026
summary: We present a scalable, modular pipeline for automatic neologism detection that combines rule-based filtering with LLM classification. The pipeline is grounded in two complementary word-formation frameworks, grammatical and extra-grammatical morphology, which jointly define the scope of what counts as a neologism and inform a four-class classification scheme (neologism, entity, foreign, none). While designed to be modular and transferable at the architectural level, the pipeline is instantiated on 527 million English-language Reddit posts spanning 2005-2024. From this corpus, we extract 124.6 million unique tokens and reduce them by over 99.99% to yield 1,021 neologism candidates, a set small enough for manual expert verification. Multiple LLMs independently classify each candidate via majority vote, with a final verification step, revealing substantial cross-model disagreement and highlighting the challenge of operationalizing neologism detection at scale. Manual annotation of all 1,021 candidates confirms that 599 (58.7%) are genuine lexical innovations. The pipeline code, vocabulary compilation scripts, and the annotated candidate list are available at https://github.com/DiegoRossini/neologism-pipeline.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合规则过滤与LLM分类的模块化新词检测流水线，从5.27亿Reddit帖子中提取124.6M唯一token，缩减至1,021个候选词（减少99.99%），经人工验证其中58.7%为真正新词。
AI.motivation: 大规模语料中新词的自动检测具有挑战性，现有方法缺乏系统性和可扩展性，需要一种结合语言学框架与LLM能力的自动化方案。
AI.method: 采用双框架（语法形态学与超语法形态学）定义新词范畴；先通过规则过滤缩减候选量，再使用多个LLM独立分类并通过多数投票表决，最后辅以人工验证。
AI.result: 从124.6M唯一token缩减至1,021个候选词（减少99.99%），人工验证确认其中599个（58.7%）为真正的词汇创新；不同LLM之间存在显著分歧。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线在大规模新词检测上可行且有效，但LLM间的分歧表明该任务仍具挑战性；开放了代码和标注数据以促进后续研究。

title: DBMSolver: A Training-free Diffusion Bridge Sampler for High-Quality Image-to-Image Translation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Includes supplementary material
summary: Diffusion-based image-to-image (I2I) translation excels in high-fidelity generation but suffers from slow sampling in state-of-the-art Diffusion Bridge Models (DBMs), often requiring dozens of function evaluations (NFEs). We introduce DBMSolver, a training-free sampler that exploits the semi-linear structure of DBM's underlying SDE and ODE via exponential integrators, yielding highly-efficient 1st- and 2nd-order solutions. This reduces NFEs by up to 5x while boosting quality (e.g., FID drops 53% on DIODE at 20 NFEs vs. 2nd-order baseline). Experiments on inpainting, stylization, and semantics-to-image tasks across resolutions up to 256x256 show DBMSolver sets new SOTA efficiency-quality tradeoffs, enabling real-world applicability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/snumprlab/dbmsolver.

AI.tldr: DBMSolver是一种针对扩散桥模型（DBMs）的无训练采样器，通过指数积分器利用其半线性结构，将所需函数评估次数（NFEs）减少多达5倍，同时在多个图像到图像翻译任务上提升质量（如FID降低53%），实现了效率与质量的最佳权衡。
AI.motivation: 扩散桥模型（DBMs）在图像到图像翻译中保真度高，但采样速度极慢（需要数十次函数评估），限制了实际应用。作者旨在设计一种无需额外训练的高效采样器来加速DBMs。
AI.method: 提出DBMSolver，一种无训练采样器，利用DBM底层SDE和ODE的半线性结构，通过指数积分器推导出一阶和二阶高效数值解，显著减少所需NFEs。
AI.result: 在多种I2I任务（修复、风格化、语义到图像）上，DBMSolver将NFEs减少高达5倍，同时提升生成质量（例如在DIODE数据集上20 NFEs时FID降低53%），在256x256分辨率下达到新的效率-质量最优权衡。
AI.conclusion: DBMSolver作为无训练采样器，大幅提升了扩散桥模型的采样效率，使其更适用于实际应用。

title: HyperLens: Quantifying Cognitive Effort in LLMs with Fine-grained Confidence Trajectory
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across diverse tasks, their inference dynamics remain poorly understood because of the limited resolution of existing analysis tools. In this work, we identify an intrinsic magnification mechanism in transformer architectures: deeper layers inherently magnify the small changes of layer-wise confidence, providing a fine-grained confidence trajectory. Building on this insight, we introduce HyperLens, a high-resolution probe designed to trace confidence trajectories and quantify the cognitive effort during inference. Across LLMs and datasets, HyperLens reveals a consistent divergence in confidence trajectories that separates complex from simple tasks. We abstract this pattern into a quantitative cognitive effort metric. Our analysis reveals a fundamental principle: complex tasks consistently require higher cognitive effort. Finally, we provide a mechanistic diagnosis of a common side effect of standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT): it can reduce cognitive effort and consequently degrade performance on in-domain tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文发现Transformer深层会放大浅层置信度的微小变化，基于此提出高分辨率探针HyperLens，揭示复杂任务需要更高认知努力，并发现标准SFT会降低认知努力从而损害域内任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分析工具分辨率有限，难以理解LLM的推理动态。
AI.method: 提出HyperLens高分辨率探针，通过追踪置信度轨迹量化认知努力。
AI.result: 复杂任务需要更高认知努力；标准SFT会降低认知努力并损害域内任务性能。
AI.conclusion: Transformer深层具有内在放大机制，认知努力可作为分析推理动态的有效度量。

title: FedeKD: Energy-Based Gating for Robust Federated Knowledge Distillation under Heterogeneous Settings
summary: Federated learning (FL) operates in heterogeneous environments, where variations in data distributions and asymmetric model design often result in negative transfer. While federated knowledge distillation (FKD) avoids direct model parameter sharing, existing methods typically rely on public datasets or assume that transferred knowledge is uniformly reliable, which limits their robustness in practice. This paper presents FedeKD, a reliability-aware FKD framework that makes sample-wise trust estimation an explicit component of knowledge transfer, without relying on additional public data. Each client maintains a high-capacity private model for local learning and a lightweight shared proxy model for cross-client knowledge exchange. During training, proxy models are aggregated on the server to form a global proxy, which is then used to guide updates of the private models. At the core of FedeKD is an energy-based gating mechanism that converts task-specific private-proxy disagreement into sample-wise trust weights for backward distillation. This mechanism enables sample-wise weighting of knowledge transfer, where the proxy model contributes more to reliable samples while down-weighting unreliable ones. Extensive experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that FedeKD significantly reduces negative transfer under heterogeneous settings while maintaining strong predictive performance.

AI.tldr: FedeKD 提出了一种基于能量门控机制的可信感知联邦知识蒸馏框架，通过样本级信任加权来缓解异质环境下的负迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦知识蒸馏方法要么依赖公共数据集，要么假设转移的知识均匀可靠，在异质环境下容易出现负迁移问题。
AI.method: 每个客户端维护一个高容量的私有模型（本地学习）和一个轻量级共享代理模型（跨客户端知识交换）。服务器聚合代理模型形成全局代理，指导私有模型更新。核心是能量门控机制，将私有模型与代理模型的差异转换为样本级信任权重，用于反向蒸馏。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上，FedeKD 在异质设置下显著减少了负迁移，同时保持了强大的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 将样本级信任估计显式纳入知识转移，无需公共数据，即可有效提升联邦学习在异质环境下的鲁棒性。

title: COVID-19 Infodemic. Understanding content features in detecting fake news using a machine learning approach
summary: The use of content features, particularly textual and linguistic for fake news detection is under-researched, despite empirical evidence showing the features could contribute to differentiating real and fake news. To this end, this study investigates a selection of content features such as word bigrams, part of speech distribution etc. to improve fake news detection. We performed a series of experiments on a new dataset gathered during the COVID-19 pandemic and using Decision Tree, K-Nearest Neighbor, Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machine and Random Forest. Random Forest yielded the best results, followed closely by Support Vector Machine, across all setups. In general, both the textual and linguistic features were found to improve fake news detection when used separately, however, combining them into a single model did not improve the detection significantly. Differences were also noted between the use of bigrams and part of speech tags. The study shows that textual and linguistic features can be used successfully in detecting fake news using the traditional machine learning approach as opposed to deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了文本和语言特征（如词二元组、词性分布等）在COVID-19疫情期间假新闻检测中的作用，使用决策树、KNN、逻辑回归、SVM和随机森林等传统机器学习方法进行实验。结果表明随机森林表现最佳，文本和语言特征单独使用时能提升检测效果，但两者结合并未显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管有实证证据表明内容特征（尤其是文本和语言特征）有助于区分真假新闻，但这类特征在假新闻检测领域的研究仍不充分，因此作者希望系统性地探究这些特征的有效性。
AI.method: 构建了一个COVID-19疫情期间的新数据集，提取词二元组（bigrams）和词性（POS）标签分布等特征，使用决策树、KNN、逻辑回归、SVM和随机森林五种传统机器学习分类器进行实验对比。
AI.result: 随机森林在所有实验设置中表现最佳，SVM紧随其后。文本和语言特征单独使用时均能改善假新闻检测效果，但两者组合并未带来显著提升。二元组和词性标签之间存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 文本和语言特征可以成功用于传统机器学习方法的假新闻检测，无需依赖深度学习；但不同特征类型的融合方式仍需进一步探索。

title: MTL-MAD: Multi-Task Learners are Effective Medical Anomaly Detectors
summary: Anomaly detection in medical images is a challenging task, since anomalies are not typically available during training. Recent methods leverage a single pretext task coupled with a large-scale pre-trained model to reach state-of-the-art performance. Instead, we propose to learn multiple self-supervised and pseudo-labeling tasks from scratch, using a joint model based on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). By carefully integrating multiple proxy tasks, the joint model effectively learns a robust representation of normal anatomical structures, so that anomaly scores can be derived based on how well the multi-task learner (MTL) solves each task during inference. We perform comprehensive experiments on BMAD, a recent benchmark that comprises a broad range of medical image modalities. The empirical results indicate that our multi-task learner is an effective anomaly detector, outperforming all state-of-the-art competitors on BMAD.
