AI.result: 在BEAT2和ZeroEGGS数据集上，通过定量指标、参考身份控制测试、同音频诊断、定性比较和人工偏好评估，证明该方法优于风格编码坍塌、全参考注意力和单片段微调等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将去噪时的说话人记忆与生成后的保守矩校正分离，显著提升了未见说话人的手势个性化效果。

title: Which Are the Low-Resource Languages of the Semantic Web?
comment: ESWC 2026 - 23rd European Semantic Web Conference, May 2026, Dubrovnik, Croatia
summary: Emerging digital technologies are exacerbating the existing divide in Open Access Data (OAD) between high-and low-resource languages, excluding many communities from the global digital transformation. Multilingual Linked Open Data Knowledge Graphs (LOD KGs) could contribute to mitigating this divide through cross-lingual transfer; however, no clear quantitative definition of low-resource languages has yet been established in the context of LOD KGs. In this poster, we present a methodology to analyze the distribution of languages across LOD KGs and propose a preliminary multi-level categorization based on DBpedia, BabelNet, and Wikidata. This categorization is leveraged to bring a formal definition of low-, high-, and medium-resource languages that could be later leveraged to select cross-lingual transfer candidates.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于DBpedia、BabelNet和Wikidata的多层次分类方法，用于量化定义LOD知识图谱中的低资源语言，以促进跨语言迁移和数据公平性。
AI.motivation: 新兴数字技术加剧了高低资源语言在开放数据访问上的鸿沟，而多语言LOD知识图谱可通过跨语言迁移缓解这一问题，但目前缺乏对低资源语言的定量定义。
AI.method: 分析LOD知识图谱中语言的分布情况，基于DBpedia、BabelNet和Wikidata提出初步的多层次分类体系，用于形式化定义低、中、高资源语言。
AI.result: 提出了一个初步的多层次语言资源分类体系，可用于后续选择跨语言迁移的候选语言。
AI.conclusion: 该分类方法有助于形式化定义低资源语言，从而促进多语言LOD知识图谱中的跨语言迁移，缩小高低资源语言之间的数据鸿沟。

title: Full-Spectrum Graph Neural Network: Expressive and Scalable
summary: It is well established that spectral graph neural networks (GNNs) can universally approximate node signals; however, their expressive power remains bounded by the 1-dimensional Weisfeiler-Lehman test, which is mirrored in their lack of universality for higher-order signals. To go beyond this bound, we propose the Full-Spectrum GNN (FSpecGNN), a second-order generalization of classical spectral GNNs. FSpecGNN advances spectral filtering in two perspectives: (1) it lifts the signal from the node domain to the node-pair domain; and (2) it extends the univariate spectral filter over eigenvalues to a bivariate filter over eigenvalue pairs. We show that classical spectral GNNs arise as a diagonal special case of FSpecGNN, and prove that FSpecGNN can be at most as expressive as Local 2-GNN while universally approximating node-pair signals, the latter being particularly beneficial for heterophilic graph learning. Moreover, FSpecGNN admits scalable implementations that avoid explicit node-pair-level computations; combined with a low-rank approximation that reduces full-spectrum convolution to a combination of polynomial spectral filters, it enables learning on large graphs. Empirically, FSpecGNN validates the predicted expressivity and delivers strong performance on heterophilic benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Full-Spectrum GNN (FSpecGNN)，通过将信号从节点域提升到节点对域、将单变量谱滤波器扩展为双变量滤波器，实现二阶谱图神经网络，突破了经典谱GNN的表达能力上限，能够通用逼近节点对信号，尤其适用于异配图学习。
AI.motivation: 经典谱图神经网络受限于1-WL测试，无法处理高阶信号，表达能力存在瓶颈。为了超越这一界限，作者提出二阶谱GNN，增强对节点对信号的通用逼近能力。
AI.method: 提出FSpecGNN：(1) 将信号从节点域提升到节点对域；(2) 将单变量特征值谱滤波器扩展为双变量特征值对滤波器。经典谱GNN是其对角特例。通过低秩近似将全谱卷积转化为多项式谱滤波器组合，避免显式节点对级计算，支持大规模图学习。
AI.result: 理论证明FSpecGNN最多与Local 2-GNN表达能力相当，并能通用逼近节点对信号；实验在异配图基准上取得强性能。
AI.conclusion: FSpecGNN通过二阶谱扩展突破了经典谱GNN的表达上限，在异配图学习中展现出优势，且具备可扩展的实现方式。

title: Arena as Offline Reward: Efficient Fine-Grained Preference Optimization for Diffusion Models
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) effectively promotes preference alignment of text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models. To improve computational efficiency, direct preference optimization (DPO), which avoids explicit reward modeling, has been widely studied. However, its reliance on binary feedback limits it to coarse-grained modeling on chosen-rejected pairs, resulting in suboptimal optimization. In this paper, we propose ArenaPO, which leverages Arena scores as offline rewards to provide refined feedback, thus achieving efficient and fine-grained optimization without a reward model. This enables ArenaPO to benefit from both the rich rewards of traditional RLHF and the efficiency of DPO. Specifically, we first construct a model Arena in which each model's capability is represented as a Gaussian distribution, and infer these capabilities by traversing the annotated pairwise preferences. Each output image is treated as a sample from the corresponding capability distribution. Then, for a image pair, conditioned on the two capability distributions and the observed pairwise preference, the absolute quality gap is estimated using latent-variable inference based on truncated normal distribution, which serves as fine-grained feedback during training. It does not require a reward model and can be computed offline, thus introducing no additional training overhead. We conduct ArenaPO training on Pick-a-Pic v2 and HPD v3 datasets, showing that ArenaPO consistently outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ArenaPO方法，利用Elo竞技场评分作为离线奖励信号（而非二元偏好）来直接优化文本到图像的扩散模型，结合了传统RLHF的丰富奖励与DPO的高效性，无需显式奖励模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的DPO方法仅依赖二元反馈（chosen/rejected），导致优化粒度粗糙、效果次优。作者希望在不引入额外奖励模型的前提下，获得更细粒度的反馈信号。
AI.method: 1) 构建模型竞技场，各模型能力用高斯分布表示；2) 通过遍历标注的成对偏好推断能力分布；3) 基于两个能力分布和观察到的偏好，利用截断正态分布的潜变量推理估计绝对质量差距，作为细粒度反馈；4) 使用该离线反馈进行DPO式优化。
AI.result: 在Pick-a-Pic v2和HPD v3数据集上的实验表明，ArenaPO一致优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ArenaPO通过竞技场评分提供细粒度离线奖励，实现了比DPO更优的偏好对齐，同时保持了无奖励模型的高效性。

title: In Data or Invisible: Toward a Better Digital Representation of Low-Resource Languages with Knowledge Graphs
summary: Emerging digital technologies are exacerbating the existing divide in Open Access Data (OAD) between high-and low-resource languages, excluding many communities from participating in the global digital transformation. In this PhD proposal, we aim to address this gap, focusing on the language coverage of Linked Open Data knowledge graphs (LOD KGs). First, we identify key variables that characterize language distribution in LOD, including the number of Wikipedia articles per language edition and the number of language-tagged entities in LOD KGs. These variables are analyzed across three major multilingual LOD KGs, DBpedia, BabelNet, and Wikidata, providing insights into the representation and distribution of languages within LOD. Building on this analysis, we intend to study the impact of cross-lingual transfer candidate selection on the task of multilingual KG completion. In particular, we plan to investigate strategies based on linguistic proximity and the availability of curated annotated alignments between languages. Language proximity also motivates us to explore the benefits of analogical reasoning that relies on (dis)similarities and has not yet been investigated to identify correspondences across languages to improve KG completion performance and enhance language coverage in LOD.

AI.tldr: 该博士论文聚焦于低资源语言在开放关联数据知识图谱中的覆盖不足问题，通过分析语言分布特征、研究跨语言迁移策略和类比推理方法，旨在提升多语言知识图谱补全效果，缩小高资源与低资源语言间的数字鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 新兴数字技术加剧了高资源语言与低资源语言在开放数据获取上的鸿沟，许多社区被排除在全球数字化转型之外。本文旨在解决这一问题，重点关注关联开放数据知识图谱中的语言覆盖不足。
AI.method: 1) 识别关键变量（如维基百科文章数量、语言标记实体数量）分析三大多语言LOD知识图谱（DBpedia、BabelNet、Wikidata）中的语言分布；2) 研究跨语言迁移候选选择策略（基于语言接近性和对齐标注）对多语言KG补全的影响；3) 探索基于类比推理（利用相似性/差异性）的跨语言对应关系识别方法。
AI.result: 尚未给出具体实验结果，属于研究提案阶段。预期成果包括提升低资源语言在LOD知识图谱中的覆盖率和多语言KG补全性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合语言分布分析、跨语言迁移策略和类比推理，有望有效缩小高资源与低资源语言在开放数据领域的差距，增强多语言知识图谱的语言覆盖均等性。

title: Adaptive Selection of LoRA Components in Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning
summary: Differentially private federated fine-tuning of large models with LoRA suffers from aggregation error caused by LoRA's multiplicative structure, which is further amplified by DP noise and degrades both stability and accuracy. Existing remedies apply a single update mode uniformly across all layers and all communication rounds (or alternate them on a fixed schedule), ignoring both the structural asymmetry between the two LoRA factors and the round-wise dynamics of training. We propose AS-LoRA, an adaptive framework defined by three axes (i) layer-wise freedom, in which each layer independently selects its active component, (ii) round-wise adaptivity, in which the selection updates over communication rounds, and (iii) a curvature-aware score derived from a second-order approximation of the loss. Theoretically, AS-LoRA eliminates the reconstruction-error floor of layer-tied schedules, accelerates convergence, implicitly biases solutions toward flatter minima, and incurs no additional privacy cost. Across GLUE, SQuAD, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet under strict DP budgets and non-IID partitions, AS-LoRA improves over the federated LoRA baselines by up to $+7.5$ pp on GLUE and $+12.5$ pp on MNLI-mm for example, while matching or exceeding SVD-based aggregation methods at $33\text{--}180 \times$ lower aggregation cost and with negligible communication overhead. Code for the proposed method is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/as_lora-F75F/.

AI.tldr: AS-LoRA提出了一种自适应框架，通过层粒度自由、轮次粒度自适应和曲率感知评分，解决差分隐私联邦微调中LoRA的聚合误差问题，在GLUE、SQuAD等任务上显著提升精度并降低聚合开销。
AI.motivation: 现有DP联邦微调中LoRA的乘法结构导致聚合误差，且被DP噪声放大，而现有方法对所有层和所有通信轮次采用统一更新模式，忽略了LoRA两个因子的结构不对称性和训练动态，导致稳定性和精度下降。
AI.method: 提出AS-LoRA框架，包含三个维度：(i) 层粒度自由——每层独立选择其活跃组件；(ii) 轮次自适应——选择策略随通信轮次动态更新；(iii) 曲率感知评分——基于损失二阶近似的评分函数。理论上消除了层绑定调度的重构误差下限，加速收敛，隐式偏向平坦极小值，且无额外隐私开销。
AI.result: 在GLUE、SQuAD、CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet上，严格DP预算和非IID分区下，AS-LoRA相比联邦LoRA基线在GLUE上提升高达+7.5pp，MNLI-mm上+12.5pp，以33-180倍更低的聚合成本匹敌甚至超越SVD聚合方法，通信开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: AS-LoRA通过自适应的层和轮次选择策略，有效解决了DP联邦微调中LoRA的聚合误差问题，实现了精度、稳定性和效率的全面改进。

title: MSD-Score: Multi-Scale Distributional Scoring for Reference-Free Image Caption Evaluation
comment: Preprint. 17 pages, 10 figures. Code is available at: https://steinsgatesg.github.io/MSDScore/
summary: Evaluating image captions without references remains challenging because global embedding similarity often misses fine-grained mismatches such as hallucinated objects, missing attributes, or incorrect relations. We propose MSD-Score, a reference-free metric that models image patch and text token embeddings as von Mises-Fisher mixtures on the unit hypersphere. Instead of treating each modality as a single point, MSD-Score formulates image-text matching as a multi-scale distributional scoring problem. Semantic discrepancies are quantified via a weighted bi-directional KL divergence and combined with global similarity in a multi-scale framework for both single- and multi-candidate evaluations. Extensive experiments show that MSD-Score achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human judgments among reference-free metrics. Beyond accuracy, its probabilistic formulation yields transparent and decomposable diagnostics of local grounding errors, providing a deterministic complementary signal to holistic similarity metrics and judge-based evaluators.

AI.tldr: 提出MSD-Score，一种无需参考文本的图像描述评估指标，通过将图像块和文本词元的嵌入建模为von Mises-Fisher混合分布，在单位超球面上进行多尺度分布匹配，实现细粒度的语义对齐检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的无参考图像描述评估方法依赖全局嵌入相似度，无法捕捉幻觉物体、缺失属性或错误关系等细粒度错配问题。
AI.method: 将图像块与文本词元嵌入建模为von Mises-Fisher混合分布（在单位超球面上），通过加权双向KL散度量化语义差异，并结合全局相似度构建多尺度评估框架，支持单候选和多候选评估。
AI.result: 在多项实验中，MSD-Score在无参考评估指标中达到了与人类判断最佳的斯皮尔曼/皮尔逊相关性。
AI.conclusion: MSD-Score不仅准确性高，其概率公式还能提供可解释的局部接地错误诊断，是对全局相似性指标和基于评判器的评估器的有效补充。

title: ICU-Bench:Benchmarking Continual Unlearning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress across many domains, their training on large-scale multimodal datasets raises serious privacy concerns, making effective machine unlearning increasingly necessary. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on static or short-sequence settings, offering limited support for evaluating continual privacy deletion requests in realistic deployments. To bridge this gap, we introduce ICU-Bench, a continual multimodal unlearning benchmark built on privacy-critical document data. ICU-Bench contains 1,000 privacy-sensitive profiles from two document domains, medical reports and labor contracts, with 9,500 images, 16,000 question-answer pairs, and 100 forget tasks. Additionally, new continual unlearning metrics are introduced, facilitating a comprehensive analysis of forgetting effectiveness, historical forgetting preservation, retained utility, and stability throughout the continual unlearning process. Through extensive experiments with representative unlearning methods on ICU-Bench, we show that existing methods generally struggle in continual settings and exhibit clear limitations in balancing forgetting quality, utility preservation, and scalability over long task sequences. These findings highlight the need for multimodal unlearning methods explicitly designed for continual privacy deletion.

AI.tldr: 提出ICU-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大模型在持续学习场景下的机器遗忘（隐私删除）能力，包含1000个隐私敏感文档、9500张图像、16000个QA对和100个遗忘任务，实验表明现有方法在持续遗忘设置下效果有限。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在大规模多模态数据集上训练引发严重隐私问题，需要有效的机器遗忘机制。然而现有基准主要关注静态或短序列设置，无法支持现实部署中持续的隐私删除请求评估。
AI.method: 构建ICU-Bench基准，包含医疗报告和劳动合同两个领域的1000个隐私敏感档案；设计持续遗忘评价指标（遗忘效果、历史遗忘保持、保留效用、稳定性）；在多个代表性遗忘方法上进行实验。
AI.result: 现有遗忘方法在持续设置下普遍表现不佳，在遗忘质量、效用保持和长任务序列可扩展性之间存在明显权衡与局限。
AI.conclusion: 需要专门为持续隐私删除设计的多模态遗忘方法，当前方法难以满足现实部署中连续遗忘请求的需求。

title: A Measure-Theoretic Finite-Sample Theory for Adaptive-Data Fitted Q-Iteration
summary: While reinforcement learning (RL) promises to revolutionize the control of complex nonlinear robotic systems, a profound gap persists between the heuristic success of model-free off-policy deep RL and the underlying theory, which remains largely confined to tabular or linearizable settings. We identify the cause of this gap as an emergent isolation of three traditions: (i) measure-theoretic MDP foundations on general spaces limit their analysis to exact dynamic programming and ignore all error sources of a learning process; (ii) deterministic error propagation analysis addresses the approximation error via concentrability coefficients without a finite-sample analysis of the estimation error; and (iii) PAC generalization bounds characterize the estimation errors of simplified topologies. We bridge these traditions with a unified theoretical framework for fitted Q-iteration (FQI) on general measurable Borel spaces. Our main result provides a finite-sample, adaptive-data performance bound by chaining measure-theoretic probability with Bellman-operator contraction in Banach spaces. We prove that sequential Rademacher complexity controls Bellman-regression generalization under policy-dependent data collection. We further extend this analysis to provide the first cumulative, pathwise online regret guarantee for FQI in continuous spaces. These results lay the necessary foundations for the formal analysis of many modern deep RL algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对强化学习理论与实际应用之间的鸿沟，提出了一个统一的数学框架，将测度论MDP基础、确定性误差传播和PAC泛化边界三种传统方法融合，为连续空间上的Fitted Q-Iteration (FQI)算法提供了有限样本性能保证和在线遗憾界限。
AI.motivation: 模型无关的off-policy深度强化学习在实际中取得了启发式成功，但理论基础仍然局限于表格或线性化设定。作者识别出三种研究传统（测度论MDP、确定性误差传播、PAC泛化界）彼此孤立，缺乏统一的有限样本理论框架。
AI.method: 通过链式测度论概率与Banach空间中的Bellman算子压缩，构建统一理论框架；证明序列Rademacher复杂度在策略依赖数据采集下控制Bellman回归泛化；将该分析扩展到连续空间中FQI的在线遗憾分析。
AI.result: 首次为连续空间上的FQI提供了有限样本、自适应数据性能界限，以及累积路径在线遗憾保证。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为现代深度RL算法的形式化分析奠定了必要基础，弥合了理论分析与启发式成功之间的鸿沟。

title: Revisiting Uncertainty: On Evidential Learning for Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. 16 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
summary: Partially relevant video retrieval aims to retrieve untrimmed videos using text queries that describe only partial content. However, the inherent asymmetry between brief queries and rich video content inevitably introduces uncertainty into the retrieval process. In this setting, vague queries often induce semantic ambiguity across videos, a challenge that is further exacerbated by the sparse temporal supervision within videos, which fails to provide sufficient matching evidence. To address this, we propose Holmes, a hierarchical evidential learning framework that aggregates multi-granular cross-modal evidence to quantify and model uncertainty explicitly. At the inter-video level, similarity scores are interpreted as evidential support and modeled via a Dirichlet distribution. Based on the proposed three-fold principle, we perform fine-grained query identification, which then guides query-adaptive calibrated learning. At the intra-video level, to accumulate denser evidence, we formulate a soft query-clip alignment via flexible optimal transport with an adaptive dustbin, which alleviates sparse temporal supervision while suppressing spurious local responses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Holmes outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is released at https://github.com/lijun2005/ICML26-Holmes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Holmes，一种层次化证据学习框架，通过多粒度跨模态证据聚合来显式量化和建模不确定性，以解决部分相关视频检索中查询与视频内容不对称导致的语义模糊问题。在视频间级别，将相似度分数解释为证据支持并通过Dirichlet分布建模；在视频内级别，通过带自适应dustbin的最优传输实现软查询-片段对齐。实验表明方法优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 部分相关视频检索中，短查询与丰富视频内容存在固有不匹配，导致不确定性。模糊查询引发跨视频语义歧义，加上视频内时序监督稀疏，无法提供足够匹配证据，现有方法未能有效处理这种不确定性。
AI.method: 提出层次化证据学习框架Holmes：1) 视频间级别：将相似度分数作为证据支持，用Dirichlet分布建模，基于三折原则进行细粒度查询识别与自适应校准学习；2) 视频内级别：通过带自适应dustbin的柔性最优传输实现软查询-片段对齐，缓解稀疏时序监督并抑制虚假局部响应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，Holmes优于所有现有最先进方法，证明了层次化证据学习在处理不确定性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模不确定性是解决部分相关视频检索中查询-视频不对称问题的有效途径，Holmes通过层次化证据聚合提供了可行方案。

title: MAS-Algorithm: A Workflow for Solving Algorithmic Programming Problems with a Multi-Agent System
summary: Algorithmic problem solving serves as a rigorous testbed for evaluating structured reasoning in AI coding systems, as it directly reflects a model's ability to perform structured reasoning in complex scenarios.Existing approaches predominantly rely on model-centric strategies, such as architectural modifications and data scaling, which are costly and offer limited interpretability. Alternative methods leveraging external tools or prompting techniques (e.g., chain-of-thought) are often fragmented and lack a unified framework. In this paper, we propose MAS-Algorithm, a systematic multi-agent workflow for algorithmic problem solving inspired by the practices of competitive programmers and algorithm engineers. Our framework decomposes the end-to-end solving process into modular stages, enabling structured reasoning, tool integration, and flexible coordination among agents. The design emphasizes both rigor and extensibility, allowing it to generalize across diverse problem types.Experimental results on a self-constructed benchmark demonstrate consistent improvements across multiple Qwen series models, achieving an average gain of 6.48% in acceptance rate. In contrast, parameter-efficient fine-tuning on the same data yields only a marginal improvement of 0.89%. We further observe a 4.72% gain on LiveCodeBench-Pro, along with consistent improvements across additional accuracy and efficiency metrics.Beyond performance gains, we conduct comprehensive analyses to better understand the reasoning process within the workflow, including error patterns and cross-scenario behaviors. We further perform customized replacement and ablation studies to explore the upper bound of the framework, showing that individual agents can contribute improvements of up to 27.7%. These results highlight the strong potential of MAS-Algorithm for advancing AI-driven algorithmic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出MAS-Algorithm，一种多智能体工作流，通过分解算法问题求解为模块化阶段，结合结构化推理、工具集成和智能体协调，在多个Qwen模型上实现了6.48%的接受率提升，远超微调方法的0.89%。
AI.motivation: 现有算法问题求解方法要么依赖模型中心策略（架构修改、数据扩展），成本高且可解释性差；要么使用外部工具或提示技术（如思维链），但方法零散、缺乏统一框架。需要一种系统化、可解释且高效的多智能体工作流。
AI.method: 提出MAS-Algorithm多智能体工作流，受竞标赛程序员和算法工程师实践启发，将端到端求解过程分解为多个模块化阶段，每个阶段由专门智能体负责，实现结构化推理、工具集成和灵活协调。
AI.result: 在自构建基准上，多个Qwen系列模型平均接受率提升6.48%（微调仅0.89%）；LiveCodeBench-Pro提升4.72%；消融实验显示单个智能体可贡献高达27.7%的提升。
AI.conclusion: MAS-Algorithm通过系统化的多智能体协作，显著提升了AI算法推理能力，兼具可解释性和可扩展性，为AI驱动算法推理提供了有前景的范式。

title: Revealing Modular Gradient Noise Imbalance in LLMs: Calibrating Adam via Signal-to-Noise Ratio
summary: The impressive performance of large language models (LLMs) arises from their massive scale and heterogeneous module composition. However, this structural heterogeneity introduces additional optimization challenges. While adaptive optimizers such as Adam(W) provide per-parameter adaptivity, they do not explicitly account for module-level gradient heterogeneity, resulting in slower convergence, suboptimal performance, or training instability. Existing approaches typically rely on manually tuned module-specific learning rates or specific optimization strategies, which are computationally costly and difficult to generalize across tasks or models. To establish a more principled approach, we first analyze the noise-damping behavior of Adam in high-noise modules and introduce \textbf{Module-wise Learning Rate Scaling via SNR (MoLS)}. MoLS estimates module-level SNRs to scale Adam updates, allowing automated module-wise learning rate allocation without manual tuning. Empirical results through multiple LLM training benchmarks demonstrate that MoLS improves convergence speed and generalization, achieving performance comparable to carefully tuned module-specific learning rates, while remaining compatible with memory-efficient training algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出MoLS方法，通过估计模块级信噪比（SNR）自动缩放Adam更新，无需手动调参即可实现模块级学习率分配，在LLM训练中提升收敛速度和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: LLM的结构异质性导致不同模块梯度噪声水平差异大，Adam等自适应优化器未显式考虑模块级别的梯度异质性，导致收敛慢、性能不佳或训练不稳定。现有手动调整模块学习率的方法成本高且难以泛化。
AI.method: 分析Adam在高噪声模块中的噪声抑制行为，提出MoLS（Module-wise Learning Rate Scaling via SNR），通过估计每个模块的信噪比（SNR）自动缩放Adam的学习率更新，实现自动化模块级学习率分配。
AI.result: 在多个LLM训练基准上，MoLS提升了收敛速度和泛化性能，达到了与精心手动调参的模块级学习率相当的效果，且兼容内存高效的训练算法。
AI.conclusion: MoLS提供了一种无需手动调参的自动化模块级学习率分配方法，有效解决了LLM训练中模块梯度异质性问题，兼顾了性能提升和实用性。

title: AMIEOD: Adaptive Multi-Experts Image Enhancement for Object Detection in Low-Illumination Scenes
comment: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary:
In multimedia application scenarios, images captured under low-illumination conditions often lead to lower accuracy in visual perception tasks compared to those taken in well-lit environments.
  To tackle this challenge, we propose AMIEOD, an image enhancement-enabled object detection framework for low-illumination scenes, where the two tasks are jointly optimized in a detection performance-oriented manner.
  Specifically, to fully exploit the information in poorly lit images, a Multi-Experts Image Enhancement Module (MEIEM) is proposed, which leverages diverse enhancement strategies.
  On this basis, aiming to better align the MEIEM with the detection task, we propose a Detection-Guided Regression Loss (DGRL) that utilizes the detection result to decide the regression target.
  Moreover, to dynamically select the most suitable enhancement strategy from MEIEM during inference, we construct an Expert Selection Module (ESM) guided by the proposed Detection-Guided Cross-Entropy (DGCE) loss, which formulates the optimization of ESM as a classification task.
  The improved method is well-matched with current detection algorithms to improve their performance in dim scenes.
  Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves object detection accuracy in low-illumination conditions. Our code has been released at https://github.com/scujayfantasy/AMIEOD

AI.tldr: 提出AMIEOD框架，通过多专家图像增强模块（MEIEM）和检测导向的损失函数（DGRL、DGCE），在低光照条件下联合优化图像增强与目标检测任务，显著提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 低光照环境下拍摄的图像会导致视觉感知任务（如目标检测）的准确率显著下降，现有方法未充分将图像增强与检测任务联合优化。
AI.method: 1) 多专家图像增强模块（MEIEM）：采用多种增强策略充分挖掘低光照图像信息；2) 检测引导回归损失（DGRL）：利用检测结果指导回归目标；3) 专家选择模块（ESM）+ 检测引导交叉熵损失（DGCE）：动态选择最优增强策略。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，所提方法显著提升了低光照条件下的目标检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过检测性能导向的联合优化，有效对齐图像增强与检测任务，为低光照场景下的目标检测提供了有效方案。

title: HaM-World: Soft-Hamiltonian World Models with Selective Memory for Planning
summary: World models enable model-based planning through learned latent dynamics, but imagined rollouts become unstable as the planning horizon grows or the dynamics distribution shifts. We argue that this instability reflects two missing structures in planner-facing latents: history-conditioned memory for approximate Markov completeness, and geometric organization that separates configuration, momentum, and task semantics. We propose HaM-World (HMW), a structured world model that decomposes the latent state into a canonical (q, p) subspace and a context subspace c, while using Mamba selective state-space memory as the history-conditioned input to the same latent dynamics. Within this interface, (q, p) evolves through an energy-derived Hamiltonian vector field plus learnable residual/control dynamics, while c captures semantic, dissipative, and non-conservative factors. This gives the planner a single latent state shared by dynamics prediction, reward/value estimation, imagined rollouts, and CEM action search. On four DeepMind Control Suite tasks, HaM-World reaches the highest Avg. AUC (117.9, +9.5%), reduces long-horizon rollout error to 45% of a strong baseline model, and wins 11/12 k in {3,5,7} MSE cells. Under 12 OOD perturbations spanning dynamics shifts, action delay, and observation masking, HaM-World achieves the highest return in every condition, with average OOD-return gains of 10.2% on Finger Spin and 13.6% on Reacher Easy. Mechanism diagnostics further show bounded action-free Hamiltonian-energy drift, structured energy variation under policy rollouts, and coherent control-induced energy transfer, supporting the intended Soft-Hamiltonian dynamics design.

AI.tldr: 提出HaM-World（HMW）结构化世界模型，将潜状态分解为规范(q,p)子空间和上下文c子空间，利用Mamba选择性状态空间记忆作为历史条件输入，结合哈密顿向量场与可学习残差/控制动力学，在DeepMind Control Suite任务中取得SOTA性能，显著降低长程 rollout 误差并提升OOD鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型在规划视野增长或动力学分布偏移时，想象 rollout 变得不稳定。作者认为这种不稳定性源于面向规划器的潜状态中缺少两种结构：用于近似马尔可夫完备性的历史条件记忆，以及将配置、动量和任务语义分离的几何组织。
AI.method: 将潜状态分解为规范(q,p)子空间（通过能量导出的哈密顿向量场+可学习残差/控制动力学演化）和上下文c子空间（捕获语义、耗散和非保守因素），使用Mamba选择性状态空间模型作为历史条件输入到潜动力学中，为规划器提供单一共享潜状态用于动力学预测、奖励/值估计、想象rollout和CEM动作搜索。
AI.result: 在四个DeepMind Control Suite任务上Avg. AUC达117.9（+9.5%），长程rollout误差降至强基线模型的45%，在{3,5,7}步MSE中赢11/12项。12种OOD扰动下每项条件均取得最高回报，Finger Spin平均OOD回报增益10.2%，Reacher Easy增益13.6%。机理诊断验证了有界无动作哈密顿能量漂移、策略rollout下的结构化能量变化以及连贯的控制诱导能量转移。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入历史条件记忆（Mamba）和几何结构化的潜状态分解（哈密顿动力学），有效解决了世界模型长程规划不稳定和分布偏移问题，验证了Soft-Hamiltonian动力学设计的有效性。

title: Reward Shaping and Action Masking for Compositional Tasks using Behavior Trees and LLMs
summary: Decomposing complex tasks into a sequence of simpler subtasks can improve learning efficiency for an autonomous agent. Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to optimize agent policies to complete subtasks, but requires well-defined subtask rewards and benefits from action masking. Recent work uses large language models (LLMs) to automate reward shaping and action masking, however none of them fully address reactivity to subtask failure and modularity to varying objects for compositional tasks. To overcome these challenges, we develop masking reward behavior tree (MRBT), a symbolic structure used as a reactive and modular reward and action mask function. We design an MRBT template and derive logical specifications to construct and verify MRBTs for a sequence of object-interaction subtasks. Further, we develop an automated pipeline that uses an LLM to generate MRBTs robust to varying task objects, an SMT-solver to verify correctness of specifications, and a neurosymbolic RL loop to train agents on compositional tasks. Experiments demonstrate successful generation and refinement of five MRBTs, consistently improving training efficiency and task success rates over baselines and MRBTs without action masking. We further highlight three advantages of MRBTs: transferability, modularity, and verifiability.

AI.tldr: 提出MRBT（掩码奖励行为树）作为反应式模块化奖励和动作掩码函数，结合LLM生成、SMT验证和神经符号强化学习循环，提升组合任务的训练效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM辅助的奖励塑形和动作掩码方法未能充分处理子任务失败的反应性和组合任务中不同对象的模块化问题。
AI.method: 设计MRBT模板和逻辑规范，利用LLM自动生成对变体对象鲁棒的MRBT，用SMT求解器验证规范正确性，在神经符号RL循环中训练智能体。
AI.result: 成功生成和优化五个MRBT，在训练效率和任务成功率上持续优于基线及无动作掩码的MRBT。
AI.conclusion: MRBT具有可迁移性、模块化和可验证性三大优势，为组合任务中的LLM辅助RL提供了有效方案。

title: LARGO: Low-Rank Hypernetwork for Handling Missing Modalities
summary: Addressing missing modalities is an important challenge in multimodal image analysis and often relies on complex architectures that do not transfer easily to different datasets without architectural modifications or hyperparameter tuning. While most existing methods tackle this problem in feature space by engineering representations that are robust to missing inputs, we instead operate in weight space. We propose LARGO, a hypernetwork that compresses the $2^N-1$ dedicated missing-modality models into a single network by modelling the convolutional weights using the Canonical Polyadic (CP) tensor decomposition. Extensive experimental validation on BraTS 2018 (4 modalities, 15 scenarios) and ISLES 2022 (3 modalities, 7 scenarios) shows that our method ranks first in 47 out of 52 configurations, achieving average Dice improvements of +0.68$\%$ and +2.53$\%$ over state-of-the-art baselines (mmFormer, M$^{3}$AE, ShaSpec, SimMLM). A proof-of-concept experiment on avMNIST suggests that LARGO may extend beyond medical imaging to heterogeneous non-medical modalities.

AI.tldr: 提出 LARGO，一种基于 CP 张量分解的超网络方法，通过在权重空间而非特征空间处理多模态缺失问题，将 $2^N-1$ 个专用模型压缩为单一网络，在 BraTS 2018 和 ISLES 2022 上取得 SOTA 结果。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态缺失方法依赖复杂架构且难以跨数据集迁移，特征空间方法需要工程化鲁棒表征，缺乏通用高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用 CP 张量分解对卷积权重进行建模，通过超网络 (hypernetwork) 将 $2^N-1$ 个缺失模态专用模型压缩为单一网络，在权重空间而非特征空间处理模态缺失问题。
AI.result: 在 BraTS 2018（4 模态，15 场景）和 ISLES 2022（3 模态，7 场景）上，52 个配置中 47 个排名第一，Dice 平均提升 +0.68% 和 +2.53%，超越 mmFormer、M³AE 等基线。
AI.conclusion: LARGO 在权重空间处理模态缺失是有效且可迁移的方案，在医学影像领域表现优异，并有望推广至非医学多模态场景。

title: Temporal Smoothness Doubly Robust Learning for Debiased Knowledge Tracing
summary: Knowledge Tracing (KT) is fundamental to intelligent education systems, yet relies on educational logs that are selectively observed. The non-random nature of exercise recommendations and student choices inevitably induces severe selection bias. Most existing KT methods neglect this issue, training on observed logs using standard empirical risk, which yields biased mastery estimates and accumulates errors in subsequent recommendations. To address this, we introduce a doubly robust (DR) formulation for KT that integrates a propensity model with an error imputation model, theoretically guaranteeing unbiasedness if either model is accurate. Beyond unbiasedness, in the sequential setting of KT, we identify that the estimator's performance is compromised by variance-dependent stochastic deviations that accumulate over time, thereby causing training instability and limiting performance. To mitigate this, we derive a generalization bound that explicitly characterizes the impact of estimator variance and identifies temporal smoothness as a key factor in controlling it. Building on these theoretical insights, we propose the Temporal Smoothness Doubly Robust (TSDR) framework. TSDR jointly optimizes the KT predictor and the imputation model with a smoothness regularizer, effectively reducing variance while preserving the unbiasedness guarantee of DR. Experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TSDR consistently enhances various state-of-the-art KT backbones, underscoring the vital role of principled bias correction in KT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间平滑双重鲁棒（TSDR）框架，通过结合倾向加权与误差插补模型，在知识追踪中消除选择性偏差，并引入平滑正则化降低方差累积问题，在多个基准上提升SOTA KT模型性能。
AI.motivation: 知识追踪（KT）依赖教育日志，但练习推荐和学生选择具有非随机性，导致严重的选择偏差。现有KT方法忽略此问题，在偏差数据上训练会得到有偏的掌握度估计，并在后续推荐中累积误差。
AI.method: 提出双重鲁棒（DR）KT公式（倾向模型+误差插补模型），理论上任一模型准确即可保证无偏性。进一步推导泛化界，发现方差随时间的随机波动导致训练不稳定，识别出时间平滑性是控制方差的关键。基于此提出TSDR框架，在联合优化KT预测器与插补模型时加入平滑正则化，既保持DR的无偏性保证，又有效降低方差。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上，TSDR一致提升了多种SOTA KT骨干模型的性能，验证了有原则的偏差校正对KT的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 选择性偏差是KT中不可忽视的核心问题，TSDR通过理论驱动的双重鲁棒+时间平滑机制有效解决了偏差与方差的双重挑战，为智能教育系统中的更可靠知识追踪提供了新范。

title: Selective Rollout: Mid-Trajectory Termination for Multi-Sample Agent RL
summary: Group-relative RL training (GRPO) samples a small group of parallel rollouts for every training prompt and uses their within-group reward spread to compute per-trajectory advantages. In agentic environments each rollout is a long multi-turn dialogue with one LLM call per step, so this multi-sample multiplier dominates the total training cost. When every rollout of a prompt ends with the same reward, the group has zero reward variance and contributes no gradient, so the extra rollouts add no information; such groups are common in practice (typically around 40% of all groups), so the wasted-compute fraction is substantial rather than marginal. Existing methods filter such groups at the prompt level, either after their rollouts are paid for or before any rollout begins, but both decide without using information that becomes available during the rollout itself. We instead ask whether the in-group divergence between the partial trajectories at an intermediate step can already predict that the group will be zero-variance: when the parallel rollouts have already converged on the same action prefix, the group is on track to produce a single reward, and we can stop early. We propose a one-parameter gate that stops a group when the mean pairwise prefix edit distance between its partial action sequences falls below a threshold. On a 60-iteration on-policy GRPO run on ALFWorld with Qwen2.5-7B, averaged over four random seeds, the gated arm finishes 10.7% faster in wall-clock (bootstrap 95% CI excludes 0) and shifts held-out success rate on 50 unseen tasks by +2.5 pp, with the held-out gain tracing to a measurable reduction in zero-advantage gradient-batch dilution. Code is available at https://github.com/zhiyuanZhai20/selective-rollout.

AI.tldr: 针对GRPO训练中因零方差组（约40%）导致的计算浪费问题，提出一个基于编辑距离的早期停止门控机制，在中间步骤预测并提前终止无效组，实现10.7%加速且性能不降。
AI.motivation: GRPO每个prompt需采样多个并行rollout，但约40%的组内所有rollout获得相同奖励，导致零方差、零梯度贡献，计算完全浪费。现有方法要么在rollout完成后筛选（已浪费），要么在开始前筛选（缺乏信息），无法利用rollout过程中产生的信息。
AI.method: 提出一个单参数门控机制：在GRPO训练的中间步骤，计算组内部分动作序列间的平均配对编辑距离（pairwise prefix edit distance）；当该距离低于阈值时，预测该组将趋向零方差，提前终止该组剩余rollout。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld中用Qwen2.5-7B进行60次迭代的on-policy GRPO实验（4个随机种子平均）：门控版本墙钟时间加速10.7%（bootstrap 95% CI排除0），50个未见任务的成功率提升+2.5个百分点，归因于零方差梯度批次稀释的减少。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用组内轨迹的部分信息进行早期停止，可以在不牺牲性能的情况下显著减少GRPO训练中的计算浪费，且该方法简单、仅需一个参数。

title: Anatomy of a Query: W5H Dimensions and FAR Patterns for Text-to-SQL Evaluation
summary: Natural language interfaces to databases have gained popularity, yet the theoretical foundations for evaluating and designing these systems remain underdeveloped. We present QUEST (Query Understanding Evaluation through Semantic Translation), a framework resting on two independently motivated components: the FAR structural invariant, which holds that every well-formed query reduces to Filter, Aggregate, and Return operations; and the W5H dimensional framework, which holds that all filtering criteria map to six semantic dimensions (Who, What, Where, When, Why, and How). Validated across five text-to-SQL datasets (n = 120,464), FAR conformance is universal across all domains and schema types, while W5H dimensional profiles vary substantially. Healthcare queries are strongly concentrated in temporal (WHEN: 80.4%) and person-centric (WHO: 73.0%) dimensions far exceeding general-domain benchmarks, and causal (WHY) and mechanistic (HOW) reasoning are near-zero everywhere, with apparent HOW exceptions reflecting quantitative aggregation rather than genuine procedural reasoning. These results identify a frontier that must be crossed for genuine machine reasoning over structured data.

AI.tldr: 提出了QUEST框架，包含两个组件：FAR结构不变性（所有查询可简化为过滤、聚合、返回）和W5H语义维度框架（六个维度：Who/What/Where/When/Why/How）。在12万+样本上验证发现FAR普遍适用，但W5H维度分布差异大：医疗查询集中在WHEN和WHO维度，而因果（WHY）和机制（HOW）推理几乎为零，揭示了当前文本到SQL系统的局限性。
AI.motivation: 自然语言到数据库接口虽然流行，但评估和设计这些系统的理论基础仍然薄弱，缺乏系统性的理论框架来理解查询的结构和语义。
AI.method: 提出QUEST框架，包含FAR结构不变性（Filter-Aggregate-Return）和W5H语义维度框架（Who/What/Where/When/Why/How），并在5个文本到SQL数据集（共120,464个样本）上进行实证验证。
AI.result: FAR结构不变量在所有领域和模式类型中普遍适用；W5H维度分布差异显著（医疗查询中WHEN占80.4%、WHO占73.0%）；因果推理（WHY）和机制推理（HOW）在所有数据集中几乎为零。
AI.conclusion: 当前文本到SQL系统缺乏因果和机制推理能力，需要跨越该前沿才能实现真正的结构化数据上的机器推理。

title: OpenGaFF: Open-Vocabulary Gaussian Feature Field with Codebook Attention
summary: Understanding open-vocabulary 3D scenes with Gaussian-based representations remains challenging due to fragmented and spatially inconsistent semantic predictions across multi-view observations. In this paper, we present OpenGaFF, a novel framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. At the core of our method is a Gaussian Feature Field that models semantics as a continuous function of Gaussian geometry and appearance. By explicitly conditioning semantic predictions on geometric structure, this formulation strengthens the coupling between geometry and semantics, leading to improved spatial coherence across similar structures in 3D space. To further enforce object-level semantic consistency, we introduce a structured codebook that serves as a set of shared semantic primitives. Furthermore, a codebook-guided attention mechanism is proposed to retrieve language features via similarity matching between query embeddings and learned codebook entries, enabling robust open-vocabulary reasoning while reducing intra-object feature variance. Extensive experiments on standard 2D and 3D open-vocabulary benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, achieving improved segmentation quality, stronger 3D semantic consistency and a semantically interpretable codebook that provides insight into the learned representation.

AI.tldr: OpenGaFF是一个基于3D高斯泼溅的开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过高斯特征场将语义与几何结构强耦合，并引入结构化码本和码本引导的注意力机制来实现空间一致和对象级一致的语义预测，在2D/3D基准上优于先前方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯的开放词汇3D场景理解方法在多视角观测下存在语义预测碎片化、空间不一致的问题，缺乏几何与语义的有效耦合。
AI.method: 1) 提出高斯特征场(Gaussian Feature Field)，将语义建模为高斯几何与外观的连续函数，增强几何-语义耦合；2) 引入结构化码本作为共享语义基元，强制对象级语义一致性；3) 设计码本引导的注意力机制，通过查询嵌入与码本条目的相似性匹配检索语言特征，减少对象内特征方差。
AI.result: 在标准2D和3D开放词汇基准上，OpenGaFF一致优于先前方法，实现了更好的分割质量、更强的3D语义一致性，并获得了语义可解释的码本。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何感知的语义建模和码本约束，可以有效解决3D场景理解中的语义不一致问题，同时码本的可解释性为理解学习到的表示提供了新视角。

title: From Coordinate Matching to Structural Alignment: Rethinking Prototype Alignment in Heterogeneous Federated Learning
summary: Heterogeneous federated learning (HtFL) aims to enable collaboration among clients that differ in both data distributions and model architectures. Prototype-based methods, which communicate class-level feature centers (prototypes) instead of full model parameters, have recently shown strong potential for HtFL. Existing prototype-based HtFL methods typically reuse the MSE-based or cosine-based alignment mechanism developed for homogeneous FL when aligning client-specific representations with global prototypes. These approaches are essentially coordinate alignment, where representations of clients are forced to match the global prototypes in the embedding space in an element-wise manner. Such alignment implicitly assumes that all clients should map their representations into the feature subspace defined by the global prototypes. This assumption is reasonable in homogeneous FL, where all clients share the same feature extractor. However, it becomes problematic in HtFL, since heterogeneous feature extractors naturally induce client-specific feature subspaces, and forcing all clients to optimize within a single global subspace unnecessarily suppresses their learning capacity. We observe that coordinate alignment implicitly couples two distinct objectives: aligning inter-class semantic structure, which is directly beneficial for classification, and enforcing a shared feature basis, which is unnecessary and even harmful under model heterogeneity. Building on this insight, we design FedSAF, which shifts the alignment objective from absolute coordinates to inter-class relational structure. We demonstrate that structural alignment consistently outperforms coordinate alignment in heterogeneous settings. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our structural alignment outperforms state-of-the-art prototype-based HtFL methods by up to 3.52\%.

AI.tldr: 提出 FedSAF，将异构联邦学习中的原型对齐从坐标级（坐标对齐）转为结构级（类间关系结构对齐），解决异构特征提取器下坐标对齐限制学习能力的问题，在多个基准上提升高达 3.52%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于原型的异构联邦学习方法使用 MSE 或余弦对齐（坐标对齐），隐含假设所有客户端应映射到全局特征子空间。这在模型异构下不合理，因为异构特征提取器自然产生客户端特定的特征子空间，坐标对齐不必要地压制了学习能力。
AI.method: 提出 FedSAF，将对齐目标从绝对坐标转为类间关系结构（structural alignment），解耦了原本耦合的类间语义结构对齐（有益分类）和共享特征基强制（有害于异构设置）两个目标。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，FedSAF 在原型异构联邦学习场景下比 SOTA 方法提升最高 3.52%。
AI.conclusion: 结构对齐在异构联邦学习中一致优于坐标对齐，验证了耦合两个目标（语义结构对齐 vs 特征基强制）在异构设置下是有害的，解耦对齐目标能有效释放异构客户端的表示学习能力。

title: Retrieval from Within: An Intrinsic Capability of Attention-Based Models
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) typically treats retrieval and generation as separate systems. We ask whether an attention-based encoder-decoder can instead retrieve directly from its own internal representations. We introduce INTRA (INTrinsic Retrieval via Attention), a framework where decoder attention queries score pre-encoded evidence chunks that are then directly reused as context for generation. By construction, INTRA unifies retrieval and generation, eliminating the retriever-generator mismatch typical of RAG pipelines. This design also amortizes context encoding by reusing precomputed encoder states across queries. On question-answering benchmarks, INTRA outperforms strong engineered retrieval pipelines on both evidence recall and end-to-end answer quality. Our results demonstrate that attention-based models already possess a retrieval mechanism that can be elicited, rather than added as an external module.

AI.tldr: 提出INTRA框架，利用注意力机制让编码器-解码器直接从自身内部表示中检索，统一检索与生成过程，在QA任务上优于传统RAG流水线。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG将检索和生成视为分离系统，导致检索器与生成器不匹配问题，且无法复用预计算编码状态。
AI.method: INTRA框架：解码器注意力查询对预编码的证据片段进行评分，直接复用为生成上下文，统一检索与生成过程。
AI.result: 在问答基准测试上，INTRA在证据召回和端到端答案质量上均优于强工程化的检索流水线。
AI.conclusion: 注意力模型本身已具备可被引出的内部检索机制，无需外挂检索模块。

title: Boosting Self-Supervised Tracking with Contextual Prompts and Noise Learning
summary: Learning robust contextual knowledge from unlabeled videos is essential for advancing self-supervised tracking. However, conventional self-supervised trackers lack effective context modeling, while existing context association methods based on non-semantic queries struggle to adapt to unlabeled tracking scenarios, making it difficult to learn reliable contextual cues. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised tracking framework, named \textbf{\tracker}, which introduces a dual-modal context association mechanism that jointly leverages fine-grained semantic prompts and contextual noise to drive the model toward learning robust tracking representations. Adherent to the easy-to-hard learning principle, our contextual association mechanism operates based on two stages. During early training, instance patch tokens (prompts) are assigned to both forward and backward tracking branches to facilitate the acquisition of tracking knowledge. As training progresses, contextual noise is gradually injected into the model to perturb feature, encouraging the tracker to learn robust tracking representations in a more complex feature space. Thus, this novel contextual association mechanism enables our self-supervised model to learn high-quality tracking representations from unlabeled videos, while being applied exclusively during training to preserve efficient inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为\tracker的自监督跟踪框架，通过双模态上下文关联机制（结合细粒度语义提示和上下文噪声）从未标记视频中学习鲁棒的跟踪表示，采用从易到难的两阶段训练策略。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督跟踪器缺乏有效的上下文建模，现有的基于非语义查询的上下文关联方法难以适应未标记的跟踪场景，无法学习可靠的上下文线索。
AI.method: 提出双模态上下文关联机制：早期阶段将实例块令牌（语义提示）分配给前后跟踪分支以获取跟踪知识；后期逐步注入上下文噪声扰动特征，迫使模型在更复杂的特征空间中学习鲁棒表示。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了该方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该上下文关联机制使自监督模型能从无标签视频中学习高质量的跟踪表示，且仅在训练时使用以保持高效推理。

title: TheraAgent: Self-Improving Therapeutic Agent for Precise and Comprehensive Treatment Planning
summary: Formulating a treatment plan is inherently a complex reasoning and refinement task rather than a simple generation problem. However, existing large language models (LLMs) mainly rely on one-shot output without explicit verification, which may result in rough, incomplete, and potentially unsafe treatment plans. To address these limitations, we propose TheraAgent, an agentic framework that replaces one-shot generation with an iterative generate-judge-refine pipeline. By mirroring the actual reasoning process of human experts who iteratively revise treatment plans, our framework progressively transforms coarse and incomplete drafts into precise, comprehensive, and safer therapeutic regimens. To facilitate the critical judge component, we introduce TheraJudge, a treatment-specific evaluation module integrated into the inference loop to enforce clinical standards. Experiments show TheraAgent achieves state-of-the-art results on HealthBench, leading in Accuracy and Completeness. In expert evaluations, it attains an 86% win rate against physicians, with superior Targeting and Harm Control. Moreover, the highly agreement between TheraJudge and HealthBench evaluations confirms the reliability of our framework.

AI.tldr: 提出TheraAgent框架，通过迭代的生成-评判-优化流程替代LLM在治疗方案制定中的单次输出，配合专用评估模块TheraJudge，在HealthBench上达到SOTA，并在专家评估中以86%胜率优于医生。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在治疗方案制定中依赖一次性输出，缺乏显式验证，导致方案粗糙、不完整且可能存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 提出TheraAgent智能体框架，采用迭代式"生成-评判-优化"流程，并引入治疗专用评估模块TheraJudge，在推理循环中强制执行临床标准。
AI.result: 在HealthBench上达到SOTA，Accuracy和Completeness领先；专家评估中以86%胜率优于医生，尤其在Targeting和Harm Control方面表现突出；TheraJudge与HealthBench评估高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 迭代式推理验证范式能显著提升LLM在复杂医疗决策任务中的表现，且专用评估模块的有效性得到验证。

title: A Testable Certificate for Constant Collapse in Teacher-Guided VAEs
summary:
Posterior collapse in variational autoencoders is often diagnosed by its symptoms: a small KL term, a strong decoder, or weak use of the latent code. These signals are useful, but they do not define a collapse boundary. We study a concrete failure mode, input-independent constant collapse, and show that this case admits an exact threshold. For any fixed nonconstant teacher distribution \(T(\cdot\mid x)\), the best constant student is the dataset-average teacher distribution, and its alignment cost is the teacher mutual information \(I_T(X;T)\). Therefore, if a strictly latent-only raw witness achieves alignment loss below this value, with a safety margin, the witness cannot be constant in the input.
  This identity turns a qualitative failure mode into a measurable one. In CIFAR-100 experiments with per-seed teacher search, full training stays on the certified side of the boundary, removing alignment drives the raw witness into the constant-student regime, and restarting from a collapsed checkpoint with alignment enabled restores the certificate. Tiny-ImageNet-200 fixed-target runs show the same prevention--collapse--rescue pattern across three independently searched teachers. Standard VAE-style baselines, including methods that preserve reconstruction quality or post-hoc predictability, remain negative under the raw certificate. The guarantee is intentionally narrow: it certifies that the matched nonconstant teacher-relative variation passes through the latent pathway, rather than claiming that all forms of posterior collapse have been ruled out.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量化变分自编码器中后验坍塌的方法：通过定义“输入无关常数坍塌”并推导其精确阈值（即教师互信息 I_T(X;T)），利用对齐损失与阈值的比较来认证潜在编码是否真正使用了输入信息。实验验证了该认证方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 后验坍塌（posterior collapse）是VAE中的常见问题，但现有诊断方法（如小KL项、强解码器）仅观察到症状，并未定义明确的坍塌边界。本文旨在提供一个可量化的、有理论保证的坍塌判定标准。
AI.method: 1) 理论推导：对于非恒定教师分布 T(·|x)，最优常数学生是数据集平均教师分布，其对齐损失的下界为教师互信息 I_T(X;T)。2) 利用纯潜在编码的“原始见证”（raw witness）的对齐损失与阈值比较：若损失低于阈值（加安全裕度），则见证不可能与输入无关。3) 在CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet-200上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100上，完整训练保持认证通过；移除对齐损失使潜在编码进入常数学生区域；从坍塌检查点重启并启用对齐可恢复认证。Tiny-ImageNet-200上重复了相同的"预防-坍塌-恢复"模式。标准VAE基线（包括保持重建质量或事后可预测性的方法）均未通过认证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个精确但刻意窄化的认证：它保证匹配的非恒定教师相关的变异性确实通过潜在编码传递，而非声称排除了所有形式的后验坍塌。

title: VISD: Enhancing Video Reasoning via Structured Self-Distillation
summary: Training VideoLLMs for complex reasoning remains challenging due to sparse sequence level rewards and the lack of fine grained credit assignment over long, temporally grounded reasoning trajectories. While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) provides reliable supervision, it fails to capture token level contributions, leading to inefficient learning. Conversely, existing self distillation methods offer dense supervision but lack structure and diagnostic specificity, and often interact unstably with reinforcement learning. In this work, we propose VISD, a structured self distillation framework that introduces diagnostically meaningful privileged information for video reasoning. VISD employs a video aware judge model to decompose reasoning quality into multiple dimensions, including answer correctness, logical consistency, and spatio-temporal grounding, and uses this structured feedback to guide a teacher policy for token level supervision. To stably integrate dense supervision with RL, we introduce a direction magnitude decoupling mechanism, where rollout level advantages computed from rewards determine update direction, while structured privileged signals modulate token level update magnitudes. This design enables semantically aligned and fine grained credit assignment, improving both reasoning faithfulness and training efficiency. Additionally, VISD incorporates curriculum scheduling and EMA based teacher stabilization to support robust optimization over long video sequences. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that VISD consistently outperforms strong baselines, improving answer accuracy and spatio temporal grounding quality. Notably, VISD reaches these gains with nearly 2x faster convergence in optimization steps, highlighting the effectiveness of structured self supervision in improving both performance and sample efficiency for VideoLLMs.

AI.tldr: VISD是一个结构化自蒸馏框架，通过视频感知裁判模型从多个维度（答案正确性、逻辑一致性、时空 grounding）分解推理质量，并结合方向-幅度解耦机制，将RL的奖励信号与结构化特权信号稳定融合，实现细粒度信用分配，在视频推理任务上显著提升性能并加速2倍收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有VideoLLM训练方法面临两难：RLVR仅提供稀疏序列级奖励，无法进行token级信用分配；自蒸馏方法提供密集监督但缺乏结构性和诊断特异性，且与RL结合不稳定。缺乏一种既能提供结构化细粒度监督，又能稳定与RL融合的训练框架。
AI.method: 1) 视频感知裁判模型：将推理质量分解为答案正确性、逻辑一致性、时空grounding等多个维度，提供诊断性结构化反馈。2) 教师策略：利用结构化特权信号生成token级监督。3) 方向-幅度解耦机制：rollout级优势（来自奖励）决定更新方向，结构化特权信号调节token级更新幅度，实现细粒度信用分配。4) 课程调度和EMA教师稳定化策略，支持长视频序列的鲁棒优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准上一致优于强基线，提升答案准确性和时空grounding质量；达到接近2倍的收敛速度提升（优化步数减少）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化自监督能够有效兼顾推理性能与样本效率，为VideoLLM复杂推理训练提供了更高效、更稳定的范式。

title: BehaviorGuard: Online Backdoor Defense for Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Backdoor attacks pose a serious threat to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). Current defenses typically rely on reward anomalies to reverse-engineer triggers and model finetuning to remove backdoors. However, complex trigger patterns undermine their robustness, and fine-tuning entails high costs, limiting practical utility. Therefore, we shift defense concerns to trigger-agnostic backdoor output behaviors and propose BehaviorGuard, an online behavior-based backdoor detection and mitigation framework for DRL. Specifically, we find that regardless of attacks, backdoored policies induce consistent shifts in action distributions to ensure reliable activation, leaving detectable traces in high-quantile regions and distribution tails, even in the absence of triggers. Based on this, we design a novel metric that captures behavioral drift in action distributions to identify and suppress backdoor actions at runtime. To our knowledge, this is the first online backdoor defense that counters attacks both in single- and multi-agent DRL. Evaluated across diverse benchmarks with different backdoor attacks, BehaviorGuard consistently surpasses prior methods in both efficacy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出BehaviorGuard，一种针对深度强化学习后门攻击的在线行为检测与缓解框架，通过捕捉动作分布中的行为漂移（即便无触发器触发）来识别和抑制后门动作，无需依赖触发器逆向或模型微调。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御方法依赖奖励异常进行触发器逆向和模型微调，但复杂触发器模式削弱了鲁棒性，且微调成本高。因此需要一种与触发器无关、低成本的在线防御方法。
AI.method: 发现后门策略会导致动作分布在高分位数区域和分布尾部出现可检测的行为漂移（即使无触发器）。基于此设计量化行为漂移的指标，在线识别并抑制后门动作，适用于单/多智能体DRL。
AI.result: 在多种基准和不同后门攻击下，BehaviorGuard在防御效果和效率上均一致优于先前方法，且支持在线部署。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现无需触发器逆向、无微调成本的在线后门防御框架，可同时应对单/多智能体DRL后门攻击。

title: HCInfer: An Efficient Inference System via Error Compensation for Resource-Constrained Devices
summary: LLMs often struggle with memory-constrained deployment on consumer-grade hardware due to their massive parameter sizes. While existing solutions such as model compression and offloading improve deployment feasibility, they often suffer from substantial accuracy degradation or severe throughput bottlenecks. Recent error compensation methods recover accuracy through auxiliary LoRA-style branches, and we observe that these branches are inherently amenable to offloading: they require substantial parameter storage but access only a small subset of compensation parameters during each inference step. Motivated by this opportunity, we propose HCInfer, a heterogeneous inference system that offloads residual compensation to the CPU while executing the compressed backbone on the GPU, and further introduces an asynchronous compensation pipeline and sensitivity-aware dynamic rank allocation to hide compensation overhead and maximize accuracy recovery. Experimental results show that HCInfer achieves a maximum accuracy improvement of 5.2% on downstream tasks compared to compression model and sustaining a maximum speedup of 10.4x compared to full-precision model.

AI.tldr: HCInfer提出一种异构推理系统，将压缩的主干模型部署在GPU上，将残差补偿的LoRA分支卸载到CPU，并通过异步补偿流水线和敏感度感知的动态秩分配，在内存受限的消费级硬件上实现高精度和高吞吐的LLM推理。
AI.motivation: 现有模型压缩和卸载方案在内存受限的消费级硬件上部署LLM时，存在精度严重下降或吞吐瓶颈的问题。最近基于LoRA的误差补偿方法虽然能恢复精度，但补偿参数存储量大，每次推理只访问小部分，这为异构卸载提供了机会。
AI.method: 1) 将压缩后的主干模型部署在GPU上，残差补偿（LoRA分支）卸载到CPU；2) 引入异步补偿流水线，隐藏CPU计算开销；3) 提出敏感度感知的动态秩分配，在不同层间自适应分配补偿参数预算，最大化精度恢复。
AI.result: 在下游任务上相比压缩模型最高提升5.2%的准确率，相比全精度模型最高实现10.4倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: HCInfer证明了将压缩模型的残差补偿参数卸载到CPU是一种有效的异构推理策略，能在不牺牲太多吞吐的情况下显著恢复压缩带来的精度损失，适合消费级硬件上的LLM部署。

title: Spherical Flows for Sampling Categorical Data
summary: We study the problem of learning generative models for discrete sequences in a continuous embedding space. Whereas prior approaches typically operate in Euclidean space or on the probability simplex, we instead work on the sphere $\mathbb S^{d-1}$. There the von Mises-Fisher (vMF) distribution induces a natural noise process and admits a closed-form conditional score. The conditional velocity is in general intractable. Exploiting the radial symmetry of the vMF density we reduce the continuity equation on $\mathbb S^{d-1}$ to a scalar ODE in the cosine similarity, whose unique bounded solution determines the velocity. The marginal velocity and marginal score on $(\mathbb S^{d-1})^L$ both decompose into posterior-weighted tangent sums that differ only by per-token scalar weights. This gives access to both ODE and predictor-corrector (PC) sampling. The posterior is the only learned object, trained by a cross-entropy loss. Experiments compare the vMF path against geodesic and Euclidean alternatives. The combination of vMF and PC sampling significantly improves results on Sudoku and language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在球面（S^{d-1}）上学习离散序列生成模型，利用von Mises-Fisher (vMF)分布的径向对称性将连续方程简化为标量ODE，通过后验加权切线和实现ODE和预测-校正（PC）采样，实验表明该方法在数独和语言建模上显著提升效果。
AI.motivation: 现有离散序列生成模型通常在欧几里得空间或概率单纯形上操作，缺乏在球面上利用vMF分布自然噪声过程和闭式条件得分的有效方法。
AI.method: 利用vMF分布的径向对称性，将S^{d-1}上的连续方程简化为余弦相似度的标量ODE；后验作为唯一学习对象，通过交叉熵损失训练；边际速度和边际得分分解为后验加权切线和，实现ODE和PC采样。
AI.result: vMF路径结合PC采样在数独和语言建模任务上显著优于测地线和欧几里得替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 球面vMF框架为离散序列生成提供了一种高效、可扩展的新范式，尤其在需要建模离散结构（如语言）时具有优势。

title: Metonymy in vision models undermines attention-based interpretability
summary: Part-based reasoning is a classical strategy to make a computer vision model directly focus on the object parts that are relevant to the downstream task. In the context of deep learning, this also serves to improve by-design interpretability, often by using part-centric attention mechanisms on top of a latent image representation provided by a standard, black-box model. This approach is based on a locality assumption: that the latent representation of an object part encodes primarily information about the corresponding image region. In this work, we test this basic assumption, measuring intra-object leakage in vision models using part-based attribute annotations. Through a comprehensive experimental evaluation, we show that modern pretrained vision transformers violate the locality assumption and exhibit a strong intra-object leakage, in which each part encodes information from the whole object, a visual metonymy that compromises the faithfulness of attention-based interpretable-by-design methods for part-based reasoning, ultimately rendering them uninterpretable. In addition, we establish an upper bound using a two-stage approach that prevents leakage by design. We then show that this inherently disentangled feature extraction improves attribute-driven part discovery on a variety of tasks, confirming the practical impact of intra-object leakage. Our results uncover a neglected issue affecting the interpretability of part-based representations, such as those in CBMs relying on part-centric concepts, highlighting that two-stage approaches offer a promising way to mitigate it.

AI.tldr: 本文发现预训练视觉Transformer存在"对象内信息泄露"问题：目标某部分的潜在表示会编码整个对象的信息，导致基于注意力机制的可解释性方法失效。作者提出两阶段方法（先提取特征再分类）可避免泄露，提升可解释性和部件发现效果。
AI.motivation: 测试视觉模型中"局部性假设"是否成立（即目标某部分的潜在表示是否主要编码对应区域的信息），揭示基于注意力的可解释性方法在部件级推理中的缺陷。
AI.method: 1) 使用部件级属性标注定量测量视觉Transformer中的对象内信息泄露；2) 提出两阶段方法（特征提取+分类分离）防止泄露，建立其上界。
AI.result: 预训练视觉Transformer严重违反局部性假设，存在显著的对象内信息泄露；两阶段方法可有效防止泄露，提升属性驱动的部件发现效果。
AI.conclusion: 对象内信息泄露是部件级可解释性方法（如CBM）中一个被忽视但严重的问题，两阶段方法提供了一种有效的缓解方案。

title: TACT: Mitigating Overthinking and Overacting in Coding Agents via Activation Steering
summary: When language model agents tackle complex software engineering tasks, they often degrade over long trajectories, which we define as *agent drift*. We focus on two recurring failure modes *overthinking* and *overacting*, i.e., where the agent repeatedly reasons over information it already has, and where it issues tool calls without integrating recent observations or acquiring new evidence. In this paper, we introduce TACT (Think-Act Calibration via activation Steering), to detect and mitigate agent drift in the residual stream before it surfaces as a behavioral failure. In specific, we label trajectory steps as overthinking, overacting, or calibrated, and find that their hidden states can separate linearly along two *drift axes*, pointing from calibrated behavior toward each failure mode (AUC $\approx$ 0.9). To mitigate agent drift, we project each step's activation onto these axes at test time and pull drifted ones back toward the calibrated region. Experiments show that TACT outperforms unsteered baselines across SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench 2.0, and CLAW-Eval, lifting average resolve rate by $+5.8$ pp on Qwen3.5-27B and $+4.8$ pp on Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it while cutting steps-to-resolve by up to $26\%$. These gains frame agent drift as a steerable direction in the residual stream, and position TACT as a viable handle for reliable long-horizon agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 TACT 方法，通过激活引导（activation steering）来检测和缓解大语言模型智能体在长程软件工程任务中的"智能体漂移"问题（包括过度思考与过度行动），在多个基准上显著提升任务解决率并减少步骤数。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在处理复杂软件工程任务时，随着轨迹变长会出现性能退化（称为"智能体漂移"），主要表现为两种失败模式：过度思考（反复推理已有信息）和过度行动（盲目调用工具而不整合新信息）。现有方法缺乏对这两种模式的有效检测与缓解手段。
AI.method: TACT 方法：(1) 将轨迹步骤标注为过度思考、过度行动或校准状态三类；(2) 发现这些状态在残差流中沿两条"漂移轴"线性可分（AUC≈0.9）；(3) 在测试时，将每一步的激活投影到这两条轴上，并将发生漂移的激活拉回校准区域。
AI.result: 在 SWE-bench Verified、Terminal-Bench 2.0 和 CLAW-Eval 上，TACT 显著优于未引导的基线：Qwen3.5-27B 解决率提升 +5.8 个百分点，Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it 提升 +4.8 个百分点，解决步骤数最高减少 26%。
AI.conclusion: 智能体漂移在残差流中表现为可引导的方向，TACT 通过激活引导提供了一种有效的缓解手段，有助于构建更可靠的长期任务智能体。

title: MDN: Parallelizing Stepwise Momentum for Delta Linear Attention
summary: Linear Attention (LA) offers a promising paradigm for scaling large language models (LLMs) to long sequences by avoiding the quadratic complexity of self-attention. Recent LA models such as Mamba2 and GDN interpret linear recurrences as closed-form online stochastic gradient descent (SGD), but naive SGD updates suffer from rapid information decay and suboptimal convergence in optimization. While momentum-based optimizers provide a natural remedy, they pose challenges in simultaneously achieving training efficiency and effectiveness. To address this, we develop a chunkwise parallel algorithm for LA with a stepwise momentum rule by geometrically reordering the update coefficients. Further, from a dynamical systems perspective, we analyze the momentum-based recurrence as a second-order system that introduces complex conjugate eigenvalues. This analysis guides the design of stable gating constraints. The resulting model, Momentum DeltaNet (MDN), leverages Triton kernels to achieve comparable training throughput with competitive linear models such as Mamba2 and KDA. Extensive experiments on the 400M and 1.3B parameter models demonstrate consistent performance improvements over strong baselines, including Transformers, Mamba2 and GDN, across diverse downstream evaluation benchmarks. Code: https://github.com/HuuYuLong/MomentumDeltaNet .

AI.tldr: 本文提出Momentum DeltaNet (MDN)，通过动量规则和分块并行算法改进线性注意力模型中的SGD风格线性递归，从动力系统角度设计稳定门控约束，在400M和1.3B参数规模上超越Transformer、Mamba2和GDN等强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有线性注意力模型（如Mamba2、GDN）将线性递归解释为闭式在线SGD，但朴素SGD更新存在信息快速衰减和优化次优的问题。动量优化器虽能缓解，但在训练效率和效果之间难以平衡。
AI.method: 1) 提出了带有逐步动量规则的线性注意力分块并行算法，通过对更新系数进行几何重排序实现高效训练；2) 从动力系统视角分析动量递归为二阶系统（引入共轭复特征值），据此设计稳定的门控约束；3) 基于Triton kernel实现，训练吞吐量与Mamba2等相当。
AI.result: 在400M和1.3B参数模型上，MDN在多个下游评测基准上一致优于Transformer、Mamba2和GDN等强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 动量机制能有效改善线性注意力的信息衰减问题，结合动力系统分析设计的稳定门控约束使模型在保持高效训练的同时取得了更优的性能。

title: Architecture Matters: Comparing RAG Systems under Knowledge Base Poisoning
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are vulnerable to knowledge base poisoning, yet existing attacks have been evaluated almost exclusively against vanilla retrieve-then-generate pipelines. Architectures designed to handle conflicting retrieved information - multi-agent debate, agentic retrieval, recursive language models - remain untested against adversarially optimized contradictions. We evaluate four RAG architectures (vanilla RAG, agentic RAG, MADAM-RAG, and Recursive Language Models) under controlled single-document (N=1) poisoning on 921 Natural Questions QA pairs, comparing a clean baseline, naive injection, and CorruptRAG-AK - an adversarial attack whose meta-epistemic framing targets credibility assessment. Architecture is a high-impact variable in adversarial robustness: under CorruptRAG-AK, attack success rates range from 81.9% (vanilla) to 24.4% (RLM) - a spread of nearly 58 percentage points across architectures with comparable clean accuracy (~92%). Decomposing this gap, once the poisoned document is retrieved, adversarial framing - not retrieval optimization - drives the majority of CorruptRAG-AK's advantage for three of four architectures, localizing the cross-architecture vulnerability at the content-reasoning stage. Our MADAM-RAG reimplementation shows the highest apparent contradiction detection rate, though our LLM judge over-identifies this behavior (~48.5% precision), so reported rates are upper bounds. Regardless of detection, MADAM-RAG cannot resolve contradictions reliably, producing a 41.4% non-answer rate even on clean inputs - though implementation divergences from the original may contribute. We introduce a seven-category behavioral taxonomy capturing contradiction detection, hedging, and failure modes beyond binary accuracy. Code, data, and analysis notebooks are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了四种RAG架构（vanilla RAG、agentic RAG、MADAM-RAG、递归语言模型）在知识库投毒攻击下的鲁棒性，发现架构是影响对抗鲁棒性的关键变量，攻击成功率从81.9%（vanilla）到24.4%（RLM）不等，且漏洞主要源于内容推理阶段而非检索优化。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统的知识库投毒攻击研究几乎只针对简单的检索-生成流水线，而能够处理冲突信息的更先进架构（多智能体辩论、智能体检索、递归语言模型）尚未经过对抗性优化的矛盾信息测试。
AI.method: 在921个Natural Questions问答对上，对四种RAG架构进行单文档投毒攻击，比较清洁基线、朴素注入和CorruptRAG-AK（一种针对可信度评估的元认知对抗攻击）的效果，并引入七类别行为分类法分析模型行为。
AI.result: 架构是影响鲁棒性的高影响变量：CorruptRAG-AK下攻击成功率从81.9%（vanilla）到24.4%（RLM），跨度达58个百分点，而清洁准确率均在92%左右。漏洞主要来自内容推理阶段而非检索优化。MADAM-RAG的矛盾检测率最高但精度仅48.5%，且即使在清洁输入上也有41.4%的不回答率。
AI.conclusion: 不同RAG架构在知识库投毒攻击下的鲁棒性差异巨大，对抗性框架（而非检索优化）是驱动攻击效果的主要因素，漏洞集中在内容推理阶段；MADAM-RAG的矛盾检测能力被高估且存在严重的非回答问题。

title: Dynamic Pondering Sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts Transformer for Event Stream based Visual Object Tracking
summary: Despite significant progress, RGB-based trackers remain vulnerable to challenging imaging conditions, such as low illumination and fast motion. Event cameras offer a promising alternative by asynchronously capturing pixel-wise brightness changes, providing high dynamic range and high temporal resolution. However, existing event-based trackers often neglect the intrinsic spatial sparsity and temporal density of event data, while relying on a single fixed temporal-window sampling strategy that is suboptimal under varying motion dynamics. In this paper, we propose an event sparsity-aware tracking framework that explicitly models event-density variations across multiple temporal scales. Specifically, the proposed framework progressively injects sparse, medium-density, and dense event search regions into a three-stage Vision Transformer backbone, enabling hierarchical multi-density feature learning. Furthermore, we introduce a sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts module to encourage expert specialization under different sparsity patterns, and design a dynamic pondering strategy to adaptively adjust the inference depth according to tracking difficulty. Extensive experiments on FE240hz, COESOT, and EventVOT demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a favorable trade-off between tracking accuracy and computational efficiency. The source code will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenEvTracking.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种事件稀疏感知跟踪框架，通过多时间尺度的事件密度变化显式建模，结合分层多密度视觉Transformer主干、稀疏感知的混合专家模块和动态推理策略，在事件相机视觉跟踪中实现了精度与效率的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于事件的跟踪器忽视了事件数据的固有空间稀疏性和时间密集性，且依赖单一固定时间窗口采样策略，这在运动动态变化下效果欠佳。作者旨在解决这一问题，提出一种能自适应处理事件稀疏模式变化的跟踪框架。
AI.method: 1) 渐进式将稀疏、中等密度、密集事件搜索区域注入三阶段Vision Transformer主干，实现分层多密度特征学习；2) 引入稀疏感知的混合专家模块，鼓励不同专家处理不同稀疏模式；3) 设计动态推理策略，根据跟踪难度自适应调整推理深度。
AI.result: 在FE240hz、COESOT和EventVOT数据集上，所提方法在跟踪精度与计算效率之间取得了良好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度事件密度建模和稀疏感知的专家机制能有效提升事件相机视觉跟踪的性能，同时保持计算效率。

title: BioResearcher: Scenario-Guided Multi-Agent for Translational Medicine
summary:
Translational medicine turns underspecified development goals into evidence synthesis that must combine literature, trials, patents, and quantitative multi-omics analysis while preserving identifiers, uncertainty, and retrievable provenance. General-purpose foundation models and off-the-shelf tool-augmented or multi-agent systems are not built for this: they tend to produce single-shot answers or run open-endedly, and fall short on the auditable, scenario-specific workflows that heterogeneous biomedical sources demand.
  This paper introduces Ingenix BioResearcher, a scenario-guided multi-agent system that maps queries to versioned research playbooks, delegates to specialized subagents over 30+ tools and machine-learning endpoints, mixes structured database access with sandboxed code for genome-scale analyses, and applies claim-level multi-model reconciliation before editorial assembly.
  We evaluate BioResearcher across unit-level capabilities, open-ended biomedical reasoning, and end-to-end clinical discovery. It leads evaluated baselines on 109 single-step tests (83.49% pass rate; 0.892 average score), achieves strong biomedical benchmark performance (89.33% on BixBench-Verified-50 and the top 0.758 mean score on BaisBench Scientific Discovery), and leads on a 30-query clinical end-to-end benchmark with the highest positive hit rate (74.7% $\pm$ 3.3%) and negative clear rate (96.8% $\pm$ 0.2%). These results show broad, competitive performance across unit-level, open-ended, and end-to-end clinical evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ingenix BioResearcher，一个面向转化医学的场景引导多智能体系统，通过版本化研究手册、30+工具/ML端点、结构化和基因组级分析、多模型一致性校对等模块，在单元级、开放式和端到端临床评估中均取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 转化医学需要整合文献、试验、专利和多组学数据，同时保留标识符、不确定性和可溯源信息。通用基础模型和现成工具增强/多智能体系统无法满足这种可审计、场景特定的工作流需求。
AI.method: 提出场景引导多智能体系统：1) 将查询映射到版本化研究手册；2) 在30+工具和ML端点中委派给专业子智能体；3) 混合结构化数据库访问与沙盒化代码用于基因组级分析；4) 在编辑汇总前进行声明级多模型一致性校对。
AI.result: 单步测试通过率83.49%（平均分0.892）；BixBench-Verified-50达89.33%；BaisBench科学发现平均分0.758（最高）；30查询临床端到端基准中阳性命中率74.7%±3.3%，阴性清除率96.8%±0.2%，均为最优。
AI.conclusion: BioResearcher在单元级、开放式推理和端到端临床发现评估中均展现出广泛且具有竞争力的性能，证明了场景引导多智能体框架在转化医学中的有效性。

title: Hypothesis generation and updating in large language models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly help people solve problems, from debugging code to repairing machinery. This process requires generating plausible hypotheses from partial descriptions, then updating them as more information arrives. Yet how LLMs perform this form of inference, and how close it is to optimal, remains unclear. We study this question in the number game, a controlled setting in which a learner infers the hypothesis supported by a few positive integers, such as $\{16, 8, 2, 64\}$: a rule like powers of 2 or an interval like numbers near 20. We measure the posterior over hypotheses using three complementary probes: posterior prediction, hypothesis evaluation, and hypothesis generation. We then compare LLM behavior with an optimal Bayesian model and human behavior, and test whether the same posterior is expressed across probes. LLMs are often well described by a two-parameter Bayesian fit, but with systematic offsets: by default they show a strong-sampling assumption that creates an implicit Occam's razor, favoring narrower hypotheses, while thinking mode shifts them toward greater prior reliance. We also find a robust evaluation--generation gap: LLMs select more correct hypotheses during hypothesis evaluation but generate simpler, more rule-like hypotheses. Finally, this Bayesian-with-bias pattern does not extrapolate. Models can behave as if they hold rule-like hypotheses over observed examples, yet generalize poorly to parts of the hypothesis domain not covered by those examples. Our results highlight a limitation of LLMs as general problem solvers, especially for scientific inference, where hypotheses must go beyond the data.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数字游戏（从少量正整数推断隐藏规则）研究LLM的假设推断能力，发现LLM的行为可被两参数贝叶斯模型近似描述，但存在系统性偏差：默认表现出强采样假设（隐含奥卡姆剃刀，偏向更窄假设），思考模式则更依赖先验；同时存在评估-生成差距（评估时更能选对假设，但生成时倾向简单规则性假设）；此外，这种"带偏差的贝叶斯"模式无法外推，模型在观测数据上表现良好但对假设空间未覆盖的部分泛化能力差。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM越来越多地被用于辅助问题解决（如调试代码、维修机械），但其如何进行假设推断以及这种推断离最优有多远仍不清楚。作者希望在受控环境（数字游戏）中系统研究LLM的假设推断能力，并与最优贝叶斯模型和人类行为进行对比。
AI.method: 使用数字游戏（从{16,8,2,64}等正整数集推断隐藏规则如"2的幂"或"接近20的数"）作为实验范式，设计了三种互补探针来测量后验：后验预测、假设评估和假设生成。将LLM行为与最优贝叶斯模型及人类行为进行比较，并检验同一后验是否在不同探针上一致表达。
AI.result: 1) LLM行为可用两参数贝叶斯拟合良好描述，但存在系统性偏差：默认模式有强采样假设（隐含奥卡姆剃刀，偏向更窄假设），思考模式转向更大先验依赖；2) 存在鲁棒的评估-生成差距：评估时更能选出正确假设，但生成时倾向更简单、更规则性的假设；3) 这种带偏差的贝叶斯模式无法外推，模型在观测数据上表现良好，但对假设空间中未覆盖的部分泛化差。
AI.conclusion: LLM作为通用问题解决者存在局限性，尤其是在科学推理中（假设必须超越已有数据）。其假设推断行为虽可被贝叶斯模型近似，但存在系统性偏差且无法外推至未观测的假设空间区域。

title: Pest-Thinker: Learning to Think and Reason like Entomologists via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Pest-induced crop losses pose a major threat to global food security and sustainable agricultural development. While recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for visual understanding and smart agriculture, their direct application to pest recognition remains limited due to the domain's unique challenges such as high inter-species complexity, intra-species variability, and the scarcity of expert-annotated data. In this work, we introduce Pest-Thinker, a knowledge-driven reinforcement learning (RL) framework that enables MLLMs to reason over fine-grained pest morphology. We first construct two high-definition pest benchmarks, QFSD and AgriInsect, comprising diverse species and expert-annotated morphological traits. Leveraging these datasets, we synthesize Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories to facilitate structured learning of pest-specific visual cues through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel feature reward that guides the model to focus on observable morphological evidence, assessed by an LLM-as-a-Judge strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Pest-Thinker substantially improves both in-domain and out-of-domain morphological understanding, marking a step toward expert-level visual reasoning for intelligent agricultural pest analysis. The datasets and source code are available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出Pest-Thinker框架，通过知识驱动的强化学习（GRPO + 特征奖励）增强多模态大模型在细粒度害虫形态识别上的推理能力，并构建了两个高清害虫基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 害虫导致作物损失严重，现有MLLM在害虫识别领域表现有限，面临物种间复杂性高、种内变异大、专家标注数据稀缺等挑战。
AI.method: 1) 构建QFSD和AgriInsect两个高清害虫基准数据集；2) 利用CoT推理轨迹进行SFT微调；3) 使用GRPO结合基于LLM-as-a-Judge的特征奖励，引导模型关注可观察的形态学证据。
AI.result: Pest-Thinker在域内和域外形态学理解上都取得显著改进，向专家级视觉推理迈进一步。
AI.conclusion: 知识驱动的RL框架能有效提升MLLM在农业害虫识别中的细粒度推理能力，具有实际应用价值。

title: Strat-LLM: Stratified Strategy Alignment for LLM-based Stock Trading with Real-time Multi-Source Signals
comment: Accepted by the 2026 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are evolving into autonomous trading agents, yet existing benchmarks often overlook the interplay between architectural reasoning and strategy consistency. We propose Strat-LLM, a framework grounded in Stratified Strategy Alignment. Operating in a live-forward setting throughout 2025, it integrates heterogeneous data including sequential prices, real-time news, and annual reports to eliminate look-ahead bias. Extensive stress tests on A-share and U.S. markets reveal: (1) reasoning-heavy models achieve peak utility in Free Mode via internal logic, whereas standard models require Strict Mode as a vital risk anchor; (2) alignment utility is regime-dependent, with Free and Guided modes capturing momentum in uptrending markets, while Strict Mode mitigates drawdowns in downtrends; (3) mid-scale models (35B) show optimal fidelity under strict constraints, whereas ultra-large models (122B) suffer an alignment tax under rigid rules but gain a performance premium in Guided Mode; (4) standard LLMs often fall into a high win-rate trap, optimizing for small gains at the expense of total returns, which can only be mitigated through deep reasoning or strict external guardrails. Project details are available at https://Strat-LLM.github.io.

AI.tldr: 提出Strat-LLM框架，通过分层策略对齐（Stratified Strategy Alignment）在2025年实时市场数据上测试LLM作为交易代理的能力，揭示了推理能力、模型规模与策略约束之间的关键交互关系。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM交易基准忽视了架构推理能力与策略一致性之间的相互作用，缺乏对前瞻性偏差的有效控制。
AI.method: 提出Strat-LLM框架，采用分层策略对齐机制，在2025年实时前向设置中整合历史价格、实时新闻和年报等多源异构数据，在A股和美股市场进行压力测试。
AI.result: (1) 推理密集型模型在自由模式下表现最佳，标准模型需要严格模式作为风险锚；(2) 对齐效用在上涨市场中自由/引导模式好，下跌市场中严格模式减少回撤；(3) 中等规模(35B)在严格约束下保真度最优，超大规模(122B)在严格规则下存在对齐税但在引导模式下有性能溢价；(4) 标准LLM易陷入"高胜率陷阱"。
AI.conclusion: 模型推理能力、规模与策略约束模式之间存在复杂非单调关系，为LLM交易代理的部署提供了重要指导原则。

title: Measuring Learning Progress via Gradient-Momentum Coupling
summary: Measuring learning progress is essential for curiosity-driven exploration in reinforcement learning, but widely used signals such as prediction error often fail to distinguish meaningful, learnable patterns from random noise. This paper proposes Gradient-Momentum Coupling (GMC), a signal derived from optimization dynamics that quantifies how useful each sample's gradient is for ongoing learning by measuring its per-parameter normalized absolute product with the momentum from previous gradients. By leveraging momentum's natural filtering of noise and oscillations, GMC identifies samples that contribute to ongoing parameter updates. Controlled experiments demonstrate noise robustness and emergent curriculum learning, with the signal prioritizing tasks by learning speed rather than difficulty. Experiments on MiniGrid suggest that replacing prediction error with GMC within existing curiosity-driven architectures can improve robustness to observation noise.

AI.tldr: 提出梯度-动量耦合（GMC）信号，通过优化动态衡量样本对学习的贡献度，替代预测误差用于好奇心驱动的探索，在MiniGrid实验中提升了观测噪声鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统好奇心驱动探索依赖预测误差信号，但预测误差无法区分可学习模式和随机噪声，导致探索效率低下。亟需一种能过滤噪声、准确反映学习进展的信号。
AI.method: GMC通过计算每个样本梯度与历史动量之间的逐参数归一化绝对乘积，利用动量对噪声和振荡的自然过滤特性，量化样本对持续参数更新的贡献程度。
AI.result: 控制实验验证了噪声鲁棒性和涌现式课程学习（按学习速度而非难度排序任务）；在MiniGrid环境中，用GMC替换预测误差可提升对观测噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GMC是一种比预测误差更鲁棒的学习进展信号，能有效过滤噪声并生成自适应的课程学习顺序，在噪声环境下显著优于传统好奇心驱动方法。

title: Continuous Expert Assembly: Instance-Conditioned Low-Rank Residuals for All-in-One Image Restoration
summary:
Real-world image degradation is often unknown, spatially non-uniform, and compositional, requiring all-in-one restoration models to adapt a single set of weights to diverse local corruption patterns without test-time degradation labels. Existing methods typically modulate a shared backbone with global prompts or degradation descriptors, or route features through predefined expert pools. However, compact global conditioning can bottleneck localized degradation evidence, while static expert routing may produce homogeneous updates or rely on unstable sparse assignments. We propose \textbf{Continuous Expert Assembly} (CEA), a token-wise dynamic parameterization framework for all-in-one image restoration. CEA employs a lightweight \textbf{Cross-Attention Hyper-Adapter} to probe intermediate spatial features and synthesize instance-conditioned low-rank routing bases and residual directions. Each spatial token then assembles its own residual update via dense signed dot-product affinities over the generated rank-wise components, avoiding external prompts, static expert banks, and discrete Top-
  selection. The resulting assembly rule also admits a linear-attention perspective, making its dense token-wise routing behavior transparent. Experiments on AIO-3, AIO-5, and CDD-11 show that CEA improves average restoration quality over strong prompt-, descriptor-, and expert-based baselines, with the clearest gains on spatially varying and compositional degradations, while maintaining favorable parameter, FLOP, and runtime efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出连续专家组装(CEA)框架，通过交叉注意力超适配器为每个空间token动态生成低秩路由基和残差方向，实现token-wise的全能图像修复，无需预定义专家池或离散选择。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的图像退化通常是未知、空间不均匀且组合性的，需要全能的单模型适应多种局部损坏模式，而现有方法（全局提示、预定义专家池）在处理局部退化时存在瓶颈或依赖不稳定的稀疏分配。
AI.method: 设计轻量级交叉注意力超适配器，探测中间空间特征并合成实例条件的低秩路由基和残差方向；每个空间token通过密集符号点积亲和度组装自己的残差更新，避免了外部提示、静态专家库和离散Top-K选择。
AI.result: 在AIO-3、AIO-5和CDD-11数据集上，CEA在平均修复质量上优于基于提示、描述符和专家的基线方法，在空间变化和组合退化上的提升最为明显，同时参数、FLOP和运行效率良好。
AI.conclusion: CEA通过token-wise动态参数化实现了高效的全能图像修复，其密集路由机制也可从线性注意力视角解释，验证了动态参数化在复杂退化场景中的有效性。

title: Pathways to AGI
summary: Our focus are five related questions that stem from a critical software studies perspective. Underpinning this view is the acknowledged need to avoid assumptions regarding the inevitability of the current situation relating to AI. What we need to see is the closeness of the linkage between current commercial AI development and our prevailing social, political and economic circumstances. This does mean that the perspectives presented here are done so critically and conditionally. Most importantly, Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is seen as being problematic both conceptually and definitionally. This conditioning of any view regarding AGI does lead the discussion in specific directions and to certain conclusions regarding the future. However, adopting this perspective enables the work to offer some final recommendations. We set out to ask the following questions, 1. What are the critical pathways that produced the current dominant generative AI tools (capabilities, product forms, adoption patterns)? 2. Which decision points acted as leverage nodes (small changes that had large downstream effects), and which dead ends reveal alternative possibilities that did not become dominant? 3.
