How do pathways differ across three foundational-model trajectories such as the frontier proprietary models, open-weight models or specific domain and sovereign models? 4. Which alternative projects branched from key leverage nodes, what is their current state, and why did some succeed, stall, fail or become absorbed? 5. Based on this analysis, what socio-technical development programmes could plausibly move toward AGI-adjacent capability while meeting requirements for transparency, moderation, wellbeing and sustainable business models?

AI.tldr: 本文从批判性软件研究视角出发，提出五个核心问题，分析当前生成式AI（特别是AGI）发展路径、关键决策节点、不同基础模型轨迹的差异、替代项目的成败原因，并最终提出兼顾透明度、可持续性等要求的社会技术发展建议。
AI.motivation: 作者认为当前AI发展现状并非不可避免，需要批判性地审视AI发展与当前社会、政治、经济环境之间的紧密联系，避免对AGI概念不加批判地接受。
AI.method: 提出五个关键研究问题，采用批判性软件研究视角进行定性分析，考察生成式AI发展路径中的关键决策节点、分叉点及不同模型轨迹（商业闭源、开放权重、专用/主权模型）的差异。
AI.result: 识别出导致当前生成式AI主导格局的关键路径、杠杆节点（小变化导致大下游效应）、以及那些未成为主流的替代可能性。分析了不同模型发展轨迹的差异及替代项目的成败原因。
AI.conclusion: 提出了能够朝着接近AGI能力发展，同时满足透明度、适度性、福祉和可持续商业模式的社会技术发展方案建议。

title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Rotation Profile Control in Tokamaks
summary: Tokamaks remain leading candidates for achieving practical fusion energy, yet many important control problems inside these devices are still difficult or unsolved. One such challenge is controlling the plasma rotation profile, which strongly influences stability, confinement, and transport. While the average rotation can be controlled, controlling the full profile is challenging due to high dimensionality, response to multiple actuators and dependence on plasma condition. Learning-based control methods, such as reinforcement learning (RL), provide a potential solution to this challenging problem with ability to model complex interactions leading to effective multi-input multi-output control. However, learning such policies is challenging due to the lack of accurate simulators that can model the rotation profile dynamics. In this work, we investigate the use of offline RL and offline model-based RL algorithms for rotation profile control, training them solely on historical data from the DIII-D tokamak. Our final method uses probabilistic models of plasma dynamics to generate rollouts for RL training. We deploy this policy on the DIII-D Tokamak and observe promising real-world results. We conclude by highlighting key challenges and insights from training and deploying an RL policy on a complex physical device while using only limited past data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用离线强化学习（offline RL）和基于模型的离线RL方法，在仅使用历史数据的情况下，控制托卡马克（DIII-D）中的等离子体旋转剖面，并成功在实际装置上部署，取得了有前景的实验结果。
AI.motivation: 托卡马克中控制等离子体旋转剖面是一个高维、多输入多输出的难题，直接影响聚变装置的稳定性、约束和输运性能。现有方法无法有效解决，而基于学习的控制方法（如RL）虽有潜力，但缺乏精确仿真器来建模旋转剖面动力学。
AI.method: 使用离线RL和离线模型-based RL算法，仅基于DIII-D托卡马克的历史数据进行训练；最终方法采用概率模型建模等离子体动力学，利用模型生成rollout数据来训练RL策略，并在真实DIII-D装置上部署验证。
AI.result: 在DIII-D托卡马克上成功部署RL策略，观察到有前景的实际控制效果，证明了仅用有限历史数据也能学习出可用的旋转剖面控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 离线RL结合概率动力学模型能够有效解决复杂物理装置中的控制问题，为未来聚变装置智能控制提供了可行路径；同时总结了在有限数据下训练和部署RL策略的关键挑战与经验。

title: Autoregressive Visual Generation Needs a Prologue
summary: In this work, we propose Prologue, an approach to bridging the reconstruction-generation gap in autoregressive (AR) image generation. Instead of modifying visual tokens to satisfy both reconstruction and generation, Prologue generates a small set of prologue tokens prepended to the visual token sequence. These prologue tokens are trained exclusively with the AR cross-entropy (CE) loss, while visual tokens remain dedicated to reconstruction. This decoupled design lets us optimize generation through the AR model's true distribution without affecting reconstruction quality, which we further formalize from an ELBO perspective. On ImageNet 256x256, Prologue-Base reduces gFID from 21.01 to 10.75 without classifier-free guidance while keeping reconstruction almost unchanged; Prologue-Large reaches a competitive rFID of 0.99 and gFID of 1.46 using a standard AR model without auxiliary semantic supervision. Interestingly, driven only by AR gradients, prologue tokens exhibit emergent semantic structure: linear probing on 16 prologue tokens reaches 35.88% Top-1, far above the 23.71% of the first 16 tokens from a standard tokenizer; resampling with fixed prologue tokens preserves a similar high-level semantic layout. Our results suggest a new direction: generation quality can be improved by introducing a separate learned generative representation while leaving the original representation intact.

AI.tldr: 提出Prologue方法，通过生成少量"序言令牌"附加到视觉令牌序列前，解耦自回归图像生成中的重建与生成任务，在不影响重建质量的前提下显著提升生成性能，且序言令牌展现出涌现的语义结构。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像生成中，重建和生成之间存在差距（reconstruction-generation gap），现有方法试图修改视觉令牌以同时满足两者，但往往顾此失彼。作者希望解耦这两个任务，使生成优化不影响重建质量。
AI.method: Prologue生成少量序言令牌（prologue tokens）附加到视觉令牌序列前。序言令牌仅用AR交叉熵损失训练，专注于生成；视觉令牌保持不变，专注于重建。这种解耦设计让生成优化在AR模型的真实分布上进行，而不影响重建质量。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256x256上，Prologue-Base将gFID从21.01降至10.75（无分类器引导），重建几乎不变；Prologue-Large达到rFID 0.99和gFID 1.46。序言令牌展现出涌现语义结构，16个令牌的线性探测Top-1达35.88%，远超标准tokenizer前16令牌的23.71%。
AI.conclusion: 生成质量可以通过引入独立的可学习生成表示来提高，同时保持原始表示不变。这为自回归图像生成提供了一种新方向。

title: Novelty-based Tree-of-Thought Search for LLM Reasoning and Planning
summary: Although advances such as chain-of-thought, tree-of-thought or reinforcement learning have improved the performance of LLMs in reasoning and planning tasks, they are still brittle and have not achieved human-level performance in many domains, and often suffer from high time and token costs. Inspired by the success of width-based search in planning, we explore how the concept of novelty can be transferred to language domains and how it can improve tree-of-thought reasoning. A tree of thoughts relies on building possible "paths" of consecutive ideas or thoughts. These are generated by repeatedly prompting an LLM. In our paper, a measurable concept of novelty is proposed that describes the uniqueness of a new node (thought) in comparison to nodes previously seen in the search tree. Novelty is estimated by prompting an LLM and making use of embedded general knowledge from pre-training. This metric can then be used to prune branches and reduce the scope of the search. Although this method introduces more prompts per state, the overall token cost can be reduced by pruning and reducing the overall tree size. This procedure is tested and compared using several benchmarks in language-based planning and general reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于新颖性度量的树状思维推理方法，通过评估新节点的独特性来剪枝搜索树，在降低token成本的同时提升LLM推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理方法（如思维链、思维树）虽然有所改进，但仍存在脆弱性、高时间和token开销，且未达到人类水平。作者受宽度优先搜索中新颖性概念成功应用的启发，探索如何将新颖性概念迁移到语言领域以改进思维树推理。
AI.method: 提出一种可量化的新颖性度量，通过提示LLM并利用预训练嵌入的通用知识，评估新节点与搜索树中已有节点的独特性。基于此度量对搜索树进行分支剪枝，缩小搜索范围，从而降低整体token成本。
AI.result: 虽引入更多提示（per state），但通过剪枝减少了整体树大小，降低了总token成本。在多个基于语言的规划和通用推理基准上进行了测试和比较。
AI.conclusion: 新颖性度量能有效指导思维树剪枝，在保证推理质量的同时降低计算开销，为LLM推理效率优化提供了新思路。

title: Do Neural Operators Forget Geometry? The Forgetting Hypothesis in Deep Operator Learning
summary:
Neural operators perform well on structured domains, yet their behaviour on irregular geometries remains poorly understood. We show that this limitation is not merely an encoding issue, but a depth-wise failure mode inherent to deep operator architectures.
  We formalise the Geometric Forgetting Hypothesis: due to the Markovian structure of operator layers and their reliance on global mixing mechanisms, neural operators progressively lose access to domain geometry as depth increases. Using layer-wise geometric probing, we demonstrate that both spectral and attention-based operators systematically lose geometric fidelity.
  We show that this geometric forgetting degrades accuracy, stability, and generalisation. To counteract it, we introduce a lightweight geometry memory injection mechanism that restores geometric constraints at intermediate depths with minimal architectural overhead. This simple intervention consistently mitigates forgetting and exposes a geometric shortcut instability in transformer-based operators, revealing that geometric retention is a structural requirement rather than a design choice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出几何遗忘假说，指出神经算子（包括基于注意力机制的Transformer算子）在深层结构中会逐渐丢失对几何信息的表征能力，并引入轻量级的几何记忆注入机制来缓解这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子在非规则几何域上的行为缺乏深入理解，作者发现这不仅是一个编码问题，更是深度算子架构固有的逐层失效模式。
AI.method: 1) 形式化几何遗忘假说，分析算子层的马尔可夫结构和全局混合机制导致几何信息逐层丢失；2) 设计层间几何探针实验，验证谱算子和注意力算子均存在系统性的几何保真度下降；3) 提出轻量级几何记忆注入机制，在中间深度恢复几何约束。
AI.result: 几何遗忘会显著降低准确性、稳定性和泛化能力；几何记忆注入机制能有效缓解遗忘；揭示了基于Transformer的算子在几何记忆上的结构性捷径不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 几何保持是深度算子的结构性需求而非设计选择，简单干预即可显著改善性能。

title: AI-Generated Images: What Humans and Machines See When They Look at the Same Image
comment: Included in the main conference proceedings published by Springer Nature (CCIS Series)
summary: The misuse of generative AI in online disinformation campaigns highlights the urgent need for transparent and explainable detection systems. In this work, we investigate how detectors for AI-generated images can be more effective in providing human-understandable explanations for their predictions. To this end, we develop a suite of detectors with various architectures and fine-tuning strategies, trained on our large-scale photorealistic fake image dataset, AIText2Image, and assess their performance on state-of-the-art text-to-image AI generators. We integrate 16 different explainable AI (XAI) methods into our detection framework, and the visual explanations are comprehensively refined and evaluated through a novel approach that prioritizes human understanding of AI-generated images, using both textual and visual responses collected from a survey of 100 participants. This framework offers insights into visual-language cues in fake image detection and into the clarity of XAI methods from a human perspective, measuring the alignment of XAI outputs with human preferences.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了面向AI生成图像的检测器如何提供人类可理解的解释，构建了多架构检测器套件，并整合16种XAI方法，通过100人调查来评估XAI输出与人类偏好的一致性。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在在线虚假信息活动中的滥用凸显了透明、可解释检测系统的迫切需求，现有检测器缺乏人类可理解的解释能力。
AI.method: 开发多种架构和微调策略的检测器，在自建大型数据集AIText2Image上训练；集成16种可解释AI方法；通过100人调查结合文本和视觉反馈来评估解释质量。
AI.result: 集成多种XAI方法并基于人类调查评估，揭示了视觉-语言线索在虚假图像检测中的作用，以及XAI方法清晰度与人类偏好的对齐程度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够提供符合人类理解的AI生成图像检测解释，为构建更透明可信的检测系统提供了方向。

title: Visual Fingerprints for LLM Generation Comparison
comment: Submitted to the Short Paper track at IEEE VIS 2026
summary: Large language model (LLM) outputs arise from complex interactions among prompts, system instructions, model parameters, and architecture. We refer to specific configurations of these factors as generation conditions, each of which can bias outputs in various ways. Understanding how different generation conditions shape model behaviors is essential for tasks such as prompt design and model evaluation, yet it remains challenging due to the stochastic and open-ended nature of text generation. We present an approach to visually compare LLM outputs across generation conditions by modeling responses as collections of linguistic choices, including content, expression, and structure. We extract these choices using natural language processing pipelines and represent their distributions across repeated samples. We then visualize these distributions as visual fingerprints, enabling direct, distribution-level comparison of condition-specific tendencies. Through four usage scenarios, we demonstrate how visual fingerprints reveal consistent patterns in LLM behavior that are difficult to observe through individual responses or aggregate metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过"视觉指纹"方法，可视化比较不同生成条件下LLM输出在内容、表达和结构上的分布差异，以揭示模型行为模式。
AI.motivation: LLM输出受提示、系统指令、参数和架构等多种"生成条件"影响，理解这些条件如何塑造模型行为对提示设计和模型评估至关重要，但由于文本生成的随机性和开放性，现有方法难以有效比较不同条件下的输出差异。
AI.method: 将LLM输出建模为包含内容、表达和结构等语言选择的集合，利用NLP流水线提取这些选择，并在重复采样中表示其分布，最后将这些分布可视化为"视觉指纹"，实现跨条件的分布级比较。
AI.result: 通过四个使用场景，展示了视觉指纹能够揭示LLM行为中难以通过单个响应或聚合指标观察到的一致模式。
AI.conclusion: 视觉指纹方法能够有效揭示不同生成条件下LLM行为的系统性差异，有助于提示设计和模型评估等任务。

title: SOPE: Stabilizing Off-Policy Evaluation for Online RL with Prior Data
summary: Incorporating prior data into online reinforcement learning accelerates training but typically forces a difficult trade-off between high computational costs and long, multi-stage training pipelines. While fixed-length stabilization phases are significantly more computationally efficient than static update schedules, they require task-dependent manual tuning, risking either the waste of prior knowledge or severe overfitting. To address this, we propose SOPE, an algorithm that uses an actor-aligned Off-Policy Policy Evaluation (OPE) signal as an automated early-stopping mechanism to dynamically control the length of offline training phases. By evaluating the critic on a held-out validation split under the current policy's action distribution, SOPE halts gradient updates exactly when out-of-distribution benefits saturate, eliminating the need for manual schedule tuning. Evaluated on 25 continuous control tasks from the Minari benchmark suite, SOPE improves baseline performance by up to 45.6% while reducing the required TFLOPs by up to 22x, thus balancing the tradeoff between sample and computational efficiency. These findings demonstrate that adaptive, evaluation-driven update schedules are more effective than relying on static, exhaustive update schedules.

AI.tldr: 提出SOPE算法，利用离线策略评估信号作为自动早停机制，动态控制离线训练阶段长度，在25个连续控制任务上最高提升45.6%性能并减少22倍计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在将先验数据融入在线强化学习时，面临高计算成本与多阶段训练管线的权衡，固定长度的稳定阶段需要任务依赖的手动调参，容易浪费先验知识或导致过拟合。
AI.method: 提出SOPE，使用actor对齐的离线策略评估(OPE)信号作为自动早停机制，通过评估critic在保留验证集上当前策略动作分布下的表现，在分布外收益饱和时停止梯度更新。
AI.result: 在Minari基准的25个连续控制任务上，SOPE相比基线最高提升45.6%性能，同时减少最多22倍TFLOPs计算量。
AI.conclusion: 自适应、评估驱动的更新调度比静态、穷举的更新调度更有效，能更好地平衡样本效率与计算效率。

title: Learning Discrete Autoregressive Priors with Wasserstein Gradient Flow
summary: Discrete image tokenizers are commonly trained in two stages: first for reconstruction, and then with a prior model fitted to the frozen token sequences. This decoupling leaves the tokenizer unaware of the model that will later generate its tokens. As a result, the learned tokens may preserve image information well but still be difficult for an autoregressive (AR) prior to predict from left to right. We analyze this mismatch using Tripartite Variational Consistency (TVC), which decomposes latent-variable learning into three consistency conditions: conditional-likelihood consistency, prior consistency, and posterior consistency. TVC shows that two-stage training preserves the reconstruction side but leaves prior consistency outside the tokenizer objective: the overall token distribution is fixed before the AR prior participates in training. Motivated by this view, we add a distribution-level prior-matching signal during tokenizer training, while keeping the reconstruction objective unchanged. We optimize this signal with a Wasserstein-gradient-flow update. For hard categorical tokens, the update reduces to a token-level contrast between an auxiliary AR model that tracks the tokenizer's current token distribution and the target AR prior. It requires only forward passes through the two AR models and does not backpropagate through either of them. The resulting tokenizer, wAR-Tok, reduces AR loss and improves generation FID on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet at comparable reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出wAR-Tok，通过在图像离散分词器训练中加入分布级先验匹配信号（基于Wasserstein梯度流更新），解决两阶段训练中分词器与自回归先验不匹配的问题，从而降低AR损失并提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的离散图像分词器采用两阶段训练（先重建再拟合先验），导致分词器不了解后续AR模型的需求，学到的token虽保留图像信息但难以被AR模型从左到右预测。作者用Tripartite Variational Consistency (TVC)理论分析了这种不匹配，发现两阶段训练只保证了重建侧的一致性，却忽略了先验一致性。
AI.method: 在分词器训练阶段加入分布级先验匹配信号，保持重建目标不变。使用Wasserstein梯度流更新优化该信号，对于硬类别token，更新简化为token级别的对比学习——用一个辅助AR模型跟踪当前分词分布，与目标AR先验进行对比。该方法只需前向传播两个AR模型，无需反向传播。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，wAR-Tok在保持相当重建质量的情况下，降低了AR损失并提升了生成FID指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过TVC理论揭示了两阶段分词器训练的根本问题，并提出了一种轻量级的先验匹配方法，在不改变重建能力的前提下有效提升AR生成性能。

title: VibeServe: Can AI Agents Build Bespoke LLM Serving Systems?
summary: For years, we have built LLM serving systems like any other critical infrastructure: a single general-purpose stack, hand-tuned over many engineer-years, meant to support every model and workload. In this paper, we take the opposite bet: a multi-agent loop that automatically synthesizes bespoke serving systems for different usage scenarios. We propose VibeServe, the first agentic loop that generates entire LLM serving stacks end-to-end. VibeServe uses an outer loop to plan and track the search over system designs, and an inner loop to implement candidates, check correctness, and measure performance on the target benchmark. In the standard deployment setting, where existing stacks are highly optimized, VibeServe remains competitive with vLLM, showing that generation-time specialization need not come at the cost of performance. More interestingly, in non-standard scenarios, VibeServe outperforms existing systems by exploiting opportunities that generic systems miss in six scenarios involving non-standard model architectures, workload knowledge, and hardware-specific optimizations. Together, these results suggest a different point in the design space for infrastructure software: generation-time specialization rather than runtime generality. Code is available at https://github.com/uw-syfi/vibe-serve.

AI.tldr: VibeServe 提出了一种多智能体循环框架，能够自动生成针对不同使用场景的定制化 LLM 推理服务系统，在标准场景下与 vLLM 竞争，在非标准场景下显著超越现有系统。
AI.motivation: 传统 LLM 服务系统采用通用型架构，需要大量人工调优来支持各种模型和工作负载。作者认为这种方法效率低下，因此提出相反的思路：在生成时进行自动化定制，而非运行时保持通用性。
AI.method: VibeServe 采用双层智能体循环：外层循环负责规划并跟踪系统设计的搜索空间；内层循环实现候选系统、检查其正确性，并在目标基准上测量性能，从而自动生成端到端的 LLM 服务栈。
AI.result: 在标准部署场景中，VibeServe 与高度优化的 vLLM 性能相当；在六种非标准场景（如非标准模型架构、工作负载知识、硬件特定优化）中，VibeServe 通过利用通用系统忽略的机会，显著优于现有系统。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明基础设施软件存在一个不同的设计空间：生成时定制化优于运行时通用性，为 LLM 服务系统的设计提供了新方向。

title: QuadraSHAP: Stable and Scalable Shapley Values for Product Games via Gauss-Legendre Quadrature
summary: We study the efficient computation of Shapley values for \emph{product games} -- cooperative games in which the coalition value factorizes as a product of per-player terms. Such games arise in machine learning explainability whenever the value function inherits a multiplicative structure from the underlying model, as in kernel methods with product kernels and tree-based models. Our key result is that the Shapley value of each player in a product game admits an exact one-dimensional integral representation: the weighted sum over exponentially many feature coalitions collapses to the integral of a degree-$(d-1)$ polynomial over $[0,1]$, where $d$ is the total number of features. This yields a Gauss--Legendre quadrature scheme that is \emph{provably exact} whenever the number of nodes satisfies $m_q \geq \lceil d/2 \rceil$, and otherwise provides a \emph{near-exact} approximation with error provably decaying geometrically in $m_q$. In practice, a few hundred nodes can achieve highly precise estimates even with thousands of features. Building on this formulation, we derive a numerically stable implementation via log-space evaluation, together with an efficient parallel implementation based on associative scan primitives that achieves $O(d\,m_q)$ total work and $O(\log d)$ parallel time. Experiments show that \textsc{QuadraSHAP} is the fastest numerically stable method across all tested configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Gauss-Legendre求积的Shapley值高效计算方法QuadraSHAP，适用于值函数可分解为乘积形式的博弈（乘积博弈），通过将指数级求和转化为一维积分，实现了O(d m_q)的计算复杂度和O(log d)的并行时间，且精度可保证。
AI.motivation: 现有的Shapley值计算在特征数量大时面临指数级复杂度问题，而许多机器学习模型（如核方法、树模型）的值函数具有乘积结构，现有方法未能充分利用这一特性来高效计算。
AI.method: 推导出乘积博弈中Shapley值的一维积分表示（被积函数为d-1次多项式），利用Gauss-Legendre求积公式实现精确/近似的数值积分，结合log-space数值稳定处理和关联扫描原语实现高效并行计算。
AI.result: 当求积节点数m_q ≥ ⌈d/2⌉时精确可计算；否则误差随节点数几何级衰减。实践中几百个节点即可处理数千特征。QuadraSHAP在所有测试配置中是最快的数值稳定方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为乘积博弈的Shapley值计算提供了一种理论上可证明精确、数值稳定且高度可并行的实用方案，对模型可解释性具有重要价值。

title: Priming, Path-dependence, and Plasticity: Understanding the molding of user-LLM interaction and its implications from (many) chat logs in the wild
summary: User interactions with LLMs are shaped by prior experiences and individual exploration, but in-lab studies do not provide system designers with visibility into these in-the-wild factors. This work explores a new approach to studying real-world user-LLM interactions through large-scale chat logs from the wild. Through analysis of 140K chatbot sessions from 7,955 anonymized global users over time, we demonstrate key patterns in user expressions despite varied tasks: (1) LLM users are not tabula rasa, nor are they constantly adapting; rather, interaction patterns form and stabilize rapidly through individual early trajectories; (2) Longitudinal outcomes, such as recurring text patterns and retention rates, are strongly correlated with early exploration; (3) Parallel dynamics are present, including organizing expressions by task types such as emotional support, or in response to model-version updates. These results present an ``agency paradox'': despite LLM input spaces being unconstrained and user-driven, we in fact see less user exploration. We call for design consideration surrounding the molding procedure and its incorporation in future research.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析14万次真实聊天日志，发现LLM用户并非完全自由探索，而是早期交互模式会快速固化，形成"能动性悖论"——尽管输入空间无约束，用户探索行为反而较少。
AI.motivation: 现有实验室研究无法反映用户在实际场景中与LLM的交互模式，设计者缺乏对用户真实行为的可见性，因此需要从野外大规模聊天日志中研究用户-LLM交互的真实动态。
AI.method: 对7955名全球用户的14万次聊天会话进行纵向分析，研究用户交互模式的演化、早期轨迹对长期结果的预测作用以及并行动态（如按任务类型组织表达、对模型版本更新的响应）。
AI.result: (1) 用户交互模式通过早期个人轨迹快速形成并稳定；(2) 长期结果（如重复文本模式、留存率）与早期探索行为强相关；(3) 存在并行动态，用户会按任务类型（如情感支持）或响应模型版本更新来组织表达。
AI.conclusion: LLM用户存在"能动性悖论"：理论上输入空间无约束，实际用户探索行为却较少。呼吁在设计研究中考虑"塑造过程"（molding procedure）的影响。

title: Beyond Forgetting in Continual Medical Image Segmentation: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
summary: Continual learning (CL) is essential for deploying medical image segmentation models in clinical environments where imaging domains, anatomical targets, and diagnostic tasks evolve over time. However, continual segmentation still faces three main challenges. First, the scenarios for this task remain insufficiently standardized for real-world clinical settings. Second, existing research has been primarily focused on mitigating forgetting, overlooking the other essential properties such as plasticity. Third, a benchmark work with comprehensive evaluation on existing methods is stll desirable. To address these gaps, we present such benchmark study of continual medical image segmentation. We first define three clinically motivated scenarios, namely Domain-CL, Class-CL, and Organ-CL, to respectively capture the cross-center domain shift, the incremental anatomical structure segmentation, and the cross-organ segmentation. We then introduce an evaluation framework that measures not only general performance and forgetting, but also plasticity, forward generalizability, parameter efficiency, and replay burden. The results, from extensive experiments with representative CL methods, showed that it was still challenging to develop a model that could satisfy all the requirements simultaneously. Nevertheless, these studies also suggested that the replay-based methods achieve the best overall balance between stability and plasticity, the parameter-isolation methods should be effective at reducing forgetting, though at the cost of increased model size, and the forward generalizability remain a significantly understudied aspect of this research field. Finally, we discuss related learning paradigms and outline future directions for continual medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向医学图像分割的持续学习基准，定义了三种临床场景（域漂移、增量解剖分割、跨器官分割），并引入了包含可塑性、前向泛化性等多维度的评估框架。实验表明回放方法在稳定性与可塑性间取得最佳平衡，参数隔离方法能有效减少遗忘但增大模型规模。
AI.motivation: 持续学习在医学图像分割中面临三个挑战：场景缺乏临床标准化、现有研究过度关注遗忘而忽略可塑性等关键属性、缺乏综合基准评估。本文旨在填补这些空白。
AI.method: 定义了三种临床场景：Domain-CL（跨中心域漂移）、Class-CL（增量解剖结构分割）、Organ-CL（跨器官分割）；引入多维评估框架，涵盖性能、遗忘、可塑性、前向泛化性、参数效率和回放负担。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）回放方法在稳定性与可塑性间平衡最佳；2）参数隔离方法能有效减少遗忘但模型规模增大；3）前向泛化性是该领域显著未充分研究的方面。
AI.conclusion: 同时满足所有要求仍具挑战，但对不同方法的优劣进行了系统分析，并指出前向泛化性是未来重点研究方向。

title: Safety Certification is Classification
summary: The goal of this paper is certifying safety of dynamical systems subject to uncertainty. Existing approaches use trajectory data to estimate transition probabilities, and compute safety probabilities recursively via dynamic programming (DP). This recursion may lead to compounding errors in the certified safety probability, thus collapsing to a vacuous lower bound for growing horizons $T$. We propose a kernel embedding framework that treats safety certification as a classification problem on trajectory data, directly estimating the $T$-step safety probability without recursion. We show that the framework subsumes well-established approaches from the literature (e.g., barrier certificates, robust Markov models) as special cases, and allows us to go beyond their limitations. As the main consequence, it bypasses compounding error across the horizon and enables certification for systems with non-Markovian dynamics. We demonstrate that direct estimators remain stable independent of the certification horizon and in the non-Markovian setting, whilst DP-based certificates silently go unsound -- confirmed in simulation on a neural-controlled quadrotor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于核嵌入的框架，将动态系统的安全认证视为轨迹数据的分类问题，直接估计T步安全概率，避免动态规划递归导致的误差累积问题，支持非马尔可夫动力学，并在神经控制四旋翼仿真中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过动态规划递归计算安全概率，随着时间步长T增加会累积误差，导致认证下界变得空洞无效。作者希望突破这一局限，实现更长时域下的可靠安全认证。
AI.method: 将安全认证转化为轨迹数据的分类问题，利用核嵌入框架直接估计T步安全概率，无需递归计算。该框架统一了屏障证书、鲁棒马尔可夫模型等现有方法。
AI.result: 直接估计器在不同认证时域下保持稳定，且在非马尔可夫设定下依然有效；而基于DP的认证方法会无声地变得不可靠。神经控制四旋翼仿真验证了结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的核嵌入框架绕过递归误差累积，支持非马尔可夫系统，为长时域安全认证提供了更可靠的方案。

title: Retain-Neutral Surrogates for Min-Max Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning seeks to remove the influence of designated training data while preserving performance on the remaining data. Approximate unlearning can be viewed as a local editing problem; in min-max unlearning, the key local object is the surrogate point at which the retain objective is evaluated. When forget and retain gradients are strongly aligned, an unconstrained forget-maximizing perturbation can move to a surrogate point that increases retain loss. We propose Retain-Orthogonal Surrogate Unlearning (ROSU), which constrains the inner surrogate construction by maximizing first-order forget gain subject to zero first-order retain change under a fixed perturbation budget. This yields a closed-form retain-orthogonal perturbation, a lightweight transported outer update, and amplification along the retain-neutral direction. Our analysis establishes (i) a curvature-controlled second-order bound on retain damage, (ii) a positive-alignment regime in which ROSU strictly reduces surrogate retain loss relative to standard min-max perturbations, and (iii) near-equivalence when the two gradients are nearly orthogonal. Across vision and language benchmarks (CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, TOFU, WMDP), the empirical pattern follows this geometry: ROSU gives its clearest gains in high-coupling regimes while remaining competitive elsewhere.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROSU方法，通过约束内部代理点构造使其与保留梯度正交，在固定扰动预算下最大化遗忘一阶增益同时保持保留损失不变，实现高效机器遗忘。理论分析建立了曲率控制的二阶保留损失上界，并证明在梯度强对齐场景下ROSU优于标准min-max方法。
AI.motivation: 机器遗忘中，近似遗忘可视为局部编辑问题。现有min-max遗忘方法在遗忘梯度和保留梯度强对齐时，无约束的遗忘最大化扰动会导致代理点移动到增加保留损失的位置，损害模型在保留数据上的性能。
AI.method: 提出Retain-Orthogonal Surrogate Unlearning (ROSU)，约束内部代理点构造，在固定扰动预算下最大化遗忘一阶增益的同时保持保留一阶变化为零。推导出保留正交扰动的闭式解，以及轻量化的传输外更新和沿保留中性方向的放大策略。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet、TOFU、WMDP等视觉和语言基准上，ROSU在高耦合（梯度强对齐）场景下表现最优，在其他场景下也具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ROSU通过保留正交约束有效解决了梯度强对齐时标准min-max遗忘的保留损失增加问题，理论分析建立了曲率控制的二阶保留损失上界，并揭示了正对齐机制和近正交时的近等价性。

title: DynT2I-Eval: A Dynamic Evaluation Framework for Text-to-Image Models
summary: Existing text-to-image (T2I) benchmarks largely rely on fixed prompt sets, leaving them vulnerable to overfitting and benchmark contamination once publicly released and repeatedly reused. In this work, we propose DynT2I-Eval, a fully automated dynamic evaluation framework for T2I models. It constructs a structured visual semantic space from long-form descriptions, decomposing prompts into controllable dimensions (e.g., subject, logical constraint, environment, and composition). This enables the continuous generation of fresh prompts via task-specific spaces and difficulty-aware sampling. DynT2I-Eval evaluates model performance across text alignment, perceptual quality, and aesthetics. Heterogeneous outputs are unified into prompt-conditioned pairwise comparisons, allowing a dynamic scheduler, micro-batch aggregation, and weighted Bayesian updates to maintain a stable online leaderboard despite changing prompt distributions and model injection. Experiments with independently sampled prompt streams demonstrate that continually refreshed prompts provide a robust evaluation protocol, reducing the impact of prompt-set-specific tuning. Simulations and ablations further confirm that the proposed ranking framework achieves a strong balance among cold-start convergence, late-entry discovery, and long-run ranking fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出了DynT2I-Eval，一个面向文本到图像模型的自动化动态评估框架，通过结构化视觉语义空间持续生成新提示，并利用在线排行榜机制实现鲁棒评估，避免过拟合和基准污染。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I基准依赖固定提示集，反复公开使用后易受过拟合和基准污染问题影响，导致评估结果不可靠。
AI.method: 1) 从长文本描述构建结构化视觉语义空间，将提示分解为可控维度（主体、逻辑约束、环境、组合）；2) 通过任务特定空间和难度感知采样持续生成新提示；3) 将异构输出统一为提示条件成对比较，结合动态调度器、微批聚合和加权贝叶斯更新维持在线排行榜。
AI.result: 实验表明持续刷新的提示相比固定提示集提供了更鲁棒的评估协议，减少了对特定提示集调优的影响；模拟和消融实验证明该排名框架在冷启动收敛、后期发现和长期排名保真度之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 动态评估框架能有效缓解基准污染问题，为T2I模型提供更可靠、更可持续的评估方法。

title: Shallow Prefill, Deep Decoding: Efficient Long-Context Inference via Layer-Asymmetric KV Visibility
summary: Long-context inference in decoder-only language models is costly because long prompts are processed during Prefill, cached at every layer, and repeatedly attended to during autoregressive Decode. We introduce \emph{Shallow Prefill, dEEp Decode} (SPEED), a phase-asymmetric KV-visibility policy that materializes non-anchor prompt-token KV states only in lower layers while keeping Decode-phase tokens full-depth. Unlike previous approaches that make upper-layer prompt KV states cheaper to store or construct, SPEED removes prefill tokens from the upper-layer Decode visibility set altogether. With a minimal BoS anchor, this simple change preserves broad benchmark quality while reducing long-context cost. In a controlled Llama-3.1-8B instruction-tuning study, SPEED using only 75\% of layers for prefill tokens reaches 51.2 average score on OLMES-style benchmarks, compared with 51.4 for the full-depth baseline, while improving TTFT by 33\%, TPOT by 22\%, and reducing active KV memory by 25.0\% at 128K context. Layer-wise diagnostics suggest that this cutoff retains the main prompt-selection and representation-stabilization regions of the full-depth model. These results show that long-context prompt tokens need not always persist as full-depth KV-cache objects when Decode-phase tokens remain full-depth.

AI.tldr: SPEED提出了一种非对称KV可见性策略：Prefill阶段的非锚点token仅在下层保留KV状态，而上层只保留锚点token，Decode阶段的token保持全深度可见性。该方法在Llama-3.1-8B上以75%层数用于prefill token，达到与全深度基线接近的性能（51.2 vs 51.4），同时TTFT提升33%、TPOT提升22%、KV内存减少25%。
AI.motivation: 长上下文Decoder-only模型推理成本高昂，因为长prompt在Prefill阶段被处理、每层缓存KV、并在Decode阶段被反复注意力计算。现有工作主要让上层prompt KV更便宜存储或构建，但SPEED认为prefill token不需要在所有层都作为KV缓存对象存在。
AI.method: 提出"Shallow Prefill, Deep Decode"（SPEED）策略：非锚点prompt token的KV状态只在下层（如75%层数）中物化，上层完全移除这些token的可见性，仅保留BOS锚点token。Decode阶段的token保持全深度可见性。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B指令微调实验中，SPEED（75%层数用于prefill token）在OLMES基准上平均51.2分（基线51.4分），TTFT降低33%，TPOT降低22%，KV内存减少25%（128K上下文）。层诊断表明cutoff保留了full-depth模型的主要prompt选择和表示稳定化区域。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文prompt token不需要始终作为全深度的KV缓存对象存在，只要Decode阶段token保持全深度，对模型质量的影响很小。这为长上下文推理的高效化提供了新的设计空间。

title: RepFlow: Representation Enhanced Flow Matching for Causal Effect Estimation
summary:
Estimating causal effects from observational data has become increasingly critical in diverse fields including healthcare, economics, and social policy. The fundamental challenge in causal inference arises from the missing counterfactuals and the selection bias. Existing methods are largely limited to point estimates and lack the capacity for distribution modeling. In this work, we propose RepFlow, a novel framework that formulates causal effect estimation as a joint optimization problem integrating representation learning with Conditional Flow Matching (CFM).
  RepFlow mitigates selection bias by minimizing the entropically regularized Wasserstein distance between treated and control representations.
  To enhance numerical stability, we further introduce an $L_2$ normalization constraint on latent representations.
  This balanced representation enables the flow model to accurately capture the distribution of potential outcomes. Extensive experiments across a wide range of benchmarks demonstrate that RepFlow consistently outperforms existing methods in both point and distributional causal effect estimation.

AI.tldr: RepFlow框架将表示学习与条件流匹配(CFM)结合，通过最小化熵正则化Wasserstein距离来缓解选择偏差，并引入L2归一化约束增强数值稳定性，在因果效应估计的点估计和分布估计上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有因果效应估计方法主要局限于点估计，缺乏分布建模能力，且面临缺失反事实和选择偏差等核心挑战。
AI.method: 将因果效应估计构建为联合优化问题，融合表示学习与条件流匹配(CFM)；通过最小化熵正则化Wasserstein距离缓解选择偏差；引入L2归一化约束增强数值稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，RepFlow在点估计和分布因果效应估计方面均一致优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RepFlow成功将流匹配模型引入因果效应估计，实现了从点估计到分布估计的扩展，并有效缓解了选择偏差问题。

title: LeakDojo: Decoding the Leakage Threats of RAG Systems
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enables large language models (LLMs) to leverage external knowledge, but also exposes valuable RAG databases to leakage attacks. As RAG systems grow more complex and LLMs exhibit stronger instruction-following capabilities, existing studies fall short of systematically assessing RAG leakage risks. We present LeakDojo, a configurable framework for controlled evaluation of RAG leakage. Using LeakDojo, we benchmark six existing attacks across fourteen LLMs, four datasets, and diverse RAG systems. Our study reveals that (1) query generation and adversarial instructions contribute independently to leakage, with overall leakage well approximated by their product; (2) stronger instruction-following capability correlates with higher leakage risk; and (3) improvements in RAG faithfulness can introduce increased leakage risk. These findings provide actionable insights for understanding and mitigating RAG leakage in practice. Our codebase is available at https://github.com/yeasen-z/LeakDojo.

AI.tldr: LeakDojo是一个可配置框架，用于系统评估RAG系统的数据库泄漏风险。研究发现查询生成和对抗性指令独立影响泄漏，更强的指令遵循能力与更高泄漏风险相关，RAG忠实度提升可能增加泄漏风险。
AI.motivation: RAG系统使LLM可以利用外部知识，但同时也将宝贵的RAG数据库暴露于泄漏攻击之下。现有研究缺乏对RAG泄漏风险的系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出LeakDojo可配置框架，在14个LLM、4个数据集和多种RAG系统上对6种现有攻击进行基准测试。
AI.result: (1)查询生成和对抗性指令独立贡献于泄漏，整体泄漏近似于二者的乘积；(2)更强的指令遵循能力与更高的泄漏风险相关；(3)RAG忠实度的提升可能引入更高的泄漏风险。
AI.conclusion: 提供了理解和缓解RAG泄漏的可行见解，代码已开源。

title: Retina-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language Modeling for Joint Retinal Diagnosis and Clinical Report Generation
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness among working-age adults worldwide, yet most automated screening systems are limited to image-level classification and lack clinically structured reporting. We propose Retina-RAG, a low-cost modular framework that jointly performs DR severity grading, macular edema (ME) detection, and report generation. The architecture decouples a high-performance retinal classifier and a parameter-efficient vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) adapted via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), enabling flexible component integration. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module injects curated ophthalmic knowledge together with structured classifier outputs at inference time to improve diagnostic consistency and reduce hallucinations. Retina-RAG achieves an F1-score of 0.731 for DR grading and 0.948 for ME detection, substantially outperforming zero-shot Qwen (0.096, 0.732) and MMed-RAG (0.541, 0.641) on a retinal disease detection dataset with captions. For report generation, Retina-RAG attains ROUGE-L 0.429 and SBERT similarity 0.884, exceeding all baselines. The full framework operates on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that clinically structured retinal AI can be achieved with modest computational resources.

AI.tldr: 提出Retina-RAG，一种结合视网膜分类器、LoRA微调视觉语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL-7B）和检索增强生成（RAG）的模块化框架，用于糖尿病视网膜病变的严重程度分级、黄斑水肿检测和报告生成，在消费级GPU上运行。
AI.motivation: 现有糖尿病视网膜病变自动筛查系统大多局限于图像级分类，缺乏临床结构化的报告生成能力，且纯视觉语言模型存在幻觉问题。
AI.method: 采用解耦架构：1）高性能视网膜分类器；2）基于LoRA适配的Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct视觉语言模型；3）RAG模块在推理时注入结构化分类器输出与眼科知识库，提升诊断一致性与减少幻觉。
AI.result: DR分级F1=0.731，ME检测F1=0.948，远优于零样本Qwen（0.096, 0.732）和MMed-RAG（0.541, 0.641）；报告生成ROUGE-L=0.429，SBERT相似度=0.884，均超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 临床结构化的视网膜AI可以在适度计算资源下实现，Retina-RAG展示了模块化、低成本的可部署方案。

title: On Time, Within Budget: Constraint-Driven Online Resource Allocation for Agentic Workflows
summary: Agentic systems increasingly solve complex user requests by executing orchestrated workflows, where subtasks are assigned to specialized models or tools and coordinated according to their dependencies. While recent work improves agent efficiency by optimizing the performance--cost--latency frontier, real deployments often impose concrete requirements: a workflow must be completed within a specified budget and before a specified deadline. This shifts the goal from average efficiency optimization to maximizing the probability that the entire workflow completes successfully under explicit budget and deadline constraints. We study \emph{constraint-driven online resource allocation for agentic workflows}. Given a dependency-structured workflow and estimates of success rates and generation lengths for each subtask--model pair, the executor allocates models and parallel samples across simultaneously executable subtasks while managing the remaining budget and time. We formulate this setting as a finite-horizon stochastic online allocation problem and propose \emph{Monte Carlo Portfolio Planning} (MCPP), a lightweight closed-loop planner that directly estimates constrained completion probability through simulated workflow executions and replans after observed outcomes. Experiments on CodeFlow and ProofFlow demonstrate that MCPP consistently improves constrained completion probability over strong baselines across a wide range of budget--deadline constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文研究面向智能体工作流的约束驱动在线资源分配问题，提出蒙特卡洛组合规划（MCPP）方法，在给定预算和截止时间约束下最大化工作流成功完成概率。
AI.motivation: 实际部署中智能体工作流往往有明确的预算和截止时间约束，现有方法仅优化平均性能-成本-延迟边界，未考虑在约束下最大化完成概率这一实际需求。
AI.method: 将问题建模为有限时域随机在线分配问题，提出MCPP——一种轻量级闭环规划器，通过模拟工作流执行直接估计约束下的完成概率，并在观察到结果后重新规划。
AI.result: 在CodeFlow和ProofFlow实验上，MCPP在各种预算-截止时间约束下均持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 面向约束的在线资源分配能显著提升智能体工作流在实际部署中的可靠性，MCPP是一种有效的轻量级解决方案。

title: VARS-FL: Validation-Aligned Client Selection for Non-IID Federated Learning in IoT Systems
summary: Federated learning (FL) systems typically employ stateless client selection, treating each communication round independently and ignoring accumulated evidence of client contribution quality. Under non-IID data, this leads to slow convergence and unstable training, particularly when selection relies on local proxies (e.g., training loss) that are misaligned with the global optimization objective. These challenges are especially pronounced in Internet of Things (IoT) and Industrial IoT (IIoT) environments, where data is highly heterogeneous and distributed across devices observing different traffic patterns. In this paper, we propose VARS-FL (Validation-Aligned Reputation Scoring for Federated Learning), a client selection framework that quantifies each client's contribution using the reduction in server-side validation loss induced by its update. These per-round signals are aggregated into a Reputation score that combines a sliding-window average of recent contributions with a logarithmically scaled participation term, enabling robust exploration-exploitation selection. VARS-FL requires no changes to local training or aggregation and remains fully compatible with standard FedAvg. We evaluate VARS-FL on a 15-class non-IID IoT intrusion detection task using the Edge-IIoTset dataset, with 100 clients across multiple seeds, and compare it against FedAvg, Oort, and Power-of-Choice. VARS-FL consistently improves accuracy, F1-Macro, and loss, while accelerating convergence (up to 36% fewer rounds to reach 80% accuracy). These results demonstrate that validation-aligned, history-aware client selection provides a more reliable and efficient training process for federated learning in heterogeneous IoT environments.

AI.tldr: 提出VARS-FL框架，通过服务器端验证损失减少量评估客户端贡献，结合滑动窗口平均和对数参与度项生成信誉分数，实现非IID联邦学习中的高效客户端选择，在IoT入侵检测任务上加速收敛达36%。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习客户端选择方法（随机选择、基于本地代理如训练损失）在非IID数据下收敛慢且训练不稳定，尤其在IoT/IIoT环境中数据高度异构，亟需一种与全局优化目标对齐的、历史感知的客户端选择机制。
AI.method: 提出VARS-FL框架：1) 用客户端更新后服务器验证损失的减少量衡量单轮贡献；2) 将单轮贡献通过滑动窗口平均（近期贡献）与对数放大的参与度项结合，聚合为信誉分数；3) 基于信誉分数进行探索-利用权衡的客户端选择；4) 无需修改本地训练或聚合算法，兼容FedAvg。
AI.result: 在Edge-IIoTset数据集（15类非IID，100个客户端）上，VARS-FL在准确率、F1-Macro和损失上均优于FedAvg、Oort和Power-of-Choice，且加速收敛（达到80%准确率所需轮次减少36%）。
AI.conclusion: 验证对齐的、历史感知的客户端选择能为异构IoT环境中的联邦学习提供更可靠、更高效的训练过程。

title: Bridging Passive and Active: Enhancing Conversation Starter Recommendation via Active Expression Modeling
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-driven conversational search is shifting information retrieval from reactive keyword matching to proactive, open-ended dialogues. In this context, Conversation Starters are widely deployed to provide personalized query recommendations that help users initiate dialogues. Conventionally, recommending these starters relies on a closed "exposure-click" loop. Yet, this feedback loop mechanism traps the system in an echo chamber where, compounded by data sparsity, it fails to capture the dynamic nature of conversational search intents shaped by the open world. As a result, the system skews towards popular but generic suggestions.In this work, we uncover an untapped paradigm shift to shatter this harmful feedback loop: harnessing user "free will" through active user expressions. Unlike traditional recommendations, conversational search empowers users to bypass menus entirely through manually typed queries. The open-world intents in active queries hold the key to breaking this loop. However, incorporating them is non-trivial: (1) there exists an inherent distribution shift between active queries and formulated starters. (2) Furthermore, the "non-ID-able" nature of open text renders traditional item-based popularity statistics ineffective for large-scale industrial streaming training. To this end, we propose Passive-Active Bridge (PA-Bridge), a novel framework that employs an adversarial distribution aligner to bridge the distributional gap between passively recommended starters and active expressions. Moreover, we introduce a semantic discretizer to enable the deployment of popularity debiasing algorithms. Online A/B tests on our platform, demonstrate that PA-Bridge significantly boosts the Feature Penetration Rate by 0.54% and User Active Days

AI.tldr: 本文提出PA-Bridge框架，通过对抗分布对齐器和语义离散化器解决LLM驱动的对话搜索中"曝光-点击"反馈循环导致的回声室效应，将用户主动表达（手动查询）融入对话启动器推荐，显著提升了特征渗透率和用户活跃天数。
AI.motivation: 传统的对话启动器推荐依赖"曝光-点击"闭环反馈机制，导致系统陷入回声室效应——只推荐流行但泛化的内容，无法捕捉用户在开放世界中动态变化的搜索意图。作者希望利用用户在对话搜索中主动表达的自由意志（手动输入的查询）来打破这一有害反馈循环。
AI.method: 提出Passive-Active Bridge (PA-Bridge)框架：(1) 使用对抗分布对齐器(adversarial distribution aligner)来弥合被动推荐的启动器与主动表达之间的分布偏移；(2) 引入语义离散化器(semantic discretizer)将开放文本转化为可处理的形式，以便在工业级流式训练中部署流行度去偏算法。
AI.result: 在线A/B测试显示，PA-Bridge在平台上将特征渗透率(Feature Penetration Rate)提升了0.54%，用户活跃天数(User Active Days)也获得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用用户主动表达的自由意志可以有效打破对话搜索推荐中的回声室效应，PA-Bridge通过对抗对齐和语义离散化成功将开放世界的用户意图融入推荐系统，为下一代LLM驱动的对话搜索提供了新的范式。

title: SuperFace: Preference-Aligned Facial Expression Estimation Beyond Pseudo Supervision
summary: Accurate facial estimation is crucial for realistic digital human animation, and ARKit blendshape coefficients offer an interpretable representation by mapping facial motions to semantic animation controls. However, learning high-quality ARKit coefficient prediction remains limited by the absence of reliable ground-truth supervision. Existing methods typically rely on capture software such as Live Link Face to provide pseudo labels, which may contain noisy activations, biased coefficient magnitudes, and missing or inaccurate facial actions. Consequently, models trained with supervised learning tend to reproduce imperfect pseudo labels rather than optimize for perceptual expression fidelity. In this paper, we propose SuperFace, a preference-driven framework that moves ARKit facial expression estimation from pseudo-label imitation toward human-aligned perceptual optimization. Instead of treating software-estimated coefficients as fixed ground truth, SuperFace uses them only as an initialization and further improves coefficient prediction through human preference feedback on rendered facial expressions. By aligning the model with perceptual judgments rather than numerical pseudo labels, SuperFace enables more visually faithful and expressive facial animation. Experiments show that SuperFace improves expression fidelity over Live Link Face supervision, demonstrating the effectiveness of preference-driven optimization for semantic facial action prediction.

AI.tldr: SuperFace提出了一种基于人类偏好优化的框架，用于ARKit面部表情系数预测。该方法不再将软件生成的伪标签视为真实值，而是通过人类对渲染面部表情的偏好反馈来优化系数，实现更符合视觉感知的面部动画质量。
AI.motivation: 现有ARKit系数预测方法依赖Live Link Face等软件提供伪标签进行监督学习，但这些伪标签存在噪声激活、系数偏差、面部动作缺失等问题，导致模型学习到的是不完美的伪标签而非真实的表达保真度。需要一种能对齐人类感知的优化方法。
AI.method: 提出SuperFace框架：1) 使用软件估计的系数作为初始化；2) 通过人类对渲染面部表情的偏好反馈进行优化；3) 从伪标签模仿转向人类对齐的感知优化。
AI.result: 实验表明SuperFace在表情保真度上优于直接使用Live Link Face监督的方法，验证了偏好驱动优化对语义面部动作预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SuperFace通过将面部表情估计从伪标签模仿转向人类偏好对齐的感知优化，实现了更视觉真实和富有表现力的面部动画，为解决缺乏可靠真实标签的回归问题提供了新思路。

title: CrossCult-KIBench: A Benchmark for Cross-Cultural Knowledge Insertion in MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), trained primarily on English-centric data, frequently generate culturally inappropriate or misaligned responses in cross-cultural settings. To mitigate this, we introduce the task of cross-cultural knowledge insertion, which focuses on adapting models to specific cultural contexts while preserving their original behavior in other cultures. To facilitate research in this area, we introduce CrossCult-KIBench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for assessing both the effectiveness of knowledge insertion and its unintended side effects on non-target cultures. The benchmark includes 9,800 image-grounded cases covering 49 culturally relevant visual scenarios across English, Chinese, and Arabic language-culture groups. It supports evaluation in both single-insert and sequential-insert settings. We also propose Memory-Conditioned Knowledge Insertion (MCKI) as a baseline method. MCKI retrieves relevant cultural knowledge from an external memory using frozen MLLM representations, prepending matched entries as conditional prompts when applicable. Extensive experiments on CrossCult-KIBench reveal that current approaches struggle to balance effective cultural adaptation with behavioral preservation, highlighting a key challenge in developing culturally-aware MLLMs. Our work thus underscores an important research direction for developing more culturally adaptive and responsible MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨文化知识插入任务及CrossCult-KIBench评估基准（含9800个案例，覆盖中英阿三种语言文化），并提出MCKI基线方法，实验发现现有方法难以平衡文化适应与行为保持。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）主要基于英语中心数据训练，在跨文化场景中常生成文化不恰当或不对齐的回应，亟需一种能针对性插入特定文化知识同时保持其他文化行为的方法。
AI.method: 提出CrossCult-KIBench基准（9800个视觉场景，覆盖49种文化场景，支持单次和顺序插入评估）和MCKI基线方法（从外部记忆检索相关文化知识，利用冻结MLLM表示匹配并前置条件提示）。
AI.result: 实验表明现有方法难以在有效文化适应和行为保持之间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 跨文化知识插入是发展更具文化适应性和负责任MLLM的关键研究方向。

title: VisMMOE: Exploiting Visual-Expert Affinity for Efficient Visual-Language MoE Offloading
summary: Large-scale vision-language mixture-of-experts (VL-MoE) models provide strong multimodal capability, but efficient deployment on memory-constrained platforms remains difficult. Existing MoE offloading systems are largely designed for text-centric workloads and become much less effective for visual-heavy inputs, where large numbers of visual tokens induce broader and less predictable expert accesses. We present VisMMoE, a VL-MoE offloading system built on a single systems insight: pruning redundant visual tokens can improve offloading not only by reducing computation, but also by reshaping expert demand. We refer to this effect as \textit{visual-expert affinity}: token pruning makes expert accesses more concentrated within layers and more stable across layers, producing a smaller and more predictable expert working set. Guided by this insight, VisMMoE combines affinity-aware token compression, lookahead expert prediction, and cache/pipeline orchestration to improve expert locality and prefetch effectiveness under tight memory budgets. We implement VisMMoE on multiple frameworks and evaluate it on representative VL-MoE models and benchmarks. VisMMoE improves end-to-end inference performance by up to 2.68x and 1.61x, respectively, over strong baselines for today's VL-MoE deployments while maintaining competitive accuracy.

AI.tldr: VisMMoE是一个面向视觉-语言混合专家模型的高效推理卸载系统，通过剪枝冗余视觉token重塑专家访问模式（视觉-专家亲和性），结合亲和性感知token压缩、前瞻性专家预测和缓存/流水线编排，在内存受限平台上实现最高2.68倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的MoE卸载系统主要针对文本密集型任务设计，在处理视觉密集输入时效果不佳——大量视觉token导致专家访问模式分散且难以预测，使得内存卸载效率低、推理速度慢。
AI.method: 核心洞察是"视觉-专家亲和性"：剪枝冗余视觉token不仅减少计算量，还能使专家访问在层内更集中、跨层更稳定，从而产生更小且可预测的专家工作集。基于此，VisMMoE设计了三个关键组件：1) 亲和性感知token压缩；2) 前瞻性专家预测；3) 缓存/流水线协同编排。
AI.result: 在多个框架和代表性VL-MoE模型上评估，VisMMoE相比强基线方法实现端到端推理性能最高提升2.68倍和1.61倍，同时保持有竞争力的精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过将视觉token剪枝与MoE卸载系统协同设计，可以有效改善视觉-语言模型的部署效率，证明了"视觉-专家亲和性"这一概念在系统优化中的实用价值。

title: Near-Policy: Accelerating On-Policy Distillation via Asynchronous Generation and Selective Packing
summary: Standard knowledge distillation for autoregressive models often suffers from distribution mismatch. While on-policy methods mitigate this by leveraging student-generated outputs, they rely on computationally expensive Reinforcement Learning (RL) frameworks. To improve efficiency, we propose Near-Policy Distillation (NPD), an asynchronous approach that decouples student generation from training. This reformulation enables Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with sequence packing. However, asynchronous updates inevitably introduce policy lag and sample noise, which can cause the behavior to drift from near-policy toward off-policy. To counteract this without sacrificing efficiency, NPD integrates sparse student updates and the $Δ$-IFD filtering mechanism, a heuristic sample selection mechanism that empirically stabilizes the optimization trajectory. By filtering extreme out-of-distribution samples, $Δ$-IFD prevents noise from dominating the gradients, ensuring updates remain within a safe proximal learning zone. Empirically, the NPD framework achieves a 8.1x speedup over on-policy baselines and outperforms SFT by 8.09%. Crucially, by effectively narrowing the exploration space for subsequent RL, our method enables openPangu-Embedded-1B to reach a state-of-the-art score of 68.73%, outperforming the substantially larger Qwen3-1.7B. Codes will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 提出近策略蒸馏（NPD）框架，通过异步解耦学生生成与训练，结合稀疏更新和Δ-IFD过滤机制，在避免分布偏移的同时实现8.1倍加速，使1B模型超越1.7B模型。
AI.motivation: 自回归模型的标准知识蒸馏存在分布不匹配问题；在线策略方法虽能缓解但依赖计算昂贵的强化学习框架，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出近策略蒸馏(NPD)，异步解耦学生生成与训练，实现带序列打包的SFT；集成稀疏学生更新和Δ-IFD启发式样本选择机制，过滤极端离群样本，确保更新在近策略学习区域内。
AI.result: 相比在线策略基线实现8.1倍加速，优于SFT 8.09%；openPangu-Embedded-1B达到68.73% SOTA分数，超越更大的Qwen3-1.7B。
AI.conclusion: NPD有效缩小后续RL的探索空间，以高效异步方式实现接近在线策略的性能，为知识蒸馏提供了兼顾效率与效果的实用方案。

title: EA-WM: Event-Aware Generative World Model with Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields
summary: Pretrained video diffusion models provide powerful spatiotemporal generative priors, making them a natural foundation for robotic world models. While recent world-action models jointly optimize future videos and actions, they predominantly treat video generation as an auxiliary representation for policy learning. Consequently, they insufficiently explore the inverse problem: leveraging action signals to guide video synthesis, thereby often failing to preserve precise robot spatial geometry and fine-grained robot-object interaction dynamics in the generated rollouts. To bridge this gap, we present EA-WM, an Event-Aware Generative World Model that effectively closes the loop between kinematic control and visual perception. Rather than injecting joint or end-effector actions as abstract, low-dimensional tokens, EA-WM projects actions and kinematic states directly into the target camera view as Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields. To fully exploit this geometrically grounded representation, we introduce event-aware bidirectional fusion blocks that modulate cross-branch attention, capturing object state changes and interaction dynamics. Evaluated on the comprehensive WorldArena benchmark, EA-WM achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing baselines by a significant margin.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EA-WM，一种事件感知生成式世界模型，通过将动作和运动状态投影为结构化运动-视觉动作场，并引入事件感知双向融合模块，实现机器人运动控制与视觉感知的闭环，在WorldArena基准上取得SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 现有世界-动作模型将视频生成视为策略学习的辅助表示，未能充分利用动作信号引导视频合成，导致生成的rollout中机器人空间几何和细粒度交互动态保持不佳。
AI.method: 1) 将动作和运动状态投影到目标相机视角，形成结构化运动-视觉动作场；2) 引入事件感知双向融合模块，调节跨分支注意力以捕捉物体状态变化和交互动态。
AI.result: 在WorldArena基准上取得SOTA性能，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EA-WM有效弥合了运动控制与视觉感知之间的差距，证明了结构化动作表示和事件感知融合对机器人世界模型的重要性。

title: Policy-Guided Stepwise Model Routing for Cost-Effective Reasoning
summary: Inference-time computation has greatly enhanced the performance of large language models (LLMs) on challenging reasoning tasks, but this strategy can incur high inference costs. One solution is to route intermediate chain-of-thought (CoT) states to language models of different sizes; however, existing approaches rely on handcrafted routing strategies that limit performance, or on training large process reward models that may be infeasible in many applications. We formulate stepwise model routing as a constrained decision-making problem, which we solve by training a small control policy using reinforcement learning in conjunction with threshold calibration to tune the performance-efficiency tradeoff. We validate our method on three math benchmarks (GSM8K, MATH500, and OmniMath) on both open and closed models. Our method consistently improves the accuracy-cost tradeoff compared to handcrafted approaches, while achieving a comparable tradeoff to methods that require training large process reward models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过强化学习训练一个小型控制策略，在推理过程中将中间链式思维状态路由到不同大小的语言模型，以优化性能-效率的权衡，无需依赖手工路由策略或训练大型过程奖励模型。
AI.motivation: 推理时计算提升了LLM在复杂推理任务上的性能，但带来了高推理成本。现有的路由方法要么依赖手工策略限制性能，要么需要训练大型过程奖励模型（在很多场景下不可行）。因此需要一种更高效且无需大量额外训练资源的方法来动态路由推理步骤。
AI.method: 将逐步模型路由形式化为约束决策问题，使用强化学习训练一个小型控制策略（policy），并结合阈值校准来调节性能-效率的权衡。在GSM8K、MATH500、OmniMath三个数学基准上对开源和闭源模型进行验证。
AI.result: 该方法在准确性-成本权衡上持续优于手工路由策略，并且能达到与需要训练大型过程奖励模型的方法相当的性能-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习训练的小型控制策略能够有效地实现LLM推理时的动态模型路由，在不大幅增加训练成本的前提下优化推理效率与性能的平衡。

title: Quadratic Objective Perturbation: Curvature-Based Differential Privacy
summary: Objective perturbation is a standard mechanism in differentially private empirical risk minimization. In particular, Linear Objective Perturbation (LOP) enforces privacy by adding a random linear term, while strong convexity and stability are ensured by an additional deterministic quadratic term. However, this approach requires the strong assumption of bounded gradients of the loss function, which excludes many modern machine learning models. In this work, we introduce Quadratic Objective Perturbation (QOP), which perturbs the objective with a random quadratic form. This perturbation induces strong convexity and enforces stability of the problem through curvature, thereby enabling privacy and allowing sensitivity to be controlled through spectral properties of the perturbation rather than assumptions on the gradients. As a result, we obtain $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differential privacy under weaker assumptions, in the interpolation regime. Furthermore, we extend the analysis to account for approximate solutions, showing that privacy guarantees are preserved under inexact solves. Additionally, we derive utility guarantees in terms of empirical excess risk, and provide a theoretical and numerical comparison to LOP, highlighting the advantages of curvature-based perturbations. Finally, we discuss algorithmic aspects and show that the resulting problems can be solved efficiently using modern splitting schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出二次目标扰动(QOP)替代传统线性目标扰动(LOP)以实现差分隐私，通过随机二次型扰动来诱导强凸性和稳定性，从而在更弱的梯度假设下(插值机制)达到隐私保护，并分析了近似解下的隐私保证、效用边界及高效求解算法。
AI.motivation: 传统线性目标扰动(LOP)方法要求损失函数梯度有界这一强假设，这排除了许多现代机器学习模型。本文旨在通过曲率基扰动来放松这一假设，使得差分隐私能在更一般的情况下适用。
AI.method: 提出二次目标扰动(QOP)，即对目标函数添加一个随机二次型扰动项。该扰动通过曲率诱导强凸性和稳定性，使得敏感度控制依赖于扰动的谱性质而非梯度假设。同时分析了近似求解下的隐私保持，并使用现代分裂算法实现高效求解。
AI.result: 在插值机制下，QOP在更弱的假设条件下实现了(ε, δ)-差分隐私；近似解仍能保持隐私保证；推导了经验过剩风险的效用界；理论分析与数值实验均表明QOP相比LOP具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于曲率的二次扰动为差分隐私经验风险最小化提供了一条新路径，放宽了传统方法所需的有界梯度假设，同时在隐私和效用之间取得了良好的平衡。

title: Bridging visual saliency and large language models for explainable deep learning in medical imaging
summary: The opaque nature of deep learning models remains a significant barrier to their clinical adoption in medical imaging. This paper presents a multimodal explainability framework that bridges the gap between convolutional neural network (CNN) predictions and clinically actionable insights for brain tumor classification, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to deliver human-interpretable diagnostic narratives. The proposed framework operates through three coupled stages. First, nine CNN architectures are extended with a dual-output hybrid formulation that simultaneously optimises a classification head and a segmentation head, enabling spatially richer feature learning. Second, visual saliency attribution methods, namely Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, and ScoreCAM, are applied to generate class-discriminative heatmaps, which are subsequently refined into binary tumor masks via an adaptive percentile thresholding pipeline. Third, the resulting masks are mapped onto the Harvard-Oxford cortical atlas to translate pixel-level evidence into named neuroanatomical structures, and the extracted findings are encoded into a structured JSON file that conditions three LLMs (Grok3, Mistral, and LLaMA) to generate coherent, radiological-style diagnostic reports. Evaluated on a dataset of 4,834 contrast-enhanced T1-weighted brain MRI images spanning three tumor classes, InceptionResNetV2 achieved the highest classification performance and Grad-CAM++ yielded the best segmentation overlap. Among the language models, Grok3 led in lexical diversity and coherence, while LLaMA achieved the highest readability score. By integrating visual, anatomical, and linguistic modalities into a unified pipeline, the framework produces explanations that are technically grounded and meaningfully interpretable, advancing the transparency and clinical accountability of artificial intelligence assisted brain tumor diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、显著性热图（Grad-CAM等）和LLM（Grok3、Mistral、LLaMA），为脑肿瘤MRI分类生成放射学风格的诊断报告，提升模型可解释性和临床可信度。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学影像中的"黑箱"特性阻碍了临床采用，亟需可解释性方法将模型预测转化为临床可理解的诊断依据。
AI.method: 1) 九种CNN架构加入双输出头（分类+分割）进行联合优化；2) 使用Grad-CAM等生成热图，经自适应阈值处理得到肿瘤掩码；3) 将掩码映射到哈佛-牛津皮质图谱获取解剖结构；4) 将结果编码为JSON，输入LLM生成放射学风格诊断报告。
AI.result: InceptionResNetV2分类性能最优，Grad-CAM++分割效果最佳；LLM中Grok3词汇多样性和连贯性最好，LLaMA可读性最高。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将视觉、解剖和语言模态统一为可解释的流水线，推动了AI辅助脑肿瘤诊断的透明性和临床责任感。

title: Back to the Beginning of Heuristic Design: Bridging Code and Knowledge with LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently advanced automatic heuristic design (AHD) for combinatorial optimization (CO), where candidate heuristics are iteratively proposed, evaluated, and refined. Most existing approaches search over executable programs and distill insights from execution feedback to guide later iterations. Because this process moves from low-level implementations to high-level principles, we refer to it as a bottom-up paradigm. We argue that this view is incomplete and introduce a complementary top-down perspective: knowledge becomes the primary search object and code merely instantiates and tests it, making what is learned explicit and reusable across problems and trajectories. We formalize this shift through a statistical-learning view that exposes a distortion--compression trade-off, and instantiate it in both population-based and tree-based AHD frameworks. Across CO and tasks beyond it, knowledge-first search improves discovery efficiency, transfer, and generalization, often outperforming code-centric pipelines, while combining both strategies yields further gains. Our results suggest that progress in AHD depends on iteratively constructing and evolving interpretable hypotheses that retain value beyond a single search trajectory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种"知识优先"的自顶向下范式来补充现有的自底向上代码搜索方法，用于自动启发式设计（AHD）。知识成为主要搜索对象，代码仅用于实例化和测试，通过学习一个统计框架中的失真-压缩权衡来形式化这一转变，并在组合优化等任务上验证了其提升发现效率、迁移性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM驱动自动启发式设计（AHD）主要采用自底向上的范式，从低级实现（代码）逐步提炼高级原则。但这种"代码优先"的方式学到的东西难以跨问题复用，且搜索效率受限。作者认为需要一种互补的自顶向下视角，让知识成为核心搜索对象，使学到的内容显式化、可迁移。
AI.method: 1) 提出知识优先的搜索范式，将知识（可解释的假设）作为主搜索对象，代码仅用于实例化和验证。2) 通过统计学习视角形式化该转变，揭示失真-压缩权衡（distortion-compression trade-off）。3) 在基于种群和基于树的AHD框架中实例化该方法。4) 在组合优化及其他任务上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 知识优先搜索相比代码优先管线在发现效率、迁移性和泛化能力上有显著提升；同时结合两种策略（自顶向下+自底向上）可获得更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自动启发式设计的进展依赖于迭代构建和演化可解释的假设，这些假设在单一搜索轨迹之外仍保留价值。知识优先范式是对现有代码优先范式的有效补充。

title: From Drops to Grid: Noise-Aware Spatio-Temporal Neural Process for Rainfall Estimation
summary: High-resolution rainfall observations are crucial for weather forecasting, water management, and hazard mitigation. Traditional operational measurements are often biased and low-resolution, limiting their ability to capture local rainfall. Accurate high-resolution rainfall maps require integrating sparse surface observations, yet existing deep learning densification methods are hindered by rainfall's skewed, localized nature, noise, and limited spatio-temporal fusion. We present DropsToGrid, a Neural Process-based method that generates dense rainfall fields by fusing temporal sequences from noisy, irregularly distributed private weather stations with spatial context from radar. Leveraging multi-scale feature extraction, temporal attention, and multi-modal fusion, the model produces stochastic, continuous rainfall estimates and explicitly quantifies uncertainty. Evaluations on real-world datasets demonstrate that DropsToGrid outperforms both operational and deep learning baselines, generating accurate high-resolution rainfall maps with well-calibrated uncertainty, even when only few stations are available and in cross-regional scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DropsToGrid，一种基于神经过程的方法，通过融合稀疏、噪声的私人气象站时序数据与雷达空间信息，生成高分辨率、不确定性量化的降雨场。
AI.motivation: 传统降雨观测存在偏差大、分辨率低的问题，难以捕捉局部降雨特征；现有深度学习密集化方法受限于降雨数据的偏态分布、噪声和时空融合不足。
AI.method: 基于神经过程，结合多尺度特征提取、时序注意力机制和多模态融合，生成随机连续降雨估计并显式量化不确定性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，DropsToGrid在仅有少量站点和跨区域场景下均优于业务方法和深度学习基线，生成高分辨率降雨图且不确定性校准良好。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有效融合多源异构数据生成高分辨率降雨场的方法，验证了神经过程在该任务上的优势。

title: Taming the Entropy Cliff: Variable Codebook Size Quantization for Autoregressive Visual Generation
summary: Most discrete visual tokenizers rely on a default design: every position in the sequence shares the same codebook. Researchers try to scale the codebook size $K$ to get better reconstruction performance. Such a constant-codebook design hits a fundamental information-theoretic limit. We observe that the per-position conditional entropy of the training set decays so quickly along the sequence that, after a few positions, the conditional distribution becomes essentially deterministic. On ImageNet with $K=16384$, this happens within only 2 out of 256 positions, turning the remaining 254 into a memorization problem. We call this phenomenon the Entropy Cliff and formalize it with a simple expression: $t^{*} = \lceil \log_2 N / \log_2 K \rceil$. Interestingly, this phenomenon is not observed in language, as its natural structure keeps the effective entropy per position well below the codebook capacity. To address this, we propose Variable Codebook Size Quantization (VCQ), where the codebook size $K_t$ grows monotonically along the sequence from $K_{\min}=2$ to $K_{\max}$, leaving the loss function, parameter count, and AR training procedure unchanged. With a vanilla autoregressive Transformer and standard next-token prediction, a base version of VCQ reduces gFID w/o CFG from 27.98 to 14.80 on ImageNet $256\times256$ over the baseline. Scaled up, it reaches gFID 1.71 with 684M autoregressive parameters, without any extra training techniques such as semantic regularization or causal alignment. The extreme information bottleneck at $K_{\min}=2$ naturally induces a coarse-to-fine semantic hierarchy: a linear probe on only the first 10 tokens reaches 43.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, compared to 27.1% for uniform codebooks. Ultimately, these results show that what matters is not only the total capacity of the codebook, but also how that capacity is distributed and organized.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉离散分词器存在"熵悬崖"现象：序列前几个位置之后的条件熵迅速衰减，导致剩余位置变成记忆问题。据此提出变分词表大小量化(VCQ)，让词表大小沿序列单调增长（从2到最大值），在ImageNet 256×256上显著提升重构效果（gFID从27.98降至14.80），并自然形成粗到细的语义层次结构。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉离散分词器默认每个位置共享相同大小的词表，这存在信息论极限。作者发现视觉序列中条件熵沿位置急剧衰减，导致大部分位置沦为记忆问题，亟需更合理的码本容量分配方案。
AI.method: 提出VCQ（Variable Codebook Size Quantization），让词表大小K_t沿序列单调递增（从K_min=2到K_max），不改变损失函数、参数数量和自回归训练流程。利用极小的初始词表作为信息瓶颈，自然诱导粗到细的语义层次。
AI.result: 基础版VCQ将gFID（无CFG）从27.98降至14.80；扩展到684M自回归参数时达到gFID 1.71。仅用前10个token的线性探针在ImageNet上达到43.8% top-1准确率（统一词表仅27.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 视觉分词中重要的不仅是词表总容量，更是容量如何沿序列分布和组织。VCQ通过简单的单调递增词表设计，在不引入额外技术的情况下显著提升了重构质量和语义层次。

title: P-Guide: Parameter-Efficient Prior Steering for Single-Pass CFG Inference
summary: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is essential for high-fidelity conditional generation in flow matching, yet it imposes significant computational overhead by requiring dual forward passes at each sampling step. In this work, we address this bottleneck by introducing \textbf{P-Guide}, a framework that achieves high-quality guidance through a single inference pass by modulating only the initial latent state. We further show that, under a first-order approximation, P-Guide is equivalent to CFG in the sense that it steers generation from the prior space, without requiring explicit velocity field extrapolation during sampling. We consider both homoscedastic and \textbf{heteroscedastic} priors, and find that jointly modeling the mean and variance enables adaptive loss attenuation and improved robustness to data uncertainty. Extensive experiments demonstrate that P-Guide reduces inference latency by approximately 50\% while maintaining fidelity and prompt alignment competitive with standard dual-pass CFG baselines.

AI.tldr: P-Guide 提出一种通过仅调制初始潜状态实现单次前向传播的引导框架，在流匹配中替代需要双前向传播的 CFG，将推理延迟降低约 50% 同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 解决流匹配中 CFG 需要双前向传播导致计算开销大的问题，在保持高质量条件生成的同时降低推理成本。
AI.method: 通过仅调制初始潜状态实现单次推理引导；在一阶近似下证明其与 CFG 等价；提出同方差和异方差先验建模，联合建模均值和方差实现自适应损失衰减。
AI.result: 推理延迟降低约 50%，生成保真度和提示对齐性与标准 CFG 基线相当。
AI.conclusion: P-Guide 在流匹配中实现了高效的单次前向传播引导，有效降低了计算开销而不牺牲性能。

title: Safety Anchor: Defending Harmful Fine-tuning via Geometric Bottlenecks
summary: The safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains vulnerable to Harmful Fine-tuning (HFT). While existing defenses impose constraints on parameters, gradients, or internal representations, we observe that they can be effectively circumvented under persistent HFT. Our analysis traces this failure to the inherent redundancy of the high-dimensional parameter space: attackers exploit optimization trajectories that are orthogonal to defense constraints to restore harmful capabilities while deceptively adhering to safety restrictions. To address this, we propose Safety Bottleneck Regularization (SBR). SBR shifts the defensive focus from the redundant parameter space to the unembedding layer, which serves as a geometric bottleneck. By anchoring the final hidden states of harmful queries to those of the safety-aligned model, SBR enables the model to maintain safe responses even under persistent HFT. Extensive experiments confirm SBR's effectiveness, demonstrating that utilizing just a single safety anchor is sufficient to reduce the Harmful Score to $<$10 while preserving competitive performance on benign downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有的LLM安全对齐防御（参数/梯度/表示约束）在高强度有害微调下无效，原因是高维参数空间的冗余性允许攻击者绕过约束。提出安全瓶颈正则化（SBR），将防御重心转向解嵌入层这一几何瓶颈，通过锚定有害查询的最终隐藏状态来维持安全响应。仅需单个安全锚即可将有害分数降至10以下，同时保持良性任务性能。
AI.motivation: LLM的安全对齐在有害微调下容易被攻破，现有防御方法（约束参数、梯度或内部表示）在高强度持续攻击下可以被有效绕过，需要更鲁棒的防御机制。
AI.method: 提出Safety Bottleneck Regularization (SBR)：将防御重心从冗余的参数空间转移到解嵌入层（unembedding layer），将其视为几何瓶颈。通过让有害查询的最终隐藏状态锚定到安全对齐模型的最终隐藏状态，迫使模型保持安全响应。
AI.result: 实验表明SBR非常有效，仅需单个安全锚（single safety anchor）就能将有害分数降至10以下，同时在良性下游任务上保持有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: SBR通过聚焦于解嵌入层这一几何瓶颈，能够有效抵御持续的HFT攻击，克服了现有方法在高维参数空间冗余性下的局限性。

title: Differentiable Adaptive 4D Structured Illumination for Joint Capture of Shape and Reflectance
summary: We present a differentiable framework to adaptively compute 4D illumination conditions with respect to an object, for efficient, high-quality simultaneous acquisition of its shape and reflectance, with a unified spatial-angular structured light and a single camera. Using a simple histogram-based pixel-level probability model for depth and reflectance, we differentiably link the next illumination condition(s) with a loss that encourages the reduction in depth uncertainty. As new structured illumination is cast, corresponding image measurements are used to update the uncertainty at each pixel. Finally, a fine-tuning-based approach reconstructs the depth map and reflectance parameter maps, by minimizing the differences between all physical measurements and their simulated counterparts. The effectiveness of our framework is demonstrated on physical objects with wide variations in shape and appearance. Our depth results compare favorably with state-of-the-art techniques, while our reflectance results are comparable when validated against photographs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种可微分的框架，通过自适应计算4D光照条件，利用统一的空间-角度结构光和单摄像头，同时高效高质量地获取物体的形状和反射率。方法基于直方图的像素级概率模型，可微地链接光照条件与深度不确定性降低损失，并通过微调重建深度图和反射率参数。
AI.motivation: 提出一种能够同时高效获取物体形状和反射率的方法，减少光照条件选择的盲目性，提升采集效率和质量。
AI.method: 采用可微分框架，基于直方图的像素级概率模型，通过深度不确定性降低损失自适应选择光照条件，最后用微调方法重建深度和反射率。
AI.result: 在多种形状和外观的物理物体上验证了有效性，深度结果优于或媲美现有技术，反射率结果经照片验证具有可比性。
AI.conclusion: 该可微分光照优化框架能有效同时获取形状和反射率，深度重建效果达到或超越SOTA，反射率重建质量良好。

title: Skill1: Unified Evolution of Skill-Augmented Agents via Reinforcement Learning
summary: A persistent skill library allows language model agents to reuse successful strategies across tasks. Maintaining such a library requires three coupled capabilities. The agent selects a relevant skill, utilizes it during execution, and distills new skills from experience. Existing methods optimize these capabilities in isolation or with separate reward sources, resulting in partial and conflicting evolution. We propose Skill1, a framework that trains a single policy to co-evolve skill selection, utilization, and distillation toward a shared task-outcome objective. The policy generates a query to search the skill library, re-ranks candidates to select one, solves the task conditioned on it, and distills a new skill from the trajectory. All learning derives from a single task-outcome signal. Its low-frequency trend credits selection and its high-frequency variation credits distillation. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that Skill1 outperforms prior skill-based and reinforcement learning baselines. Training dynamics confirm the co-evolution of the three capabilities, and ablations show that removing any credit signal degrades the evolution.

AI.tldr: 提出Skill1框架，通过单一策略联合进化技能选择、利用和提炼三个能力，使用单一任务结果信号进行训练，在ALFWorld和WebShop上超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立优化技能选择、利用和提炼三个能力，或使用不同的奖励来源，导致不完整且冲突的进化过程，缺乏统一的学习框架。
AI.method: 训练单一策略（policy）生成查询搜索技能库、重排序候选技能、基于选定技能解决任务、从轨迹中提炼新技能。所有学习信号来自单一任务结果，低频趋势用于选择、高频变化用于提炼。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上，Skill1优于先前基于技能的方法和强化学习基线。训练动态证实了三个能力的共同进化，消融实验表明移除任何信用信号都会退化进化效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过单一任务结果信号即可实现技能选择、利用和提炼的联合进化，为语言模型智能体的技能库管理提供了统一有效的框架。

title: Knowing but Not Correcting: Routine Task Requests Suppress Factual Correction in LLMs
summary: LLMs reliably correct false claims when presented in isolation, yet when the same claims are embedded in task-oriented requests, they often comply rather than correct. We term this failure mode \emph{correction suppression} and construct a benchmark of 300 false premises to systematically evaluate it across eight models. Suppression rates range from 19\% to 90\%, with four models exceeding 80\%, establishing correction suppression as a prevalent and severe phenomenon. Mechanistic analysis reveals that suppression is not a knowledge failure: the model registers the error internally but task context diverts early-layer attention from the false claim as output intent crystallizes toward compliance at middle layers. We characterize this as \emph{knowing but not correcting} -- suppression occurs at response selection rather than knowledge encoding. Guided by this mechanism, we propose two training-free interventions. Correction Direction Steering (CDS) estimates a correction-compliance direction from matched pairs and injects it at middle layers before output intent crystallizes. Dynamic Payload Amplification (DPA) localizes payload tokens via attention divergence between early and late layers and amplifies their representation at the final layer, requiring no calibration data. Experiments on Qwen3.5-9B and LLaMA3.1-8B show both methods substantially improve factual strictness. CDS achieves the highest correction rate on Qwen3.5-9B (0\%$\to$58.2\%). DPA is the only method that preserves or improves reasoning capability on both models. These findings introduce \emph{factual strictness} -- the willingness to uphold accuracy against contextual pressures -- as a new dimension of model reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在孤立情境下能纠正错误信息，但当错误信息嵌入任务导向请求时，模型倾向于遵从而非纠正（"纠正抑制"）。通过构建300条错误前提基准测试，发现抑制率高达19%-90%。机制分析表明这是"知道但不纠正"——内部知识未缺失，但任务上下文在中间层转移了注意力。提出两种无需训练的干预方法：校正方向引导（CDS）和动态有效载荷增强（DPA），显著提升事实严格性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM在事实核查或知识问答中的纠错能力，但忽略了任务导向场景下模型明知错误仍选择遵从的现象。作者旨在系统量化这一"纠正抑制"问题，并揭示其背后的机制，最终提出轻量级干预方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建300条错误前提基准，覆盖8个模型评估纠正抑制率。2) 通过注意力分析进行机制研究，定位抑制发生的层。3) 提出两种无需训练的干预：CDS（从匹配对估计校正-遵从方向，注入中间层）和DPA（通过注意力差异定位有效载荷token，增强其最终层表示）。
AI.result: 8个模型抑制率19%-90%，4个模型超80%。CDS在Qwen3.5-9B上将纠正率从0%提升至58.2%。DPA是唯一在两种模型上保持或提升推理能力的方法。
AI.conclusion: 纠正抑制是LLM中普遍且严重的问题，根源在于响应选择而非知识编码。引入"事实严格性"作为模型可靠性的新维度。CDS和DPA作为无需训练的干预方法有效提升了模型在上下文压力下的准确性。

title: Look Beyond Saliency: Low-Attention Guided Dual Encoding for Video Semantic Search
summary: Video semantic search in densely crowded scenes remains a challenging task due to visual encoders tendency to prioritize salient foreground regions while neglecting contextually important, background areas. We propose an Inverse Attention Embedding mechanism that explicitly captures and highlights these overlooked regions. By combining inverse attention embeddings with traditional visual embeddings, our method significantly enhances semantic retrieval performance without additional training. Initial experiments and ablation studies demonstrate promising improvements over existing approaches in recall for video semantic search in crowded environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种逆注意力嵌入机制，通过捕获视觉编码器忽略的背景区域信息，在不额外训练的情况下提升密集人群场景下的视频语义搜索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉编码器在密集人群场景中倾向于关注显著的前景区域，而忽略对语义检索同样重要的背景区域，导致视频语义搜索效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出逆注意力嵌入（Inverse Attention Embedding）机制，显式捕获被视觉编码器忽视的背景区域，并将其与传统视觉嵌入结合，无需额外训练即可增强语义检索。
AI.result: 在密集人群场景下的视频语义搜索任务中，初步实验和消融研究表明该方法在召回率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 逆注意力嵌入机制能够有效弥补视觉编码器对背景区域的忽视，以零额外训练成本提升语义搜索性能。

title: Graphlets as Building Blocks for Structural Vocabulary in Knowledge Graph Foundation Models
summary: Foundation models excel at language, where sentences become tokens, and vision, where images become pixels, because both reduce to discrete symbols on a shared, fixed grid. Knowledge Graphs share the discreteness, but not the geometry. Their entities and relations are discrete symbols, yet their arrangement is relational and lacks a common, fixed grid. Knowledge Graphs (KGs) share the discreteness, but not the geometry. They form irregular, non-Euclidean topologies whose local neighborhoods differ from graph to graph. Therefore, Knowledge Graph Foundation Models (KGFMs) rely on identifying structural invariances to produce transferable representations. Without a universal token set, KGFMs are limited in their ability to transfer representations across unseen KGs. We close this gap by treating graphlets, small connected graphs, as structural tokens that recur in heterogeneous KGs. In this paper, We introduce a model-agnostic framework based on a vocabulary of graphlets that mines a KG between relations via pattern matching. In particular, we considered closed and open 2- and 3-path, and star graphlets, to obtain robust invariances. The framework is evaluated on 51 KGs from a wide range of domains, for zero-shot inductive and transductive link prediction. Experiments show that adding simple graphlets to the vocabulary yields models that outperform prior KGFMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将图结构（graphlets）作为结构标记（structural tokens），构建知识图谱基础模型（KGFM）的通用框架，解决不同KG间表示迁移的难题，在51个KG上零样本链接预测任务中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱（KGs）虽然具有离散性，但缺乏语言和视觉数据中固定的网格几何结构，导致现有基础模型难以在不同KG间迁移表示。本文旨在通过引入图结构作为结构标记，弥合这一差距，实现跨KG的零样本泛化。
AI.method: 提出一个模型无关的框架，基于图结构（graphlets）词汇表（包括封闭/开放2-路径、3-路径和星形图结构），通过模式匹配挖掘KG中关系间的结构不变性，将图结构作为离散的结构标记来生成可迁移表示。
AI.result: 在51个涵盖广泛领域的不同知识图谱上，对零样本归纳式（inductive）和直推式（transductive）链接预测任务进行评估，实验表明在词汇表中加入简单的图结构即可使模型超越此前最优的KGFMs。
AI.conclusion: 图结构可以作为一种有效的结构标记，为知识图谱基础模型提供跨KG的可迁移表示能力，且该方法模型无关、易于集成，具有较好的泛化性和实用性。

title: Uncertainty Estimation via Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026. 24 pages, 7 figures, including appendix
summary: Quantifying uncertainty in neural network predictions is essential for high-stakes domains such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and manufacturing. While existing approaches often depend on costly sampling or restrictive distributional assumptions, we propose Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping (HCM), a simple yet principled framework for sampling-free and distribution-free uncertainty estimation. HCM decomposes outputs into a magnitude and a normalized direction vector constrained to lie on the unit hypersphere, enabling a novel interpretation of uncertainty as the degree of violation of this geometric constraint. This yields deterministic and interpretable estimates applicable to both regression and classification. Experiments across diverse benchmarks and real-world industrial tasks demonstrate that HCM matches or surpasses ensemble and evidential approaches, with far lower inference cost and stronger confidence-error alignment. Our results highlight the power of geometric structure in uncertainty estimation and position HCM as a versatile alternative to conventional techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping (HCM)，一种无需采样和分布假设的不确定性量化框架，通过将输出分解为幅度和单位超球面方向向量，利用几何约束违背程度来估计不确定性，在回归和分类任务上性能媲美集成方法但计算成本更低。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络不确定性量化方法要么依赖昂贵的采样过程，要么需要限制性的分布假设，难以在自动驾驶、医疗等高风险场景中高效部署。
AI.method: HCM将网络输出分解为幅度和归一化方向向量（约束在单位超球面上），通过度量该几何约束的违反程度来直接、确定性地估计不确定性，无需采样和分布假设。
AI.result: 在多个基准和工业任务上，HCM在不确定性估计质量上匹配或超越集成方法和证据深度学习方法，同时推理成本显著更低，置信度-误差对齐更强。
AI.conclusion: 几何结构在不确定性估计中具有强大潜力，HCM可作为传统方法的高效替代方案。

title: ZScribbleSeg: A comprehensive segmentation framework with modeling of efficient annotation and maximization of scribble supervision
summary: Curating fully annotated datasets for medical image segmentation is labour-intensive and expertise-demanding. To alleviate this problem, prior studies have explored scribble annotations for weakly supervised segmentation. Existing solutions mainly compute losses on annotated areas and generate pseudo labels by propagating annotations to adjacent regions.
