By decomposing polysemantic activations into sparse sets of monosemantic features, SAEs aim to translate neural network computations into human-understandable concepts. However, common architectures such as TopK SAEs rely on a fixed sparsity level. They enforce the same number of active features (K) across all inputs, ignoring the varying complexity of real-world data. Natural data often lies on manifolds with varying local intrinsic dimensionality, meaning the number of relevant factors can change significantly across samples. This suggests that a fixed sparsity level is not optimal. Simple inputs may require only a few features, while more complex ones need more expressive representations. Using a constant K can therefore introduce noise in simple cases or miss important structure in more complex ones. To address this issue, we propose SoftSAE, a sparse autoencoder with a Dynamic Top-K selection mechanism. Our method uses a differentiable Soft Top-K operator to learn an input-dependent sparsity level k. This allows the model to adjust the number of active features based on the complexity of each input. As a result, the representation better matches the structure of the data, and the explanation length reflects the amount of information in the input. Experimental results confirm that SoftSAE not only finds meaningful features, but also selects the right number of features for each concept. The source code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SoftSAE-8F71/.

AI.tldr: SoftSAE提出了一种动态Top-K稀疏自编码器，通过可微分的Soft Top-K算子学习与输入相关的稀疏度k，使模型能根据输入复杂度自适应调整激活特征数量，比固定TopK SAE更灵活高效。
AI.motivation: 现有的TopK SAE使用固定的稀疏度K，忽略了真实数据在不同样本间内在维度（local intrinsic dimensionality）的变化，简单输入需要更少特征、复杂输入需要更多特征，固定K会导致简单输入引入噪声或复杂输入丢失信息。
AI.method: 提出SoftSAE，使用可微分的Soft Top-K算子替代硬Top-K选择，让模型学习输入依赖的稀疏度k，从而根据每个样本的复杂度动态调整激活特征的数量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明SoftSAE不仅能找到有意义的特征，还能为每个概念选择正确的特征数量，实现了更匹配数据结构的表示。
AI.conclusion: 动态稀疏度选择比固定稀疏度更符合数据的自然结构，SoftSAE在机械可解释性中能生成更合理的特征表示和解释长度。

title: A Flow Matching Algorithm for Many-Shot Adaptation to Unseen Distributions
summary: While generative modeling has achieved remarkable success on tasks like natural language-conditioned image generation, enabling model adaptation from example data points remains a relatively underexplored and challenging problem. To this end, we propose Function Projection for Flow Matching (FP-FM), an algorithm that directly conditions generation on samples from the target distribution. FP-FM learns basis functions to span the velocity fields corresponding to a set of training distributions, and adapts to new distributions by computing a simple least-squares projection onto this basis. This enables efficient generation of samples from diverse target distributions without additional training at inference time. We further introduce multiple variants of FP-FM that provide a trade-off in expressivity and compute by enriching the coefficient calculation, e.g., by making the coefficients dependent on time. FP-FM achieves greatly improved precision and recall relative to baselines across synthetic and image-based datasets, with especially strong gains on unseen distributions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为FP-FM的算法，通过学习基函数来覆盖流匹配中的速度场，并利用最小二乘投影实现对新目标分布的无训练高效生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型（如文本条件图像生成）在从示例数据点进行模型自适应方面仍存在挑战，即如何高效地将生成过程条件化于目标分布的样本上。
AI.method: FP-FM学习一组基函数来张成多个训练分布对应的速度场，对新的目标分布仅需计算一个简单的最小二乘投影即可获得生成条件。还提出了多种变体，通过丰富系数计算（如时间依赖系数）来权衡表达能力与计算效率。
AI.result: 在合成数据和图像数据集上，FP-FM相比基线方法在精确率和召回率上都有大幅提升，尤其在未见过的分布上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: FP-FM能够高效地适应新分布，无需在推理时进行额外训练，是一种具有良好泛化能力的条件生成方法。

title: PACE: Prune-And-Compress Ensemble Models
summary: Ensemble models achieve state-of-the-art performance on prediction tasks, but usually require aggregating a large number of weak learners. This can hinder deployment, interpretability, and downstream tasks such as robustness verification. Remedies to this issue fall into two main camps: pruning, which discards redundant learners, and compression, which generates new ones from scratch. We introduce PACE, a framework that interleaves these paradigms in a two-phase strategy. First, new learners are actively generated via a theoretically grounded procedure to enhance the diversity of the initial ensemble. When no more relevant learners can be found, a second phase of pruning is performed on this enriched ensemble. During both operations, PACE allows fine control on the faithfulness to the original ensemble. Experiments show that our method outperforms prior pruning and compression methods while offering principled control of faithfulness guarantees.

AI.tldr: PACE是一个两阶段框架，先通过理论驱动的过程主动生成新学习器以增强集成多样性，再对丰富后的集成进行剪枝，从而在保持对原始集成保真度可控的前提下，优于先前的剪枝和压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 集成模型虽性能优异，但大量弱学习器的聚合带来了部署困难、可解释性差以及鲁棒性验证等问题。现有剪枝和压缩方法各有不足，缺乏一种能灵活控制保真度并兼顾多样性的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出PACE框架，采用两阶段策略：第一阶段通过理论支持的主动生成机制增加新学习器来提升集成多样性；第二阶段对扩充后的集成进行剪枝。两个阶段均可精细控制对原始集成的保真度。
AI.result: 实验表明PACE在预测性能上优于现有的剪枝和压缩方法，同时提供了对保真度的原则性控制。
AI.conclusion: PACE通过交替进行主动生成和剪枝，有效解决了集成模型压缩中的多样性与保真度权衡问题，为集成模型的实用化提供了新思路。

title: INEUS: Iterative Neural Solver for High-Dimensional PIDEs
summary: In this paper, we introduce INEUS, a meshfree iterative neural solver for partial integro-differential equations (PIDEs). The method replaces the explicit evaluation of nonlocal jump integrals with single-jump sampling and reformulates PIDE solving as a sequence of recursive regression problems. Like Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), INEUS learns global solutions over the entire space-time domain, yet it offers a more efficient treatment of nonlocal terms and avoids the computationally expensive differentiation of full PIDE residuals. These features make INEUS particularly well suited for high-dimensional PDEs and PIDEs. Supported by a contraction-based convergence proof for linear PIDEs, our numerical experiments show that INEUS delivers accurate and scalable solutions for various high-dimensional linear and nonlinear examples.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无网格迭代神经求解器INEUS，用于求解偏积分微分方程(PIDEs)，通过单跳采样替代非局部跳跃积分，将PIDE求解转化为递归回归问题。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络(PINNs)在处理非局部项和PIDE残差微分时计算代价高昂，且难以扩展到高维问题，INEUS旨在解决这些效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用无网格的迭代神经求解方法，用单跳采样替代显式计算非局部跳跃积分，将PIDE求解重新表述为一系列递归回归问题。
AI.result: 数值实验表明INEUS在各类高维线性和非线性问题上均能提供准确且可扩展的求解结果。
AI.conclusion: INEUS提供了一种高效处理非局部项的方法，避免了计算昂贵的PIDE残差微分，对于线性PIDE有基于收缩的收敛性证明，特别适合高维PDE和PIDE求解。

title: Attributions All the Way Down? The Metagame of Interpretability
summary: We introduce the metagame, a conceptual framework for quantifying second-order interaction effects of model explanations. For any first-order attribution $φ(f)$ explaining a model $f$, we measure the directional influence of feature $j$ on the attribution of feature $i$, denoted as meta-attribution $\varphi_{j \to i}(f)$, by treating the attribution method itself as a cooperative game and computing its Shapley value. Theoretically, we prove that attributions hierarchically decompose into meta-attributions, and establish these as directional extensions of existing interaction indices. Empirically, we demonstrate that the metagame delivers insights across diverse interpretability applications: (i) quantifying token interactions in instruction-tuned language models, (ii) explaining cross-modal similarity in vision-language encoders, and (iii) interpreting text-to-image concepts in multimodal diffusion transformers.

AI.tldr: 提出元博弈框架，用于量化模型解释的二阶交互效应，通过将归因方法本身视为合作博弈并计算其Shapley值，得到特征j对特征i归因的方向性影响（元归因）。理论上证明归因可层次分解为元归因，实验在指令微调语言模型、视觉-语言编码器和多模态扩散Transformer上展示其可解释性洞察。
AI.motivation: 现有模型解释方法主要关注一阶归因（即单个特征对预测的贡献），但忽略了特征之间的交互效应（特别是特征j如何影响特征i的归因）。作者希望填补这一空白，量化解释的二阶交互效应。
AI.method: 提出"元博弈"（metagame）框架：将归因方法本身视为一个合作博弈，对每个特征对(i,j)计算其Shapley值作为元归因φ_{j→i}(f)，代表特征j对特征i归因的方向性影响。理论上建立了归因与元归因的层次分解关系。
AI.result: 在三个任务上验证有效性：(i) 指令微调语言模型中量化token交互，(ii) 视觉-语言编码器中解释跨模态相似性，(iii) 多模态扩散Transformer中解释文本到图像的概念。
AI.conclusion: 元博弈框架能够揭示一阶归因无法捕获的二阶交互信息，为模型可解释性提供了新的分析维度，特别是在理解特征间如何相互影响归因方面具有价值。

title: Region Seeding via Pre-Activation Regularization: A Geometric View from Piecewise Affine Nerual Networks
summary: Deep networks with continuous piecewise affine activations induce polyhedral partitions of the input space, making the number of realized affine regions a natural measure of expressive capacity and a key determinant of how well the model can approximate nonlinear target functions. In practice, standard training realizes far fewer region refinements in data-visited neighborhoods than the architecture could in principle support, while existing region-count theory is primarily architectural and offers little guidance on how optimization shapes the realized partition near the data. Our theory provides a sufficient condition under which bringing neuron switching surfaces sufficiently close to data points ensures their intersection with local neighborhoods, which in turn implies a strict increase in the local affine-region count, yielding a principled training-time handle for seeding data-relevant partitions early in optimization. Guided by these results, we propose a plug-and-play region-seeding regularizer that encourages early partitioning while allowing task-driven refinement to dominate later in training. Experiments show that the regularizer increases the number of realized affine regions via exact enumeration and improves overall performance on toy datasets, while also improving early-stage accuracy and achieving comparable (or slightly improved) final accuracy on ImageNet-1k for classical models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度网络中连续分段仿射激活函数诱导的输入空间多面体划分，提出了一种区域播种正则化方法，通过理论保证在优化早期将神经元切换面靠近数据点以增加局部仿射区域数量，实验表明该方法在提高早期精度和最终性能方面有效。
AI.motivation: 传统区域计数理论主要关注架构能力，但对优化如何塑造数据附近的实际区域划分缺乏指导。实践中标准训练在数据访问邻域实现的区域细化远少于架构理论上可支持的数量，因此需要理论指导的训练方法来促进与数据相关的区域划分。
AI.method: 1) 理论推导了将神经元切换面靠近数据点以确保其与局部邻域相交的充分条件，该条件保证局部仿射区域数量的严格增加。2) 基于理论提出即插即用的区域播种正则化器，鼓励早期划分，后期允许任务驱动细化主导。
AI.result: 通过精确枚举验证正则化器增加了实现的仿射区域数量；在玩具数据集上提升了整体性能；在ImageNet-1k上提升了早期阶段精度，最终精度与基线相当或略有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作弥合了理论区域计数与实际优化之间的鸿沟，提供了一种 principled 的训练时手段来在优化早期播种数据相关的分区，且即插即用的正则化方法在实际任务中有效。

title: Molecules Meet Language: Confound-Aware Representation Learning and Chemical Property Steering in Transformer-VAE Latent Spaces
summary: Molecular generative models often assume meaningful latent geometry, but apparent property predictability can reflect sequence-level shortcuts rather than chemical organization. We study this issue in an unsupervised autoregressive Transformer-VAE trained on SELFIES. After training, we freeze the model, fit linear probes to RDKit descriptors, and use the probe weights as candidate global steering directions. To separate chemical signal from SELFIES artifacts, we introduce a confound-aware evaluation based on residualization, confound-direction alignment analysis, and decoded-molecule traversal. This is necessary because SELFIES length, branch tokens, ring tokens, and token entropy are strongly encoded in the latent space. Under this confound-aware evaluation, we find robust monotonic steering for cLogP, FractionCSP3, HeavyAtomCount, TPSA, BertzCT, and HBA. Nonlinear probes further show that some properties admit stable global directions, while others are better described by local latent gradients. Overall, our results show that chemically meaningful steering can emerge in entangled molecular latent spaces, but only when validated through decoded molecules and controlled for representation-level confounds.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究无监督自回归Transformer-VAE在SELFIES分子表示上的潜在空间，发现模型编码了SELFIES语法伪影（如序列长度、分支/环标记、标记熵）而非纯粹化学信号。通过引入混淆感知评估方法（残差化、混淆方向对齐分析、解码分子遍历），在控制混淆因素后，发现部分分子性质（cLogP、FractionCSP3等）仍存在稳健的单调操控方向，而其他性质更依赖局部梯度。
AI.motivation: 分子生成模型通常假设潜在空间具有有意义的化学几何结构，但表观的属性可预测性可能源于序列级别的捷径（如SELFIES语法特征）而非真正的化学组织。现有评估未能区分化学信号与序列伪影，导致对潜在空间质量的过誉。
AI.method: 1) 训练无监督自回归Transformer-VAE（SELFIES表示）；2) 冻结模型后，用线性探针拟合RDKit描述符；3) 将探针权重作为候选全局操控方向；4) 提出混淆感知评估：残差化（去除SELFIES结构特征影响）、混淆方向对齐分析、解码分子遍历验证。
AI.result: SELFIES序列长度、分支标记、环标记、标记熵在潜在空间中强烈编码。在控制混淆后，cLogP、FractionCSP3、HeavyAtomCount、TPSA、BertzCT、HBA等性质存在稳健的单调操控方向；非线性探针表明部分性质存在稳定全局方向，另一些更依赖局部潜在梯度。
AI.conclusion: 化学上有意义的操控可以在纠缠的分子潜在空间中出现，但必须通过解码分子验证并控制表征层级的混淆因素，否则容易将语法伪影误判为化学信号。

title: Perceive, Route and Modulate: Dynamic Pattern Recalibration for Time Series Forecasting
summary: Local temporal patterns in real-world time series continuously shift, rendering globally shared transformations suboptimal. Current deep forecasting models, despite their scale and complexity, rely on fixed weight matrices applied uniformly to all temporal tokens. This creates a static pattern response: models settle into a compromised average, unable to adapt to changing local dynamics. We introduce Dynamic Pattern Recalibration (DPR), a backbone-agnostic mechanism that resolves this via token-level recalibration. Through a lightweight "Perceive-Route-Modulate" pipeline, DPR computes a soft-routing distribution over a learned basis of adaptive response patterns, generating a time-aware modulation vector that recalibrates hidden states via a residual Hadamard product. As a backbone-agnostic adapter, DPR enhances forecasting across diverse architectures with minimal overhead, confirming it addresses a general bottleneck. As a minimalist standalone model, DPRNet achieves competitive performance across 12 benchmarks, validating dynamic recalibration against macroscopic parameter scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态模式重新校准（DPR）机制，通过轻量级的"感知-路由-调制"流水线实现令牌级的时间模式自适应，解决时序预测中全局静态权重无法适应局部动态模式变化的问题。
AI.motivation: 真实世界时间序列的局部模式会持续漂移，而现有深度预测模型对所有时间令牌施加统一权重矩阵，导致模型只能学习到一种"妥协的平均"，无法适应变化的局部动态。
AI.method: DPR通过三步流水线实现：（1）感知（Perceive）：获取令牌级特征；（2）路由（Route）：在学习的自适应响应模式基上计算软路由分布；（3）调制（Modulate）：生成时间感知的调制向量，通过残差Hadamard积重新校准隐藏状态。
AI.result: 作为主干无关适配器，DPR以极小开销提升多种架构的预测性能；作为独立模型DPRNet，在12个基准上达到竞争性表现，验证了动态重新校准相比宏观参数扩展的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DPR以轻量级方式解决了时序预测中全局静态权重的根本瓶颈，表明动态令牌级重新校准是比简单扩展模型参数更有效的方向。

title: When Does $\ell_2$-Boosting Overfit Benignly? High-Dimensional Risk Asymptotics and the $\ell_1$ Implicit Bias
summary: Benign overfitting is well-characterized in $\ell_2$ geometries, but its behavior under the $\ell_1$ implicit bias of greedy ensembles remains challenging. The analytical barrier stems from the non-linear coupling of coordinate selection thresholds, which invalidates standard spectral resolvent tools. To isolate this algorithmic bias, we characterize the high-dimensional risk of continuous-time $\ell_2$-Boosting over $p$ features and $n$ samples. By coupling the Convex Gaussian Minimax Theorem with delicate asymptotic expansions of double-sided truncated Gaussian moments, we analytically resolve the non-smooth $\ell_1$ interpolant. Under an isotropic pure-noise model, we prove that benign overfitting fails at the linear rate: greedy selection localizes noise into sparse active sets, and the excess variance decays at a logarithmic rate $Θ(σ^2/\log(p/n))$ for noise variance $σ^2$. We remark that while this localization mechanism should persist in the presence of signals, the exact signal-noise decomposition remains an open problem. For spiked-isotropic designs with $k^*$ head eigenvalues and $r_2 = p - k^*$ tail dimensions, the risk converges to zero when $r_{2} \gg n$, but only at a logarithmic rate $Θ(σ^2/\log(r_2/n))$, which is slower than the linear decay observed in $\ell_2$ geometries. To avoid this slow convergence, we analyze the non-smooth subdifferential dynamics of the boosting flow. This yields a tuning-free early stopping rule that, under a bounded $\ell_1$-path condition, recovers the Lasso basic inequality and attains the minimax-optimal empirical prediction rate for $\ell_1$-bounded signals.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了贪婪集成方法（如ℓ₂-Boosting）在高维统计中的良性过拟合现象，发现其在ℓ₁几何下的表现与ℓ₂几何截然不同：最优性过拟合失败，风险以对数速率衰减。通过理论分析，提出了基于非光滑次微分动力学的早停策略，可恢复Lasso的极小化最优预测率。
AI.motivation: ℓ₂几何下的良性过拟合已被充分刻画，但ℓ₁隐式偏差（如贪婪集成方法）下的行为由于坐标选择阈值的非线性耦合而难以分析。本文旨在分离这种算法偏差，理解ℓ₁几何下良性过拟合的性质。
AI.method: 将凸高斯极小化定理与双截断高斯矩的渐近展开结合，解析地求解非光滑ℓ₁插值器。进一步分析Boosting流的非光滑次微分动力学，推导无调参的早停规则。
AI.result: 在纯噪声各向同性模型下，最优性过拟合失败，过余方差以对数速率Θ(σ²/log(p/n))衰减。在spiked-isotropic设计下，风险收敛于零但对数速率Θ(σ²/log(r₂/n))慢于ℓ₂几何的线性衰减。所提出的早停规则可在有界ℓ₁-路径条件下达到Lasso的极小化最优预测率。
AI.conclusion: ℓ₁几何下的贪婪集成方法存在固有的慢速风险衰减，但通过合适的早停策略可恢复最优预测性能。信号-噪声分解的精确刻画仍是开放问题。

title: Topology-Driven Anti-Entanglement Control for Soft Robots
summary: In the field of precision manufacturing in complex constrained environments, the role of soft robots is increasingly prominent, and the realization of anti-winding control based on multi-intelligent body reinforcement learning has become a research hotspot. One of the core problems at present is to coordinate multiple robots to complete the unwinding operation in a highly constrained environment. The existing distributed training framework faces some observability challenges in high-density barrier and unstable environments, resulting in poor learning results. This paper proposes a topology-driven Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (TD-MARL) framework to coordinate multi-robot systems to avoid entanglement. Specifically, the critical network adopts centralized learning, so that each intelligent body can perceive the strategies of other intelligent bodies by sharing the topological state, thus alleviating the training instability caused by complex interactions; eliminating the demand for communication resources between robots through distributed execution, Upgrade system reliability; the integrated topological security layer uses topological invariants to accurately assess and mitigate the risk of entanglement to avoid the strategy from falling into local difficulties. Finally, the full simulation experiments carried out in the real simulation environment show that the method is better than the current advanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method in terms of convergence and anti-winding effect.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种拓扑驱动的多智能体强化学习（TD-MARL）框架，通过集中式Critic学习、分布式执行和拓扑安全层，解决高密度障碍环境下软机器人的防缠绕控制问题。
AI.motivation: 在高密度障碍和复杂约束环境下，现有分布式训练框架面临可观测性挑战，导致多机器人防缠绕控制学习效果差。
AI.method: 1）集中式Critic网络共享拓扑状态感知其他智能体策略；2）分布式执行消除通信需求；3）集成拓扑安全层，利用拓扑不变量评估和降低缠绕风险。
AI.result: 在真实模拟环境中的全仿真实验表明，该方法在收敛性和防缠绕效果上优于当前先进的深度强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: TD-MARL框架能有效协调多机器人系统在高度约束环境中避免缠绕，提升训练稳定性和可靠性。

title: Pro-KLShampoo: Projected KL-Shampoo with Whitening Recovered by Orthogonalization
summary: Optimizers that exploit the matrix structure of gradients are central to modern LLM pre-training, with two distinct frontiers: explicit Kronecker-factored preconditioning -- most recently KL-Shampoo, which estimates the preconditioner via KL divergence minimization -- and orthogonalization of the gradient momentum, exemplified by Muon and analyzed as steepest descent under the spectral norm. The two routes are typically developed in isolation. We make a structural observation about KL-Shampoo's Kronecker preconditioners: their eigenvalue spectra exhibit a \emph{spike-and-flat} shape -- a few dominant eigenvalues followed by an approximately uniform tail -- across layers and training stages, holding exactly under a rank-$ρ$ signal-plus-noise gradient model. We exploit this structure by restricting one of KL-Shampoo's Kronecker factors to a parametric family aligned with the spike-and-flat shape: full spectral structure on a tracked $r$-dimensional subspace, single shared eigenvalue across the remaining $n-r$ directions. On these directions, we apply orthogonalization. An identity shows that this orthogonalization recovers the algebraic form of full KL-Shampoo's preconditioner. On four pre-training scales (GPT-2 124M / 350M, LLaMA 134M / 450M), Pro-KLShampoo consistently outperforms KL-Shampoo at every subspace rank we test in validation loss, peak per-GPU memory, and wallclock time to reach each loss level.

AI.tldr: 作者发现KL-Shampoo的Kronecker预条件子具有"尖峰-平坦"的特征谱形状（少量大特征值+均匀尾部），据此提出Pro-KLShampoo：对主导子空间保留完整谱结构，对剩余方向进行正交化处理，在多个GPT-2/LLaMA模型上超越原始方法。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型预训练优化器存在两条独立路线：Kronecker因子预条件（如KL-Shampoo）和梯度动量正交化（如Muon），但两者缺乏统一理解。作者发现KL-Shampoo的预条件子具有特殊的谱结构，希望利用这一结构融合两条路线，提升优化效率。
AI.method: 观察到KL-Shampoo的Kronecker因子具有"尖峰-平坦"谱形状（少量主导特征值+均匀尾部），提出Pro-KLShampoo：对跟踪的r维子空间保留完整谱结构，对剩余n-r个方向使用单一共享特征值并进行正交化。通过数学证明该正交化恢复完整KL-Shampoo预条件子的代数形式。
AI.result: 在GPT-2 124M/350M和LLaMA 134M/450M四个规模上，Pro-KLShampoo在验证损失、峰值GPU内存和到达指定损失水平的耗时上全面优于KL-Shampoo，且在所有测试的子空间秩上都表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 通过揭示并利用Kronecker预条件子的谱结构，可以将Kronecker因子预条件与梯度正交化两条路线统一起来，实现更高效的大模型预训练优化器。

title: PPO-Based Dynamic Positioning of HAPS-BS in Wind-Disturbed Stratospheric Maritime Networks
summary: High-Altitude Platform Stations (HAPS) offer a promising solution for wide-area wireless coverage in maritime regions lacking terrestrial infrastructure. However, maintaining reliable performance is challenging due to dynamic ship mobility and atmospheric disturbances, particularly stratospheric wind effects on HAPS positioning. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based framework for dynamic positioning of wind-disturbed HAPS-mounted base stations in maritime networks. A centralized DRL agent deployed on a coordinator HAPS controls multiple serving HAPS using radio measurements and network feedback, capturing realistic channel conditions and user mobility. A Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm is employed to learn robust positioning policies that enhance coverage stability and system throughput under wind disturbances. Simulation results show that the proposed approach effectively mitigates wind-induced positioning deviations while ensuring reliable wide-area connectivity for maritime users.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度强化学习（PPO算法）的高空平台站（HAPS）动态定位框架，用于在有风扰动的海事网络中优化基站覆盖和系统吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 解决海事区域缺乏地面基础设施的问题，克服HAPS因平流层风扰导致的定位偏差，提升海事网络覆盖的可靠性和性能。
AI.method: 采用集中式DRL智能体部署在协调HAPS上，利用无线测量和网络反馈控制多个服务HAPS，使用PPO算法学习鲁棒的定位策略。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法有效减轻了风致定位偏差，保障了海事用户的可靠广域连接。
AI.conclusion: DRL框架能够成功优化HAPS在动态海事环境中的定位，提升覆盖稳定性和系统吞吐量。

title: SMolLM: Small Language Models Learn Small Molecular Grammar
summary: Language models for molecular design have scaled to hundreds of millions of parameters, yet how they learn chemical grammar is poorly understood. We train SMolLM, a 53K-parameter weight-shared transformer, to generate novel SMILES with 95% validity on the ZINC-250K drug-like-molecule benchmark, outperforming a standard GPT with 10 times more parameters. Mechanistically, the same block resolves SMILES constraints across passes in a fixed order: brackets first, rings second, and valence last, as shown by error classification, linear probing, and sparse autoencoders. A systematic ablation across attention heads and passes further localizes the first bracket-matching step to a single attention head. Together, these results yield a compact, mechanistically interpretable molecular generator and a testbed for studying iterative computation in formal-language domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SMolLM，一个仅有53K参数的权重共享Transformer，在ZINC-250K数据集上实现了95%的SMILES生成有效性，性能优于10倍参数的GPT。通过机制分析发现，模型以固定顺序（括号→环→价键）分步解决SMILES约束，且首个括号匹配步骤可定位到单一注意力头。
AI.motivation: 现有分子设计语言模型规模日益增大（数亿参数），但其如何学习化学语法（SMILES规则）的底层机制尚不明确。作者希望通过构建一个极小模型来解剖化学语言模型的内部计算机制。
AI.method: 提出SMolLM——53K参数的权重共享Transformer，采用交叉注意力层实现迭代精炼（weight-shared + iterative refinement）。通过错误分类分析、线性探测（linear probing）和稀疏自编码器（sparse autoencoders）进行机制分析，并通过跨注意力头和跨pass的系统消融实验定位关键组件。
AI.result: 1）SMolLM（53K参数）在ZINC-250K上达到95%的有效性，超越标准GPT（约500K参数）。2）机制发现：模型按照括号→环→价键的固定顺序逐步解决SMILES约束。3）消融实验将括号匹配的第一步精确定位到单一注意力头。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提供了一个紧凑且机制可解释的分子生成器，并为研究形式语言领域中的迭代计算（iterative computation）建立了良好的测试平台。

title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction
summary: Modern retrieval systems, whether lexical or semantic, expose a corpus through a fixed similarity interface that compresses access into a single top-k retrieval step before reasoning. This abstraction is efficient, but for agentic search, it becomes a bottleneck: exact lexical constraints, sparse clue conjunctions, local context checks, and multi-step hypothesis refinement are difficult to implement by calling a conventional off-the-shelf retriever, and evidence filtered out early cannot be recovered by stronger downstream reasoning. Agentic tasks further exacerbate this limitation because they require agents to orchestrate multiple steps, including discovering intermediate entities, combining weak clues, and revising the plan after observing partial evidence. To tackle the limitation, we study direct corpus interaction (DCI), where an agent searches the raw corpus directly with general-purpose terminal tools (e.g., grep, file reads, shell commands, lightweight scripts), without any embedding model, vector index, or retrieval API. This approach requires no offline indexing and adapts naturally to evolving local corpora. Across IR benchmarks and end-to-end agentic search tasks, this simple setup substantially outperforms strong sparse, dense, and reranking baselines on several BRIGHT and BEIR datasets, and attains strong accuracy on BrowseComp-Plus and multi-hop QA without relying on any conventional semantic retriever. Our results indicate that as language agents become stronger, retrieval quality depends not only on reasoning ability but also on the resolution of the interface through which the model interacts with the corpus, with which DCI opens a broader interface-design space for agentic search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出直接语料交互（DCI）方法，让智能体通过通用终端工具（如grep、文件读取等）直接搜索原始语料，无需嵌入模型、向量索引或检索API。在多个基准测试中，该方法超越了传统稀疏、稠密和重排序检索基线，展示了检索接口的精细度对智能体搜索性能的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 传统检索系统（无论是词法还是语义）通过固定的相似度接口将语料访问压缩为单一top-k检索步骤，这在智能体搜索中成为瓶颈——精确的词法约束、稀疏线索组合、局部上下文检查和多步假设精炼难以通过现成检索器实现，且被早期过滤的证据无法被后续推理恢复。智能体任务需要多步编排（发现中间实体、组合弱线索、根据部分证据修订计划），进一步加剧了该局限。
AI.method: 提出直接语料交互（DCI）方法：智能体使用通用终端工具（grep、文件读取、shell命令、轻量脚本等）直接搜索原始语料，无需任何嵌入模型、向量索引或检索API，无需离线索引构建，能自然适应不断变化的本地语料库。
AI.result: 在IR基准测试和端到端智能体搜索任务中，DCI在多个BRIGHT和BEIR数据集上显著超越强稀疏、稠密和重排序基线；在BrowseComp-Plus和多跳QA任务上无需任何传统语义检索器即可达到高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 随着语言智能体变强，检索质量不仅取决于推理能力，还取决于模型与语料交互的接口精细度（resolution）。DCI为智能体搜索打开了更广阔的接口设计空间。

title: LINC: Decoupling Local Consequence Scoring from Hidden Matching in Constructive Neural Routing
summary: Constructive neural routing solvers usually score the next action by matching a decoder context to candidate embeddings, hiding deterministic one-step consequences such as travel, waiting, slack, and capacity changes. We propose LINC (Local Inference via Normed Comparison), a decoder-side candidate decision architecture that computes these consequences explicitly. LINC uses them according to their decision role: centered relative consequences are compared by a shared linear local scorer, while feasible-set summaries modulate the decoder context. This preserves standard global matching and relieves the hidden state from rediscovering transition arithmetic. The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows (CVRPTW) serves as the main constrained-routing stress test; the same interface extends to the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) and Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). In particular, for CVRPTW, LINC reduces PolyNet's Solomon/Homberger gaps from 13.83\%/38.15\% to 7.26\%/14.71\%; for TSP and CVRP, it also improves external-benchmark gaps.

AI.tldr: 提出LINC（局部推理通过归一化比较），一种解码器端候选决策架构，通过显式计算确定性一步后果（如旅行、等待、松弛、容量变化）来改进构造式神经路由求解器，在CVRPTW等约束路径问题上显著缩小与最优解的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有构造式神经路由求解器通常仅通过将解码器上下文与候选嵌入匹配来评分下一动作，忽略了旅行时间、等待时间、松弛时间、容量变化等确定性一步后果，导致隐藏状态需要"重新发现"这些转移算术，性能受限。
AI.method: 提出LINC架构：（1）显式计算每个候选动作的局部确定性后果；（2）中心化后的相对后果通过共享线性局部评分器比较；（3）可行集摘要用于调制解码器上下文。这样保留了全局匹配机制，同时减轻隐藏状态的学习负担。
AI.result: 在CVRPTW上，LINC将PolyNet在Solomon/Homberger基准上的差距从13.83%/38.15%降至7.26%/14.71%；在TSP和CVRP上也缩短了与外部基准的差距。
AI.conclusion: 显式编码确定性一步后果可以有效提升神经路由求解器的性能，特别是在约束严格的路径问题中，该架构具有良好的可扩展性。

title: Towards Dependable Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Factual Confidence Prediction
summary: Incorporating specific knowledge into large language models via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a widespread technique that fuels many of today's industry AI applications. A fundamental problem is to assess if the context retrieved by some similarity search provides indeed supporting facts, or instead misguides the generator with irrelevant information. It is critical to associate meaningful confidence measures about the factuality of the retrieval process with the generated answers. We present a new, two-staged approach to predict fact faithfulness of the output of retrieval-augmented generations. First, we employ conformal prediction to select only those retrieved chunks who have a high chance to come from the correct source. This approach in itself can improve answer quality by up to 6% in some of the studied datasets, however, the associated statistical guarantees do not hold generally, since the assumption of sample exchangeability depends on the retriever setup. We present diagnostic metrics to assess whether a setup is suitable. Second, we quantify confidence in the consistency of a generated final answer with a given retrieved context, using an attention-based factuality classifier. This approach can detect inconsistent answers with a chance of up to 77%. Our work helps to establish a novel type of certified RAG systems for a broad range of natural language industry applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两阶段方法，先用保形预测筛选高质量检索片段（提升6%答案质量），再用基于注意力的事实分类器检测生成答案与检索上下文的一致性（不一致检测率达77%），为RAG系统提供可信度保证。
AI.motivation: RAG系统中检索到的上下文可能包含无关或误导信息，需要有效评估检索过程的真实性并为生成答案提供可信的置信度度量，但目前缺乏系统性的方法。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：(1) 使用保形预测(Conformal Prediction)筛选来自正确来源的高概率检索块；(2) 基于注意力的事实分类器量化生成答案与检索上下文的一致性。
AI.result: 保形预测可将答案质量提升最多6%；事实分类器检测不一致答案的成功率最高达77%。但保形预测的统计保证在非可交换性设置下不普遍成立，需用诊断指标评估适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新型的认证RAG系统框架，为工业级自然语言应用提供可信的检索增强生成保障，但需注意保形预测的统计假设限制。

title: Eliciting associations between clinical variables from LLMs via comparison questions across populations
summary: The training data of large language models (LLMs) comprises a wide range of biomedical literature, reflecting data from many different patient populations. We investigate how it might be possible to recover information on correlation and causal links between patient characteristics, as a key building block for medical decision making. To avoid the pitfalls of direct elicitation, we propose an approach based on structured comparison questions, specifically patient comparison triplet questions. This is combined with a statistical model for the LLM representation that provides estimates of correlations without access to activations or model internals. Intuitively, we consider how similarity decisions of LLMs based on a first variable are affected by providing information on a second variable for one of the patients being assessed. We then induce prompt-level environment shifts to obtain correlation estimates for different subpopulations, which enables an invariant causal prediction (ICP) approach to obtain conservative candidate parent links. We demonstrate the method in two clinical domains, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and multiple sclerosis (MS). Across prompted environments, the elicited correlations are smooth, stable, and clinically interpretable, yet vary in a statistically significant way that supports downstream invariance testing, such that ICP provides a small set of candidate invariant parent links. These results show that indirect elicitation via triplet comparisons can recover meaningful association structure from LLMs and offer a cautious route from implicit correlations to causal statements that are congruent with LLM answering patterns.

AI.tldr: 利用结构化的三元组比较问题从LLM中提取患者特征间的相关性和因果关系，并通过环境偏移和不变因果预测获得保守的候选因果链接。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型训练数据包含大量生物医学文献，可能蕴含患者特征间的关联信息。如何从LLM中可靠地提取这些信息用于医疗决策是一个重要问题，但直接询问LLM易产生幻觉和偏见。
AI.method: 提出基于患者对比三元组问题的间接抽取方法，结合统计模型估计相关性（无需访问模型内部）；通过提示级环境偏移获取不同子群体的相关估计，再使用不变因果预测（ICP）获得保守的候选因果关系。
AI.result: 在COPD和MS两个临床领域，不同环境下提取的相关性平滑、稳定且临床可解释；统计显著的变化支持下游不变性测试，ICP提供了少量候选不变父链接。
AI.conclusion: 间接三元组比较可以从LLM中提取有意义的关联结构，为从隐式相关到因果陈述提供了一条谨慎且可行的路径。

title: Memory-Efficient EDA Denoising via Knowledge Distillation for Wearable IoT Under Severe Motion Artifacts and Underwater Conditions
summary: Electrodermal activity (EDA) is widely used in wearable Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) systems for continuous health monitoring, including autonomic assessment. However, EDA signals are highly vulnerable to motion artifacts and environmental noise, limiting reliable deployment in harsh operating conditions such as underwater. This study proposes a robust, deployable EDA denoising framework that generalizes across multiple measurement locations and harsh environments. The framework integrates a hybrid CNN-Transformer teacher model with a lightweight depth-wise separable CNN student model via a knowledge distillation (KD) strategy. To further improve robustness, a realistic data augmentation scheme is introduced to simulate diverse motion artifacts and environmental distortions. The KD-based student model significantly reduces model size (7.87 MB to 0.51 MB) and computational cost (105.1M to 11.61M FLOPs) while maintaining denoising performance (MAE: 0.144, SNR improvement: 12.08 dB) using the public dataset validation. In real-world underwater conditions (UMAC dataset) testing, the proposed method substantially improves skin conductance response reconstruction, reducing mean absolute error from 2.809 to 0.215. Furthermore, on independent testing using the CNS-OT dataset, the denoised signals enhanced downstream CNS-OT prediction performance, achieving the highest AUROC (0.806) compared to prior denoising methods. The proposed method also improved the early prediction rate (sensitivity) from 0.550 to 0.767, enabling CNS-OT prediction up to a median of 6.9 minutes before symptom onset. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework not only improves EDA signal quality but also enhances clinically relevant prediction performance while remaining suitable for deployment in resource-constrained wearable Internet of Things systems operating in harsh environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合混合CNN-Transformer教师模型与轻量级深度可分离CNN学生模型的知识蒸馏框架，用于在恶劣环境（如水下）中去除EDA信号的运动伪影和噪声，显著降低模型大小和计算成本，同时提升信号质量和下游临床预测性能。
AI.motivation: EDA信号在可穿戴医疗物联网系统中广泛用于自主神经监测，但极易受运动伪影和环境噪声干扰，尤其是在水下等恶劣环境中可靠性差，现有方法难以同时兼顾去噪性能、模型轻量化和跨场景泛化能力。
AI.method: 1) 混合CNN-Transformer教师模型提取特征；2) 轻量级深度可分离CNN学生模型通过知识蒸馏学习；3) 引入模拟运动伪影和环境失真的数据增强策略；4) 在多个数据集（公共数据集、UMAC水下数据集、CNS-OT数据集）上验证。
AI.result: 模型大小从7.87 MB压缩至0.51 MB，计算量从105.1M降至11.61M FLOPs；MAE为0.144，SNR提升12.08 dB；水下测试中MAE从2.809降至0.215；CNS-OT预测AUROC达0.806，早期预测灵敏度从0.550提升至0.767，提前中位6.9分钟预测症状发作。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架不仅改善了EDA信号质量，还显著增强了临床相关预测性能，同时适合部署在资源受限的恶劣环境可穿戴物联网系统中。

title: Governed Metaprogramming for Intelligent Systems: Reclassifying Eval as a Governed Effec
summary: AI systems increasingly synthesize executable structure at runtime: LLMs generate programs, agents construct workflows,self-improving systems modify their own behavior. In classical homoiconic and staged languages, the transition from coderepresentation to execution is unrestricted. eval is a language primitive, not a governed operation. We argue that ingovernedintelligent systems, this transition is an authority amplification: it converts symbolic structure into executableauthority andmust be mediated like any other effect. We present governed metaprogramming, a language design where programrepresentations(machine forms) are first-class values, form manipulation is pure computation, and materialization (the transition fromform toexecutable machine) is a governed effect subject to structural inspection. The governance system analyzes the proposedprogram'scapability requirements, policy compliance, and resource estimates before permitting execution. We formalize twojudgments: pureform evaluation (which emits no directives) and governed materialization (which emits exactly one governed directive). Weprovethree properties: purity of form manipulation, the no-bypass theorem, and boundary preservation. We implement the designinMashinTalk, a DSL for AI workflows compiling to BEAM bytecode, and report on integration with 454 existingmachine-checked Rocqtheorems. The central contribution is reclassifying eval from a language primitive into a governed effect.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"受控元编程"概念，将程序从表示到执行的转换（即eval）重新定义为一种受控效应，而非语言原语。通过形式化证明和MashinTalk DSL实现，确保AI系统在运行时动态生成和执行代码时受到结构性检查。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统（如LLM生成代码、智能体构建工作流、自我改进系统）在运行时动态合成可执行结构，但传统语言中eval是无限制的操作。这种从代码表示到执行的转变实质上是"权限放大"，需要像其他效应一样被管控，以确保AI系统的安全性和可控性。
AI.method: 提出受控元编程语言设计：1) 程序表示（机器形式）作为一等值；2) 形式操作是纯计算；3) 具体化（从形式到可执行机器的转换）是受控效应，需经过结构性检查（能力需求分析、策略合规性、资源评估）。形式化两个判断：纯形式求值（无指令发射）和受控具体化（发射一条受控指令）。在MashinTalk DSL中实现，编译到BEAM字节码。
AI.result: 形式化证明了三个性质：形式操作的纯度、无绕过定理、边界保持性。与454个现有机器检查的Rocq定理集成。
AI.conclusion: 核心贡献是将eval从语言原语重新分类为受控效应，为AI系统中运行时代码生成和执行提供了安全可治理的机制。

title: Topological Signatures of Grokking
summary: We study the grokking phenomenon through the lens of topology. Using persistent homology on point clouds derived from the embedding matrices of a range of models trained on modular arithmetic with varying primes, we identify a clear and consistent topological signature of grokking: a sharp increase in both the maximum and total persistence of first homology ($H_1$). Persistence diagrams reveal the emergence of a dominant long-lived topological feature together with increasingly structured secondary features, reflecting the underlying cyclic structure of the task. Compared to existing spectral and geometric diagnostics -- specifically, Fourier analysis and local intrinsic dimension -- persistent homology provides a unified geometric and topological characterization of representation learning, capturing both local and global multi-scale structure. Ablations across data regimes and control settings show that these topological transitions are tied to generalization rather than memorization. Our results suggest that persistent homology offers a principled and interpretable framework for analyzing how neural networks internalize latent structure during training.

AI.tldr: 本文通过持续同调（persistent homology）拓扑方法研究grokking现象，发现模型在泛化时第一同调群（H₁）的持续性和最大值急剧增加，揭示了循环结构拓扑特征的出现，为理解神经网络如何内化潜在结构提供了可解释框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏统一的多尺度几何拓扑视角来刻画grokking过程中表征学习的变化，谱分析和局部内在维度等方法无法同时捕捉局部与全局结构。
AI.method: 对模算术任务上训练的不同模型（不同素数）的嵌入矩阵提取点云，应用持续同调计算持久性图，分析第一同调群（H₁）的持久性特征，并与傅里叶分析、局部内在维度等基线方法对比。
AI.result: 发现grokking伴随着H₁的最大持久性和总持久性急剧上升，持久性图中出现主导的长寿命拓扑特征及结构化次级特征，这些拓扑转变与泛化而非记忆相关，且在多种数据消融和控制实验中一致。
AI.conclusion: 持续同调为分析神经网络训练中潜在结构的内化过程提供了一个原理性、可解释的统一框架，优于现有谱和几何诊断工具。

title: Decision-aware User Simulation Agent for Evaluating Conversational Recommender Systems
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) increasingly rely on user simulators for automated evaluation of sales agents. A key requirement for such simulators is the ability to model human decision-making. However, most existing simulation frameworks do not explicitly model the internal decision process, and LLM-based simulators often exhibit unrealistically strong information-processing capabilities, rarely exhibit the hesitation or decision deferral commonly observed in real consumer behavior, resulting in overly high acceptance probabilities. To address this limitation, we propose Hesitator, a theory-grounded user simulation framework that explicitly models human decision-making under choice overload. The framework introduces a modular Decision Module that separates utility-based item selection from overload-aware commitment decisions. Experiments across multiple user simulation frameworks, domains, sales modes, and LLM backbones show that integrating our module consistently mitigates unrealistic behaviors under increasing overload conditions. Furthermore, Hesitator reproduces established behavioral patterns from psychological economics, demonstrating its ability to model human decision behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hesitator，一个基于理论构建的用户模拟框架，通过引入模块化决策模块（分离效用选择与过载感知承诺决策），显式建模人类在选择过载下的决策行为，有效缓解了LLM模拟器不真实的过高接受率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的CRS用户模拟器未显式建模人类内部决策过程，LLM基模拟器表现出不切实际的强信息处理能力，很少表现出真实消费者常见的犹豫或延迟决策行为，导致接受概率过高，无法真实反映人类决策行为。
AI.method: 提出理论驱动的用户模拟框架Hesitator，核心是模块化决策模块，将基于效用的物品选择与过载感知的承诺决策分离为两个独立子模块，通过选择过载效应调控最终的接受概率。
AI.result: 在多种用户模拟框架、领域、销售模式和LLM骨干下，Hesitator模块持续缓解了过载条件下不真实的行为，并复现了来自心理经济学的已建立行为模式。
AI.conclusion: Hesitator能够有效建模人类在过载条件下的真实决策行为，为对话推荐系统的自动评估提供更逼真的用户模拟器。

title: Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Modelling with Missing Data
summary: Order-Agnostic autoregressive models have demonstrated strong performance in deep generative modeling, yet their use in settings with incomplete data remains largely unexplored. In this work, we reinterpret them through the lens of missing data. First, we show that their standard training procedure on fully observed data implicitly performs imputation under a missing completely at random mechanism, resulting in robust out-of-sample imputation performance in settings with high missingness. Second, we introduce the first principled framework for training them directly on incomplete datasets under general missingness mechanisms. Third, we leverage their amortized conditional density estimation to perform active information acquisition, i.e., sequentially selecting the most informative missing variables for downstream prediction or inference. Across a suite of real-world benchmarks, our Missingness-Aware Order-Agnostic Autoregressive Model (MO-ARM) consistently outperforms established imputation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MO-ARM，将顺序无关自回归模型重新解释为缺失数据框架，在训练、推理和主动信息获取三方面进行创新，在真实基准上优于传统插补方法。
AI.motivation: 现有顺序无关自回归模型在完整数据上表现良好，但在缺失数据场景下未被充分探索。作者希望填补这一空白，重新审视这些模型在缺失数据下的能力，并开发一个统一的框架来处理训练、推断和主动信息获取。
AI.method: 1) 证明在完整数据上的标准训练隐式地在MCAR（完全随机缺失）机制下进行插补；2) 提出首个在一般缺失机制下直接训练不完整数据的原则性框架；3) 利用摊销条件密度估计进行主动信息获取，顺序选择最有信息量的缺失变量。
AI.result: 在多个真实基准数据集上，MO-ARM持续优于已有的插补基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 顺序无关自回归模型在缺失数据场景下具有很大潜力，MO-ARM为处理缺失数据提供了统一且有效的框架。

title: Automated Population-Level Audit Assurance via AI-Based Document Intelligence
summary: Audit transaction testing validates accuracy and completeness of customer-facing statements against internal systems of record. Traditional manual, sample-based review of unstructured PDF statements is labor-intensive and does not scale to millions of transactions. This paper presents an automated framework for large-scale audit transaction testing using AI-based document intelligence. The solution leverages Snowflake Document AI to extract structured data from unstructured PDF statements using a small labeled corpus (approximately 20 documents). Extracted data are reconciled against authoritative source-of-truth datasets to identify discrepancies at scale. Results are surfaced through interactive dashboards and automated reports. The framework enables population-level testing rather than sampling-based approaches, improving audit coverage and supporting continuous assurance objectives. Recent advances in document intelligence and analytics-driven audit frameworks enable scalable, near real-time risk identification and continuous assurance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个利用AI文档智能（基于Snowflake Document AI）自动化审计交易测试的框架，可从少量标注样本（约20份）的PDF对账单中提取结构化数据，并与权威数据集进行大规模对账，实现从抽样测试到全量测试的转变，提升审计覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 传统的手动、样本-based的PDF对账单审计工作耗时耗力，无法扩展到数百万笔交易，审计覆盖率有限。
AI.method: 利用Snowflake Document AI，仅用约20份标注文档训练，从非结构化PDF对账单中提取结构化数据，然后与内部权威数据集进行自动化对账，并通过交互式仪表盘和自动化报告呈现结果。
AI.result: 实现了从样本测试到全量（population-level）测试的转变，显著提升了审计覆盖率，支持近实时的风险识别和持续审计。
AI.conclusion: AI文档智能与数据分析驱动的审计框架能够实现规模化、近实时的审计交易测试，支持持续审计目标。

title: Preliminary Insights in Chronos Frequency Data Understanding and Reconstruction
summary: This paper presents a preliminary analysis of the ability of Chronos foundation model to process and internally represent frequency domain information. Foundation models that process time-series data offer practitioners a unified architecture capable of learning generic temporal representations across diverse tasks and domains, reducing the need for task-specific feature engineering and enabling transfer across signal modalities. Despite their growing adoption, the extent to which such models encode fundamental signal properties remains insufficiently characterised. We address this gap by analysing Chronos under controlled conditions, starting from the simplest class of signals: discrete sinusoids generated at fixed frequencies. Using lightweight online minimum description length probes applied to the decoder architecture, we test for the presence and separability of frequency information in the model's internal representations. The results provide insight into how frequential content is captured across the frequency spectrum and highlight regimes in which representation quality may degrade or require particular care. These findings offer practical guidance for users of Chronos in signal processing and information fusion contexts, and contribute to ongoing efforts to improve the interpretability and evaluation of foundation models for temporal data.

AI.tldr: 本文初步分析了Chronos基础模型在处理和内部表示频域信息方面的能力，通过将最简正弦信号输入模型并应用轻量级在线最小描述长度探针，研究了其内部表示中频率信息的可分离性与质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管处理时间序列数据的基础模型已被广泛采用，但这些模型编码基本信号属性的程度尚未得到充分表征。
AI.method: 使用离散正弦信号作为最简测试用例，通过在解码器架构上应用轻量级在线最小描述长度探针，测试模型内部表示中频率信息的存在性和可分离性。
AI.result: 揭示了频域信息在频率频谱上的捕获方式，并指出了表示质量可能下降或需要特别注意的区域。
AI.conclusion: 为信号处理和信息融合领域的Chronos用户提供了实用指导，并有助于推进时间数据基础模型可解释性和评估的持续工作。

title: Enhancing Cryo-EM Density Map Segmentation in Phenix for Improved Atomic Model Building
summary: We introduce PhenixCraft, a fully automated pipeline for building atomic models from cryo-EM density maps. By integrating AlphaFold predictions, we enhance the map-segmentation step in Phenix during model building, addressing challenges posed by noise and artifacts that traditionally hinder this step. Our results demonstrate PhenixCraft's superior performance in TM-scores and sequence accuracy, significantly improving upon the limitations and inefficiencies of traditional model building using Phenix.

AI.tldr: PhenixCraft是一个全自动流水线，结合AlphaFold预测改进cryo-EM密度图的原子模型构建，在TM-score和序列准确性上显著优于传统Phenix方法。
AI.motivation: 传统cryo-EM密度图建模受噪声和伪影影响，分割步骤效果不佳，导致模型构建效率低、精度差。
AI.method: 将AlphaFold的结构预测整合到Phenix的图分割步骤中，构建全自动流水线PhenixCraft，以增强对噪声和伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: PhenixCraft在TM-score和序列准确性指标上均优于传统Phenix方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动化流水线有效改进了cryo-EM原子模型构建的精度和效率。

title: Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths
summary: We introduce a new generative modeling framework, \textbf{Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths (AuxPath-FM)}, which generalizes conditional flow matching by incorporating an auxiliary variable drawn from an arbitrary distribution into the probability path. Unlike prior methods that restrict auxiliary components to Gaussian noise, AuxPath-FM allows the variable $η$ to follow any distribution, producing trajectories of the form $X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η$. We theoretically demonstrate that this construction preserves the continuity equation and maintains a training objective consistent with the marginal formulation. This flexibility enables the design of diverse probability paths using various priors, including Gaussian, Uniform, Laplace, and discrete Rademacher distributions, each offering unique geometric properties for generative flows. Furthermore, our framework allows for specialized tasks such as label-guided generation by encoding structured semantic information into the auxiliary distribution. Overall, AuxPath-FM provides a principled and general foundation for probability path design, offering both theoretical generality and practical flexibility for diverse generative modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出AuxPath-FM框架，通过引入任意分布的辅助变量来泛化条件流匹配，允许使用高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯等多种先验分布设计概率路径，支持标签引导生成等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有条件流匹配方法将辅助变量限制为高斯噪声，缺乏灵活性。作者希望提供更通用的框架，允许任意分布的辅助变量，从而设计更多样化的概率路径。
AI.method: 在条件流匹配中引入任意分布的辅助变量η，定义轨迹形式为X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η，理论上证明该构造保持连续性方程且训练目标与边际公式一致。
AI.result: 支持多种先验分布（高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯、离散Rademacher等），每种分布提供不同的几何特性；可编码结构化语义信息实现标签引导生成。
AI.conclusion: AuxPath-FM为概率路径设计提供了原则性且通用的理论基础，兼具理论通用性和实际灵活性。

title: Maximizing Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget: A Submodular View of Tree Search for Tool-Use Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary:
We formalize Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget (RIFB) as the expected non-vanishing policy-gradient mass that a tool-use rollout set injects into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We prove that any budget-agnostic independent sampler suffers a collapse rate bounded away from zero for hard prompts regardless of the budget. Motivated by this, we recast intermediate state selection as a monotone submodular maximization problem, where a greedy one-step selector enjoys a 1 minus 1/e approximation guarantee.
  Our Uncertainty-aware Upper Confidence Bound (UUCB) terms arise as closed-form marginal gains of this objective. This turns the token-level entropy bonus from an empirical trick into an analytic consequence of the formulation. We present InfoTree, a training-time tree-search framework coupling UUCB with a learned Adaptive Budget Allocator (ABA) and an asynchronous Speculative Expansion scheme.
  ABA rescues prompts whose initial tree is wasted on uniform outcomes, lifting the mixed-outcome ratio from 58.1 percent to 76.3 percent with less than 5 percent budget overhead. Speculative Expansion reduces wall-clock overhead from 14.3 percent to 4.8 percent by tolerating bounded staleness in UUCB scores.
  Across nine benchmarks spanning math reasoning (AIME 2024 and 2025, MATH-500, OlympiadBench, USAMO), web-search agents (GAIA, HLE-100, BrowseComp-lite), and tool-rich coding and OS agents (APPS-verified, AgentBench-OS), InfoTree outperforms flat GRPO, DeepSearch, Tree-GRPO, AT2PO, CW-GRPO, and RC-GRPO. Head-to-head compositions with Tree-GRPO prefix sharing and CW-GRPO contribution weights deliver further gains, confirming that our selector operates orthogonally to rollout reuse and trajectory re-weighting. A 5 by 5 by 5 robustness grid reveals that over three quarters of the hyperparameter space lies on a performance plateau, confirming UUCB robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出InfoTree框架，将GRPO中的中间状态选择转化为单调子模最大化问题，推导出UUCB项，并设计了自适应预算分配器和异步推测展开机制，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在固定预算下，传统独立采样器对困难提示的梯度坍缩率始终非零，导致规划效率低下。需要一种能感知不确定性的树搜索方法以提升GRPO的训练效率。
AI.method: 1) 将中间状态选择建模为单调子模最大化问题，贪心选择器有1-1/e近似保证；2) 推导UUCB（不确定性上置信界）作为该目标的闭式边际增益；3) 提出InfoTree框架，包含UUCB、自适应预算分配器(ABA)和异步推测展开。
AI.result: ABA将混合结果比率从58.1%提升至76.3%（预算开销<5%）；推测展开将墙钟开销从14.3%降至4.8%；在9个基准上超越现有方法；超参数鲁棒性分析显示>3/4参数空间处于性能平台。
AI.conclusion: UUCB选择器与rollout复用和轨迹重加权正交，可为GRPO训练提供额外增益。token级熵奖励被形式化为分析结果而非经验技巧。

title: Layer Collapse in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently emerged as competitive alternatives to autoregressive (AR) language models, yet differences in their activation dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize these dynamics in LLaDA-8B and identify a striking layer-collapse property: a few early layers exhibit highly similar, collapsed activation patterns dominated by a single large super-outlier persisting over a long token range. Despite its apparent redundancy, this outlier is critical: pruning it causes outputs to degrade into repetitive random token loops. Paradoxically, layers in LLaDA contain more redundant representations overall, with redundancy most pronounced in earlier layers -- the reverse of AR models, where deeper layers grow redundant due to undertraining. Our analysis indicates that layer collapse in DLMs is not driven by undertraining but by overtraining: a dominant outlier becomes an indispensable information carrier while remaining representations collapse into redundant structure. These findings have strong practical implications, verified through controlled pre-training experiments. DLMs are surprisingly robust to compression: LLaDA under 3-bit GPTQ quantization drops only -1.8% on GSM8K, whereas Llama-3.1-8B drops -64.7%. Optimal sparsity allocation also reverses between families: at 50% average sparsity, allocating more to early layers in LLaDA yields +8.4% over the reverse strategy, while the same allocation costs Llama -8.4%. Our findings reveal that the DLM training objective fundamentally reshapes layer dynamics relative to AR models, with direct consequences for compression and deployment. Code: github.com/Conzel/super-outlier-dlm.

AI.tldr: 本文发现扩散语言模型（DLM）存在"层坍塌"现象：早期几层激活模式高度相似，被单个持续的大异常值主导。去除该异常值会导致输出退化为随机token循环。与自回归模型相反，DLM的冗余集中在浅层而非深层，且由过训练而非欠训练导致。DLM对量化压缩高度鲁棒（3-bit GPTQ仅降1.8% vs Llama降64.7%），最优稀疏分配策略也完全相反。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLM）已成为自回归模型的有力替代品，但两者在激活动态上的差异尚不明确。作者旨在系统表征DLM与AR模型在层激活模式上的根本差异。
AI.method: 以LLaDA-8B为对象，分析其层激活模式，识别"层坍塌"属性；通过剪枝实验验证异常值的关键作用；通过控制预训练实验验证过训练假说；对比量化压缩（GPTQ）和稀疏分配策略下的鲁棒性差异。
AI.result: 1) LLaDA早期层存在高度相似的坍塌模式，被单个持续大异常值主导；2) 该异常值不可或缺，剪枝后输出退化为随机token循环；3) 冗余主要集中在前层，与AR模型相反；4) 层坍塌由过训练导致；5) DLM对3-bit量化高度鲁棒（-1.8%），远优于AR模型（-64.7%）；6) 最优稀疏分配策略与AR模型完全相反。
AI.conclusion: DLM的训练目标从根本上重塑了层动态，与AR模型存在根本性差异，这对模型的压缩和部署有直接且重要的实践启示。

title: Bridging Generation and Training: A Systematic Review of Quality Issues in LLMs for Code
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate defective outputs in code generation tasks, ranging from logical bugs to security vulnerabilities. While these generation failures are often treated as model-level limitations, empirical evidence increasingly traces their root causes to imperfections within the training corpora. Yet, the specific mechanisms linking training data quality issues to generated code quality issues remain largely unmapped. This paper presents a systematic literature review of 114 primary studies to investigate how training data quality issues propagate into code generation. We establish a unified taxonomy that categorizes generated code quality issues across nine dimensions and training data quality issues into code and non-code attributes. Based on this taxonomy, we formalize a causal framework detailing 18 typical propagation mapping mechanisms. Furthermore, we synthesize state-of-the-art detection and mitigation techniques across the data, model, and generation lifecycles. The reviewed literature reveals a clear methodological shift: quality assurance is transitioning from reactive, heuristic-based post-generation filtering toward proactive, data-centric governance and closed-loop repair. Finally, we identify open challenges and outline research directions for developing reliable LLMs for code through integrated data curation and continuous evaluation. Our repository is available at https://github.com/SYSUSELab/From-Data-to-Code.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了114篇研究，建立了训练数据质量问题如何传播到代码生成输出的因果框架，提出了统一分类法（9种生成代码质量问题维度、训练数据质量问题分为代码与非代码属性），形式化了18种典型传播映射机制，并总结了数据、模型、生成全生命周期的检测与缓解技术。研究发现质量保证正从反应式后生成过滤转向主动式数据治理与闭环修复。
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成任务中频繁产生缺陷输出（从逻辑错误到安全漏洞），现有研究往往将其视为模型层面的局限性，但实证表明根因常来自训练语料库的不完善。然而，训练数据质量问题与生成代码质量问题之间的具体关联机制尚未被系统映射，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对114篇主要研究进行系统文献综述，建立统一分类法（生成代码质量9维度、训练数据质量分为代码属性与非代码属性），在此基础上形式化包含18种典型传播映射机制的因果框架，并综述数据、模型、生成全生命周期的检测与缓解技术。
AI.result: 建立了从训练数据质量到生成代码质量的因果传播框架，识别出18种典型映射机制；发现质量保证范式正在从反应式后生成过滤转向主动式数据治理和闭环修复。
AI.conclusion: 指出了通过集成数据管理和持续评估来开发可靠代码LLM的开放挑战和未来研究方向。

title: A Unified Pair-GRPO Family: From Implicit to Explicit Preference Constraints for Stable and General RL Alignment
summary: Large language model (LLM) alignment via reinforcement learning from human preferences (RLHF) suffers from unstable policy updates, ambiguous gradient directions, poor interpretability, and high gradient variance in mainstream pairwise preference learning paradigms. To systematically address these limitations, we establish a unified theoretical framework for preference-based RL optimization centered on the Pair-GRPO family, comprising two tightly coupled variants: Soft-Pair-GRPO and Hard-Pair-GRPO. Soft-Pair-GRPO is a minimal modification of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that replaces group-normalized scalar rewards with binary pairwise preference rewards, retaining GRPO's clipped surrogate and KL-regularized structure. We prove a critical gradient equivalence theorem: under first-order Taylor expansion around the current policy, Soft-Pair-GRPO's gradient is a positive scalar multiple of standard GRPO's gradient, explaining its empirical stability despite discarding continuous reward magnitudes. Building on this foundation, we propose Hard-Pair-GRPO, an advanced variant introducing explicit local probability constraints and constrained KL-fitting optimization to further suppress gradient noise and global policy drift. We provide comprehensive theoretical guarantees for both variants--including monotonic policy improvement, deterministic gradient direction, gradient-variance reduction, and dynamic step-size convergence. Extensive experiments on standard LLM alignment benchmarks (HH-RLHF,UltraFeedback) and the MuJoCo continuous control task HalfCheetah-v4 demonstrate that our Pair-GRPO family consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in alignment quality, human preference win rate, training stability, and generalization to general reinforcement learning. Ablation studies validate the critical contributions of each core component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pair-GRPO系列方法（Soft-Pair-GRPO和Hard-Pair-GRPO），通过统一理论框架解决了RLHF中策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊等问题，在LLM对齐和连续控制任务上超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF中的成对偏好学习范式存在策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差和梯度方差高等问题，亟需系统性的理论框架来克服这些局限。
AI.method: 提出Pair-GRPO系列：Soft-Pair-GRPO将GRPO的群体归一化标量奖励替换为二元成对偏好奖励，并证明了其梯度与GRPO梯度成正标量倍数的等价性定理；Hard-Pair-GRPO进一步引入局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化来抑制梯度噪声和全局策略漂移。
AI.result: 在HH-RLHF、UltraFeedback和HalfCheetah-v4基准上，Pair-GRPO系列在对齐质量、人类偏好胜率、训练稳定性和泛化能力上一致优于最先进基线。
AI.conclusion: Pair-GRPO家族通过理论驱动的设计实现了更稳定、可解释且高效的偏好对齐，并为策略梯度方法提供了统一的理论基础。

title: Shattering the Echo Chamber: Hidden Safeguards in Manuscripts Against the AI Takeover of Peer Review
summary:
As LLMs become increasingly capable, editorial boards and program committees are growing concerned about reviewers who fully outsource peer review to commercial chatbots. This concern stems from prior findings that current chatbots lack the independent critical thinking and depth of reasoning required to assess scientific novelty. One promising direction for mitigating this concern is to embed hidden instructions into manuscripts that disrupt or alter chatbot-generated reviews. However, existing methods remain intuitive and fragile, as they typically rely on homogeneous payloads injected in an inter-stream manner, rendering them susceptible to sanitization or neutralization.
  In this paper, we identify End-to-End Review Outsourcing as an emerging threat and propose IntraGuard, a black-box, venue-agnostic defense framework grounded in the structural--visual decoupling inherent to the PDF. Designed for committee-side deployment, IntraGuard supports both explicit strategies that trigger refusal or warning signals, and implicit strategies that embed predefined textual markers into the generated review. These strategies can be deployed via any of three intra-stream injection mechanisms, each of which seamlessly embeds heterogeneous defensive text objects within the PDF's underlying structure without altering its visual presentation. Extensive evaluations across 7 real-world commercial chatbot settings and 12 venues spanning diverse disciplines show that IntraGuard achieves a defense success rate of up to 84%, while preserving peer-review invariance for human reviewers. IntraGuard is lightweight and hardware-independent, incurring an average overhead of only one second per manuscript on a commodity personal computer. We further evaluate 11 adaptive attacks spanning manuscript sanitization and instruction interference, and discuss the implications of constructing ensemble defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IntraGuard，一种针对LLM外包审稿的防御框架，通过在PDF中嵌入隐性指令干扰AI生成的审稿意见，防御成功率最高达84%。
AI.motivation: LLM能力提升后，审稿人可能完全外包评审给商用聊天机器人，而现有防御方法（在文本流中注入同质化指令）脆弱易被清洗。亟需更鲁棒的、黑盒的、与会议无关的防御方案。
AI.method: 基于PDF的"结构-视觉解耦"特性，提出三种流内注入机制（intra-stream injection），将异构防御文本对象嵌入PDF底层结构而不改变视觉呈现。支持显式策略（触发拒绝/警告信号）和隐式策略（嵌入预定义文本标记）。
AI.result: 在7个商用聊天机器人、12个会议场景下，防御成功率最高达84%；对人工审稿无影响；每篇论文处理开销仅约1秒；针对11种自适应攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: IntraGuard是轻量级、硬件无关的有效防御方案，能缓解LLM外包审稿问题，并讨论了集成式防御的构建思路。

title: MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades
summary: We show that the MinMax algebra provides a form of recurrence that is expressively powerful, efficiently implementable, and most importantly it is not affected by vanishing or exploding gradient. We call MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades (RNCs) the models obtained by cascading several layers of neurons that employ such recurrence. We show that MinMax RNCs enjoy many favourable theoretical properties. First, their formal expressivity includes all regular languages, arguably the maximal expressivity for a finite-memory system. Second, they can be evaluated in parallel with a runtime that is logarithmic in the input length given enough processors; and they can also be evaluated sequentially. Third, their state and activations are bounded uniformly for all input lengths. Fourth, at almost all points, their loss gradient exists and it is bounded. Fifth, they do not exhibit a vanishing state gradient: the gradient of a state w.r.t. a past state can have constant value one regardless of the time distance between the two states. Finally, we find empirical evidence that the favourable theoretical properties of MinMax RNCs are matched by their practical capabilities: they are able to perfectly solve a number of synthetic tasks, showing superior performance compared to the considered state-of-the-art recurrent neural networks; also, we train a MinMax RNC of 127M parameters on next-token prediction, and the obtained model shows competitive performance for its size, providing evidence of the potential of MinMax RNCs on real-world tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MinMax代数的递归神经级联（RNCs），该模型不受梯度消失/爆炸影响，具有强表达能力（涵盖所有正则语言）、可并行/串行计算、状态有界、梯度存在且不消失等理论优势，并在合成任务和127M参数规模的下一个token预测任务上展现了竞争力。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN受到梯度消失/爆炸问题的困扰，限制了其学习长距离依赖的能力。作者希望设计一种新型递归结构，既保持递归的表达能力，又从根本上避免梯度问题。
AI.method: 利用MinMax代数（最小值和最大值运算）构建递归神经网络级联（RNCs），通过级联多个采用MinMax递归的神经元层获得模型。
AI.result: 理论证明了RNCs能表达所有正则语言、可对数时间并行化、状态有界、梯度存在且有界、状态梯度不会消失。实验上，在合成任务中优于主流RNN，127M参数的RNC在下一次token预测上表现出与尺寸匹配的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MinMax RNCs理论上兼具强表达力和数值稳定性，实践中也展现出潜力，是一种有前景的递归架构。

title: Securing the Agent: Vendor-Neutral, Multitenant Enterprise Retrieval and Tool Use
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, Published in ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic AI systems are increasingly prevalent in enterprise AI deployments. However, real enterprise environments introduce challenges largely absent from academic treatments and consumer-facing APIs: multiple tenants with heterogeneous data, strict access-control requirements, regulatory compliance, and cost pressures that demand shared infrastructure.
  A fundamental problem underlies existing RAG architectures in these settings: retrieval systems rank documents by relevance--whether through semantic similarity, keyword matching, or hybrid approaches--not by authorization, so a query from one tenant can surface another tenant's confidential data simply because it scores highest. We formalize this gap and analyze additional shortcomings--including tool-mediated disclosure, context accumulation across turns, and client-side orchestration bypass--that arise when agentic systems conflate relevance with authorization. To address these challenges, we introduce a layered isolation architecture combining policy-aware ingestion, retrieval-time gating, and shared inference, enforced through server-side agentic orchestration. This approach centralizes security-critical operations--tool execution authorization, state isolation, and policy enforcement--on the server, creating natural enforcement points for multitenant isolation while allowing client-side frameworks to retain control over agent composition and latency-sensitive operations.
  We validate the proposed architecture through an open-source implementation in OGX, a vendor-neutral framework that implements an OpenAI-compatible, open-source Responses API with server-side multi-turn orchestration. We evaluate it empirically and show that ABAC gating eliminates cross-tenant leakage while introducing negligible overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在多租户企业环境中，现有RAG和智能体系统存在严重的安全隐患——检索系统按相关性而非权限排序，导致跨租户数据泄露。作者提出了一种分层隔离架构（策略感知摄取+检索时门控+共享推理），并通过开源框架OGX实现验证，证明基于属性的访问控制（ABAC）门控能消除跨租户泄露且开销可忽略。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG架构在多租户企业部署中面临根本性安全问题：检索系统按相关性（语义相似度、关键词匹配等）排序而非授权，导致租户A的查询可能因得分最高而泄露租户B的机密数据。此外，工具中介的披露、跨轮对话上下文累积、客户端编排绕过等问题进一步加剧了安全风险。
AI.method: 提出分层隔离架构，包含三层：1) 策略感知摄取（策略感知的文档摄入）；2) 检索时门控（基于ABAC的检索时刻访问控制）；3) 共享推理（共享推理服务）。核心思想是将安全关键操作（工具执行授权、状态隔离、策略执行）集中在服务端，通过服务端智能体编排强制实现多租户隔离，同时允许客户端框架控制智能体组合和延迟敏感操作。
AI.result: 通过开源框架OGX（兼容OpenAI Responses API的服务端多轮编排框架）实现并验证，实验表明ABAC门控消除了跨租户数据泄露，同时引入的开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 企业级RAG和智能体系统需要将安全性作为一等公民纳入架构设计，相关性不等于授权。分层隔离架构通过服务端集中化策略执行，能有效解决多租户环境中的安全隔离问题，且性能开销极小。

title: Data-Driven Covariate Selection for Nonparametric and Cycle-Agnostic Causal Effect Estimation
summary: Estimating causal effects from observational data requires identifying valid adjustment sets. This task is especially challenging in realistic settings where latent confounding and feedback loops are present. Existing approaches typically assume acyclicity or rely on global causal structure learning, limiting applicability and computational efficiency. In this work, we study a local, data-driven method for covariate selection based on conditional independence information. While this method is known to be sound and complete in acyclic causal models, its validity in the presence of cycles has remained unclear. Our main contribution is to show that these guarantees extend to cyclic causal models. In particular, our result relies on the invariance of conditional independence assertions under $σ$-acyclification. These findings establish a unified, cycle-agnostic perspective on covariate selection and causal effect estimation, showing that the method applies across cyclic and acyclic settings without modification. Empirically, we validate this on extensive synthetic data, showing reliable performance in cyclic causal models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在反馈循环的因果模型中，基于条件独立性的局部数据驱动协变量选择方法（即调整集选择）的有效性，证明其在循环因果模型中与无环模型一样可靠，并通过σ-无环化技术建立了统一的视角。
AI.motivation: 现有因果效应估计方法大多假设无环性（acyclicity）或依赖全局因果结构学习，在存在潜在混淆和反馈循环的现实场景中缺乏适用性和计算效率，因此需要一种局部、数据驱动的方法并验证其在循环因果模型中的有效性。
AI.method: 基于条件独立性信息进行局部协变量选择（调整集选择），并利用σ-无环化（σ-acyclification）证明条件独立断言在循环和无环模型中的不变性，从而将原有的理论保证从无环模型扩展到循环因果模型。
AI.result: 理论上证明了基于条件独立性的协变量选择方法在循环因果模型中同样保持可靠性和完备性；在合成数据上进行了实证验证，表明其在循环因果模型中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可无需修改地适用于循环和无环两种因果模型，建立了一个统一的、对循环结构不敏感的协变量选择与因果效应估计框架。

title: Asymmetric On-Policy Distillation: Bridging Exploitation and Imitation at the Token Level
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories with token-level teacher feedback and often outperforms off-policy distillation and standard reinforcement learning. However, we find that its standard advantage weighted policy gradient suffers from three structural weaknesses, including high variance updates, vanishing gradients in zero-advantage regions, and exploration bottlenecks when corrective signals are insufficient.We therefore propose Asymmetric On-Policy Distillation (AOPD), which replaces ineffective negative reinforcement with localized divergence minimization in non-positive advantage regions while preserving positive reinforcement learning. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that AOPD consistently outperforms standard OPD, with average gains of 4.09 / 8.34 under strong / weak initialization, respectively. AOPD also maintains higher policy entropy during training and better capability retention during sequential tool-use adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出非对称在线蒸馏（AOPD），通过用局部散度最小化替代负强化，解决标准在线蒸馏中高方差、梯度消失和探索瓶颈的问题，在数学推理任务上平均提升4-8%。
AI.motivation: 标准在线蒸馏（OPD）的优势加权策略梯度存在三个结构性问题：高方差更新、零优势区域的梯度消失、以及校正信号不足时的探索瓶颈，需要更稳定的训练方法。
AI.method: 提出非对称在线蒸馏（AOPD），在非正优势区域用局部散度最小化替代无效的负强化，同时保留正优势区域的强化学习信号，实现非对称的更新策略。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上，AOPD在强初始化下平均提升4.09%，弱初始化下提升8.34%；训练过程中保持更高的策略熵，在顺序工具适应中保持更好的能力保留。
AI.conclusion: AOPD有效解决了标准在线蒸馏的三个结构性问题，是一种更稳定高效的蒸馏方法，特别适用于弱初始化场景和需要持续学习的场景。

title: Consistent Geometric Deep Learning via Hilbert Bundles and Cellular Sheaves
summary: Modern deep learning architectures increasingly contend with sophisticated signals that are natively infinite-dimensional, such as time series, probability distributions, or operators, and are defined over irregular domains. Yet, a unified learning theory for these settings has been lacking. To start addressing this gap, we introduce a novel convolutional learning framework for possibly infinite-dimensional signals supported on a manifold. Namely, we use the connection Laplacian associated with a Hilbert bundle as a convolutional operator, and we derive filters and neural networks, dubbed as \textit{HilbNets}. We make HilbNets and, more generally, the convolution operation, implementable via a two-stage sampling procedure. First, we show that sampling the manifold induces a Hilbert Cellular Sheaf, a generalized graph structure with Hilbert feature spaces and edge-wise coupling rules, and we prove that its sheaf Laplacian converges in probability to the underlying connection Laplacian as the sampling density increases. Notably, this result is a generalization to the infinite-dimensional bundle setting of the Belkin \& Niyogi \cite{BELKIN20081289} convergence result for the graph Laplacian to the manifold Laplacian, a theoretical cornerstone of geometric learning methods. Second, we discretize the signals and prove that the discretized (implementable) HilbNets converge to the underlying continuous architectures and are transferable across different samplings of the same bundle, providing consistency for learning. Finally, we validate our framework on synthetic and real-world tasks. Overall, our results broaden the scope of geometric learning as a whole by lifting classical Laplacian-based frameworks to settings where the signal at each point lives in its own Hilbert space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HilbNets，一种在流形上处理无限维信号的卷积学习框架，通过希尔伯特丛上的连接拉普拉斯算子定义卷积，并证明了离散化后的网络能收敛到连续架构，适用于时间序列、概率分布等复杂信号。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习面临时间序列、概率分布、算子等本质无限维且定义在不规则域上的信号，缺乏统一的学习理论框架。
AI.method: 利用希尔伯特丛上的连接拉普拉斯算子定义卷积，构建HilbNets；通过两步采样实现：1) 流形采样得到希尔伯特细胞层（Hilbert Cellular Sheaf），证明其拉普拉斯概率收敛到连接拉普拉斯；2) 离散化信号并证明离散HilbNets收敛到连续架构。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实任务上验证了框架的有效性，证明了离散化模型的收敛性和跨采样迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将经典拉普拉斯框架推广到信号位于各自希尔伯特空间的场景，拓宽了几何学习的适用范围。

title: How Far Are VLMs from Privacy Awareness in the Physical World? An Empirical Study
summary: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous cognitive cores for embodied assistants, evaluating their privacy awareness in physical environments becomes critical. Unlike digital chatbots, these agents operate in intimate spaces, such as homes and hospitals, where they possess the physical agency to observe and manipulate privacy-sensitive information and artifacts. However, current benchmarks remain limited to unimodal, text-based representations that cannot capture the demands of real-world settings. To bridge this gap, we present ImmersedPrivacy, an interactive audio-visual evaluation framework that simulates realistic physical environments using a Unity-based simulator. ImmersedPrivacy evaluates physically grounded privacy awareness across three progressive tiers that test a model's ability to identify sensitive items in cluttered scenes, adapt to shifting social contexts, and resolve conflicts between explicit commands and inferred privacy constraints. Our evaluation of 12 state-of-the-art models reveals consistent deficits. In cluttered scenes, all models exhibit monotonic performance decay as scene complexity grows due to perceptual deficit. When social context shifts, no model exceed 65% selection accuracy. Under conflicting commands, the best model gemini-3.1-pro perfectly balances task completion and privacy preservation in only 51% of cases. These findings reveal that current VLMs in the physical world suffer from perceptual fragility and fail to let their knowledge of privacy cues govern their situated behavior. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/immersed-privacy/immersed-privacy .

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImmersedPrivacy，一个基于Unity模拟器的交互式视听评估框架，用于测试视觉语言模型(VLMs)在物理环境中的隐私意识。评估了12个最先进模型在三个递进层次上的表现，发现所有模型在杂乱场景中存在感知退化，社交情境适应能力不足，以及在指令冲突下难以平衡任务完成与隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有的隐私评估基准局限于单模态、基于文本的表征，无法捕捉VLM作为具身助手在真实物理环境（如家庭、医院）中操作时的隐私挑战。这些代理拥有物理行动能力，能观察和操作隐私敏感信息，亟需更能反映现实世界复杂性的评估框架。
AI.method: 基于Unity模拟器构建交互式视听评估框架ImmersedPrivacy，设计三个递进测试层次：1）在杂乱场景中识别敏感物品；2）适应变化的社交情境；3）在明确指令与隐含隐私约束之间解决冲突。对12个最先进VLM进行系统性评估。
AI.result: 1）杂乱场景中所有模型性能随场景复杂度增加而单调下降；2）社交情境变化时，无模型超过65%的选择准确率；3）指令冲突下，最佳模型gemini-3.1-pro仅在51%的情况下完美平衡任务完成与隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在物理世界中存在感知脆弱性，无法让隐私知识有效指导其情境行为。模型虽有隐私知识，但在复杂的物理环境中无法将其转化为恰当的决策行动。

title: SparseForge: Efficient Semi-Structured LLM Sparsification via Annealing of Hessian-Guided Soft-Mask
summary:
Semi-structured sparsity provides a practical path to accelerate large language models (LLMs) with native hardware support, but post-training semi-structured pruning often suffers from substantial quality degradation due to strong structural coupling. Existing methods rely on large-scale sparse retraining to recover accuracy, resulting in high computational cost.
  We propose SparseForge, a post-training framework that improves recovery efficiency by directly optimizing the sparsity mask rather than scaling up retraining tokens. SparseForge combines Hessian-aware importance estimation with progressive annealing of soft masks into hardware-executable structured sparsity, enabling stable and efficient sparse recovery. On LLaMA-2-7B under 2:4 sparsity, SparseForge achieves 57.27% average zero-shot accuracy with only $\textbf{5B}$ retraining tokens, surpassing the dense model's 56.43% accuracy and approaching the 57.52% result of a state-of-the-art method using $\textbf{40B}$ tokens. Such improvements on the accuracy-efficiency trade-off from SparseForge are shown to be consistent across model families.

AI.tldr: SparseForge提出了一种后训练半结构化稀疏框架，通过Hessian感知重要性估计和软掩码渐进退火直接优化稀疏掩码，仅用5B重训练token就在LLaMA-2-7B的2:4稀疏性下达到57.27%准确率（超过稠密模型的56.43%），而现有最先进方法需要40B token。
AI.motivation: 半结构化稀疏虽能利用硬件加速LLM，但后训练剪枝因结构耦合导致严重质量下降，现有方法依赖大规模稀疏重训练（需大量token）来恢复精度，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出SparseForge框架：1) Hessian感知的重要性估计来评估剪枝影响；2) 软掩码渐进退火，将连续掩码逐步退火为硬件可执行的硬结构化稀疏掩码，直接优化掩码而非扩展重训练数据量。
AI.result: LLaMA-2-7B上2:4稀疏性：SparseForge仅用5B token达57.27%零样本准确率（超稠密模型56.43%）；最先进方法需40B token达57.52%。该效率优势在多个模型家族上一致成立。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接优化稀疏掩码而非增加重训练数据量，可在极低计算成本下实现接近甚至超越稠密模型和后训练SOTA方法的稀疏模型质量，显著提升了准确率-效率权衡。

title: FRInGe: Distribution-Space Integrated Gradients with Fisher--Rao Geometry
summary: Gradient-based attribution methods are model-faithful and scalable, but Integrated Gradients (IG) can be brittle because explanations depend on heuristic baselines, straight-line paths, discretization, and saturation. We propose Fisher--Rao Integrated Gradients (FRInGe), which defines both the reference and interpolation schedule in predictive distribution space. FRInGe replaces input baselines with a maximum-entropy predictive reference and follows a Fisher-Rao geodesic on the probability simplex. The corresponding input-space trajectory is realized through the pullback Fisher metric and stabilized by KL and Euclidean trust regions; attributions are obtained by integrating input gradients along this trajectory. Across six ImageNet architectures, FRInGe most clearly improves calibration-oriented attribution metrics, especially MAS scores, while remaining competitive on perturbation AUC and infidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fisher-Rao Integrated Gradients (FRInGe)，一种通过在预测分布空间而非输入空间定义参考点和插值路径的梯度归因方法，以解决传统Integrated Gradients的脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Integrated Gradients (IG) 存在因启发式基线选择、直线路径、离散化和饱和效应导致的归因结果不稳定问题，亟需一种更鲁棒的归因方法。
AI.method: FRInGe在预测分布空间（概率单纯形）中定义最大熵参考点，并沿着Fisher-Rao测地线进行插值；通过拉回Fisher度量将分布空间的轨迹映射回输入空间，并引入KL散度和欧几里得置信域进行稳定化，最后沿该轨迹积分输入梯度得到归因。
AI.result: 在六种ImageNet架构上，FRInGe在校准导向的归因指标（尤其MAS分数）上表现最优，同时在扰动AUC和不忠实度指标上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: FRInGe通过在预测分布空间操作，有效提升了归因方法的校准性和鲁棒性，为可解释性研究提供了新思路。

title: Making AI Drafts Count: A Quality Threshold in Audio Description Workflows
summary: Audio description (AD) narrates visual elements in video for blind and low-vision audiences. Recent work has shown that giving novice describers an AI-generated draft to start from helps produce higher-quality AD and lowers the barrier to entry. What remains an open question is how draft quality shapes the editing process. We investigate this through GenAD, an AD generation pipeline that incorporates accessibility guidelines and contextual video information, and RefineAD, an editing interface for human revisions. Human-AI contributions are measured across text, timing, and delivery. In a within-subjects study, we compared authoring from scratch against editing AI drafts of varying quality. GenAD drafts cut completion time by more than half and significantly reduced cognitive load. In contrast, baseline drafts generated from simple, unguided prompts offered only modest benefits, pointing to a minimum quality threshold for effectiveness. Qualitative findings suggest this threshold is content-dependent; as visual complexity increases, so does the quality needed from AI drafts. We propose this as a design principle: effective AI assistance should clear a quality threshold suited to the target content, rather than simply be present.

AI.tldr: 本文研究AI生成的音频描述草稿质量如何影响人工编辑过程。通过GenAD管道（整合无障碍指南和视频上下文信息）生成高质量AD草稿，以及RefineAD编辑界面，实验发现高质量AI草稿可将完成时间缩短一半以上并显著降低认知负荷，而低质量草稿仅提供有限帮助。提出"质量阈值"设计原则：有效AI辅助需达到与目标内容复杂度相匹配的质量门槛。
AI.motivation: 探索AI生成的音频描述草稿质量如何影响盲人和低视力人群视频内容描述的创作过程，以及确定有效AI辅助所需的最低质量门槛。
AI.method: 提出GenAD管道（整合无障碍指南和视频上下文信息生成AD）和RefineAD编辑界面；通过被试内实验，比较从零开始创作与编辑不同质量AI草稿（GenAD生成 vs 简单无引导提示基线）的效果，测量文本、时间、交付等维度的人类-AI贡献。
AI.result: GenAD草稿将完成时间缩短一半以上，显著降低认知负荷；基线草稿（简单无引导提示生成）仅提供有限帮助；质量阈值因内容复杂度而异，视觉复杂度越高，所需AI草稿质量也越高。
AI.conclusion: 提出设计原则：有效AI辅助应达到适合目标内容的质量阈值，而非简单提供AI辅助即可。高质量AI草稿对降低认知负荷和提高效率有显著作用。

title: Federated Cross-Client Subgraph Pattern Detection
summary: Subgraph pattern detection aims to uncover complex interaction structures in graphs. However, state-of-the-art graph neural network (GNN)-based solutions assume centralized access to the entire graph. When graphs are instead distributed across multiple parties, client-local GNN computations diverge from those of a centralized model, resulting in a representation-equivalence gap. We formalize this as a structural observability problem, where subgraph patterns crossing partition boundaries become locally unidentifiable. To bridge this gap, we propose a per-step, layer-wise embedding exchange framework in which clients synchronize intermediate node representations at each layer of the forward pass, without exposing raw features or labels. Under an extended-subgraph assumption and shared model parameters across clients, this framework recovers the same node representations as a centralized GNN over the full graph. Experiments on synthetic directed multigraphs with cycles, bicliques, and scatter-gather patterns show that embedding exchange and federated parameter aggregation are complementary rather than interchangeable: their combination recovers most of the representation gap, provided exchanged embeddings are fresh per-step rather than stale per-epoch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向分布式图的子图模式检测框架，通过逐层嵌入交换机制弥补分布式GNN与集中式GNN之间的表示等价性差距，实验表明该框架与联邦参数聚合互补。
AI.motivation: 现有的GNN子图模式检测方法假设全局图集中可用，但在跨多方分布的图场景下，客户端本地GNN的计算会偏离集中式模型，产生表示等价性差距。
AI.method: 提出逐层嵌入交换框架：客户端在每一层前向传播时同步中间节点表示，不暴露原始特征和标签。在扩展子图假设和共享模型参数条件下，可恢复与集中式GNN相同的节点表示。
AI.result: 在合成有向多图上的实验表明，嵌入交换与联邦参数聚合互补而非可互换，二者结合可恢复大部分表示差距，且交换的嵌入需是每步新鲜的而非每轮过时的。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效弥合分布式GNN的表示等价性差距，为跨多方子图模式检测提供了可行方案。

title: FedFrozen: Two-Stage Federated Optimization via Attention Kernel Freezing
summary: Federated learning with heterogeneous clients remains a significant challenge for deep learning, primarily due to client drift arising from inconsistent local updates. Existing federated optimization methods typically address this issue through objective-level regularization or update-correction mechanisms. Recent studies, however, suggest that Transformer-based architectures may be inherently more robust than conventional models under heterogeneous federated training. Motivated by this observation, we investigate how different parameter components within the attention mechanism influence federated optimization.
