Since RG motivates the design of these models, we use techniques from statistical physics -- specifically replica analysis -- to study their generalization properties. Specifically, we analyze the behavior of the Watanabe-Akaike Information Criterion (WAIC) as a proxy for generalization loss. This analysis yields two practical results: (i) guidance on the lattice design as a function of dataset size and predictor dimensionality; and (ii) a principled scaling law for the regularization prior when adding higher-order terms to the expansion so that one can increase model complexity without an expected increase in generalization loss. We evaluate the methodology on public datasets and find performance competitive against both blackbox methods and other intrinsically interpretable approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一类受重正化群理论启发的模型，基于加性层次展开（类似功能ANOVA和混合效应模型），构建显式、可解释且易于修改的多维晶格划分来支撑回归参数变化，并通过副本分析研究其泛化性质，给出了晶格设计和正则化先验的标度律指导。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释模型（如决策树、线性模型）在复杂模式捕捉上受限，而黑盒模型（如深度神经网络）虽性能强但缺乏可解释性。作者希望设计一种兼具显式可解释性和强性能的模型，受重正化群理论启发，将输入空间的层次化划分与统计学习结合。
AI.method: 模型基于多维晶格划分输入空间，每个维度对应一个属性；参数以层次展开形式表示，每项捕捉相对于更粗粒度的变化。模型可解释为分段GLM、层次混合效应回归或具有结构化参数共享的回归树。利用统计物理中的副本分析研究WAIC作为泛化损失的代理，推导出晶格设计与数据集大小/维度关系的指导，以及高阶项正则化先验的标度律。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的评估表明，该方法性能与黑盒方法及其他内在可解释方法相比具有竞争力。副本分析给出了两个实用结果：(i) 基于数据集大小和预测变量维度的晶格设计指导；(ii) 添加高阶项时正则化先验的标度律，使得增加模型复杂度不会预期增加泛化损失。
AI.conclusion: 受RG启发的层次加性模型在保持显式可解释性的同时，能取得与黑盒方法竞争的性能。理论分析为模型设计提供了实用指导，平衡了模型复杂度与泛化能力。

title: Permutation-preserving Functions and Neural Vecchia Covariance Kernels
summary: We introduce a novel framework for constructing scalable and flexible covariance kernels for Gaussian processes (GPs) by directly learning the covariance structure under a regression-type parameterization induced by Vecchia approximations, using deep neural architectures. Specifically, we model kriging coefficients and conditional standard deviations, deterministic quantities that uniquely characterize the covariance, providing stable and informative learning targets. Exploiting the permutation-equivariant structure of conditioning sets in the Vecchia factorization, we derive a universal representation for permutation-preserving functions and design neural architectures that respect this symmetry, leading to improved training stability and data efficiency. The proposed approach enables expressive, non-stationary kernel learning while maintaining computational scalability, thereby bridging classical GP methodology with modern deep learning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Vecchia近似和深度神经网络的框架，通过学习kriging系数和条件标准差来构造高斯过程的协方差核，实现了可扩展、灵活且非平稳的核学习。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯过程的协方差核设计受限于手工选择或参数化形式，难以兼顾表达能力和计算可扩展性。希望借助深度学习自动学习核结构，同时保持GP的计算优势。
AI.method: 利用Vecchia近似将协方差学习转化为回归参数（kriging系数和条件标准差）的学习问题；设计置换等变神经网络来保证对条件集排列不变性的对称性约束。
AI.result: 实现了兼具表达力和可扩展性的非平稳协方差核学习，训练稳定性和数据效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效连接了经典高斯过程方法与现代深度学习，为GP核学习提供了新的路径。

title: Discrete Elastic Ribbons: A Unified Discrete Differential Geometry Framework for One-Dimensional Energy Models
comment: 59 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables. Source code available on https://github.com/StructuresComp/discrete-elastic-ribbon and https://github.com/StructuresComp/discrete-elastic-ribbon-jax
summary: Elastic ribbons, slender structures whose length ($L$), width ($W$), and thickness ($b$) satisfy $L \gg W \gg b$, exhibit mechanical behaviors intermediate between one-dimensional rods ($L \gg W, b$) and two-dimensional plates ($L, W \gg b$). In quadratic Kirchhoff-type rod-based frameworks, such as Discrete Elastic Rods (DER), the governing equilibrium equations are independent of width, and therefore these models cannot capture width-dependent mechanical effects. Reduced centerline-based ribbon models attempt to capture width dependence via coupled bending-twisting energies. However, their relative accuracy remain unclear due to the absence of a unified simulation framework. In this work, we formulate a framework grounded in discrete differential geometry where the energy is expressed as functions of coupled bending-twisting strain measures along the centerline, rather than a linear sum of quadratic bending and twisting energies in DER. We derive analytical gradients and Hessians of the energy that enable implicit time integration. Within this unified setting, we compare five ribbon models: Kirchhoff, Sadowsky, Wunderlich, Sano, and Audoly. As a benchmark, a straight ribbon is longitudinally constrained into a pre-buckled arch and subjected to transverse displacement, inducing a supercritical pitchfork bifurcation. Predicted bifurcation thresholds are compared against shell-based finite element simulations, with the Sano model providing the closest agreement in capturing width-dependent shifts. Our high-performance JAX-based implementation achieves $\mathcal{O}(N)$ per-iteration cost and also confirms that Sano model introduces negligible per-iteration overhead relative to standard DER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于离散微分几何的统一框架，比较了五种弹性带模型（Kirchhoff、Sadowsky、Wunderlich、Sano、Audoly），发现Sano模型在捕捉宽度依赖的力学效应方面与壳有限元模拟最接近，且计算开销与标准DER相当。
AI.motivation: 现有弹性带模型（如DER）的平衡方程与宽度无关，无法捕捉宽度依赖的力学效应。虽然简化中心线模型试图通过耦合弯扭能量引入宽度依赖性，但由于缺乏统一仿真框架，它们的相对准确性尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于离散微分几何，将能量表达为中心线上的耦合弯扭应变函数（而非DER中二次弯扭能量的线性求和），导出解析梯度和黑塞矩阵实现隐式时间积分。在统一框架下比较五种模型，并以预屈曲拱形直带受横向位移的超临界叉形分岔为基准，与壳有限元模拟对比。
AI.result: Sano模型在预测宽度依赖的分岔阈值方面与壳有限元模拟最接近；基于JAX的高性能实现达到O(N)每轮迭代成本，且Sano模型相比标准DER的额外开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: Sano模型是弹性带建模中准确性和效率的最佳权衡方案，为细长结构的物理仿真提供了实用选择。

title: Relaxed Sparsest-Permutation Formulation for Causal Discovery at Scale
summary: Despite the growing availability of large datasets, causal structure learning remains computationally prohibitive at scale. We revisit sparsest-permutation learning for linear structural equation models and show that exact Cholesky factorization is unnecessary for structure recovery. This observation motivates a support-level relaxation that searches for sparse triangular factors over a precision-support screening graph. The relaxed formulation can be efficiently evaluated via masked zero-fill incomplete Cholesky factorization, enabling scalable comparison of candidate orderings. At the population level, we establish soundness for Markov equivalence class (MEC) recovery under no-cancellation and sparsest Markov representation assumptions, as well as robustness to ordering misspecification. Motivated by these guarantees, we introduce SCOPE, a sparse-Cholesky pipeline that provides a scalable implementation of the relaxed formulation. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that SCOPE matches the MEC recovery accuracy of substantially slower baselines, while achieving significantly reduced runtime and scaling to 10k variables.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCOPE方法，通过支持级松弛和掩码零填充不完全Cholesky分解，实现线性结构方程模型中因果结构的高效学习，可扩展到万级变量，且恢复精度与慢速基线方法相当。
AI.motivation: 因果结构学习在大规模数据下计算开销巨大，现有方法难以扩展到高维变量场景，需要更高效的算法。
AI.method: 重新审视稀疏置换学习，发现精确Cholesky分解并非必要，提出支持级松弛——在精度支持筛选图上搜索稀疏三角因子，通过掩码零填充不完全Cholesky分解高效评估候选排序，构建SCOPE管线。
AI.result: SCOPE在合成和真实数据集上匹配了慢速基线方法的MEC恢复精度，但运行时间显著减少，可扩展至10k变量。
AI.conclusion: 所提松弛方法在无抵消和最稀疏马尔可夫表示假设下保证了MEC恢复的合理性，并对排序错误具有鲁棒性。

title: Stability of the Monge Map in Semi-Dual Optimal Transport
summary: This paper shows that the semi-dual formulation of the optimal transport problem has a degenerate saddle-point structure, and that its numerical solution is equivalent to solving a constrained optimization problem. We derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the convergence of Monge maps without requiring optimality of the dual potential. This analysis helps explain why, in practice, numerical algorithms often require more iterations to update the transport map than the potential.

AI.tldr: 论文指出最优传输的半对偶形式存在退化的鞍点结构，其数值解等价于约束优化问题，并推导了Monge映射收敛的充要条件，解释了为何实际算法中传输映射需要比势函数更多迭代更新。
AI.motivation: 分析最优传输半对偶形式的退化鞍点结构，并解释其数值求解中传输映射更新缓慢的原因。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，将半对偶形式的数值求解转化为约束优化问题，并推导Monge映射收敛的充要条件（不要求对偶势函数最优）。
AI.result: 得到了Monge映射收敛的充要条件，解释了实际算法中传输映射需要更多迭代更新的现象。
AI.conclusion: 半对偶形式的退化鞍点结构导致传输映射更新更慢，理论分析为该类算法的改进提供了指导。

title: A Scalable Digital Twin Framework for Energy Optimization in Data Centers
summary: This study proposes a scalable Digital Twin framework for energy optimization in data centers.The framework integrates IoT-based data acquisition, cloud computing, and machine learning techniques to enable real-time monitoring, forecasting, and intelligent energy management. A controlled small-scale data center environment was developed to monitor variables such as power consumption, temperature, and computational workload. Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) models were employed to predict energy demand and support operational decision-making. Experimental results demonstrated improvements in energy efficiency, including reductions in power consumption and enhancements in Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE). Despite being evaluated in a constrained environment, the proposed framework demonstrates strong potential as a scalable and cost-effective solution for sustainable data center management.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合物联网、云计算和LSTM的数字孪生框架，用于数据中心的能源优化，实验证明能降低功耗并改善PUE。
AI.motivation: 数据中心能耗问题日益严重，现有方法缺乏实时监控与智能预测能力，亟需可扩展的能源优化方案。
AI.method: 构建小型数据中心实验环境，通过IoT采集功耗、温度、负载等数据，使用LSTM模型预测能耗需求，结合数字孪生实现实时监控与决策支持。
AI.result: 在受限环境下验证了框架的有效性，成功降低了功耗并提升了PUE指标。
AI.conclusion: 该数字孪生框架具有可扩展性和成本效益，是数据中心可持续管理的潜在解决方案。

title: When AI Meets Science: Research Diversity, Interdisciplinarity, Visibility, and Retractions across Disciplines in a Global Surge
summary: The extent to which Artificial Intelligence (AI) can trigger generalized paradigm shifts in science is unclear. Although some of these technologies have revolutionized data collection and analysis in specific scientific fields such as Chemistry, their overall impact depends on the scope of adoption and the ways scholars use them. In this study, we document substantial differences in the timing and extent of AI adoption across countries and scientific domains from 1960 to 2015. After 2015, we find generalized exponential growth in AI adoption, with the number of AI-supported works multiplying by at least four across all domains. The transformative nature of this rapid growth is less apparent and points to multiple challenges should adoption trends persist. According to our analyses, AI-supported research is confined to very few topics with strong ties to Computer Science and conventional statistical frameworks, suggesting limited transformational potential in epistemological terms. AI-supported works are also associated with an unwarranted citation premium and exhibit substantially higher retraction rates than non-AI-supported works across most fields. Geographically, AI adoption displays pronounced heterogeneity at the country level, along with an acceleration in the relevance of middle-income countries in Asia, from China and beyond. Thus, the transformative capacity of AI in science remains largely untapped, and its rapid adoption underlines challenges in research openness, transparency, reproducibility, and ethics from a global perspective. We discuss how best research practices could boost the benefits of AI adoption and highlight fields and geographies where these trends warrant closer scrutiny.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了1960-2015年间AI在科学研究中的采用情况，发现2015年后AI支持的研究呈指数级增长（至少翻四倍），但这种增长集中在与计算机科学和传统统计框架紧密相关的少数主题上，AI支持论文存在不当的引用溢价和更高的撤稿率，地理分布呈现显著异质性（亚洲中等收入国家崛起），表明AI在科学中的变革潜力尚未充分释放，并面临开放性、透明度、可复现性和伦理等多重挑战。
AI.motivation: 探究人工智能（AI）能否以及在多大程度上引发科学领域的范式转变，揭示不同国家和科学领域在AI采用时间与程度上的差异，评估AI对科学研究变革潜力的真实影响。
AI.method: 基于1960-2015年的文献计量分析，比较AI支持研究与非AI支持研究在主题分布、引用影响、撤稿率、地理分布等方面的差异，采用统计方法量化AI采用的增长模式及其特征。
AI.result: 1) 2015年后AI采用呈指数级增长，所有领域至少翻四倍；2) AI支持研究局限于少数与计算机科学紧密相关的主题及传统统计框架；3) AI支持论文存在不合理的引用优势；4) AI支持论文在多数领域撤稿率显著更高；5) AI地理分布不均，亚洲中等收入国家（尤其是中国）显著加速。
AI.conclusion: AI在科学中的变革潜力尚未充分实现，快速采用伴随着研究开放性、透明度、可复现性和伦理方面的挑战，需要更好的研究实践来促进AI的积极效益。

title: In-Context Positive-Unlabeled Learning
summary: Positive-unlabeled (PU) learning addresses binary classification when only a set of labeled positives is available alongside a pool of unlabeled samples drawn from a mixture of positives and negatives. Existing PU methods typically require dataset-specific training or iterative optimization, which limits their applicability when many tasks must be solved quickly or with little tuning. We introduce PUICL, a pretrained transformer that solves PU classification entirely through in-context learning. PUICL is pretrained on synthetic PU datasets generated from randomly instantiated structural causal models, exposing it to a wide range of feature-label relationships and class-prior configurations. At inference time, PUICL receives the labeled positives and the unlabeled samples as a single input and returns class probabilities for the unlabeled rows in one forward pass, with no gradient updates or per-task fitting. On 20 semi-synthetic PU benchmarks derived from the UCI Machine Learning Repository, OpenML, and scikit-learn, PUICL outperforms four standard PU learning baselines in average AUC and accuracy, and is competitive on F1-score. These results show that the in-context learning paradigm extends naturally beyond fully supervised tabular prediction to the semi-supervised PU setting.

AI.tldr: 提出PUICL，一个通过上下文学习（ICL）解决正无标记（PU）分类问题的预训练Transformer模型。模型在合成因果结构数据集上预训练，推理时无需梯度更新或任务特定微调，在20个半合成PU基准上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PU学习方法通常需要数据集特定的训练或迭代优化，限制了在需要快速解决多个任务或较少调优场景下的适用性。作者希望利用上下文学习范式，让一个预训练模型能零样本地直接解决任意PU分类任务。
AI.method: PUICL基于Transformer架构，在合成PU数据集上预训练。合成数据通过随机实例化的结构因果模型生成，覆盖多样的特征-标签关系和先验类分布。推理时，将标记正样本和未标记样本拼接为单个输入序列，通过一次前向传播直接输出未标记样本的类别概率。
AI.result: 在20个半合成PU基准（来自UCI、OpenML、scikit-learn）上，PUICL在平均AUC和准确率上超越四种标准PU学习基线，在F1分数上表现有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习范式可以自然地从全监督表格预测扩展到半监督PU设置，预训练Transformer能够通过上下文学习有效解决PU分类问题。

title: Quantum Kernels for Audio Deepfake Detection Using Spectrogram Patch Features
summary: Quantum machine learning has emerged as a promising tool for pattern recognition, yet many audio-focused approaches still treat spectrograms as generic images and do not explicitly exploit their time-frequency structure. We propose Q-Patch, a quantum feature map tailored to audio that encodes local time-frequency patches from mel-spectrograms into quantum states using shallow, hardware-efficient circuits with adjacency-aware entanglement. Each selected patch is summarized by a compact four-dimensional acoustic descriptor and mapped to a four-qubit circuit with depth at most three, enabling practical quantum kernel construction under near-term constraints. We evaluate Q-Patch on an audio spoofing detection task using a controlled, balanced protocol and compare it with size-matched classical baselines. Q-Patch improves discrimination between bona fide and spoofed samples, achieving an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) of 0.87, compared with 0.82 for a radial basis function support vector machine (RBF-SVM) trained on the same patch-level features. Kernel-space analysis further reveals a clear class structure, with cross-class similarity around 0.615 and within-class self-similarity of 1.00. Overall, Q-Patch provides a practical framework for incorporating time-frequency-aware representations into quantum kernel learning for audio authenticity assessment in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出Q-Patch，一种针对音频的量子特征图方法，将梅尔频谱图的局部时频块编码为量子态，在音频欺骗检测任务上AUROC达到0.87，优于经典RBF-SVM的0.82。
AI.motivation: 现有量子机器学习处理音频时，将频谱图视为普通图像，未能充分利用音频的时频结构特性。
AI.method: 从梅尔频谱图中提取局部时频块，计算四维声学描述子，映射到4-qubit浅层量子电路（深度≤3），构建量子核函数。
AI.result: 在音频欺骗检测任务上，Q-Patch的AUROC为0.87，优于RBF-SVM的0.82；核空间分析显示类间相似度0.615，类内自相似度1.00。
AI.conclusion: Q-Patch提供了一种在低资源场景下将时频感知表示融入量子核学习的实用框架，用于音频真实性评估。

title: Variational Smoothing and Inference for SDEs from Sparse Data with Dynamic Neural Flows
comment: Yu Wang and Arnab Ganguly contributed equally to this work. Corresponding to Arnab Ganguly
summary: Stochastic differential equations (SDEs) provide a flexible framework for modeling temporal dynamics in partially observed systems. A central task is to calibrate such models from data, which requires inferring latent trajectories and parameters from sparse, noisy observations. Classical smoothing methods for this problem are often limited by path degeneracy and poor scalability. In this work, we developed a novel method based on characterization of the posterior SDE in terms of conditional backward-in-time score defined as the gradient of a function solving a Kolmogorov backward equation with multiplicative updates at observation times. We learn this conditional score using neural networks trained to satisfy both the governing PDE and the observation-induced jump conditions, thereby integrating continuous-time dynamics with discrete Bayesian updates. The resulting score induces a posterior SDE with the same diffusion coefficient but a modified drift, enabling efficient posterior trajectory sampling. We further derive a likelihood-based objective for learning the SDE parameters, yielding an evidence lower bound (ELBO) for joint state smoothing and parameter estimation. This leads to a variational EM-style procedure, where the neural conditional score is optimized to approximate the smoothing distribution, followed by a maximization step over the SDE parameters using samples from the induced posterior. Experiments on nonlinear systems demonstrate accurate and stable inference with a very few observations demonstrating significant improved scalability compared to classical MCMC methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经条件分数的SDE后验推断方法，通过学习Kolmogorov后向方程的解来构建后验SDE，实现了对稀疏观测下的潜变量轨迹和参数的高效推断。
AI.motivation: 传统SDE平滑方法受路径退化限制且可扩展性差，需要一种能处理稀疏、噪声观测且可扩展的推断方法。
AI.method: 利用神经网络学习条件分数（conditional score），该分数满足Kolmogorov后向方程和观测引起的跳跃条件，从而构建具有修正漂移的后验SDE，并推导了ELBO用于联合状态平滑和参数估计。
AI.result: 在非线性系统上，仅用极少观测即可实现准确稳定的推断，显著优于经典MCMC方法。
AI.conclusion: 神经条件分数方法有效解决了SDE推断中的路径退化和可扩展性问题。

title: Quantum Kernels for Parity-Structured Classification: A Hybrid Pipeline
summary: Parity (XOR) classification requires detecting discrete, high-order feature interactions that smooth classical kernels cannot efficiently capture. We study how quantum kernel advantage depends on parity complexity, the number of features entering the XOR rule, and find a clear threshold behavior. We pair a ZZ quantum feature map with binary {0, pi} encoding (features median thresholded before circuit input) to expose parity structure. A binary encoding ablation, RBF SVM trained on the identical {0, pi} features, separates encoding from circuit effects: at low complexity (n = 5 features), binary RBF achieves 83.4% +/- 1.7% and the quantum kernel 81.2% +/- 1.9%, showing encoding drives performance there. At high complexity (n = 11 features, 11 qubits, r = 3 ZZ repetitions), all classical methods collapse to near-random (approx. 50%), binary RBF reaches only 54.3% +/- 1.1%, and the quantum ZZ kernel achieves 66.3% +/- 3.2% (mean +/- std, 10 seeds), a +12.0 percentage-point margin over the binary ablation and approx. 7x higher kernel-target alignment (0.094 +/- 0.020 vs. 0.013 +/- 0.001). These results identify parity complexity as a concrete axis along which genuine quantum kernel advantage, not attributable to encoding alone, emerges.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究量子核方法在奇偶性（XOR）分类任务中的优势，发现当特征数量增加时，经典方法（包括二值化RBF核）性能崩溃至随机水平，而量子ZZ核能保持显著优势，证明了真正的量子核优势存在于高复杂性奇偶性问题中。
AI.motivation: 探究量子核方法是否能在高维奇偶性分类任务中展现出超越经典核方法的真正优势，区分"编码带来的提升"与"量子电路本身的优势"。
AI.method: 采用ZZ量子特征映射结合二值{0, pi}编码，将特征经过中位数阈值化后输入量子电路。同时设置二值化消融实验（用RBF SVM在相同的二值化特征上训练）来分离编码效应和量子电路效应。
AI.result: 低复杂度（n=5）时，二值RBF达83.4%，量子核81.2%，编码驱动性能；高复杂度（n=11）时，经典方法崩溃至~50%，RBF仅54.3%，量子ZZ核达66.3%，高出12个百分点，核-目标对齐度是消融实验的7倍。
AI.conclusion: 奇偶性复杂度是量子核方法能够展现真正优势（非编码所致）的具体维度，在高复杂度XOR问题上存在量子核优势。

title: CredibleDFGO: Differentiable Factor Graph Optimization with Credibility Supervision
comment: Submitted to NAVIGATION: Journal of the Institute of Navigation
summary: Global navigation satellite system (GNSS) positioning is widely used for urban navigation, but the covariance reported by the GNSS solver is often unreliable in urban canyons. Existing differentiable factor graph optimization (DFGO) methods already learn measurement weighting through the solver, but they still use position-only objectives. As a result, the mean estimate may improve while the reported covariance remains too small, too large, or wrong in shape. In this work, we propose CredibleDFGO (CDFGO), a differentiable GNSS factor graph framework that makes covariance credibility an explicit training target. The Weighting Generation Network (WGN) predicts per-satellite reliability weights. The differentiable Gauss--Newton solver maps these weights to a position estimate and posterior covariance, and proper scoring rules supervise the East--North predictive distribution end-to-end. We study negative log-likelihood (NLL), Energy Score (ES), and their combination. Results on three UrbanNav test scenes show consistent gains in uncertainty credibility. Positioning accuracy also improves on the medium-urban and harsh-urban scenes, and the mean horizontal error and 95th-percentile error improve on the deep-urban scene. On the harsh-urban Mong Kok (MK) scene, CDFGO-Combined reduces the mean horizontal error from 13.77\,m to 11.68\,m, reduces NLL from 40.63 to 6.59, and reduces ES from 12.31 to 9.05. The case studies link the MK improvement to better axis-wise consistency, more credible local covariance ellipses, and satellite-level reweighting.

AI.tldr: 提出CredibleDFGO（CDFGO），一种可微分的GNSS因子图优化框架，通过显式训练协方差可信度来提升城市导航中定位的不确定性估计质量。
AI.motivation: 现有可微分因子图优化方法仅以位置优化为目标，导致协方差估计不可靠（过小、过大或形状错误），无法准确反映城市峡谷环境中的定位不确定性。
AI.method: 设计权重生成网络（WGN）预测每颗卫星的可靠性权重，通过可微分Gauss-Newton求解器映射为位置估计和后验协方差，并用适当评分规则（负对数似然NLL、能量评分ES及其组合）端到端监督东-北预测分布。
AI.result: 在三个UrbanNav测试场景中，不确定性可信度一致提升；中度和重度城区定位精度提升；深城区平均水平和95分位误差改善；在Mong Kok场景，平均水平误差从13.77m降至11.68m，NLL从40.63降至6.59，ES从12.31降至9.05。
AI.conclusion: 将协方差可信度作为显式训练目标能有效改善GNSS定位的不确定性估计质量，同时提升定位精度，未来值得在更多传感器融合场景中推广。

title: Spectral Lens: Activation and Gradient Spectra as Diagnostics of LLM Optimization
summary: Training loss and throughput can hide distinct internal representation in language-model training. To examine these hidden mechanics, we use spectral measurements as practical and operational diagnostics. Using a controlled family of decoder-only models adapted from the modded NanoGPT codebase, we introduce an empirical protocol based on activation covariance and per-sample gradient SVD spectra. This dual-view reveals three empirical findings and one mechanistic explanation. First, batch size acts as a latent determinant of representation geometry: runs that reach equal loss settle into systematically distinct activation spectra. Second, the activation covariance tail measured early in training reliably forecasts downstream token efficiency. Third, movement of the activation spectrum head (leading modes), together with gradient spectra, characterizes underlying learning-dynamics changes, separating learning-side architectural improvements from primarily execution-side gains. These predictive and diagnostic signals persist across the 12-, 36-, and 48-layer model tiers. Finally, a mechanistic model proves the main observations and explains how activation covariance spectra correlate with task-aligned feature learning.

AI.tldr: 论文通过激活协方差和梯度SVD谱的双重视角，揭示了语言模型训练中隐藏的内部表征机制，发现批次大小是表征几何的潜在决定因素，激活谱尾部可预测token效率，谱头部运动与梯度谱共同刻画学习动态变化。
AI.motivation: 标准训练指标（损失、吞吐量）无法揭示语言模型训练中隐藏的内部表征差异，作者希望探究这些隐藏机制并建立实用诊断工具。
AI.method: 在modded NanoGPT代码库上构建受控的decoder-only模型族，采用激活协方差和每个样本梯度SVD谱的双重视角进行实证分析，并提出机制模型验证主要观察结果。
AI.result: 1) 批次大小是表征几何的潜在决定因素，相同损失下不同批次大小导致不同激活谱；2) 早期激活协方差尾部可预测下游token效率；3) 激活谱头部与梯度谱共同刻画学习动态，区分学习侧架构改进与执行侧效率提升；4) 机制模型解释了激活协方差谱与任务对齐特征学习的关联。
AI.conclusion: 提供了可操作的光谱诊断工具，可用于预测模型效率和区分不同类型的改进，为理解语言模型训练内部机制提供了新视角。

title: Schedule-and-Calibrate: Utility-Guided Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Code LLMs
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards has proven effective at post-training LLMs for coding, yet deploying separate task-specific specialists incurs costs that scale with the number of tasks, motivating a unified multi-task RL (MTRL) approach. However, existing MTRL methods treat all coding tasks uniformly, relying on fixed data curricula under a shared optimization strategy, ultimately limiting the effectiveness of multi-task training. To address these limitations, we propose ASTOR, a multi-tASk code reinforcement learning framework via uTility-driven coORdination. Centered on task utility, a signal capturing each task learning potential and cross-task synergy, ASTOR comprises two coupled modules: 1) Hierarchical Utility-Routed Data Scheduling module hierarchically allocates training budget and prioritizes informative prompts, steering training toward the most valuable data and 2) Adaptive Utility-Calibrated Policy Optimization module dynamically scales per-task KL regularization, matching update constraints to each tasks current training state. Experiments on two widely-used LLMs across four representative coding tasks demonstrate that ASTOR consistently improves a single model across all tasks, outperforming the best task-specific specialist by 9.0%-9.5% and surpassing the strongest MTRL baseline by 7.5%-12.8%.

AI.tldr: ASTOR是一个面向多任务代码强化学习的框架，通过任务效用驱动的数据调度和自适应策略优化，使得单一模型在多个编码任务上超越任务专用专家模型9.0%-9.5%，并在多任务基线基础上提升7.5%-12.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练LLM的方法通常为每个任务单独训练专家模型，成本随任务数量线性增长；而统一的多任务RL方法对所有任务采用固定数据课程和共享优化策略，限制了多任务训练的效果。
AI.method: 提出ASTOR框架，以"任务效用"为核心信号（捕捉各任务学习潜力与跨任务协同），包含两个耦合模块：1) 层次化效用路由数据调度模块，分层分配训练预算并优先选择高信息量提示；2) 自适应效用校准策略优化模块，动态调整每个任务的KL正则化强度，匹配各任务的当前训练状态。
AI.result: 在两种LLM和四个代表性编码任务上，ASTOR在所有任务上一致提升单一模型性能，超越最佳任务专用专家9.0%-9.5%，超越最强多任务基线7.5%-12.8%。
AI.conclusion: 通过任务效用驱动的协调机制，ASTOR有效解决了多任务RL训练中任务间冲突和资源分配不均的问题，实现了单一模型同时胜任多个编码任务的目标。

title: BUILD-AND-FIND: An Effort-Aware Protocol for Evaluating Agent-Managed Codebases
summary: Most coding-agent benchmarks ask whether generated code behaves correctly. That remains essential, but repository-level engineering is increasingly agent-managed: one agent writes a repository, and later agents inspect, audit, or extend it as working context. In that setting, a generated repository is not only an answer to a task but also a communication artifact for future work. Even when strong agents nearly satisfy the visible behavioral objective, repositories can differ in how clearly they expose the intended behavior and design choices behind that behavior. We introduce BUILD-AND-FIND, a protocol for evaluating whether downstream agents can recover those intended choices from generated repositories, and how much inspection that recovery requires. For each task, a builder sees a hidden repository specification and creates a codebase; a finder sees only the codebase and a specification-traced multiple-choice question bank. The protocol separates behavioral correctness from artifact-side recovery and reports recovery accuracy, repeatability, implementation coverage, and inspection effort. Accuracy and stability act as gates: effort is interpreted only when recovery succeeds reliably. Among artifacts from which the same intent can be recovered, lower effort by the same finder suggests that the artifact makes that intent easier to locate. Question-only and spec-only controls quantify generic priors and specification access, while audits separate omitted claims from finder failures and check whether correct answers cite artifact evidence. In the released high-prior task pack, recovery accuracy is near saturation, so inspection effort and finder-specific effects provide the main panel-local comparison.

AI.tldr: 提出了BUILD-AND-FIND协议，用于评估代码生成agent构建的仓库是否能让后续agent从中恢复出设计意图，而不仅仅是行为正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码agent基准只关注生成代码的行为正确性，但仓库级别的工程越来越多由agent管理（一个agent写仓库，后续agent检查、审计或扩展）。生成的仓库不仅是任务答案，更是未来工作的沟通产物，因此需要评估仓库是否清晰表达了设计意图。
AI.method: BUILD-AND-FIND协议：builder根据隐藏的仓库规范创建代码库，finder仅看代码库和基于规范的多选题库进行意图恢复。评估指标包括恢复准确率、可重复性、实现覆盖率和检查工作量。通过question-only和spec-only对照组控制先验和规范访问，审计分离遗漏主张与finder失败。
AI.result: 在发布的高先验任务包中，恢复准确率接近饱和，因此检查工作量和finder特定效应成为主要的局部对比指标。
AI.conclusion: 代码生成的评估应从单纯的行为正确性扩展到"artifact-side recovery"（制品侧意图恢复能力），提供更全面的仓库质量评估维度。

title: Convex-Geometric Error Bounds for Positive-Weight Kernel Quadrature
summary: Kernel quadrature can exploit RKHS spectral structure and outperform Monte Carlo on smooth integrands, but optimized quadrature weights are generally signed and may be numerically unstable. We study whether spectral acceleration remains possible when the weights are constrained to be positive, i.e., simplex weights. In the exact-target fixed-pool setting, an evaluated i.i.d. candidate pool of size $N$ is already available and the task is to reweight it so as to approximate the kernel mean embedding. We show that this positive reweighting problem is governed not by the equal-weight empirical average, but by the random convex hull generated by the pool. Our main geometric result shows that the mean of a bounded $d$-dimensional random vector can be approximated by a convex combination of $N$ i.i.d. samples at accuracy $O(d/N)$ with high probability, sharper than equal-weight averaging in the fixed-dimensional regime. We transfer this $d$-dimensional convex-hull approximation to full RKHS worst-case error through an augmented Mercer-truncation argument. The resulting positive-weight KQ bounds consist of a spectral tail term and a finite-sample convex-hull term, yielding Monte-Carlo-beating rates in favorable spectral regimes, including near-$O(1/N)$ rates up to logarithmic factors under exponential spectral decay. We also provide a constructive Frank--Wolfe algorithm that operates directly on the pool atoms, maintains simplex weights, and admits an explicit optimization-error bound.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了核求积（Kernel Quadrature）在权重必须为正（单纯形权重）时是否仍能实现谱加速。通过几何分析证明了在高维随机向量凸包近似中的$O(d/N)$精度，并将其迁移到RKHS最坏情况误差中，得到了在有利谱衰减下击败蒙特卡洛的收敛速率。同时提出了一个保持单纯形权重的Frank-Wolfe算法。
AI.motivation: 传统核求积的优化权重通常有正有负，可能导致数值不稳定。作者希望研究在保持权重为正（即概率权重）的约束下，是否仍能利用RKHS的谱结构实现比蒙特卡洛更快的收敛速度。
AI.method: 1) 几何分析：证明有界d维随机向量均值可用N个i.i.d.样本的凸组合以$O(d/N)$精度近似；2) 通过增广Mercer截断论证将d维凸包结果迁移到无穷维RKHS；3) 提出Frank-Wolfe算法直接对已有原子池操作，保持单纯形权重并具有显式优化误差界。
AI.result: 正权重的核求积误差由谱尾项和有限样本凸包项组成。在指数谱衰减下，可达到接近$O(1/N)$（忽略对数因子）的收敛速率，优于蒙特卡洛的$O(1/\sqrt{N})$。
AI.conclusion: 正权重约束下的核求积仍然可以实现谱加速，在有利谱条件下击败蒙特卡洛方法，同时避免了有符号权重的数值不稳定问题。

title: Polarizable atomic multipoles for learning long-range electrostatics
summary: Long-range electrostatics and polarization remain central obstacles to extending machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) to ionic, polar, and interfacial systems. Here, we introduce a semi-local framework for learning electrostatics from energies and forces using polarizable atomic multipoles. Local equivariant descriptors predict environment-dependent latent monopoles, dipoles, and quadrupoles, while residual non-local charge transfer and polarization are captured by non-self-consistent linear response in induced charges and dipoles. Across four diverse benchmarks and four short-range MLIP architectures, the multipole hierarchy and response terms systematically improve potential energy surface accuracy, with the largest gains in systems where long-range effects are essential. More importantly, the learned latent variables recover physically meaningful electrical responses: accurate Born effective charge tensors, emergent polarizabilities, infrared spectra in close agreement with experiments, and semi-quantitative Raman spectra for bulk water and hybrid MAPbI$_3$ perovskite. This systematically improvable, physically transparent framework enables MLIPs trained on standard energy and force labels to predict polarization-sensitive observables.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半局域框架，利用可极化原子多极子从能量和力中学习静电相互作用，通过局部等变描述符预测潜变量单极子、偶极子和四极子，并通过非自洽线性响应捕获剩余的非局域电荷转移和极化，显著提升了MLIP在离子、极化和界面系统中的精度。
AI.motivation: 长程静电和极化效应是阻碍机器学习原子间势（MLIP）应用于离子、极化和界面系统的核心障碍，现有方法难以同时兼顾物理准确性和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出半局域框架：1) 局部等变描述符预测环境依赖的潜变量单极子、偶极子和四极子；2) 非自洽线性响应机制捕获剩余的非局域电荷转移和极化；3) 多极层次结构系统性地提升势能面精度。
AI.result: 在四个多样化的基准测试和四种短程MLIP架构上，多极层次和响应项系统性地提升了势能面精度，尤其对长程效应关键的系统中提升最大。潜变量恢复了物理有意义的响应：准确的有效Born电荷张量、涌现极化率、与实验高度一致的红外光谱以及半定量拉曼光谱。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可系统改进、物理透明，使得基于标准能量和力标签训练的MLIP能够预测极化敏感的可观测物理量。

title: Optimal Confidence Band for Kernel Gradient Flow Estimator
summary: In this paper, we investigate the supremum-norm generalization error and the uniform inference for a specific class of kernel regression methods, namely the kernel gradient flows. Under the widely adopted capacity-source condition framework in the kernel regression literature, we first establish convergence rates for the supremum norm generalization error of both continuous and discrete kernel gradient flows under the source condition $s>α_0$, where $α_0\in(0,1)$ denotes the embedding index of the kernel function. Moreover, we show that these rates match the minimax optimal rates. Building on this result, we then construct simultaneous confidence bands for both continuous and discrete kernel gradient flows. Notably, the widths of the proposed confidence bands are also optimal, in the sense that their shrinkage rates are greater than, while can be arbitrarily close to, the minimax optimal rates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了核梯度流在最大模意义下的泛化误差和一致推断，在容量-源条件框架下建立了连续和离散核梯度流的收敛速度，并证明了这些速度达到了极小极大最优。基于此，进一步构建了同时置信带，其宽度在收缩速度上也接近极小极大最优。
AI.motivation: 现有核回归方法的泛化误差研究多集中在L2范数，而最大模（supremum-norm）下的误差分析和一致推断（如同时置信带）尚不充分。本文旨在填补这一空白，为核梯度流在最大模意义下的理论性质提供完整的刻画。
AI.method: 采用容量-源条件（capacity-source condition）框架，通过理论分析研究了连续和离散核梯度流在最大模下的泛化误差收敛速度，并基于此构造了同时置信带。
AI.result: 在源条件 s>α₀ 下，连续和离散核梯度流的最大模泛化误差收敛速度达到极小极大最优；构建的同时置信带的宽度收缩速度大于且可以任意接近极小极大最优速率。
AI.conclusion: 本文为核梯度流在最大模下的泛化误差和一致推断提供了理论上最优的结果，为核方法的统计推断奠定了更坚实的理论基础。

title: Ratio-based Loss Functions
summary: Algorithms in machine learning and AI do critically depend on at least three key components: (i) the risk function, which is the expectation of the loss function, (ii) the function space, which is often called the hypothesis space, and (iii) the set of probability measures, which are allowed for the specified algorithm. This paper gives a survey of a certain class of loss functions, which we call ratio-based. In supervised learning, margin-based loss functions for classification tasks depending on the product of the output values $y_i$ and the predictions $f(x_i)$ as well as distance-based loss functions depending on the difference of $y_i$ and $f(x_i)$ for regression are common. Distance-based loss functions are in particular useful, if an additive model assumption seems plausible, i.e. the common signal plus noise assumption. However, in the literature, several loss functions proposed for regression purposes have a multiplicative error structure in mind and pay attention to relative errors, i.e. to the ratio of $y_i$ and $f(x_i)$. In this survey article, we systematically investigate such ratio-based loss functions and propose a few new losses, which may be interesting for future research. We concentrate on investigating general properties of ratio-based loss functions like continuity, Lipschitz-continuity, convexity, and differentiability, because these properties play a central role in most machine learning algorithms. Therefore, we do not focus on some specific machine learning algorithm to derive universal consistency, learning rates, or stability results. Instead, we want to enable future research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了机器学习中一类基于比率（ratio-based）的损失函数，这类损失函数关注预测值与真实值的比率（相对误差），而非传统的差值或乘积。文章分析了这些损失函数的连续性、Lipschitz连续性、凸性和可微性等一般性质，并提出了一些新的损失函数供未来研究参考。
AI.motivation: 现有损失函数多基于加法误差结构（距离-based）或分类的边际损失，但许多回归问题存在乘法误差结构，需要关注相对误差。作者希望系统梳理基于比率的损失函数，并分析其数学性质，为未来研究奠定基础。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，系统搜集和分类已有基于比率的损失函数，从连续性、Lipschitz连续性、凸性和可微性等一般性质角度进行分析，并提出若干新的损失函数。
AI.result: 系统总结了多类基于比率的损失函数的数学性质，提出了新的损失函数设计方向，明确了这些函数在连续性、凸性等方面的特性。
AI.conclusion: 基于比率的损失函数在处理乘法误差结构回归问题时有重要价值，但其性质分析尚不充分，未来可进一步探索其在具体机器学习算法中的一致性和学习率等问题。

title: Super-Level-Set Regression: Conditional Quantiles via Volume Minimization
summary: Constructing minimum-volume prediction regions that satisfy conditional coverage is a fundamental challenge in multivariate regression. Standard approaches rely on explicitly estimating the full conditional density and subsequently thresholding it. This two-step plug-in process is notoriously difficult, sensitive to estimation errors, and computationally expensive. One would like to instead optimize the region directly. Formulating a direct solution is challenging, however, because it requires minimizing a volume objective that is coupled with the conditional quantiles of the model's own estimation error. In this work, we address this challenge. We introduce super-level-set regression (SLS), a novel mathematical framework that successfully resolves this implicit coupling, allowing us to directly parameterize and optimize the geometric boundaries of the target conditional level sets. By bypassing full distribution estimation and leveraging flexible volume-preserving frontier functions, our approach natively captures complex, multimodal, and disjoint conditional structures end-to-end. Ultimately, SLS offers a new perspective on multivariate conditional quantile regression, replacing the restrictive assumptions of density-first methods with a direct geometric optimization strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出超水平集回归（SLS）框架，通过直接参数化和优化条件水平集的几何边界来构建最小体积预测区域，无需显式估计完整条件密度，解决了传统两步法中估计误差敏感和计算昂贵的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统构建条件覆盖最小体积预测区域的方法依赖于先估计完整条件密度再阈值化的两步法，这一过程对估计误差敏感、计算成本高，且难以处理复杂多模态分布。作者希望绕过密度估计，直接优化预测区域。
AI.method: 提出超水平集回归（SLS）框架：通过体积保持的前沿函数直接参数化条件水平集的几何边界，利用数学方法解耦体积目标与模型自身估计误差的条件分位数之间的隐式耦合，实现端到端优化。
AI.result: SLS能够原生捕捉复杂、多模态、非连通的非凸条件结构，通过直接几何优化替代密度优先方法，在保持条件覆盖的同时最小化预测区域体积。
AI.conclusion: SLS为多元条件分位数回归提供了新视角，用直接几何优化策略替代了密度优先方法的限制性假设，在计算效率和模型灵活性方面具有优势。

title: Architecture Shape Governs QNN Trainability: Jacobian Null Space Growth and Parameter Efficiency
summary: Variational quantum circuits with angle encoding implement truncated Fourier series, and architectures arranging $N$ qubits with $L$ encoding layers each -- sharing encoding budget $E = NL$ -- generate identical frequency spectra, identical frequency redundancy, and require the same minimum parameter count for coefficient control. Despite this equivalence, trainability varies substantially with architecture shape $(N,L)$ at fixed $E$. We identify structural rank deficiency of the coefficient matching Jacobian $J$ as the mechanism responsible. For serial single-qubit architectures, we prove $\mathrm{rank}(J) \leq 2L+1$ regardless of parameter count $P$, with $\dim(\ker J) \geq P-(2L+1)$ growing without bound -- a phenomenon we term \emph{structural gradient starvation}: a growing fraction of parameters become structurally decoupled from the loss as $P$ increases at fixed $L$. Parallel architectures avoid this via independent phase trajectories, ensuring $σ_{\min}(J^{(\mathrm{par})}) > 0$ generically for $P \leq 2E+1$, so no parameter lies in $\ker J$. For practitioners, we further show that the two natural routes to increasing parameter count have fundamentally different effects: adding feature map (FM) layers monotonically strengthens the Jacobian QFIM eigenvalue spectrum and achieves $R^2 \geq 0.95$ with $1.6$--$2.2\times$ fewer parameters than adding trainable blocks across all tested architectures, while trainable blocks improve training only through the classical interpolation mechanism with no quantum-specific benefit.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了变分量子电路中架构形状（N个量子比特×L个编码层）对可训练性的影响，发现尽管频率谱和冗余性相同，但可训练性差异很大。串行架构存在结构秩亏导致“梯度饥饿”问题，而并行架构可避免。增加特征映射层比增加可训练块更高效。
AI.motivation: 动机在于揭示变分量子电路中固定编码预算E=NL下不同架构形状(N,L)对可训练性的影响机制，并寻找更高效的参数增加策略。
AI.method: 通过理论分析系数匹配雅可比矩阵J的秩，证明串行单量子比特架构中rank(J)≤2L+1，导致结构梯度饥饿；并行架构可避免此问题。实验比较了增加特征映射层与增加可训练块两种参数增长路径的效果。
AI.result: 串行架构中大量参数处于雅可比矩阵核空间，与损失解耦；并行架构可避免。增加特征映射层比增加可训练块在提升Jacobian QFIM特征值谱上更有效，且达到R²≥0.95时参数减少1.6-2.2倍。
AI.conclusion: 固定编码预算下，架构形状对可训练性有决定影响；增加特征映射层是更高效的参数增长策略，而可训练块仅通过经典插值机制改善训练，无量子特有优势。

title: FunctionalAgent: Towards end-to-end on-top functional design
summary: Multiconfiguration pair-density functional theory (MC-PDFT) offers an efficient and accurate framework for computing electronic energies in strongly correlated molecular systems, with the quality of the on-top functional being a key determinant of its predictive accuracy. Here we introduce FunctionalAgent, an agentic system for fully automated functional development. FunctionalAgent orchestrates a team of specialized sub-agents to decompose the development process into dataset construction, active-space generation, MCSCF calculation and descriptor generation, loss-function construction, and functional fitting, optimization, and evaluation, thereby linking all stages into a closed-loop automated workflow. Using FunctionalAgent, we developed MC26, a hybrid meta-GGA on-top functional that achieves improved overall accuracy on the training set compared with other methods evaluated on the same benchmark dataset. We further introduce COF26, a new functional form that, owing to the optimized training process, achieves the best performance on both the training and test sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FunctionalAgent，一个用于自动化开发多构型对密度泛函理论（MC-PDFT）中on-top泛函的智能体系统，并开发了MC26和COF26两种新型泛函。
AI.motivation: MC-PDFT中on-top泛函的质量直接影响计算精度，但传统泛函开发过程复杂、耗时，需要大量人工干预，因此需要自动化系统来加速和优化这一过程。
AI.method: FunctionalAgent是一个多智能体系统，包含多个专业子智能体，分别负责数据集构建、活性空间生成、MCSCF计算与描述符生成、损失函数构建、以及泛函拟合、优化与评估，形成闭环自动化工作流。
AI.result: 开发了混合meta-GGA型on-top泛函MC26，在训练集上取得了优于其他方法的整体精度；进一步提出了新泛函形式COF26，在训练集和测试集上均达到最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: FunctionalAgent实现了泛函开发的全流程自动化，证明了智能体系统在计算化学领域加速科学发现的潜力。

title: When to Trust Imagination: Adaptive Action Execution for World Action Models
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by jointly predicting future visual observations and future actions. However, current WAMs typically execute a fixed number of predicted actions after each model inference, leaving the robot blind to whether the imagined future remains consistent with the actual physical rollout. In this work, we formulate adaptive WAM execution as a future-reality verification problem: the robot should execute longer when the WAM-predicted future remains reliable, and replan earlier when reality deviates from imagination. To this end, we propose Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC), a lightweight verifier that jointly reasons over predicted future actions, predicted visual dynamics, real observations, and language instructions to estimate whether the remaining action rollout can still be trusted. FFDC enables adaptive action chunk sizes as an emergent consequence of prediction-observation consistency, preserving the efficiency of long-horizon execution while restoring responsiveness in contact-rich or difficult phases. We further introduce Mixture-of-Horizon Training to improve long-horizon trajectory coverage for adaptive execution. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark and in the real world demonstrate that our method achieves a strong robustness-efficiency trade-off: on RoboTwin, it reduces WAM forward passes by 69.10% and execution time by 34.02%, while improving success rate by 2.54% over the short-chunk baseline; in real-world experiments, it improves success rate by 35%.

AI.tldr: 提出FFDC轻量级验证器，通过预测-现实一致性检查实现自适应动作执行，在机器人操控中同时提升效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有World Action Models在执行固定数量的预测动作后，机器人在实际物理 rollout 过程中对预测未来是否与真实一致缺乏感知，导致在接触密集或困难阶段响应不足。
AI.method: 提出Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC)轻量验证器，联合推理预测动作、预测视觉动态、真实观测和语言指令，判断剩余动作是否可信；并引入Mixture-of-Horizon Training改进长程轨迹覆盖。
AI.result: RoboTwin基准上：WAM前向传播减少69.10%，执行时间减少34.02%，成功率提升2.54%；真实实验中成功率提升35%。
AI.conclusion: 通过预测-观测一致性检查实现了自适应动作块大小的涌现，在保持长程执行效率的同时恢复接触密集或困难阶段的响应能力。

title: TabCF: Distributional Control Function Estimation with Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Instrumental variable (IV) and control function (CF) methods are powerful tools for causal effect estimation in the presence of unmeasured confounding, yet most existing approaches target only mean effects and/or demand substantial fitting and tuning effort. In this paper, we introduce a simple method, TabCF, for control function regression using tabular foundation models, which enables accurate, fast, identification-transparent, and tuning-light causal estimation of distributional quantities, such as interventional means and quantiles; we also propose a copula-based approximation for multivariate outcomes. TabCF performs favorably against representative methods across a broad range of small- to medium-sized synthetic and real data scenarios. The central message is two-fold: for practitioners, it highlights that TabCF is an effective tool for distributional causal inference; for researchers, it suggests that the proposed approach could be considered a strong baseline for future method development. Code is available at https://github.com/GepingChen/TabCF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TabCF方法，利用表格基础模型进行控制函数回归，实现快速、准确、无需繁琐调参的分布级因果效应估计（如均值、分位数），并使用Copula近似处理多变量结果。
AI.motivation: 现有工具变量/控制函数方法大多仅估计均值效应，且需要大量拟合与调参工作，缺乏一个简单、高效且能估计分布级因果量的方法。
AI.method: 利用表格基础模型进行控制函数回归（TabCF），结合Copula近似处理多变量输出，实现轻量调参的分布因果推断。
AI.result: 在多种合成和真实数据场景下，TabCF在估计介入均值和分位数等分布量方面优于代表性方法。
AI.conclusion: TabCF对实践者是有效的分布因果推断工具，对研究者可视为未来方法开发的强基线。

title: Gaussian mixture models in Hilbert spaces via kernel methods
summary: Modern datasets across many disciplines increasingly consist of time-evolving, potentially infinite-dimensional random objects, such as dynamic functional data, which are naturally modeled in Hilbert spaces. In these settings, characterizing probability measures, for example, through densities, can be ill-defined or technically challenging. Motivated by clustering applications, we propose a Gaussian mixture framework for Hilbert-space-valued data based on kernel mean embeddings and develop efficient optimization algorithms for estimation. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm is well defined and that the model yields a dense class of approximations in infinite-dimensional spaces. We evaluate the framework through extensive experiments on diverse structures and data geometries, including $L^2$-functional data and random graphs in Laplacian spaces arising in modern medical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核均值嵌入的高斯混合模型框架，用于处理希尔伯特空间中的动态函数数据（如时变随机对象），并开发了高效优化算法，通过理论保证和实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集（如动态函数数据、随机图）往往是时变且无限维的，传统的概率密度刻画方法在希尔伯特空间中难以定义或技术复杂，缺乏有效的聚类分析工具。
AI.method: 基于核均值嵌入（kernel mean embeddings）构建高斯混合模型，适用于希尔伯特空间值数据，并设计了高效的优化估计算法。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多种数据结构（包括L²函数数据和随机图拉普拉斯空间数据）上的有效性，且理论证明了算法的良好定义性及模型在无限维空间中的稠密逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为希尔伯特空间中的动态/无限维随机对象提供了可行的聚类方案，在医学等现代应用中具有潜力。

title: Relay Buffer Independent Communication over Pooled HBM for Efficient MoE Inference on Ascend
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) inference requires large-scale token exchange across devices, making dispatch and combine major bottlenecks in both prefill and decode. Beyond network transfer, routing-driven layout transformation, temporary relay, and output restoration can add substantial overhead. Existing MoE communication paths are often buffer-centric, using explicit inter-process relay and reordering buffers around collective transfer. This report presents a relay-buffer-free communication design for MoE inference acceleration on Ascend systems. The design reorganizes dispatch and combine around direct placement into destination expert windows and direct reading from remote expert windows. Built on globally pooled high-bandwidth memory and symmetric-memory allocation, it removes most intermediate relay and reordering buffers while retaining only lightweight control state, including counts, offsets, and synchronization metadata. We instantiate the design as two schedules for the main phases of MoE inference: a prefill schedule with richer planning state for throughput-oriented execution, and a compact decode schedule for latency-sensitive execution. Experiments on Ascend-based MoE workloads show reduced dispatch and combine latency in both settings. At the serving level, the implementation improves time to first token (TTFT), preserves competitive time per output token (TPOT), and enlarges the feasible scheduling space under practical latency constraints. These results indicate that, on platforms with globally addressable device memory, reducing intermediate buffering and output restoration around expert execution is an effective direction for accelerating MoE inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对昇腾系统的无中继缓冲区MoE通信设计，通过全局高带宽内存和对称内存分配，将调度和合并操作直接放置/读取到专家窗口，消除了大部分中间中继和重排序缓冲区，在预填充和解码阶段均降低了延迟，改善了TTFT并保持了竞争力的TPOT。
AI.motivation: MoE推理中，跨设备的token交换导致调度和合并成为预填充和解码阶段的主要瓶颈，现有的基于缓冲区的通信路径引入了大量中间中继和重排序开销。
AI.method: 提出无中继缓冲区的通信设计，利用全局高带宽内存和对称内存分配，实现直接放置到目标专家窗口和直接从远程专家窗口读取，仅保留轻量级控制状态（计数、偏移量、同步元数据）。针对预填充和解码阶段分别设计了两种调度方案。
AI.result: 在昇腾MoE workload上，调度和合并延迟降低；服务层面TTFT改善，TPOT保持竞争力，扩展了实际延迟约束下的可行调度空间。
AI.conclusion: 在具有全局可寻址设备内存的平台上，减少专家执行周围的中间缓冲和输出恢复是加速MoE推理的有效方向。

title: OBLIQ-Bench: Exposing Overlooked Bottlenecks in Modern Retrievers with Latent and Implicit Queries
summary: Retrieval benchmarks are increasingly saturating, but we argue that efficient search is far from a solved problem. We identify a class of queries we call oblique, which seek documents that instantiate a latent pattern, like finding all tweets that express an implicit stance, chat logs that demonstrate a particular failure mode, or transcripts that match an abstract scenario. We study three mechanisms through which obliqueness may arise and introduce OBLIQ-Bench, a suite of five oblique search problems over real long-tail corpora. OBLIQ-Bench exposes an overlooked asymmetry between retrieval and verification, where reasoning LLMs reliably recognize latent relevance whenever relevant documents are surfaced, but even sophisticated retrieval pipelines fail to surface most relevant documents in the first place. We hope that OBLIQ-Bench will drive research into retrieval architectures that efficiently capture latent patterns and implicit signals in large corpora.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Oblique Query概念（需要识别隐式模式的一类查询），构建OBLIQ-Bench基准测试套件，发现检索与验证之间存在不对称性——推理型LLM能识别相关文档但检索管道无法高效召回，呼吁研究能捕获隐式信号的检索架构。
AI.motivation: 现有检索基准趋于饱和，但实际中存在一类"oblique queries"（隐式查询），需要挖掘文档中潜藏的抽象模式/隐式立场，这类问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 识别obliqueness产生的三种机制，构建包含五个真实长尾语料库上oblique搜索问题的OBLIQ-Bench基准，系统对比各类检索管道与推理型LLM的表现。
AI.result: 推理型LLM在验证阶段能可靠识别隐式相关性，但现有检索管道即使先进的也大多无法召回相关文档，揭示了retrieval与verification间的显著不对称性。
AI.conclusion: 检索远未解决，需要设计能高效捕获隐式模式和潜在信号的新型检索架构，OBLIQ-Bench为相关研究提供了基准。

title: Correcting heterogeneous diagnostic bias when developing clinical prediction models using causal hidden Markov models
summary:
In routine care, individuals identified a priori as high-risk are usually tested for conditions more frequently. Protected attributes, such as sex or ethnicity may also determine testing frequency. Such heterogeneous detection rates across a population induce label error. This causes systematic model error for specific groups and biases performance metrics during validation.
  This paper proposes a method to correct for such bias in prediction models due to differential diagnostic delay. We use a causal inference framework to define our target estimand: an individual's diagnosis probability in a counterfactual scenario where their diagnosis rate matches that of a reference group. We model the longitudinal process as a hidden Markov model, in which confirmatory test results are emissions from a latent progressive disease stage. We validate our approach in simulated data and apply it to a case study of chronic kidney disease prediction using electronic health records.
  In simulations, our method reduces prediction bias and improves calibration-in-the-large, correcting the Observed:Expected ratio in the underdiagnosed group from 1.34 (standard deviation: 0.09) in a model developed without any correction for underdiagnosis bias to 1.02 (0.09). Violations of assumptions in the simulation affected the estimation of model parameters, but the proposed approach nonetheless remained better calibrated than the standard model. In the clinical case study, we identify diabetes as the main driver of observability, with an odds ratio of 10.36 (95% confidence interval, 9.80 - 11.02) in 6-month urine albumin-creatinine ratio testing rate. Using our approach to predict the counterfactual diagnostic rate in patients without diabetes, we improved the Observed:Expected ratio of a developed clinical prediction model from 1.55 (1.51 - 1.59) to 1.01 (0.98 - 1.04).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果推断的偏差校正方法，通过隐马尔可夫模型处理因检测率差异导致的预测模型偏差，并在慢性肾脏病预测中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 在常规医疗中，高风险人群和特定群体（如不同性别、种族）检测频率不同，导致标签误差，进而造成预测模型对某些群体产生系统性偏差，并影响性能评估的公正性。现有方法未能有效纠正这种因诊断延迟差异带来的偏差。
AI.method: 采用因果推断框架定义目标估计量：在反事实场景下（即个体检测率与参考组相同）的诊断概率。将纵向诊断过程建模为隐马尔可夫模型，其中确认性检测结果作为潜在疾病进展阶段的发射量。通过模拟数据和真实电子健康记录案例进行验证。
AI.result: 模拟实验中，校正后低诊断组的Observed:Expected比率从1.34改善至1.02。临床案例中，发现糖尿病是检测率的主要驱动因素（OR=10.36），校正后预测模型的O:E比率从1.55改善至1.01。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效减少因诊断延迟差异导致的预测偏差，改善模型的校准度，即使部分假设被违反仍比标准模型更稳健。

title: PoTAcc: A Pipeline for End-to-End Acceleration of Power-of-Two Quantized DNNs
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Artificial Intelligence (TCASAI), 2026
summary:
Power-of-two (PoT) quantization significantly reduces the size of deep neural networks (DNNs) and replaces multiplications with bit-shift operations for inference. Prior work has shown that PoT-quantized DNNs can preserve accuracy for tasks such as image classification; however, their performance on resource-constrained edge devices remains insufficiently understood. While general-purpose edge CPUs and GPUs do not provide optimized backends for bit-shift operations, custom hardware accelerators can better exploit PoT quantization by implementing dedicated shift-based processing elements. However, deploying PoT-quantized models on such accelerators is challenging due to limited support in existing inference frameworks. In addition, the impact of different PoT quantization strategies on hardware design, performance, and energy efficiency during full inference has not been systematically explored.
  To address these challenges, we propose PoTAcc, an open-source end-to-end pipeline for accelerating and evaluating PoT-quantized DNNs on resource-constrained edge devices. PoTAcc enables seamless preparation and deployment of PoT-quantized models via TensorFlow Lite (TFLite) across heterogeneous platforms, including CPU-only systems and hybrid CPU-FPGA systems with custom accelerators. We design shift-based processing element (shift-PE) accelerators for three PoT quantization methods and implement them on two FPGA platforms. We evaluate accuracy, performance, energy efficiency, and resource utilization across a range of models, including CNNs and Transformer-based architectures. Results show that our CPU-accelerator design achieves up to 3.6x speedup and 78% energy reduction compared to CPU-only execution for PoT-quantized DNNs on PYNQ-Z2 and Kria boards. The code will be publicly released at https://github.com/gicLAB/PoTAcc

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PoTAcc，一个用于在资源受限边缘设备上加速和评估 Power-of-two (PoT) 量化 DNN 的开源端到端流水线，支持 CPU 和 CPU-FPGA 混合系统。实验表明，相比纯 CPU 执行，加速器设计在 PYNQ-Z2 和 Kria 开发板上可实现最高 3.6 倍加速和 78% 能效提升。
AI.motivation: PoT 量化虽能减小模型体积并以移位操作替代乘法，但现有工作对其在资源受限边缘设备上的性能理解不足：通用 CPU/GPU 缺乏对移位操作的优化后端，而定制加速器又面临推理框架支持有限的问题，且不同 PoT 量化策略对硬件设计的影响尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 提出 PoTAcc 开源端到端流水线：1）通过 TensorFlow Lite 实现 PoT 量化模型的准备与跨平台部署；2）针对三种 PoT 量化方法设计基于移位处理单元（shift-PE）的加速器；3）在 PYNQ-Z2 和 Kria 两个 FPGA 平台上实现 CPU 与 FPGA 混合系统。
AI.result: 在包含 CNN 和 Transformer 的多个模型上实验，CPU-加速器混合设计相比纯 CPU 执行实现最高 3.6 倍速度提升和 78% 能效降低。
AI.conclusion: PoTAcc 有效填补了 PoT 量化从算法到边缘硬件部署的空白，展示了定制移位加速器在资源受限设备上的显著性能与能效优势。

title: Time-Inhomogeneous Preconditioned Langevin Dynamics
summary: Langevin sampling from distributions of the form $p(x) \propto \exp(-Ψ(x))$ faces two major challenges: (global) mode coverage and (local) mode exploration. The first challenge is particularly relevant for multi-modal distributions with disjoint modes, whereas the second arises when the potential $Ψ$ exhibits diverse and ill-conditioned local mode geometry. To address these challenges, a common approach is to precondition Langevin dynamics with problem-specific information, such as the sample covariance or the local curvature of $Ψ$. However, existing preconditioner choices inherently involve a trade-off between global mode coverage and local mode exploration, and no prior method resolves both simultaneously. To overcome this limitation, we propose the TIPreL, which introduces a time- and position-dependent preconditioner. This design effectively addresses both challenges mentioned above within a single framework. We establish convergence of the resulting dynamics in the Wasserstein-2 distance both in continuous time and for a tamed Euler discretization. In particular, our analysis extends the existing state of the art by proving convergence under time- and space-dependent diffusion coefficients, and only locally Lipschitz drifts, which has not been covered by prior work. Finally, we experimentally compare TIPreL with competing preconditioning schemes on a two-dimensional, severely ill-posed example and on a Bayesian logistic regression task in higher dimensions, confirming the efficiency of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIPreL方法，通过引入时间和位置依赖的预条件子，同时解决Langevin采样中的全局模式覆盖和局部模式探索两大挑战，并在连续时间和离散化设置下证明其收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有Langevin采样的预条件方法在全局模式覆盖和局部模式探索之间存在权衡，无法同时解决这两个问题。作者旨在设计一种能兼顾两者的单框架方法。
AI.method: 提出TIPreL（Time- and Position-dependent Preconditioned Langevin），使用时间和位置依赖的预条件子。在理论上，证明了Wasserstein-2距离下的收敛性，且分析适用于时变和空变扩散系数以及局部Lipschitz漂移项。
AI.result: 在二维严重病态问题和更高维度的贝叶斯逻辑回归任务上，TIPreL优于其他预条件方案。
AI.conclusion: TIPreL通过时间和位置依赖的预条件策略，成功弥合了全局模式覆盖与局部模式探索之间的鸿沟，并在理论上扩展了现有收敛分析的范围。

title: Diffusion model for SU(N) gauge theories
summary: Implicit score matching provides a computationally efficient approach for training diffusion models and generating high-quality samples from complex distributions. In this work, we develop a score-matching framework for SU(N) lattice gauge theories, which can be extended to other Lie groups. We apply the method to SU(3) gauge configurations with the Wilson gauge action in two and four dimensions and assess the quality of the generated samples by comparison with Hybrid Monte Carlo (HMC) simulations. We show that the diffusion models can be successfully trained and applied for sampling the Wilson gauge action. For large values of inverse coupling, accurate reverse-time integration requires predictor-corrector schemes, for which we introduce a corrector based on Hamiltonian molecular dynamics. While the corrector significantly improves sampling quality, it also increases the computational cost. We outline several strategies for improving sampling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于隐式分数匹配的扩散模型框架，用于SU(N)晶格规范场论（特别是SU(3)）。在二维和四维Wilson规范作用下，模型能成功采样，但大逆耦合时需要哈密顿动力学校正器，虽提升质量但增加计算成本。
AI.motivation: 将扩散模型（基于隐式分数匹配）应用于晶格规范场论中的SU(N)群采样，探索比传统混合蒙特卡洛（HMC）更高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 使用隐式分数匹配训练扩散模型；对于大逆耦合区域，引入基于哈密顿分子动力学的预测-校正方案以改进反向时间积分精度。
AI.result: 扩散模型成功训练并对Wilson规范作用采样；校正器显著提升采样质量，但计算成本增加；提出了若干提升采样效率的策略。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在晶格规范场论采样中有潜力，但效率和校正器开销仍需优化，未来可扩展到其他李群。

title: Correct Code, Vulnerable Dependencies: A Large Scale Measurement Study of LLM-Specified Library Versions
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are now largely involved in software development workflows, and the code they generate routinely includes third-party library (TPL) imports annotated with specific version identifiers. These version choices can carry security and compatibility risks, yet they have not been systematically studied.
  We present the first large-scale measurement study of version-level risk in LLM-generated Python code, evaluating 10 LLMs on PinTrace, a curated benchmark of 1,000 Stack Overflow programming tasks. LLMs tend to specify version identifiers when directly prompted at 26.83%-95.18%, while down to 6.45%-59.19% in creating a manifest file directly. Among the specified versions, 36.70%-55.70% of tasks contain at least one known CVE, and 62.75%-74.51% of them carry Critical or High severity ratings. In 72.27%-91.37% of cases, the associated CVEs were publicly disclosed before the model's knowledge cutoff. The statistics show all models converge on the same small set of risky release versions, indicating a systemic bias rather than isolated model error. Static compatibility rates range from 19.70% to 63.20%, with installation failure as the dominant cause. The dynamic test cases confirm the pattern by 6.49%-48.62% pass rates. Further experiments confirm that these failures are attributable to version selection rather than code quality, and that externally anchored version constraints substantially reduce both vulnerability exposure and compatibility failures. Our findings reveal LLM version selection as a first-class, previously overlooked risk surface in LLM-based development. We disclosed these findings to the community of the evaluated models, and several confirmed the issue. All the code and dataset have been released for open science at https://github.com/dw763j/PinTrace.

AI.tldr: 首次大规模测量研究LLM生成的Python代码中第三方库版本选择的安全与兼容性风险。10个LLM在1000个编程任务上，36.70%-55.70%的任务包含已知CVE，72.27%-91.37%的漏洞在模型知识截止前已公开。模型存在系统性偏差，倾向于选择相同的风险版本。
AI.motivation: LLM被广泛用于代码生成，但生成的第三方库版本选择可能带来安全与兼容性风险，这一问题此前未被系统研究。
AI.method: 构建PinTrace基准（1000个Stack Overflow任务），评估10个LLM的版本选择行为，结合静态漏洞匹配（CVE数据库）和动态兼容性测试，并引入外部锚定约束进行对比实验。
AI.result: LLM指定版本标识的比例为26.83%-95.18%；36.70%-55.70%的任务包含已知CVE，其中62.75%-74.51%为严重或高危；模型存在系统性偏差；动态通过率仅6.49%-48.62%。外部锚定版本约束能显著降低风险。
AI.conclusion: LLM版本选择是一个被忽视的一流风险面，而非孤立模型错误，建议引入外部版本约束来缓解风险。

title: A Topological Sorting Criterion for Random Causal Directed Acyclic Graphs
summary: Random directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) based on imposing an order on Erdős-Rényi and scale free random graphs are widely used for evaluating causal discovery algorithms. We show that in such DAGs, the set of nodes reachable via open paths, termed relatives, increases monotonically along the causal order. We assess the prevalence of this pattern numerically, and demonstrate that it can be exploited for causal order recovery via sorting by the estimated number of relatives. We note that many simulations in the literature feature settings where this yields an excellent proxy for the causal order, and show that a strict increase of relatives along the causal order leads to a singular Markov equivalence class. We propose sampling time-series DAGs as a possible alternative and discuss implications for causal discovery algorithms and their evaluation on synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 本文发现在基于Erdős-Rényi和无标度随机图生成的随机DAG中，沿着因果顺序的节点可达集（称为"亲属"）单调递增。这一模式可被利用来通过估计亲属数量进行排序恢复因果顺序，且该模式在模拟中效果显著，但会导致马尔可夫等价类奇异。作者提出采样时间序列DAG作为替代方案。
AI.motivation: 评估因果发现算法时广泛使用随机DAG作为基准，但作者发现这类合成数据存在系统性偏差（亲属随因果顺序单调递增），这可能导致因果发现算法在合成数据上的性能评估不可靠，需要揭示并解决这一问题。
AI.method: 理论分析证明亲属单调递增性质，数值实验评估该模式的普遍性，并展示如何利用排序亲属数量恢复因果顺序。进一步分析该性质导致的马尔可夫等价类奇异问题，提出时间序列DAG作为替代方案。
AI.result: 验证了随机DAG中亲属沿因果顺序单调递增的模式普遍存在；该模式可用于有效恢复因果顺序；但该性质导致马尔可夫等价类奇异，影响因果发现算法的公平评估。
AI.conclusion: 当前广泛使用的随机DAG合成数据存在结构偏差，可能高估因果发现算法的性能。建议采用时间序列DAG等替代方案来更公平地评估算法。

title: Multimodal Deep Generative Model for Semi-Supervised Learning under Class Imbalance
summary: When modeling class-imbalanced data, it is crucial to address the imbalance, as models trained on such data tend to be biased towards the majority classes. This problem is amplified under partial supervision, where pseudo-labels for unlabeled data are predicted based on imbalanced labeled data, propagating the bias. While recent semi-supervised models address class imbalance, they typically assume single-modal input data. However, with the growing availability of multimodal data, it is essential to leverage complementary modalities. In this article, we propose a multimodal deep generative model for semi-supervised learning under class imbalance. Our approach uses separate encoders for each modality, sharing latent variables across modalities, and simplifies joint posterior computation with a product-of-experts method. To further address class imbalance, we replace typical Gaussian distributions with Student's t-distributions for the prior, encoder, and decoder, better capturing the heavy-tailed latent distributions in imbalanced data. We derive a new objective function for training the proposed model on both labeled and unlabeled data using $γ$-power divergence. Empirical results on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms baseline methods in generalization, achieving superior classification performance for partially labeled multimodal data with imbalanced class distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态深度生成模型，用于解决类别不平衡下的半监督学习问题。模型采用各模态独立编码器、共享潜变量、product-of-experts联合后验计算，并用Student's t分布替代高斯分布处理不平衡数据的长尾分布，通过γ-幂散度构建目标函数。在基准和真实数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督模型虽能处理类别不平衡，但通常假设输入为单模态数据。随着多模态数据日益丰富，需要利用互补模态信息来提升不平衡场景下半监督学习的性能。
AI.method: 1) 各模态使用独立编码器，通过共享潜变量跨模态对齐；2) 采用product-of-experts方法简化联合后验计算；3) 使用Student's t分布替代高斯分布作为先验、编码器和解码器的分布假设，更好拟合不平衡数据的重尾特性；4) 基于γ-幂散度设计新的目标函数，同时利用有标签和无标签数据训练。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和真实世界数据集上，该模型在泛化能力上优于基线方法，对部分标注的多模态不平衡数据实现了更优的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: Student's t分布和γ-幂散度能够有效应对多模态数据中的类别不平衡问题，多模态深度生成模型在半监督不平衡学习场景具有显著优势。

title: Expressivity of Bi-Lipschitz Normalizing Flows: A Score-Based Diffusion Perspective
summary: Many normalizing flow architectures impose regularity constraints, yet their distributional approximation properties are not fully characterized. We study the expressivity of bi-Lipschitz normalizing flows through the lens of score-based diffusion models. For the probability flow ODE of a variance-preserving diffusion, Lipschitz regularity of the score induces a flow of bi-Lipschitz diffeomorphic transport maps. This ODE bridge allows us to analyze the distributional approximation power of bi-Lipschitz normalizing flows and, conversely, derive deterministic convergence guarantees for diffusion-based transport. Our key idea is to use the probability flow ODE to link regularity of the score to regularity of the induced transport maps. We verify score regularity for broad target densities, including compactly supported densities, Gaussian convolutions of compactly supported measures and finite Gaussian mixtures. We obtain a universal distributional approximation result: Gaussian pullbacks induced by bi-Lipschitz variance-preserving transport maps are $L^1$-dense among all probability densities. For Gaussian convolution targets, we further obtain convergence in Kullback-Leibler divergence without early stopping.

AI.tldr: 本文研究双Lipschitz正则化归一化流(Normalizing Flows)的表达能力，通过分数扩散模型的视角，证明双Lipschitz方差保持输运映射诱导的高斯拉回在概率密度空间中是L^1稠密的，为扩散模型的确定性收敛提供理论基础。
AI.motivation: 归一化流架构通常施加正则性约束（如双Lipschitz条件），但其分布逼近性质尚未被充分刻画。本文旨在从扩散模型的视角系统分析此类正则化流的表达能力。
AI.method: 利用方差保持(Variance-Preserving)扩散的概率流ODE，建立分数函数的Lipschitz正则性与诱导输运映射的双Lipschitz微分同胚性质之间的联系。通过分析分数正则性在紧支撑密度、高斯卷积及有限高斯混合等广泛目标密度上的成立性，推导分布逼近性质。
AI.result: 1) 双Lipschitz方差保持输运映射诱导的高斯拉回在L^1范数下在所有概率密度中稠密（通用逼近）；2) 对于高斯卷积目标，无需早期停止即可获得KL散度下的收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: 建立了正则化归一化流与扩散模型之间的理论桥梁，证明了双Lipschitz约束下归一化流具有强大的分布逼近能力，同时为扩散模型提供了确定性收敛保证。

title: Teaching LLMs Program Semantics via Symbolic Execution Traces
summary: We introduce an evaluation framework of 500 C verification tasks across five property types (memory safety, overflow, termination, reachability, data races) built on SV-COMP 2025, and evaluate 14 models across six families. We find that high overall accuracy masks a critical weakness: while most models reliably confirm properties hold, violation detection varies widely and degrades sharply with program length. To close this gap, we train on formal verification artifacts: running the Soteria symbolic execution engine on generic open-source C code and using the resulting traces for continued pretraining of Qwen3-8B. Just ${\sim}$3,000 bug traces combined with chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time improve violation detection by over 17 percentage points, producing one of the most balanced accuracy profiles among evaluated models. On violation detection, the trained 8B model outperforms the 4$\times$ larger Qwen3-32B without thinking and approaches it in overall accuracy. The interaction between trace training and chain-of-thought is superadditive: neither alone provides meaningful gains, but their combination does. Improvements transfer across all five property types, including ones the training traces do not target. Our 28 configurations confirm the gains stem from trace semantics, not code volume, and that trace curation and format matter.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个包含500个C语言验证任务的评估框架，发现大模型在违规检测方面存在严重短板。通过使用符号执行引擎生成的验证轨迹对Qwen3-8B进行持续预训练，并结合思维链推理，将违规检测准确率提升超过17个百分点，使8B模型在违规检测上超越未使用思维链的Qwen3-32B。轨迹训练与思维链的结合具有超加性效应。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在程序验证任务中总体准确率看似不错，但掩盖了违规检测能力严重不足的问题，且随着程序长度增加性能急剧下降。作者希望弥合模型在"确认属性成立"与"检测违规"之间的能力差距。
AI.method: 基于SV-COMP 2025构建500个C验证任务（涵盖内存安全、溢出、终止、可达性、数据竞争五类属性），评估14个模型。对Qwen3-8B进行持续预训练：使用Soteria符号执行引擎在通用开源C代码上运行，生成验证轨迹（约3000条bug轨迹），并在推理时结合思维链推理。
AI.result: 轨迹训练+思维链使违规检测提升17个百分点以上；训练的8B模型在违规检测上超越未使用思维链的4倍大模型Qwen3-32B，总体准确率接近；轨迹训练与思维链的组合具有超加性效应（单独使用无效）；改进跨五种属性类型泛化，包括训练数据未涉及的类型；28组消融实验确认增益来自轨迹语义而非代码量。
AI.conclusion: 使用形式化验证轨迹进行持续预训练，结合思维链推理，是提升大模型程序违规检测能力的有效方法，且具有跨属性类型的泛化能力。轨迹的语义内容和格式对效果至关重要。

title: Predictive-Generative Drift Decomposition for Speech Enhancement and Separation
summary: We propose a plug-and-play framework for speech enhancement and separation that augments predictive methods with a generative speech prior. Our approach, termed Stochastic Interpolant Prior for Speech (SIPS), builds on stochastic interpolants and leverages their flexibility to bridge predictive and generative modeling. Specifically, we decompose the interpolation dynamics into a task-specific drift and a stochastic denoising component, allowing a predictive estimate to be integrated directly into the generative sampling process. This results in a mathematically grounded framework for combining strong pretrained predictors with the expressive power of generative models. To this end, we train a score model using only clean speech, yielding a degradation-agnostic prior that can be reused across tasks. During inference, the predictor provides a deterministic drift that steers the sampling process toward a task-consistent estimate, while the score model preserves perceptual naturalness. Unlike prior hybrid approaches, which typically rely on architecture-specific conditioning and are tied to particular predictors or degradation settings, SIPS provides a unified framework that generalizes across predictors and additive degradation tasks. We demonstrate its effectiveness for both speech enhancement and speech separation using recent predictors such as SEMamba and FlexIO. The proposed method consistently improves perceptual quality, achieving gains up +1.0 NISQA for speech separation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIPS框架，通过随机插值将预测性方法与生成式语音先验结合，实现语音增强与分离，具有即插即用、任务无关、保持感知质量的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有预测性方法（如SEMamba）在语音增强/分离任务中缺乏生成先验的感知自然性，而生成模型又难以直接针对特定任务优化。作者希望桥接这两类方法的优势。
AI.method: 基于随机插值（stochastic interpolants）框架，将插值动力学分解为任务特定的漂移项（由预测模型提供）和随机去噪项（由干净语音训练的分数模型提供）。预测模型提供确定性引导，分数模型保持感知自然度。
AI.result: 在语音增强和语音分离任务上，SIPS显著提升了感知质量，例如在语音分离任务中NISQA指标提升最高达+1.0。
AI.conclusion: SIPS是一个统一、即插即用的混合框架，能泛化到不同预测器和加性退化任务，在保持任务一致性的同时显著改善感知质量。

title: When Does Trimming Help Conformal Prediction? A Retained-Law Diagnostic under Calibration Contamination
summary: Trimming suspicious calibration points is a common response to contamination in conformal prediction. Its effect on clean-target coverage, however, is governed by the retained law induced by trimming, not by the contamination level alone. We analyse fixed-threshold trimming as conditioning rather than purification. It replaces the contaminated calibration law with a retained law, reducing clean-target coverage to a one-dimensional score-CDF transfer problem with an exact finite-sample identity. A componentwise bound on the transfer gap gives a population-level diagnostic. This separates a clean-side covariance cost from a retained-contamination cost, governed by the dirty-to-clean retention ratio. Trimming helps when the anomaly score separates retention probabilities while remaining score-neutral on the clean population. Otherwise, it cannot substantially reduce contamination through the retained mixture coefficient. We also give finite-sample certificate templates that provide numerical guarantees under independent audit.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在保形预测中剔除可疑校准点对干净目标覆盖率的影响，提出将固定阈值剔除视为条件化而非净化，并给出了有限样本下的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有保形预测方法在应对数据污染时常用剔除策略，但剔除对干净目标覆盖率的影响机制未被充分理解。作者希望从理论层面澄清剔除的本质及其效果边界。
AI.method: 将固定阈值剔除重新解释为条件化操作而非简单净化，推导出干净目标覆盖率与保留分布之间的有限样本恒等式，并给出组件级别的转移差距上界。
AI.result: 剔除非总能减少污染，其效果取决于异常评分是否能分离保留概率且对干净群体保持评分中性；否则无法通过保留混合系数实质降低污染。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个清洁侧协方差成本与保留污染成本的分解框架，并给出了有限样本下的证书模板，为独立审计提供数值保证。

title: Fine-Tuning Small Language Models for Solution-Oriented Windows Event Log Analysis
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for event log analysis, but their high computational requirements, reliance on cloud infrastructure, and security concerns limit practical deployment. In addition, most existing approaches focus only on the identification of the problem and do not provide actionable remediation. Small language models (SLMs) present a light-weight alternative that can be fine-tuned for a specific purpose and hosted locally. This paper investigates whether SLMs, when fine-tuned for a specific task, can serve as a practical alternative for event log analysis while also generating solutions. We first create a large-scale synthetic Windows event log dataset that contains remediation actions using a high-performing LLM. We then fine-tune multiple SLMs and LLMs using the LoRA parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique and evaluate their performance by comparing with expert assessment. The results show that the dataset accurately reflects real-world scenarios and that fine-tuned SLMs consistently outperform LLMs in identifying issues and providing relevant remediation, while requiring fewer computational resources.

AI.tldr: 本文研究小语言模型（SLMs）在事件日志分析中的应用，通过LoRA微调使其在识别问题和提供修复方案上超越大语言模型（LLMs），且计算资源需求更低。
AI.motivation: LLMs用于事件日志分析存在计算成本高、依赖云基础设施、安全隐患等问题，且现有方法仅识别问题而不提供修复方案。因此探索SLMs作为轻量级本地部署的替代方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用高性能LLM生成包含修复动作的大规模合成Windows事件日志数据集；2) 使用LoRA参数高效微调技术微调多个SLMs和LLMs；3) 通过专家评估比较性能。
AI.result: 数据集准确反映真实场景；微调后的SLMs在识别问题和提供修复方案上一致优于LLMs，且所需计算资源更少。
AI.conclusion: SLMs经过任务特定微调后，可作为事件日志分析的实用替代方案，兼具高效性和可部署性。

title: CoupleEvo: Evolving Heuristics for Coupled Optimization Problems Using Large Language Models
comment: accepted at GECCO 2026, San Jose, Costa Rica, Workshop
summary: Many real-world optimization problems consist of multiple tightly coupled subproblems whose solutions must be coordinated to achieve high overall performance. However, existing large language model driven automated heuristic design approaches are limited to single-problem settings. In this paper, we propose CoupleEvo. CoupleEvo proposes three evolutionary coordination strategies to evolve heuristics for coupled optimization problems: the sequential strategy evolves heuristics for one subproblem after the other; the iterative strategy alternates the evolution of heuristics for different subproblems over successive generations; and the integrated strategy evolves heuristics for all problems simultaneously. The approach is evaluated on two representative coupled optimization problems. Experimental results show that decomposition-based strategies (sequential and iterative) provide more stable convergence and higher solution quality, while the integrated evolution strategy suffers from increased search complexity and variability. These findings highlight the importance of coordinating evolutionary search across interdependent subproblems and demonstrate the potential of LLM-driven heuristic design for complex coupled optimization problems. The code is available: https://github.com/tb-git-kit-research/CoupleEvo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoupleEvo，一种利用大语言模型驱动演化算法来自动设计耦合优化问题启发式策略的方法，包含顺序、迭代和集成三种协调策略，实验表明分解式策略（顺序和迭代）比集成策略更稳定高效。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计方法仅适用于单问题场景，无法处理现实世界中多个紧密耦合的子问题需要协调优化的情形。
AI.method: 提出了三种演化协调策略：(1) 顺序策略——逐个优化子问题的启发式；(2) 迭代策略——在不同子问题间交替演化；(3) 集成策略——同时演化所有子问题的启发式。
AI.result: 在两类代表性耦合优化问题上，分解式策略（顺序和迭代）收敛更稳定、解质量更高，而集成策略面临搜索复杂度和变异性增大的问题。
AI.conclusion: 协调跨子问题的演化搜索对耦合优化至关重要，且LLM驱动的启发式设计在复杂耦合优化问题上具有潜力。

title: ConquerNet: Convolution-Smoothed Quantile ReLU Neural Networks with Minimax Guarantees
summary: Quantile regression is a fundamental tool for distributional learning but poses significant optimization challenges for deep models due to the non-smoothness of the pinball loss. We propose ConquerNet, a class of \textbf{con}volution-smoothed \textbf{qu}antil\textbf{e} \textbf{R}eLU neural \textbf{net}works, which yield smooth objectives while preserving the underlying quantile structure. We establish general nonasymptotic risk bounds for ConquerNet under mild conditions, providing minimax guarantees over Besov function classes. In numerical studies, we demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms standard quantile neural networks at multiple quantile levels, showing improved estimation accuracy and training efficiency across the board, with particularly pronounced advantages at high and low quantiles.

AI.tldr: ConquerNet通过卷积平滑处理解决分位数回归中pinball损失的非光滑优化难题，在保持分位数结构的同时实现平滑目标函数，理论上给出Besov类上的极小化最优保证，实验显示在高低分位数上显著优于标准神经网络方法。
AI.motivation: 分位数回归是分布学习的重要工具，但深度模型中pinball损失函数的非光滑性给优化带来了显著挑战，现有方法在训练效率和估计精度上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ConquerNet，即卷积平滑分位数ReLU神经网络，通过平滑技术将非光滑的pinball损失转化为光滑目标，同时保留分位数的结构特性。
AI.result: 在温和条件下建立了ConquerNet的非渐近风险界，给出了Besov函数类上的极小化最优保证；实验表明该方法在多个分位数水平上优于标准分位数神经网络，尤其在高、低分位数处优势更为突出。
AI.conclusion: 卷积平滑策略有效解决了分位数回归的优化难题，ConquerNet在估计精度和训练效率上均有显著提升。

title: Human-AI Co-Evolution and Epistemic Collapse: A Dynamical Systems Perspective
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, ICML EIML Workshop submitted
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are reshaping how knowledge is produced, with increasing reliance on AI systems for generation, summarization, and reasoning. While prior work has studied cognitive offloading in humans and model collapse in recursive training, these effects are typically considered in isolation. We propose a unified perspective: humans and language models form a coupled dynamical system linked by a feedback loop of usage, generation, and retraining. We introduce a minimal model with three variables -- human cognition, data quality, and model capability -- and show that this feedback can give rise to distinct dynamical regimes. Our analysis identifies three regimes: co-evolutionary enhancement, fragile equilibrium, and degenerative convergence. Through a simple simulation, we demonstrate that increasing reliance on AI can induce a transition toward a low-diversity, suboptimal equilibrium. From an information-theoretic perspective, this transition corresponds to an emergent information bottleneck in the human-AI loop, where entropy reduction reflects loss of diversity and support under closed-loop feedback rather than beneficial compression. These results suggest that the trajectory of AI systems is shaped not only by model design, but by the dynamics of human-AI co-evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出人机耦合动力系统视角，通过建模人类认知、数据质量和模型能力三者间的反馈循环，揭示了人机共同演化可能出现的三种动力学状态：协同进化增强、脆弱平衡和退化收敛，以及过度依赖AI会导致信息瓶颈和多样性丧失。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将人类认知卸载和模型递归训练崩溃视为孤立现象，缺乏统一视角理解人与AI在持续交互中的动态反馈机制。
AI.method: 构建包含人类认知、数据质量和模型能力三变量的最小动力学模型，通过信息论分析和模拟实验识别不同动力学状态。
AI.result: 识别出三种动力学状态：协同进化增强、脆弱平衡和退化收敛；过度依赖AI会导致低多样性、次优均衡；反馈循环中产生信息瓶颈，熵减少反映多样性丧失。
AI.conclusion: AI系统的发展轨迹不仅由模型设计决定，还受人类-AI共同演化动力学的深刻塑造。

title: End-to-End Identifiable and Consistent Recurrent Switching Dynamical Systems
summary: Learning identifiable representations in deep generative models remains a fundamental challenge, particularly for sequential data with regime-switching dynamics. Existing approaches establish identifiability under restrictive assumptions, such as stationarity or limited emission models, and typically rely on variational autoencoder (VAE) estimators, which introduce approximation gaps that limit the recovery of the latent structure. In this work, we address both the theoretical and practical limitations of this setting.
